C: 苍穹战线格拉默
E: Firmament Frontline: Glamoth

C:
铁骑的足迹遍布格拉默「帝国」的每个角落，宛若炽热的流星，却走不出泰坦尼娅编织的「梦」中。

共和国的人们担忧着为战而生的兵团，那从未存在过的「帝国」究竟与自己熟知的疆域有几分重合……

女皇赐予她的骑士荣誉与信仰，铁骑为女皇献上忠心与承诺…新人类不断自培养舱出生，被赋予编号与使命；旧人类躲在钢铁壁垒之下，忧心忡忡地享用期盼已久的和平。平静的谎言需要有人揭破，那动摇人类本质的战争手段不应存在于世，当天灾褪去，心怀恐惧的人们便要彻底摧毁扭曲的战争产物——

铁骑的护胫踏破天空，只要他们愿意，便可抵达任何一颗星星。

然而「帝国」已无处可寻，铁骑面前只存在一条既定的轨迹，一头连着死亡，一头连着自己。
E:
The Iron Cavalry's tracks spread across every corner of Glamoth's "Empire" like blazing meteors, yet they cannot escape the "dream" woven by Titania.

The people of the Republic worry about the legion born for war, questioning how much overlap there truly is between the "Empire" that never existed and the territories that the ordinary people are familiar with...

The Empress bestows honor and faith upon her knights, and the Iron Cavalry offers loyalty and commitment to the Empress... New humans are continuously birthed from incubators and given numbers and missions, while old humans hide beneath steel barriers, anxiously enjoying the long-awaited peace they yearned for. The deception of peace needs to be exposed by someone, and that particular method of war that shook the very foundation of humanity should not exist in the world. When the catastrophe fades, people with fear in their hearts then want to destroy the distorted products of war completely...

The Iron Cavalry's greaves break through the sky. As long as they are willing, they can reach any star.

However, the "Empire" is nowhere to be found. Before the Iron Cavalry lies only a predetermined path — one end leading to death, the other to themselves.

C: 【序号】 EVD-X031JA12-004 【名称】极地科考女式雪地靴 【基本特征】有明显破损和修补痕迹，鞋底藏有磁盘一枚，初步排除间谍活动可能 【取证地点】克莱恩家中地下室 【当事人信息】克莱恩（死亡），合金材料学领域首席科学家，天才俱乐部#9成员 【现场分析】 根据现场情况来看，科学家拉姆的大量遗物出现在克莱恩家中，该短靴也是其中之一。 【证言补充】 「也许我错怪他了，我是说克莱恩，而我的妻子拉姆…她离开很久了，我只觉得…陌生。」 柏环对妻子遗物出现在克莱恩家中一事并不知情，从神态上推断他似乎并不意外。 【备注信息】 克莱恩的宅邸较为偏僻，法医推断的死亡时间前后无人前往。初步判断为意外死亡。 柏环、拉姆、克莱恩三人关系特殊，他们所遭受的「巧合」已经接近「灵异」范畴。 【相关音频】 「唉，柏环我知道你在怀疑我，我也知道我无法向你证明我的清白。关于拉姆的事，我很抱歉，我问心有愧但我绝不会去伤害她…关于凶手的事，我已经有些了眉目，你听说过『寂静领主』吗？*无意义的噪音*」该音频记录来自短靴中的磁盘。
E: [ID] EVD-X031JA12-004 [Name] Women's snow boots for polar expeditions [Key Feature] Displays evident signs of wear and repair, with a hidden disk in the sole. Possibilities of espionage have been preliminarily ruled out [Location] Basement of Klein's House [Individual Involved] Klein (deceased), the best scientist in alloy material science and member No. #9 of the Genius Society. [Site Analysis] A huge number of items belonging to the late scientist Lambda were found in Klein's home, including the these boots. [Supplementary Testimony] "Maybe I was wrong about him... I mean, Klein. As for my late wife, Lambda... She's been away from me for a long while, and I just feel... unfamiliar about her." Bohdan was unaware of his wife's belongings in Klein's home but displayed no visible surprise upon discovery. [Additional Information] Klein's residence is located in a remote area with no visitors around the time of death as determined by the coroner. The preliminary diagnosis is accidental death. Bohdan, Lambda, and Klein shared a unique relationship and the series of "coincidences" they experienced border on supernatural phenomena. [Recording] "*Sigh* I know you doubt me, Bohdan, and I know I can't prove my innocence to you. I'm very sorry for what happened to Lambda. I feel guilty, but I'm the last one who would ever deliberately harm her... In fact, I have some leads about the murderer's identity. Have you ever heard of the Lord of Silence?... *noise*" Sourced from the disk hidden in the boots.

C:
灾难来临前，筑城者曾对雅利洛-Ⅵ有过美好畅想。

筑城者效仿克里珀伟力，铸造出能够改造行星的机械。数百座「造物引擎」吐息烈焰，轰然行于大地，犹如不倦的巨人园丁修葺荒芜的花田。短短几十年，沟壑与丘陵被整为平原与森林，城市星罗棋布耸立于海岸之畔。

「毁灭」的预兆降临后，筑城者将机械悉数投入战场，构筑起最初的「铁卫防线」。

毁灭的兵卒们如同蹈火的飞萤，紧随星核而至，在地表划下生灵涂炭的轨迹。曾用于「造物」的机械也不得不沦为凶器，在不属于它们的战场上抡动铁拳；最终，耕耘花园的巨人力尽倒下，仿佛一座座文明的墓碑，标记了阵线逐日溃退的历程。

退无可退的那一日，铁卫们握紧武器，身后是仅存的家园。

寒潮的到来出乎所有的人的意料。天外的怪物与前线的士兵锋刃交错的瞬间，雪线漫涌天际。一片混沌中，贝洛伯格成了世间唯一的灯火。为了扑灭它，为了守护它，双方陷入了漫无止境的厮杀。铁卫们咆哮着阿丽萨•兰德的名字，返身进入风雪深处，再也没有回来。

直到暴雪止歇，贝洛伯格的居民战战兢兢地攀上城头远眺。

他们见证了最后的「铁卫防线」。
E:
The Architects had great hopes for Jarilo-VI before the calamity.

Mimicking Qlipoth's power, the Architects created machinery that could terraform planets. Hundreds of fire-breathing Engines of Creation roared across the land, like giant gardeners cultivating abandoned flower beds. Mere decades later, valleys and hills were remade into plains and forests, and cities were thickly dotted along the coast.

After the arrival of Destruction's omen, the Architects sent all their machines into war, making them the first guards of the "Iron Defense."

Following the arrival of the Stellaron, soldiers of destruction landed like moths to flame, leaving tracks of desolation on the planet's surface. The machines once used for creation were now forced to become weapons of war, throwing their iron fists on battlefields where they didn't belong. Eventually, the giant gardeners fell to the ground in exhaustion like tombstones of a civilization, marking the gradual collapse of the defense line.

On the day when there was no more room for retreat, Silvermane Guards held tightly onto their weapons, for their homeland was mere steps behind.

The arrival of the Eternal Freeze came as a surprise to everyone. The monsters from beyond the sky and the soldiers on the front lines were trading lethal blows when snow and ice filled up the whole battlefield. In utter chaos, Belobog became the only light in the whole world. The two sides fell into endless slaughter to either sniff out or protect this light. Roaring the name of Alisa Rand, the Guards re-entered into the snow storms and never returned.

The residents of Belobog only dared to climb up the city walls to look out when the blizzard halted.

And they beheld the final guards of the "Iron Defense."

C: 倘若能实现全人类的模因化，可以预料的，战争、疾病和大多数的社会矛盾都会因此被永久性消灭。但那时，我们究竟是「智识」的行者，还是「记忆」的使徒？ 是否存在一种完美的载体，作为智慧的存在形式？作为机械帝皇的无机仿生神经元集群，「权杖」理应具备承载智慧的特质。完美进化学派的学士一度怀疑，正是以「权杖」作为扩展思维的大脑延伸，#鲁珀特二世才能以血肉之躯企及摧毁半个宇宙的算能。虽然公司对无机生命的研究项目多有限制，但仍未能阻止学者们将研发重心逐渐从肉体转移向金属。 正如托克尔克学士所言，在小小的蛋白球和有限的寿命外，我们终将创造更具超越性的智慧。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: If all of humanity could be memetized, it is foreseeable that war, sickness, and many of society's conflicts will be permanently quelled. But if that time comes, will we be pathstriders of Erudition, or emissaries of Remembrance? Is there a perfect medium for wisdom to exist? As the inorganic bionic neuron clusters of the Mechanical Emperor, the Scepters should possess the property of bearing intelligence. The School of Evolutionary Perfection scholars once suspected that #Rubert II used the Scepters as a cerebral extension of thought expansion to generate enough computational power to destroy half the universe with his mortal body. Though the IPC has imposed many restrictions on inorganic lifeform research projects, that has not prevented scholars' academic efforts from being slowly diverted from flesh to metal. It is as Scholar Torkirk declared: Beyond minuscule protein balls and limited lifespans, we will eventually create intelligence that transcends all. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: 有虚构史学家戏言，#鲁珀特二世平等地看待每条生命，他平等地认为，除自己以外的所有存在都不具备自我意志，连星神也包含其间。虽然略显荒诞，但这一流言却创造性地解释了，为何「权杖」没能获得自我思考能力。 在星际能源战争中，星际和平公司投入的大量资金，极大促进了博识学会在掘进、储能、探测等多项领域的突破性发展。开发一种优质、高产的新型能源，为这一目标，各学派的「权杖」配额，都当首先满足星际能源学派的研究需求。即便如此，仍有不止一篇史料表明，在学会的指示下，星际能源学派曾主动拖延了「权杖」的演算进程…… 纵观后世史料，无数的意外让这场战争以最恶劣的形式延长，让我不由怀疑，冥冥之中是否有股力量，在操弄我们前进的步伐？ ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: Some History Fictionologists jest that #Rubert II measured each life equally. He equally believed that, apart from himself, all existence did not possess free will, even Aeons. Though somewhat absurd, this rumor creatively explains why the Scepters did not gain sentience. During the Interstellar Energy War, the IPC invested massive funds to supercharge the progress of the Intelligentsia Guild's breakthrough developments in multiple fields, including drilling, energy storage, and detection. In order to achieve the goal of developing a new energy source superb in both quality and yield, the Scepter quotas of the various schools prioritized the research requirements of the School of Interstellar Energy Resources. Even so, there are multiple historical records stating that under the Intelligentsia Guild's directives, the School of Interstellar Energy Resources once deliberately delayed the extrapolation progress of the Scepters... By perusing later historical records, countless incidents caused the protraction of this war in the worst possible manner. I can't help but wonder if there is some unseen force in the darkness that is manipulating our path forward? — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: 权杖攻击时生成【界区：惯性】：权杖和我方目标在攻击处于弱点击破状态的敌方目标后，将本次攻击<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的削韧值转化为<u>超击破伤害</u>，敌方目标受到的<u>超击破伤害</u>提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>轮。
E: When the Scepter attacks, generates "Boundary: Inertia": When the Scepter or ally targets attack Weakness Broken enemy targets, converts <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Toughness Reduction dealt by this attack to <u>Super Break DMG</u> and increases the <u>Super Break DMG</u> the enemy target takes by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Cycle(s).

C: 嵌合在权杖时，战斗中每有<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个敌方目标被消灭后，使该权杖算能提升，最高升至3星。同时自身替换为随机决策组件。

E: When the same character acts consecutively, their ATK increases.

E: When Breaking enemy target Weakness, additionally trigger the Weakness Break effect of all other Weakness Types on the target.

C: 敌方目标陷入冻结状态后，受到的终结技伤害提高，冻结状态解除后仍会持续一定回合。
E: When an enemy target becomes Frozen, increases the Ultimate DMG they receive. This effect will endure for a number of turns even after they are no longer Frozen.

C: 【<u>耀变</u>】充能效率提高。【<u>蝶魄</u>】状态下施放普攻/战技发动攻击后，会对目标造成【<u>耀变</u>】伤害。
E: Increases the Charging Efficiency of "<u>Blazar</u>." After attacking via using Basic ATK/Skill while in the "<u>Butterfly Soul</u>" state, deals "<u>Blazar</u>" DMG to the target.

C: 【<u>执念</u>】层数越多，敌方目标受到的追加攻击伤害与附加伤害越高，该效果在受到召唤物攻击后会额外提高。
E: The more stacks of "<u>Obsession</u>," the more Follow-Up ATK and Additional DMG enemy targets take. This effect further increases after enemy targets are attacked by summons.

C: 被美蒂罗人圈养在天空中的大气浮游生物，经过长期选育，味道已经和牲畜肉类相差无几。因其极高的烹饪难度成为了高档餐厅桌上常见的食材。据星空生态学派考察，这些生物与穹桑的刺胞动物在基因上具有显著的相似性，更有激进观点称其与造翼者同源共祖，但受到了星际美食协会的集体抵制。
E: An atmospheric floating organism herded in the air by the Merito people. After prolonged selective breeding, the taste of their meat is now indistinguishable from normal farmed species. The intense difficulty involved in cooking their meat meant they became an ingredient that frequently appeared in high-end culinary establishments. Based on observations by the Astral Ecology School, these creatures have significant genetic similarities with the Cnidaria organisms in Muldrasil. There are even radicals who claim that these animals share a common ancestor with the wingweavers, but this idea faced universal rebuttal from the Interastral Culinary Association.

C: 很少有人用这把烛剪处理蜡烛，却往往把它用在更残酷、更黑暗、更痛苦的地方。剪刀剪断的不是物质，而是生物心中的热量——被称为热情的动力。假如空无烛剪划过你的心脏，你将感受到的不是痛楚，而是冷漠。
E: Few would use this candle wick trimmer on real candles. This is usually reserved for purposes more cruel, dark, and painful. This trimmer does not cut anything material. It cuts the heat within a living organism's heart — the motivation named "passion." If the Void Wick Trimmer trims at your heart, you will feel no pain, only apathy.

C: 远洋航行是艰苦的工作，面对喜怒无常的法吉娜，你永远不知道今天还风平浪静的海面，明天会不会掀起滔天巨浪。不过若是你拥有一失金爪锚，那么再大的风浪都无法撼动你的舰船。爪子来自「猎冕金爪」，这巨鹰每隔一百年便会重生，火焰燃烧殆尽后会在原地留下一对金爪。任何东西一旦被金爪抓住，除非催动咒语，否则就不会松开，所以十分适合代替船锚。
E: Oceanic voyages are gruelling work. When facing the fickle Phagousa, you can never predict whether today's calm waters will give way to tomorrow's towering waves. However, if you possess a Lost Golden Claw Anchor, no storm can shake your ship, no matter how fierce they are. The claws come from the Fowl-Hunting Golden Claw, a great eagle reborn once every hundred years. When its flames burn out, it leaves behind a pair of golden talons. Anything caught in their grasp will never be released unless the proper incantation is uttered, making them the perfect substitute for a ship's anchor.

C: 万象无常骰曾在宇宙中极为常见，造成无数微小但邪恶的混乱。它的使用方法是这样的：手掌紧紧握住骰子，默念任意一句有意义的话，想着你最想吃的食物同时将骰子掷出。某一面向上时你会得到意外之财，某一面向上时你会收获美好的爱情，但更多面的结局是疾病、霉运、诅咒和终生相伴的梅雨。尽管如此，仍有许多人热衷于投掷万象无常骰，并快乐地宣称这不过是假面愚者的一个玩笑。\n（该奇物已发生数据膨胀）
E: Entropic Dice are common in the universe and cause countless tiny but malevolent disturbances. To use it, you grab the die tightly and think of any meaningful sentence in your head, then as you throw the die, think about the food you want to eat the most. You will receive unexpected wealth if the die lands on a certain number and wonderful love on another number, but the ends you will meet for other numbers include illness, bad luck, curses, and lifelong rain. Despite this, many people still love to play with these dice, and happily declare that these items are just a joke made by the Masked Fools.\n(This Curio already underwent data expansion)

C:
你定不曾见过，克吕达玛斯的子嗣如何为他复仇，
受天父庇佑的勇士，归乡后却被兄弟扼死。
夜莺最早听到塞纳托斯的呼吸，
十角奇兽嗅出凶手，大地兽为养育者哀悼。
它们回忆少年在山峦上，手托雄鹰的姿态，
在原野上唤来狮群，托载英雄们前行。
锋狼的舌尖还残留着血的味道，
在他们一同落入陷阱时，由他所给予。
你定听闻，某位从不杀死猎物的猎人，
他的弓箭只会射向为害世间的仇敌。
少年豢养的兽群，仍远远守卫着故乡，
在森林下，埋葬尽不义之徒的尸体。
E:
You surely have never witnessed how the offspring of Clydamas avenged him.
The warrior, blessed by the sky father, was strangled by their brother upon returning home.
The nightingale heard the breath of Thanatos first,
The ten-horned beast sniffed out the murderer, and the dromas mourned its nurturer.
They recall the youth once standing on a mountain, raising an eagle to the sky,
Summoning a pride of lions on a plain, and carrying forward the heroes.
The taste of blood lingered on the tip of the direwolf's tongue,
Given by him as they fell into the trap together.
Surely you have heard of the hunter who never killed his prey.
His arrows flew only toward enemies that harmed the world.
The beasts raised by the youth still guard the homeland from afar.
Beneath the forest lie the corpses of the unrighteous.

C: 他在走廊停下脚步，望向窗外，宇宙寂静，映着他的黑眼圈。 窗上出现另一双布满血丝的眼睛，眼睛的主人比平时在科员前更放松些，漫不经心地打了个长长的哈欠。 「这么晚了，还不休息？」 「有点不放心，出来巡逻一趟……」 「我刚替防护罩更新了代码，安保系统也运转正常。」 「可能是我多虑了，但……」 「我知道。你是防卫科的负责人，我相信你的直觉。」 空间站依旧灯火通明，不分昼夜轮转，他们回到各自的岗位。 他们都明白，黑塔女士的光芒笼罩也好，空间站的防御措施也好，防卫科的日夜不眠也好，如果危机发生……  也只在刹那。
E: He stops pacing in the corridor and gazes out of the window into the tranquility of deep space, the dark circles around his eyes reflecting back at him. Another pair of bloodshot eyes appears at the window. Their owner looks more relaxed than she usually does before the researchers, and absentmindedly lets out a huge yawn. "You're up late. Not going to bed?" "I'm feeling anxious, so I'm just out for a patrol..." "I just updated the firmware for the defense shield, and security systems are all operating smoothly." "Maybe I'm overthinking things, but..." "I understand. You're the head of security, and I trust your instincts." The space station remains brightly lit and operates without a stop. They each return to their respective posts. They both know that regardless of the protection of Madam Herta's fame, the defensive measures around the space station, and the round-the-clock vigilance of the Security Department — if a disaster were to occur... It would only take seconds.

C: 在那颗遥远的行星上，有一种被称为「圣杯」的神秘资源。时至今日，那里的人们依旧用这个词去比喻那些最了不起的成就，歌颂那些最神圣的理想。也因此，在掌握神秘的人眼中，圣杯是一台能够实现任何愿望的万能许愿机，轻易将难以企及的梦想化作现实。 「是的，听上去很像某种诈骗。但它是真的…人们甚至会利用这种规则进行欺诈。 「身为从者，我明明因圣杯才得以驻留于世，但在参加的圣杯战争中，我却不止一次破坏了它。用你们的话来说，这算是成为了某种保留节目？ 「…最初要下这个决心可并不容易。毕竟是万能许愿机嘛，谁没点私心想要去实现几个愿望呢？」 少女成为英灵后的苦恼，或许以游戏玩家的视角更好理解。当同袍反目、故国毁灭、圆桌行至终点，作为当事人的骑士王，自然最能看清其中的种种不堪。「如果能有一个比我更强的玩家来攻略这一切，结果会不会有所不同？」 怀疑的想法一旦产生，便很难从内心根除。 「请让更合适的人在那时成为不列颠的王」——这或许是一个连圣杯听了也会不知道该怎么实现的愿望。 「所以，你想问我现在怎么看这个问题？ 「我并非理想的王。但这并不妨碍有人把我视作心中『理想的王』，并因此做到了我做不到的事情。 「我很感激有位朋友让我看清了这一点。 「他说，冒牌货也有冒牌货的价值。」
E: On a distant planet, there exists a mysterious resource known as the Holy Grail. To this day, its name is used to symbolize the greatest of triumphs, the loftiest of ideals. To those versed in the arcane, the Holy Grail is nothing less than an omnipotent wish-granting chalice, one that can effortlessly turn the impossible into reality. "Yeah, I know, it sounds like a con. But it's real. People have even twisted its rules to deceive others." "As a Servant, the Holy Grail is the reason I can remain in this world. Yet in the Holy Grail War I've fought in, I've shattered it more than once. You'd probably call that a bit of a running tradition?" "...Making that initial resolve isn't easy. It is an omnipotent wish-granting chalice, after all. Who doesn't have a few selfish dreams they'd like to see come true?" The girl's struggles as a Heroic Spirit might be best understood through the eyes of a player. When comrades turn against one another, when the homeland falls, when the round table reaches its end. Who better to see its ruin than the King of Knights herself? "If a player stronger than me had taken the reins, would the ending have been different?" Once that doubt takes hold, it rarely lets go. "Let someone more worthy be Britain's king in my place" — a wish even the Holy Grail might struggle to fulfill. "So, you're asking how I see it now? "I'm not the perfect king. But that doesn't stop others from seeing me as their 'ideal king' — and doing what I never could. "I'm grateful to a friend who helped me realize that." "He said even a counterfeit has its own worth."

C: 在真正成为王之前，少女有一段在家乡四处游历的时光。那时，整个世界仿佛刚刚诞生，不知名的花朵盛开在山谷，不知名的溪流反射着初春的早阳。有太多事物对少女来说没有名字，只能用手指指点点，不停地向某位知识渊博的同伴提出问题。 喂马、劈柴、尽情奔跑…少女熟悉的生活即将告一段落，可她毫不计较，每天入睡时都畅想着新的冒险。 「真正的王并不如此。 「王不可擅离城堡。那城堡并非由砖石所造，它的原材料是民众的信心。 「王不可期待冒险。每项决策都应该是深思熟虑的结果，并尽量排除个人喜好的影响。 「王不可拥有生活。王是国家的象征，无论在何种场合与人交流，都应该拥有指引前路的力量。」 或许对很多人来说，这都是一份无法承受的重担。但发掘少女的那位魔术师眼光很好——她不仅轻松地适应了这一切，甚至用男性的身份示人也不会露出任何破绽（当然，需要借助一点小小的法术）。 「有趣的是，王的烦恼并不来自这些约束。 「恰恰相反——她最头痛的，是自己失去了所有的约束。 「啊…这样说大概很难理解，不如用大家都熟悉的场景来打比方吧。」 在银河的边陲有一颗行星，那里气候恶劣，无穷的敌人威胁着人类脆弱的家园。为此人们推举出了一位「王」，把她每天的日程都排得满满当当——这样一来，从上到下，整个星球团结成了有机的整体，一切保护家园的行动都得以井井有条地展开。 但很久之后，突然有一天，王发现自己的日程出现了明显的空缺。她不觉得自己有休息的余闲，但身边的人们提供了各种各样的回答；但王敏锐地发现，这些回答的本质，都指向了同一个事实…「我们不知道还能做些什么，才能让明天比今天更好。」 「表面上看，这时的王可以想做什么就做什么。 「但只要稍动脑筋，她又会发现，自己可能做什么都是错的。 「这是一个可怕的恶性循环——想的越多，理解你的人就会越少。」 在自己的有生之年，王无法跳出这个诅咒。{RUBY_B#兰斯洛特}她最信任的骑士{RUBY_E#}与自己分道扬镳，{RUBY_B#莫德雷德}她最器重的养子{RUBY_E#}与自己刀剑相向。 她的王国在她手中崛起，亦在她手中败亡。 「如果有个更合适的人能成为王就好了。」弥留之际，她一度这样评判自己。 ——不过，大可放心。现在的少女，早就不从这个角度看待问题了。 「从结果来说，一切的改变，都因为我参加了某次圣杯战争。 「不过，千万不要误会，圣杯战争只是这样的一个契机—— 「——它喊住了埋头奔跑的你，让你有机会重新发现身边的风景。 「我仍然是王。只是换了一种履行义务的方式。 「就像那些春天的花朵…当你注意到它们的时候，往往正目睹着它们的凋谢。不过幸运的是，尽管花朵终会化作泥土，但开出花朵的树枝依旧在那儿。 「含苞的树枝，永远会等待着{RUBY_B#理想乡的实现}下一个春天{RUBY_E#}。」
E: Before she ever became a king, the girl once wandered her homeland freely. Back then, the world felt newly born. Unknown flowers bloomed in quiet valleys, nameless streams shimmered beneath the early spring sun. To her, many things had no names. She could only point and ask questions, again and again, to a certain knowledgeable companion. Feeding the horses, chopping firewood, running until breathless... Her familiar life was about to draw to a close. But she didn't mind. Each night, she drifted off to sleep, dreaming of the adventures yet to come. "A true king doesn't live that way. "A king must never stray from the castle, and that castle isn't made of stone or brick. Its foundation is the people's trust. "A king must not long for adventure. Every choice must come from deliberation, free from the pull of personal desire as much as possible. "A king must not pursue a life of their own. A king stands as the nation's symbol, and in every word they speak, no matter to whom, they must carry the strength to lead." To most, such a role would be an unbearable weight. But the mage who discovered the girl had a discerning eye — she took on the role with ease. Even presenting herself as a man raised no suspicion. Though, of course, a touch of magecraft helped with that. "The funny thing is, her troubles didn't come from being bound by these rules. "It is quite the opposite — what she struggles with most is the loss of all her restraint. "Ah... I know, that's probably hard to grasp. Maybe it's better to explain with a more familiar example." At the edge of the cosmos lies a planet ravaged by harsh weather, where endless threats loom over humanity's fragile home. To protect it, the people appointed a "king," and scheduled her every hour from dawn to dusk. And in doing so, the planet became one, united and ordered. Their efforts to defend their world fell into place with perfect precision. Years had passed when the king discovered blatant gaps appearing in her schedule. Though she felt rest was a luxury she couldn't afford, everyone around her offered various explanations. With her sharp intuition, she pierced through their words to the underlying truth: "We no longer know what more we can do to make tomorrow better than today." "To outside observers, the king seemed finally free to pursue her desires. "Yet the moment she considered her options, she realized that perhaps every choice she could now make was somehow wrong. "This is a terrifying negative spiral — the more thoughts you have, the fewer who truly understand your burden." This curse followed the king to her grave. {RUBY_B#Lancelot}Her most trusted knight{RUBY_E#} parted ways with her, while {RUBY_B#Mordred}her most promising adopted child{RUBY_E#} drew steel against her. The kingdom she raised to greatness ultimately met its downfall through her own hands. "If only someone more worthy had taken the throne." Such was her self-judgment in her dying breath. But rest assured. The girl she is now no longer scrutinizes herself through such harsh eyes. "If we consider the outcome, then everything transformed when I participated in that fateful Holy Grail War. "But please understand — the Holy Grail War was just an opportunity — "It stopped you in your headlong rush, allowing you to finally see the beauty that had always surrounded you. "I am still the king, and this is just another method of fulfilling my duty. "Like the flowers of spring... by the time you notice their beauty, you're usually only on time to witness them withering. Yet thankfully, though flowers eventually fade to soil, the branches that produced the bloom endure. "These branches, full of promise, will forever await {RUBY_B#utopia's arrival}the next spring{RUBY_E#}."

C: 绝望轮番上演于过去与未来之间，无数理想曾在红色衣衫之间燃尽。但，请别被这一抹灰烬欺骗——\n若是有人假借理想之名营造虚幻的美梦，他必将再度燃烧，与世间的伪善战斗到底。\n无论身在何处，他始终是正义的伙伴。
E: Despair plays in cycles between the past and future. Countless ideals were incinerated before that red garment. Yet, do not let this smear of ashes fool you —\nShould someone create a phantasmal sweet dream under the guise of false ideals, then he will burn again, facing down the hypocrites of the world till the very end.\nNo matter where he is, he always remains the steadfast hero of justice.

C: 对年幼的格妮薇儿来说，她的整个世界就是护国公府邸和大宅前繁荣的街市。 老师们说，她的家族历史悠久、声名显赫，这幢府邸也足有几个琥珀纪的历史。但岁月似乎未曾在上面留下分毫的痕迹，它仿佛独立于时间的法则，将这家人庇护在永恒的平静与美好之中。 父亲要求长兄、二哥和长姐接受政治教育，他希望能将这颗星球的未来交给他们中的某一位。至于格妮薇儿和其他弟弟妹妹…父亲只希望他们能在这个安宁的乐园中，度过平静幸福的一生。 格妮薇儿爱父亲。在面对政敌时，他像刺尾蟒一样可怕；但面对女儿时，他又像极了一只庞大又温暖的山岳绒兔。 在她的记忆中，父亲愿意为她做任何事，甚至肯在她盛大的生日会上，扮演被女英雄格妮薇儿斩杀的地灵。要知道，这种权臣家孩子的生日会，可是会有政敌到场的——为了让她开心，父亲根本不在乎落人口实。 后来，格妮薇儿长大了一些。她开始听到一些风言风语——父亲架空王权、谋害忠良、贪得无厌…她愿意相信这些都是政敌的谎言，但她知道这些并不都是谎言。 但很快，这些就都不再重要了。 反物质军团大举入侵，父亲率军守护王都，寸土不让。死讯传来时，格妮薇儿晕倒了。再次醒来时，她已被塞进了一艘飞艇。弟弟妹妹们在身边抽泣，长兄和长姐被绳子捆得严严实实，二哥无奈地说：「先别给他们俩松绑啊，他们不肯逃的。」 格妮薇儿望向舷窗外，母亲身披戎装，背对着逐渐升空的飞艇，指挥着不愿坐以待毙的家丁。在稍远一些的地方，虚卒们正在拆毁护国公府邸。在更远一些的地方，整条街都在燃烧，焦黑的尸体像泥土似地散落各处。 对年幼的格妮薇儿来说，她的整个世界被人从银河中抹除了。 …… 我本来自那域外的朝廷卡美洛，有着兄弟姐妹一十二个。 日子本是平安又喜乐，怎料得那烬灭祸祖造作了兵祸。 父母亲操起干戈抗敌报国，也无奈军团势如破竹我家亡国破。 长兄带着弟妹几个东漂西泊，流落到公司的矿星上傍人篱落。 争抢些残羹冷炙草间求活，也免不得风急天高牛衣病卧。 长兄本是个苦劳人，色厉胆薄，终被人逼成了草寇，银海翻波。 他只劫商旅从不打家劫舍，人都说他是草莽的英雄济贫扶弱。 他带着那数百个穷鬼成群结伙，占山为王将我们弟妹养活。 ……
E: As a child, Guinevere's entire world was the Lord Protector's mansion and the bustling streets before its doors. Her teachers said that her family has a long and distinguished history, and even this mansion has stood for a few Amber Eras. However, time did not seem to leave any traces on its stones. As if it stood apart from the rules of time and space, it forever protected this family in eternal peace and joy. Her father trained Guinevere's eldest brother, second-eldest brother, and eldest sister in politics. He wished to hand the future of this planet to one of the three. As for Guinevere and her younger siblings... He only wished they would have a quiet and happy life in this tranquil paradise. Guinevere loved her father. He was as terrifying as a ridge-tailed python when facing his political enemies. Yet in her presence, he softened and became warm and cozy, like a big fuzzy mountain hare. She remembered that her father would do anything for her. He would even willingly play the role of an earth spirit to be struck down by Guinevere, the heroine, at her birthday party. The birthday parties of upper-class children would often have the family's enemies turn up as well — However, her father didn't care at all about being a laughingstock for all the attendees. He was happy as long as she could be happy. Then, Guinevere grew up a bit. She started to hear rumors — How her father made the king a puppet, persecuted the honest courtiers, and gluttonously gained riches... She was willing to believe that all these were lies spread by his enemies. However, she knew not all of them were lies. Soon, however, these concerns ceased to matter. Everything changed when the Antimatter Legion attacked. Her father led the army to protect the royal capital, refusing to back down. Guinevere fainted when she heard the news of his death. She was already sitting inside a space shuttle when she woke up again. Her younger siblings were sobbing next to her, while her eldest brother and eldest sister were bound tightly in ropes. Her second-eldest brother said to her in a despondent tone, "Don't untie them just yet. They are still trying to go back." Guinevere looked outside the window. Her mother was dressed in armor and had her back turned to the space shuttle slowly lifting off, taking command of servants who were still willing to fight. Further away, the Voidrangers were tearing apart the Lord Protector's mansion. Even further, entire streets were on fire, with charred corpses scattered everywhere like heaps of soil. For little Guinevere, it was like her entire world had been erased from the cosmos. ... My home world, Court Camelot. My siblings, a dozen lot. Our days, peace and joy to boot. Until Ruin Author led woes afoot. Nation breached, arms they took. Legion marched, defiant we stood. We siblings escaped without a root, into an IPC mine all covered in soot. Meager scraps are what we fetch, homeless and foodless at a stretch. Eldest brother, timid once was. Back-breaking work, to piracy he was forced. Mercantile he waylaid, genteel he relayed. Hero among bandits, loots for people's benefits. Hundreds of poor he led, us siblings he fed. ...

C: 「报告将军，药王秘传残党已尽数擒获一百一十七名，待交由十王司镇入牢狱。 「但那个少年，应该是被药物折磨的，您看……」 他躲在阴影处，被唤作将军的女子朝他走了过来，显然是早已发现。 「到时，我们应彼此承继意志。」 脑中想起的声音毫无感情，但日复一日的聆听却令他在此刻举起匕首。 可不过一眨眼，手中的匕首已落了地。 「想杀我？」 「你杀了我的家人。」 他注意到那狐耳女人的眼神似乎有一瞬的怔忡。 「你把他们当家人？」 「他们救了我，所以我活着。」 她松开手，摇了摇头。 「看来你什么都不知道…罢了，之后会有人来安排你的生活与住处，你跟着他们走就好。」 她转过身离开，但少年并未起身，只是紧盯着她的背影。他知道，这也许是最后的机会。 他拾起地上的匕首，自那背影后侧跃起，挥刺向前。 「这招不错！」她赞扬道。 这一次匕首并未掉落，而是到了女子的手中。但他仍未放弃，左突右闪不成，竟发了狠要咬女子的手。 「咬人可不行…哎，没事，你们别过来…这孩子怎么跟我以前在步离军营那会儿一样的。」 女子也不出手，只是躲着。少年气喘吁吁，却仍伺机寻找她的破绽。 他们就那么僵持着。 「这样吧，不如你跟我一起回去。」 女子拿出一枚巡镝，递给他。 「我答应你。只要你跟我走，往后你便可以向我发起挑战，直到你复仇成功。」 「什么意思？」 「只要你跟我走，你就可以随时来杀我。」 不光是少年，连周围的青丘军也怔住了。 「当然，在杀了我之前，你得听我的。按时吃饭、读书、练武…对了，还得每天洗澡。」 少年艰难地咽了口口水。 「杀了你之后呢？」 女子怔了一怔，哈哈大笑起来。 「那自然是你想做什么，就做什么。」
E: "General, report! One hundred and seventeen of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been captured and will be handed over to the Ten-Lords Commission for imprisonment." "However, this young man has likely suffered torture with their medicines. Look..." As he hides himself in the shadows, the woman being referred to as the "General" walks towards him. She had clearly already noticed his presence. "When that time comes, we must carry on each other's wills." The voice that resounds in his mind is devoid of emotion, yet day after day of being exposed to it causes him to raise his dagger at once. However, in the blink of an eye, the dagger comes crashing to the ground. "You wish to kill me?" "You killed my family." He notices a momentary unease in the eyes of the fox-eared woman. "You count them as family?" "They saved me. They are the only reason I am alive." She lets go of the boy and shakes her head. "I see you know nothing... Never mind. Someone will come to plan a home and life for you. Just follow them and you will be fine." As she turns to leave, the boy stays crouched on the floor, simply staring at her back. He knows that this may be his final chance. He picks up the dagger from the ground, jumps high into the air from behind her, and lunges forward. "A fine attack!" She praises him. This time, the dagger does not fall to the ground, as it ends in the woman's hands. However, he does not give up. He dodges left and right, and even gnaws at the woman's hand when that failed. "It's not polite to bite people, you know... Ah, don't worry about me. Stand down... This child reminds me of how I was in the borisin war camp." The woman does not fight back. She simply dodges his assaults. The young man is panting and out of breath, yet still desperately seeking a break in her defenses. They stand in a stalemate. "How about this? You can come back with me." The woman pulls out a strale and hands it to the young man. "I'll make a deal with you. Come with me, and you can challenge me whenever you please until the day that your vengeance is successful." "What do you mean?" "If you come with me, you can kill me any time you like." Even the surrounding Verdant Knights were stupefied by her words. "Of course, until the day you kill me, you must do as I tell you. You will eat three square meals every day, study, learn martial arts... Oh, and you will shower daily." The young man swallows a heavy gulp. "What about after I kill you?" The woman was caught off-guard for a moment before erupting into loud laughter. "Then, naturally, you will be free to do whatever you please."

C: 【档案编号】███████ 【奇物名称】「天才的童年万华镜」 【注意事项】千万别偷看！千万别偷看！！千万别偷看！！！ 真的要看？ 你确定？ 算了，都滑到这了。后果概不负责。 【奇物档案】 天才俱乐部#83黑塔女士的私人密藏品，由忆庭提供技术支持。仅供当事人以第一人称视角重温美妙时光的记忆切片。 警告：危险物品，非当事人请勿私自凝视，否则有极大概率遭受严重的精神攻击。 案例：曾有两位审核人员私自观看。一位胡言乱语不知自己姓甚名谁，另一位胡言乱语只知重复「黑塔女士伟大！」。 【科员留言】 「『不动点是乳白色的蝴蝶结，发散级数像闪着寒光的匕首项链。卷积作褐色头发的波浪，分形是坏心情的影响。无限大与无限小吵得不可开交，给它们套上对角线的裙装再劝架：看呐，在一切集合中，最美的，当属我自己……』——对，就是那个小女孩念叨的，很神奇吧，哈哈哈哈，好神奇呀，我又是谁，我在哪里……」 ——某位审核人员的口述 「摆满洋娃娃的大房间里，飘满了我从没见过的公式与符号，它们长出手脚，扮鬼脸，围着她跳舞。她会打开像城堡一样高的衣橱，为它们挑选衣服，它们有各自的角色，出现在不同的节目中…当她停下计算时，我的精神也在那一刻得到了彻底的洗礼——黑塔女士伟大！黑塔女士伟大！黑塔女士伟大！黑塔女士伟大……」 ——某位审核人员的口述 【备注】 留着这份奇物，不过是方便我重温欣赏儿时的美貌。你们这么想看，出事可怪不得我。姑且还是给你们点建议吧：给这两个倒霉蛋找点博识学会的书念念对冲一下，马上就会好起来的。 大黑塔
E: Profile Number ██████ Curio Name: Genius' Childhood Kaleidoscope Warning: Do not look into it! Do not look into it! Do not look into it!!! Do you really want to see? Are you sure? Nevermind. You've already scrolled this far down. I won't take responsibility for what happens to you. Curio File Genius Society #83, Madam Herta's private collection, with the Garden providing technical support. A memory slice only designed for the person involved to relive a beautiful time in a first-person POV. Warning: Dangerous item. Do not gaze into it if you are not the one in the memory. Otherwise, you have a high chance of suffering an intense psychological assault. Case studies: Two reviewers have privately looked into this. One of them started saying nonsense and no longer knew their own identity, while another could only repeat the words "Glory to Madam Herta!". Researcher Comments "'The fixed point is the cream-white bow of ribbons, the divergent series is like a necklace of daggers shining with a cold light. Convolution is like the wave of brunette hair, and fractals are the influence of bad mood. Infinity and infinitesimal are in a heated argument, so put them in diagonal's dress then pull them apart: Look, the most beautiful thing in all combinations is me...' — That's right. That's what that little girl said. Isn't it amazing? Ahahahaha. So amazing! Who am I? Where am I..." — Statement from a reviewer "The large room full of dolls has equations and symbols I've never seen before floating in it. They grow limbs, pull faces, and dance around her. She will open a wardrobe as tall as a castle and pick clothes for them. They all have their own characters and appear in different programs... When she finished calculating, my spirit instantly received a complete baptism — Glory to Madam Herta! Glory to Madam Herta! Glory to Madam Herta! Glory to Madam Herta..." — Statement of a reviewer Note I saved this Curio so it's easier to review my beauty as a young woman. If you want to see it so much, then it's not my fault. I'll give you some advice: Find some Intelligentsia Guild books to counteract the stuff in their heads for these two unfortunates. They'll recover in no time. The Herta

C:
现在，你的脑海里又回响起了这句话：「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
你还未下决心，又或是你心中已经有了决定，只是你还不确定，这么想的是不是只有自己……
没关系，你还可以把它藏在心中，听听别人的想法……
说不定，你们想的完全一样呢？
E:
These words resurface in your mind once more. "When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret."
You haven't made up your mind yet, or could it be that you have. However, you're just not sure if anyone else shares your point of view...
It's alright. You can hide it deep in your heart and listen to what others think...
Is it possible that you all think the same?

C: 打开第二道大门的权限只掌握在克拉拉手里，而克拉拉此时又回到了铆钉镇搜集材料。\n不久前刚从那里回来的你很清楚：铆钉镇究竟是个怎样凶险的地方。在这里，你已经发现克拉拉的护卫机器人受损严重，并得知克拉拉被独自困在了「淬火工坊」…\n克拉拉现在正处于危险之中——尽快赶到工坊，保护克拉拉！
E: Only Clara, who has returned to Rivet Town to collect materials, has the authorization to open the second gate.\nBeing there not long ago, you are well aware of how vicious of a place Rivet Town is. Here, you already discovered Clara's robot guardian to be heavily damaged and learned that Clara is trapped in the Tempering Workshop all by herself...\nClara is in danger — hurry over to the workshop and protect Clara!

C: 在公共休息区，姬子对于邀请函的异样提出了部分担忧，但她也表示眼下更重要的还是「享受美好假期」。\n现在，终于到了入梦的时候——但在那之前，如果你还想和同伴打个招呼也不成问题。
E: In the public rest area, Himeko expresses concern about the strange appearance of the invitation, but she said that the most important thing right now is to "enjoy a pleasant vacation."\nNow, it is finally time to enter the dream... But you can speak with your companions beforehand if you like.

C: 流萤带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡。你们来到了格拉克斯大道的中心，拜访了坐落在这里的吉祥物雕像「钟表小子」。在此处驻足时，你发现钟表小子的眼睫毛对于一尊雕像来说可能有些过于生动了。\n说真的，任谁都会想把那撮抖动不已的睫毛拽下来的。而在那之前，你也可以拜托流萤给你来一张经典游客照留作纪念。
E: Firefly leads you through some of the famous sightseeing spots in the area. As you arrive in the central Glaux Avenue, you visit a statue of a mascot located here known as "Clockie." As you linger in this place, you notice that the eyelashes on Clockie are a little too lifelike for a statue.\nHonestly, anyone who lays eyes on those trembling lashes would feel the urge to pull on them. Before you do, why not ask Firefly to take a classic tourist-style commemorative picture?

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你似乎回到了熟悉的空间——怎么回事？
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nIt seems you have returned to a familiar place... What is going on?

C: 你们离约定的地点仅有一步之遥，但被一座可疑的电梯拦住了去路。\n黑天鹅说前方「似乎被严重扭曲了」——但里边究竟发生了什么？恐怕只有你进入电梯轿厢才能知道了。
E: You are just a step away from the place you arranged to meet, but a suspicious elevator blocks your path.\nBlack Swan says that the road ahead "seems to have been heavily distorted" — But what could possibly have happened in there? It seems you may have no choice but to enter the elevator to find your answer.

C: 你借一场偷天换日的小魔术取得了礼金，还有自己的基石「砂金石」——尽管下场不是很好看。但你的计划依旧紧锣密鼓地进行，就连迫在眉睫的死亡都无法阻止你的脚步。\n向路人散发礼金，套取你需要的情报吧。
E: Through a sneaky magic trick, you get your hands on the gift money and your cornerstone, the Aventurine. Things get ugly, but your plan is still being executed at a timely pace. Not even the impending death can stop you.\nDistribute the gift money to the pedestrians to exchange for the intel you need.

C: 米沙声称流梦礁是自己的家——如果真是这样，那「白日梦」酒店的待遇可真有够糟糕的。不过，天真可爱的小米沙不以为意，反而看出你们遇到了麻烦，提出带领各位寻找走失的同伴，顺便游览这座冷寂的小镇。不仅如此，你们甚至还有机会见到一位老朋友——知更鸟。\n你们与三月七顺利会师，但在出发寻找姬子之前，你们还得把这位被粉色的流梦礁之鬼吓晕的倒霉蛋交给当地人照看才行，而三月七口中的翠丝阿姨似乎是个不错的人选。
E: Misha claims Dreamflux Reef to be his home... If that is the case, you can only imagine how bad the treatment must have been at The Reverie. Although, the cute and naïve Misha has not taken that to heart. In fact, seeing that you are in trouble, he offers to lead you on a search for your lost companions and give you a tour of the desolate town along the way. Not only that, you may even have a chance to meet with an old friend... Robin.\nYou were able to reunite with March 7th safely. However, before you can go in search of Himeko, you will need to find a local to look after this poor soul that was scared unconscious by the pink spirit of Dreamflux Reef. This Aunt Jessie that March 7th mentioned sounds like a solid candidate.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C:
……

驻足的旅者：「旅者，你们好。我是先于你来到此处的另一名旅者。」
驻足的旅者：「在不久之前，此处还是一个逼仄的囚牢。但如今，我与此处的囚徒们，想要让它变成一个尘世乐园。」

驻足的旅者：「请继续向前走吧，旅者。在旅途的尽头，我有事想请求你们的协助。」
驻足的旅者：「希望你能喜欢这片焦土之上的…『美梦之地』。」

……
E:
...

Halted Traveler: "Greetings, travelers. I am another traveler who arrived here before you."
Halted Traveler: "This place has been a crowded and confined prison till very recently, but now I and the other prisoners want to make it into a paradise."

Halted Traveler: "Please keep walking forward, traveler. I have some things I would like to have your help with at the end of the journey."
Halted Traveler: "I hope you will like this... "Land of Dreams," built atop the scorched barren earth."

...

C: 始终藏在阴影中的翡翠女士终于现身，她将和托帕共赴与家族的会谈。\n家族方的代表是苜蓿草家族的家主奥帝•艾弗法，一位经验丰富、眼光毒辣的皮皮西商人。即便精明如两位「石心十人」的女强人，她们也难以预料这场会谈的走向……
E: Madam Jade, who had been hiding in the shadows this whole time, finally appears. She and Topaz will attend the meeting with The Family.\nThe Family rep is Oti Alfalfa of the Alfalfas, a seasoned, eagle-eyed Pepeshi merchant. Smart as two of the Ten Stonehearts, not even they are able to predict the direction this meeting will take...

C: 平日里静悄悄的列车组小群里突然响起了新消息的提示，虽然应该不是前往新世界的集合通知，但按往常的经验，一定也是一场新旅途的开端。\n姬子口中神秘的消息是什么呢？回车厢找她问个清楚吧！
E: The usually quiet group chat for the Crew suddenly buzzes with the prompt of a new message. While it might not be a call to adventure in a new world, based on your previous experience, it must mark the start of a new journey.\nWhat could be the mysterious "news" Himeko mentioned? Head back to the Express and ask her about it!

C: 又一次回到了白日梦酒店，曾经承载你诸多回忆的入梦港埠。入梦前不必回顾过去的痕迹，因为每次睡眠都会带来一场崭新的美梦…或噩梦。\n该准备入梦了。酒店为你准备了和上次一样的房号，不知道是怕你恋旧，还是懒得打扫其他房间。
E: Once more, you find yourself at The Reverie, the gateway into the Dreamscape that is imbued with many of your memories. There is no need to reflect on your past before diving into the Dreamscape, because each sleep births a brand-new sweet dream... or a nightmare.\nGet ready to dive into the Dreamscape. The hotel has assigned you the same room as last time, whether out of consideration for your nostalgia or sheer laziness to tidy up other rooms.

C: 你终于来到了真正的折纸大学，方才的怪梦可能只是厌学症的表现…但看看这所流光溢彩的华丽校园，看看这群热情洋溢的精英校友，还有什么好怕的呢？让玫瑰色的青春吞噬灰色的你吧！\n去找三月七与丹恒——你未来的好同学打个招呼吧。
E: You finally step into the real Paperfold University. The bizarre dream back then might just be a manifestation of your fear of school... But what is there to fear now that you've seen this glittering and magnificent campus, together with the passionate elite classmates? Let the rosy vitality of youth consume your gray!\nGo say hello to Dan Heng and March 7th, your future classmates.

C: 你终于来到了真正的折纸大学，方才的怪梦可能只是厌学症的表现…但看看这所流光溢彩的华丽校园，看看这群热情洋溢的精英校友，还有什么好怕的呢？让玫瑰色的青春吞噬灰色的你吧！\n按照校园动画片的常见情节，第一个有名有姓的学生往往是重要角色。
E: You finally step into the real Paperfold University. The bizarre dream back then might just be a manifestation of your fear of school... But what is there to fear now that you've seen this glittering and magnificent campus, together with the passionate elite classmates? Let the rosy vitality of youth consume your gray!\nFollowing school anime tropes, the first student who shares their name typically plays a crucial role in the story.

C: 你们刚买来的猴子就这么跑了，果然不能相信大学同学在校园里给你推销的业务。\n快追吧，匹诺康尼的消费者权益保护法可没那么到位。
E: Your recently acquired monkey has run away. As suspected, you can never fully trust university peers who are promoting stuff.\nGive chase. The consumer protection laws in Penacony is not robust enough to protect your rights.

C: 缭乱•忍侠的过往如浮世绘画卷般徐徐展开，在她飒爽的身姿与笑容之暗面，究竟隐藏着何种不为人知的血泪秘事呢…接下来，成为忍徒的你要继续每日的苦行，为了拥有忍者的筋骨、觉知与空手道技艺，绝不可退却畏惧。\nAK-A-3，你从诞生的那一天起，就知道自己是个实验品，对吧？
E: The Dazzling Ninja Hero's past unfurls like a Ukiyo-e scroll. Just what kind of untold sorrow and pain is hiding behind her determined facade and cheerful smile...? As a ninja initiate, you must continue your torturous trial daily to attain the swift movements, acute senses, and impressive karate skills of a true ninja. You absolutely cannot retreat or be afraid.\nAK-A-3, you've known that you're an experimental subject from the moment of your birth, aren't you?

C: 「粉霞天女」风波差点闹出人命。我们以暴露天外来客身份为代价救下了执着的达米亚诺斯，只是，如此一来…便违背了对阿格莱雅的承诺。
E: The "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco almost caused someone their life. We rescued the persistent Damionis at the cost of exposing our identities as guests from beyond the sky. But in doing so... we broke our promise to Aglaea.

C: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
E: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 跟随白厄了解黄金裔的救世苦旅后，我们最终还是决定留在翁法罗斯。经过一番休整，众黄金裔再度集结，准备向尼卡多利所在的悬锋城发起讨伐，夺取「天谴之矛」的火种。
E: After understanding from Phainon the Chrysos Heirs' arduous journey to save the world, we ultimately decided to remain in Amphoreus. After a period of rest and recovery, the Chrysos Heirs reconvened, readying themselves for an attack against Castrum Kremnos, where Nikador was, with the goal of seizing the Coreflame of the Lance of Fury.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 留守列车的姬子为卧病在床的三月七准备了定制餐食，打算去她的房间探望一番。
E: Himeko, on watch at the Express, has prepared a specially made meal for the bedridden March 7th and plans to check up on her.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 一场梦境，将*我们*带回那段早已为岁月所模糊的遥远回忆之中，而这场幻梦，印刻着*我们*内心最深处的不安。
E: A dream carries us back to memories long faded by time, and this dream mirrors the profound fears within our hearts.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝夺取了「门径」的火种，接过雅努斯的神权。现在，她必须逃离这座囚禁了她数十年之久的三相圣地，奔赴自己的命运。
E: Tribios takes the Coreflame of Passage, receiving Janus's divine authority. Now, she must flee this Sanctum of Tripartite Prophecy that has held her captive for decades and pursue her destiny.

C: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n你当然也记得，你是如何成为一名行刑者，一名督战圣女的。
E: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, this city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nOf course, you also remember how you became an executioner and a Maiden of War.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 在这里你将听不见人声，看不见人影；太阳的闪烁的火焰会把你烤焦，使你的皮肤失掉颜色；直到满天星斗的夜遮住了阳光，或太阳出来化去了晨霜，你才松快。这眼前的苦难将永远折磨你；没有人救得了你。\n——但你已经把火留下了，那是解放他们的火。而解放你的火，早就在过去点亮了。
E: Here, you'll hear no human voices, see no human shadows. The sun's flickering flames will scorch you, draining the color from your skin. Only when the starlit night shields you from sunlight, or when the Sun rises to melt away the morning frost, will you find relief. These present hardships will torture you forever, and no one can save you.\nBut you have left behind the fire... the fire that will liberate them. And the fire meant to free you was illuminated long ago.

C: 你看，「时辰」的精灵来了，她是来解放你的。但解放需要支付代价——\n关于你所离席的岁月，永远消失在时间的裂隙里，再也回不来了。\n但你要前进，用你创造的未来，偿还你欠下的债。
E: Look, the "Clockkeeper" is here with your temporal pardon. But this bail comes with interest.\nThe seconds, minutes, and years of your absence will be foreclosed upon, forever beyond withdrawal.\nThe only way out is forward, where each new moment you create becomes the currency to settle what you've borrowed from time's unforgiving bank.

C: 为什么父亲要献祭自己的女儿？为什么女儿要杀死自己的母亲？为什么神明在折磨凡人？为什么飞鹰要将龟壳掷向诗人的脑袋？\n在数不胜数的酒神诗歌中，人们愤恨、哀叹、无奈，因为那悲剧的起因总是无情无形的，无法被斩首或施以绞刑。就像水手杀不死海。
E: Why would a father sacrifice his daughter? Why would a daughter slay her mother? Why do gods torment mortals? Why would an eagle cast a tortoise shell upon a poet's head?\nIn countless poems of the wine god, people rage, grieve, and despair. It was because the roots of these tragedies are elusive and impassive, beyond the reach of blade or noose. Just as sailors cannot slay the sea.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n收集泰坦符文，完成密钥封装。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nCollect the Titan runes to complete the encryption key encapsulation.

C: 「再创世」的仪式已经顺利完成，翁法罗斯的旅程结束…果然是假的！\n这里是用你的「记忆」构筑的假象，你必须和昔涟一起赶紧逃进其他的记忆里。\n星期日正在用他的能力入侵你的「梦境」来拯救你…没想到还会有这样的一天。
E: The Era Nova Ceremony has been completed. The journey in Amphoreus is over... As if!\nThis is all an illusion constructed from your "memory." You must now escape with Cyrene into other memories!\nSunday is using his powers to invade your "dreamscape" to save you... Never thought this day would come.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n海瑟音揭露了事实，那神秘的山之民并非是真正的荒笛。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nHysilens revealed the truth that the mysterious Mountain Dweller was not the real Terravox.

C:
丹恒，你最信任的列车护卫，「开拓」之旅中最靠谱的伙伴。
他接受了「大地」的神权，只为与你，与黄金裔的伙伴们一起，并肩面对新世界，以及即将到来的决战——仅仅是知道他回到了翁法罗斯，就让你多了一份、不，一百份的安心感。

当他的神识深入无人可及的忆潮中时，他既是层岩，他也是海浪，他还是霜风…
他是大地，亦是其上的万物。
他为你而来，现在你们要为小三月而去。

烈阳已经指明了方向，继续前进吧。
E:
Dan Heng, your most trusted Express Guard, and the most reliable companion on your Trailblaze journey.
He accepted Earth's divine authority, solely to stand alongside you and the Chrysos Heir friends, facing the new world and the impending final clash together. Just knowing he's back in Amphoreus gives you not just one, but a hundred times more peace of mind.

When his consciousness delves into the memoria tide where no one else can reach, he is the bedrock, the waves, and the frosty gales...
He is the Earth and all that exists upon it.
He came for you, and now you will both go for March.

The blazing sun has shown the way. Press onward.

C: 探索遇到阻碍，十四行代数式屏障将空间隔离。螺丝咕姆提议骇入独立信源终端，通过逆转算力来攻击屏障，开启权杖内核层的封印。
E: Exploration hit a snag. A barrier of quatorzain algebraic expressions has isolated this space. Screwllum suggests hacking into the independent signal terminal and using reverse computation to break through the barrier, unlocking the seal on the Scepter's kernel.

C: 年迈的以斯帖授权你前去回收记录着奇景秘闻的录像带。
E: Esther authorizes you to retrieve the videotapes of wonders and secrets.

C: 应物科的温世齐受「公司」委托，要盘点空间站的资产亏损。\n他拜托你拍摄月台区域的资产，拍下星穹列车试试吧。
E: Wen Shiqi in the Department of Implement Arts has been tasked by the IPC with compiling a damage report of all the assets in the space station.\nHe asked you to snap some photos of assets around the railway platform. Try taking a photo of the Astral Express.

C: 利用相机扫描怪物，击败藏有左侧房间密钥的怪物
E: Use the camera to scan for monsters and defeat the monster that is carrying the encryption key to the room on the left

C: 竟然是连防卫科大哥阿兰都没有见过的全新怪物，千万不能掉以轻心！\n有关修行的事情，还是等击败怪物之后再说吧！
E: Somehow, these turned out to be a brand-new kind of monster that not even Arlan, the big brother of the Security Department, has seen before. They are not to be taken lightly at all!\nAs for the trials... just focus on killing these monsters first!

C: 真理医生似乎已经从蛛丝马迹中找到了答案，且看他到底发现了什么
E: Dr. Ratio seems to already have discovered the answer from what little evidence you have. Let's see what exactly he had discovered.

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区开始。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Starting from the Overworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区收集完了。该去下层了。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Finished in the Overworld. Time to go to the Underworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C: 虎克大人自己准备的藏宝图，自己却看不懂，意料之外，情理之中。\n幸好，你还有在矿区捡到的家用寻物仪——查宝。可以用它来找找看看。
E: Hook can't read her own treasure map, which is understandable.\nFortunately, you took Findie, the Home-Use Object Finder you found in the mine, with you. Give it a try.

C: 为提振士气、提升整体作战能力，杰帕德将带领你与希露瓦亲临前线，向战场纵深处推进，同时搜救沿途的难民。\n此处战场的气氛非同寻常，请小心应战。
E: Gepard will lead you and Serval to the front lines himself to raise morale and improve overall combat capacity. You will push deeper into the battlefield while helping the refugees along the way.\nThe atmosphere of this battlefield is out of the ordinary. Please be careful during combat.

C: 檀檀说司辰宫从路口的机巧鸟那里调取了很有用的信息，结合事故现场的目击者证词，也许能够锁定肇事星槎的去向。
E: Tantan mentions that the Palace of Astrum had extracted very important data from the cycranes at the intersection. Combined with the on-site witness testimony, it might pinpoint the whereabouts of the starskiff that caused the accident.

C: 为了得到私密的「美丽狐仙聊天」邀请链接，你答应了温符瑞要将他的礼物送到仙舟，不过「美丽狐仙聊天」不曾透露收件地址，而是要找到线下工作人员…真是越来越可疑了。
E: To get the private invitation link to the Foxian Beauty Chat, you promised Wen Furui to send his gift to Xianzhou, but the Foxian Beauty Chat never disclosed the recipient's address. Instead, you have to find the in-person operative. And so the plot thickens...

C: 你们启动了物流机巧鸟，在青雀的建议下，你们打算追上这只小鸟，找到黛青小姐本人。快追上机巧鸟，看看它准备去向哪里。
E: You start up the courier cycrane and plan to follow this bird to track down Ms. Daiqing under the suggestion of Qingque. Follow the cycrane and see where it heads to.

C: 缅怀既毕，你跟随她前往鳞渊境，不知为何她兴起了寻医问药的念头。而在丹鼎司中，也许没人比那位龙女更有资格为罗浮前代剑首把脉看诊了。
E: Respects paid, you follow her towards the Scalegorge Waterscape. For some reason, she now has the desire to seek medical counsel. No one is more qualified in the Alchemy Commission than that Dragon Lady to read the pulse and diagnose the Luofu's previous Sword Champion.

C: 竟然当着客人和爷爷的面说赠剑仪式上的宝剑是魔剑…某种程度上来说，算是小孩子童言无忌的特权了。被怀炎将军叱喝时，她那个表情完全就是不服气嘛。\n你和云璃话还没说完呢，她就冲到工造司里了，现在先去追上她吧。
E: Who would've expected Yunli to call the repatriated sword a cursed sword, in the presence of her grandfather and guests, no less... She's lucky her objection could be downplayed as the harmless words of a child, though the tongue-lashing from General Huaiyan clearly left her indignant.\nYou were midway through your conversation when Yunli dashed off to the Artisanship Commission. Go catch up to her.

C: 云璃答应你冷静下来，至少会与爷爷再聊一次，你明白她并不是喜欢向人解释自己做事缘由的人，能让她痛痛快快讲出来，也是你的本事。\n现在想来，你忙得满罗浮到处跑，而有的人却在逃课独享清闲，走！去列车抓她现行。
E: Yunli promises to calm down and speak with her grandfather about it again. You know she's not one to explain herself, so you totally deserve a pat on your back for getting her to spill everything.\nYou finally remember a certain truant's skiving off on her own while you were busy running around the entirety of the Luofu. Go to the Express and catch her in the act!

C: 演武仪典召开之际，罗浮仙舟成了诸多是非与矛盾的交集处，除却各怀心思的客人，还有遭遇步离人袭击被迫停靠的公司舰船。\n为了解决与公司的纠纷，你们陪同彦卿抵达工造司。
E: At the advent of the Wardance ceremony, the Xianzhou Luofu became a crossroads of conflict among many — not just among guests of ulterior motives, but also IPC ships that were forced to dock after escaping from borisin attacks.\nTo resolve everyone's disputes, you accompanied Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 在飞霄的提议下，众人放弃大张旗鼓的搜猎，转而揣度猎物的所思所求。而迴星港这个狼踪初现之地，会成为继续追索步离人的猎场。
E: Following Feixiao's advice, everybody abandons the large-scale hunt and begins to speculate about their prey's motives and agenda instead. As for Stargazer Navalia, the site where the wolves were first spotted, it shall become the hunting ground for the continued pursuit of the borisin.

C: 柯柯娜似乎想好了自己的决定，是时候和父母讨论一下了。
E: Cocona seems to have made a decision. It is time to discuss with her parents.

C: 柯柯娜消失了，试着触碰她留下的记忆，也许能追上她的脚步。
E: Cocona has disappeared. By touching the memories she left behind, you may be able to catch up to her again.

C: 音乐制作人埃夫姆似乎正沉醉于美梦之中，忘记了此行是为了谈生意。快找到他，免得埃夫姆和合作伙伴们的心血付之东流。
E: Music producer Ephraim seems to have overindulged himself in his dreams, and forgotten that he is here on official business. Find him quickly, before Ephraim and his partners' hard work go up in smoke.

C: 「湛蓝爵士」找到了过去的记忆，现在的它…还记得奥尔拉的事情吗？
E: Dr. Blues has recovered its memories. Does it... still remember Orla?

C: 在骑士游侠二人组的帮助下，你成功救下了好{F#闺蜜}{M#朋友}青雀。\n这可真是奇怪的一天，谁能想到最后你竟然会亲手打散一个谋财害人的邪恶组织？作为纪念，和你的同伴们一起拍下合照吧。
E: With the assistance of the Knight and the Ranger, you have successfully saved your kindred spirit, Qingque.\nIt has been a strange day. Who would have thought that you would crush a cult that seeks profit from illegal means? Take a group photo with your companions as a keepsake.

C: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n这里可是我的主场，又有知更鸟帮忙，轻轻松松啦。
E: Third stop, Penacony!\nThis is my home turf, and with Robin helping out, it'll be a piece of cake.

C: 迷路的呜呜伯看上去不太聪明的样子，还是回去反馈确认一下情况吧！
E: The lost Wubbaboo doesn't seem to be the sharpest tool in the shed. Let's go back and report the situation!

C: 科员以斯帖正在为自己的形象而苦恼，你发现她在为戴什么款式的眼镜而发愁。带着你独特的审美，过去指导一下以斯帖吧！
E: Researcher Esther is having a rough day with her appearance. She's trying to figure out what style of glasses to wear. With your unique perspective on beauty, go and advise Esther!

C: 在你的指导下，希拉就「如何做人」这件事取得了阶段性的成果。不过，你有些怀疑古恩能否接受这样的「学习成果」……
E: Sheila has made remarkable progress in acting human. But you're not sure if Gunn will be satisfied with the result...

C: 埃美丽要出席正式场合，现在非常紧张，还是用短信帮她快速重建自信吧。
E: Emily is extremely nervous now that she's about to attend a formal occasion. Use text messages to quickly rebuild her self-confidence.

C: 对于小机器人的故障情况，维修工程师有些新想法。他拜托你去重启故障的小机器人，然后回来验证下他的猜想是否正确吧。
E: The maintenance engineer has a new idea about the meal-delivery robot malfunction. He asks you to reboot the malfunctioning robot to verify if his guess is accurate.

C: 配音演员塞琳似乎在为什么事感到苦恼。\n找她聊聊，看看你能如何帮到她。
E: Celine, the voice actress, seems to be distressed about something.\nSpeak with her and see if there is anything you can help her with.

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 看过窗外风景了，回去找帕姆聊聊吧。
E: You take in the astral scenery, go back and talk to Pom-Pom.

C: 地衡司收到居民在丹鼎司洞天里发现近似「云吟术」的异象，并且在异象中遭遇了隐身怪物。\n广进根据异象的规律，在海滩上备好了饵食，希望借此找到引起异象的元凶……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission received reports that anomalies resembling cloudhymn magic have been spotted in the Alchemy Commission delve, and that invisible monsters were encountered within this phenomenon.\nBased on the patterns of anomalies, Guangjin has prepared bait on the beach in hopes of uncovering the true source behind the phenomenon.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 据说在奥赫玛，倒霉的人会被大地兽撞，你会是那个「幸运儿」吗？
E: It is said that in Okhema, the unfortunate will be knocked over by a dromas. Are you one of the "lucky" ones?

C: 阿波罗尼居然失踪了…最后的目击记录位于城下的古遗迹，顺着记忆的残像前进，寻找他的踪迹吧。
E: Who would have thought that Apollonius disappeared... He was last seen in the ancient ruins under the city. Advance after the fragments of memory and look for traces of him.

C: 温世玲好像遇到了什么小麻烦…似乎需要你的帮助。
E: Wen Shiling seems to have run into some minor troubles... She needs your help.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 沃森有一些特殊的空间站委托要交给你，向她询问具体的内容吧。
E: Watson has some special space station assignments for you. Ask her for the details.

C: 公司阻止金人巷复兴是为了获取这片地区的经营权，会长又是为了什么呢？你不明白，只能说会长必须解释清楚。\n到陈机铺去问问吧，一直以来会长躲在收旧货的店里，不会真的是旧货吧？
E: The IPC is trying to stop the revival of Aurum Alley in order to obtain the developmental rights for the area for themselves, but what does the president desire out of this situation? Perhaps only he can explain his own motive.\nHead to Oldies Depot and ask him. He's been hiding in a shop filled with second-hand goods all this time — he can't possibly be a second-hand good himself, right?

C: 「降魔机巧鸟」的功效得到了验证，是时候前往岁阳泛滥的地方了。
E: The capabilities of the exorcist cycrane has been verified. It's time to head to locations flooded with heliobi.

C: 桂乃芬卖了个关子，说要把好事留在长乐天说。\n但是你看了粉丝数就已经知道了一切，去长乐天前，请不要拆穿她的小惊喜。
E: Guinaifen isn't spilling all the beans and says she'll tell you the good stuff in Exalting Sanctum.\nHowever, you figured everything out just by looking at the fan numbers. Please don't spoil her small surprise before you meet her in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 杰伊将今日美食所需的食材整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给他吧！
E: Jay has listed all the ingredients required for today's catering menu. Once you have gathered all of the ingredients, bring them to him!

C: 记者辛格勒坚持认为家族是导致梦境世界秩序崩溃的幕后势力。\n为了证明自己猜想的正确性，她邀请你一同参与到调查工作中来。
E: A journalist named Singler firmly believes that The Family is behind all the breakdown of order in the Dreamscape world.\nShe invites you to join her investigation to validate her suspicions.

C: 帮助辛格勒收集线索——它们应该就散落在神秘空间的战利品宝箱中。
E: Help Singler search for clues — they should be scattered in the mysterious space's treasure chest.

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n过去的酒吧和现在果然不太相同，还是先跟着舒翁的记忆前进吧。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nThe lounge in the past is indeed quite different from the present. It's best to follow Siobhan's memories for now.

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n在梦境酒店找到了忧郁派，该带它回到酒吧了。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nYou found Melancholy in the hotel in the Dreamscape. Take it back to the lounge.

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n影片的剪辑工作正在继续，帮助克劳克影业完成更多影片吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and have begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nEditing is still going on. Help Clock Studios complete more films!

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•时间的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将与钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子——一道，突破重重难关，最终……\n…帮助这位并非真正的钟表小子的钟表小子克服与生俱来的存在主义危机。游戏也可以很深刻，不是吗？
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Time Trial stage. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role ever-popular protagonist from the Clockie series — Clockie. Smash through the final obstacles together...\n...Help this inauthentic Clockie overcome an existential crisis. The game can also be rather profound, can't it?

C: 十五日约定的时间已经到了，无论剑法好坏，既然彦卿师父、云璃师父说了三月七可以一战，你也大可相信她有作为胜者的能耐。\n想必斯科特已经在金人巷等候多时了，现在就去会会他吧。
E: The day of the duel has arrived. Putting aside March 7th's aptitude in swordplay, you believe she has the capability to emerge victorious, especially since both of her mentors — Yanqing and Yunli — agreed to let her go to battle.\nSkott is probably already waiting at Aurum Alley. Go meet him now.

C:
「明知注定失败的比赛，我也要参加到底吗？」
「那老子问你：注定失败的人生，就不活了吗？」
「可如果这注定是一场徒劳的悲剧，又何必看到结尾呢？」
「因为你是个战士啊，蠢材。」
E:
"Should I still participate in a tournament till the end when I know I'll definitely lose?"
"Then let me ask you: Will you stop living if you know you'll life is doomed to fail?"
"But why should I see the end of this story when it's fated to be a tragedy that I can't change?"
"Because you're a fighter, idiot."

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就这幅作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about this work

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「黄金替罪羊」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Golden Scapegoat. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 突然有群奇美拉闯入了生命花园，去看看究竟是怎么回事吧。话说…那只自称为「自由之角」的奇美拉，不就是你曾经的领队吗？！
E: A group of chimeras has suddenly broken into the Garden of Life. Hurry there and figure out what is happening. By the way, isn't the chimera calling itself the "Horn of Freedom" the former leader of your squad!?

C: 今日待鉴定宝物已准备好，去找西塔罗斯吧。
E: The treasures up for appraisal today are ready. Time to talk to Theodoros.

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 你调制了名为「人格」的配方，黑塔人偶喝下后，展现出了令人意外的一面。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为黑塔再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You mixed a recipe called "Persona," and after the Herta puppet drank it, she showed an unexpected side.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Herta.

C: 向艾丝妲了解情况
E: Find out more about the situation from Asta

C: 回到歌德宾馆休息
E: Return to Goethe Hotel and rest

E: Continue deeper into the mines and find Oleg

C: 直面史瓦罗
E: Face Svarog

C: 深入残响回廊
E: Venture deeper into the Corridor of Fading Echoes

C: 前往永冬铭碑拍纪念照
E: Go to the Everwinter Monument and take pictures

E: Participate in the Navigation Meeting

C: 前往司辰宫，谒见驭空
E: Head to the Palace of Astrum and meet with Yukong

E: Cross Cloudford and catch up to the Trailblazer's squad

E: Set out for Stargazer Navalia

E: Speak with Trashiemedes and report your results

E: Use the characteristics of the Dreamscape to construct a path

E: Head to the Meditation Room and look for the pinball machine model

E: Go deeper into the Dewlight Pavilion to look for clues

C: 登上舞台，不要害怕，不要回头
E: Get onstage. Fear not. Never look back

E: Advance down the narrow alley

E: Pass the first "School of Action" test

E: Advance through Act II and cooperate to complete the performance

C: 返回星穹列车
E: Return to the Astral Express

E: Learn about the situation from Black Swan

C: 乘坐电梯前往下层
E: Take the elevator to the lower level

C: 向米哈伊尔道别
E: Say goodbye to Mikhail

C: 与谐乐蕉师对话，准备登台演出
E: Speak with Charmony BananAdvisor and prepare for the performance

C: 前往僻静的地方
E: Head somewhere quiet

C: 跟随缇宝前进
E: Follow Tribbie's lead

C: 跟随阿格莱雅来到浴池边
E: Follow Aglaea to the bath

C: 加入战斗
E: Join the battle

C: 进入缇里西庇俄丝的住处
E: Enter Tribios' abode

C: 与遐蝶同行，继续交谈
E: Walk with Castorice and continue your talk

C: 去会会「不速之客」
E: Meet the Uninvited Guest

C: 坐浮台前往高处
E: Ride the platform to higher ground

C: 见证卡厄斯兰那的结局
E: Witness the end of Khaslana

C: 前往宴会场地
E: Head to the banquet area

C: 拆穿「三月七」的伪装
E: Expose "March 7th's" disguise

C: 「请不要让风带走你。」
E: "Let not the wind claim you."

C: 通过岁月的力量修复前路
E: Repair the path ahead through the power of time

C: 改变时空，见证真相
E: Alter space and time, witness the truth

C: 直面来古士
E: Face Lygus

C: 继续「开拓」之旅
E: Continue the Trailblazing Expedition

C: 与长夜月交谈
E: Speak with Evernight

C: 前往客房车厢
E: Head to the Passenger Cabin

C: 封装密钥，下载符文
E: Encapsulate the Encryption Key and Download Runes

C: 了解关于德谬歌的真相
E: Learn the truth about Demiurge

C: 召集「最后的泰坦」们，准备迎战铁墓
E: Gather the "Last Titans" and prepare to face Irontomb

C: 拍摄两个表情忧伤的呜呜伯的照片
E: Snap a photo of two sad Wubbaboos

C: 给姬子拍照，并将照片发给帕梅拉
E: Take a picture of Himeko and send it to Pamela

C: 从怪物身上取得通行密钥
E: Obtain the encryption key from the monster's body

C: 寻找更迅速的搜索方式
E: Find a faster way to search

C: 捕捉逃逸的冥火
E: Capture the escaped infernal fire

C: （可选）尝试创造生命
E: (Optional) Try to create life

C: 虎克好像有事找你，去问问看吧。
E: Hook seems to have something to tell you. Go ask her

C: 按着藏宝图的提示找到「宝藏」
E: Find the treasure according to the treasure map

C: 根据故事书目录，寻找剩下的宝藏
E: Find the remaining treasures based on the storybook's table of contents

C: 向希露瓦复命
E: Report back to Serval

C: 在前方寻找落单的女孩子和矿民
E: Look for the little girl and other miners

C: 击败盘踞在矿镇的裂界生物
E: Defeat the Fragmentum monsters occupying the mining town

C: 向朗道姐弟汇报雪原见闻
E: Report your findings from the Snow Plains to the Landau siblings

C: 跟踪卢卡——不要被发现！
E: Follow Luka — Don't get discovered!

C: 回到事故现场和檀檀谈谈
E: Go back to the scene of the accident and talk with Tantan

C: 再次与艾丝妲对话
E: Talk to Asta again

C: 再次与艾丝妲对话
E: Talk to Asta again

C: 在长乐天寻找三余书肆的小店长隐书
E: Find Yinshu, the shopkeeper of Spare Time Book Shop, at the Exalting Sanctum

C: 前往星槎海，收取梁沐的快递
E: Head to Starskiff Haven and receive Liangmu's parcel

E: Buy a gift for Jingzhai

E: Enter the room where Sparkle hid the clues to the puzzle

C: 回到现实酒店，找到莱斯利•迪恩的房间
E: Return to the hotel in reality and locate Lesley Dean's room

C: 将唱片带交还柯柯娜
E: Return the record to Cocona

C: 见证蒂索克二世成为一个疯狂的屠夫
E: Witness Tizocic II become a ruthless ruler

C: 帮助巴罗逃离
E: Help Barlow escape

C: 使用电视机变成哈努兄弟
E: Use the television to transform into Brother Hanu

C: 营救青雀
E: Rescue Qingque

C: 为曜青仙舟的客人送行
E: Bid farewell to the guests from the Xianzhou Yaoqing

C: 掀开过往的帷幕
E: Lift the curtain of the past

C: 和维修工程师聊聊
E: Speak with the maintenance engineer

C: 告诉阿德勒真相
E: Tell Adler the truth

C: 替「地火」派送物资
E: Deliver the supplies for Wildfire

C: 前往秘密集会所
E: Go to the secret gathering place

C: 品尝「烈焰浓茶」新品
E: Taste the new Flaming Potent Tea

E: Talk to Pom-Pom

E: Pass the challenge of the Janus' Maze and complete the extrapolation

E: Pass the challenge of the Janus' Maze and complete the extrapolation

E: Locate Alain

C: 供奉余火
E: Offer Embers

E: Pass the Trial of Equilibrium: Part Two.

E: Enter Simulated Universe: World 2

E: Find Gunn of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics

E: Speak with Mingxi

E: Speak with Herta

E: Locate the service robots and take the Treasure Maps

E: Head to Goethe Hotel and meet with Wilder

E: Head to Stargazer Navalia to make the appointment on behalf of A-Yue

E: Go to the location in March 7th's photo

E: Use the Lifeform Oven to conduct your first round of nurturing

E: Leave the chaotic space and talk to Singler

E: Find the commercial district rep to keep filming Brother Hanu's Great Heist

C: 与缇娜交谈，确认后续测试内容
E: Speak with Tinah and confirm the content of the subsequent test

C: 与银狼进行战后复盘
E: Review the battle with Silver Wolf afterwards

C: 前往金人巷，与斯科特交谈
E: Go to Aurum Alley and talk to Skott

C: 前往接待大厅，确认攻擂资格
E: Head to the Reception Hall and confirm your match qualifications

C: 与卢卡一起回到休息室
E: Return to the lounge with Luka

C: 加入折纸小鸟的合奏
E: Join the Origami Birds' ensemble

C: 与桑博对话
E: Speak with Sampo

C: 将玄关建造完成
E: Complete building the entryway

C: 和三月七讨论今日选题
E: Discuss the theme of the day with March 7th

C: 和三月七讨论照片
E: Discuss the photo with March 7th

C: 给三月七拍照留念
E: Take a commemorative picture with March 7th

C: 前往古玩店「岁月遗珍」
E: Head to the Treasure of Ages antique store

C: 参加第一场小组赛
E: Participate in the first group match

C: 赢下第一场淘汰赛
E: Win the first knockout match

C: 使用「巡海大鲨鱼」号赛车，完成试训挑战
E: Use Sea Hunter Shark to complete the training challenge

C: 开始今日的营业
E: Open for business for the day

C: 开始今日的营业
E: Open for business for the day

C: 做好准备后，去参加迷其林美食评审会
E: Get ready and attend the Memchelin Food Review

C: 宣布宴会正式开始
E: Announce the start of the feast

C: 最后1次行动：游历获得的收益提高#1%
E: For the final action: Increases rewards gained from Excursions by #1%

C: 第1次行动：训练效率提高#1%
E: For the first action: Training efficiency increases by #1%

C: 后置奖励法
E: Delayed-Gratification Method

C: 硬直强打
E: Brute-Force Stuns

C: 略窥堂奥•中段
E: Gaze into Gnosis: Progression

C: 渐入佳境•初段
E: Budding Splendor: Initiation

C: 请选择本日想要青雀提供的协助
E: Please select the assist you want Qingque to provide you today

C: 请选择本日想要青雀提供的协助
E: Please select the assist you want Qingque to provide you today

C: 距离最终试剑
E: Time to Final Sword Trial

C: 新手判官调查僵尸化异常的背后真相。
E: A newbie judge investigates the truth behind an abnormal case of zombification.

C: 我不会摔倒——我不会摔倒——我不会摔倒——我不会摔倒——
E: I won't fall over, I won't fall over, I won't fall over, I won't fall over...

C: …怎么了？我脸上有东西吗？
E: ...What? Is there something on my face?

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 你们能享受旅程，帕姆很开心。
E: ...Don't worry about me — I'm just happy you're enjoying the journey.

C: 瓦尔特先生知道目的地吧？
E: Do you know what our next destination is?

C: 我把你的话告诉了布洛妮娅。
E: I relayed your view of the Stellaron's effects to Bronya.

C: 帕姆，我们回来啦！
E: Pom-Pom, we're back!

C: …嘘！正在进行星轨稳定率检测，请别打岔！
E: ...Shhh! Checking star rail stability, Pom-Pom needs to focus!

C: 喂——喂喂——
E: Hello? Hello hello?

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 这点子有意思，不愧是天才俱乐部的人啊。
E: Interesting, she's a member of the Genius Society alright.

C: 不，不要…
E: No...

C: 嗨，初次见面，我是姬子，星穹列车的领航员。
E: Hey, nice to meet you. I'm Himeko, navigator of the Astral Express.

C: 我们去和科员们聊聊吧。这种时候，大家都不希望空间站的内部再出现意外。你试过联系黑塔了吗？
E: Let's go speak with the researchers. Right now, the space station can't afford any more unexpected turns, especially from within. Have you tried contacting Herta?

C: 有空让你见见，你也会喜欢它的。
E: Y'know, I'll introduce you when you have the time. You're gonna love him.

C: 我要打起精神来，谢谢你，好心人。
E: I will pull myself together. Thank you, that was kind of you.

C: 而且，我照看的那帮捣蛋鬼还留在外面没人管…我知道你拦我是好意，但我已经决定了。
E: Besides, that bunch of troublemakers is still out there... I know you mean well, but I've made up my mind.

C: 对，非、人、生、物。就是与人类种族不同的生命！
E: Yes. Non. Human. Life. Living creatures that aren't human...

C: 半晌，眼睛恍然瞪大不再迷茫，坚定而有力。「<unbreak>0.59</unbreak>！」它宣布。
E: After a while, the gun's gaze suddenly widens and its confusion is dispelled. "<unbreak>0.59</unbreak>!" it declares, resolutely.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着Saber：「<unbreak>12</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Saber: "<unbreak>12</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 你仔细端详这些碎片，空气中忽然传来一阵微热，拂过脸颊，在你的耳畔驻足停步。
E: You closely examine these fragments. A gust of heat suddenly arrives through the air. It touches your cheeks and pauses next to your ear.

C: 这种力量的流动，不太寻常。
E: This energy flow... it's up to something.

C: 算了，说回这个体内能存星核的小家伙……
E: Forget it, let's focus on the one who can store a Stellaron in their body...

C: 超距传输很贵的，不过这台机子是从黑塔女士那儿弄来的，商品全都包邮帕。
E: Hyper-distant delivery costs an arm and a leg, but we got this machine from Madam Herta, all the products inside come free of shipping charges.

C: 没想到你电脑修得这么好。
E: I didn't know you could fix computers so well.

C: 不过你也不用太有负担，至少「星核」目前在你体内的状态是十分稳定的，不会对外部造成畸变。
E: However, you don't have to feel too burdened. At the very least, the current state of the Stellaron in your body is very stable and will not cause distortion to the outside.

C: 列车长帕姆的玩偶，看着它，你觉得很不好意思。
E: A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. Looking at it makes you feel embarrassed.

C: 你相信我们来自天外？
E: So you believe we come from beyond the sky?

C: 我们想帮助你们。
E: We want to help you.

C: 停！我知道你要说啥：「三月啊，你当时的话太多了」「三月啊，你不该跟不信任的人透露我们的目的」…我知道啦，谁叫你们两个绕着圈打机锋，不好好说话。
E: Stop! I know what you're gonna say: "March, you said too much back there — March, you shouldn't reveal our goal to people we don't trust..." Meanwhile you guys were beating around the bush and speaking in riddles.

C: 可不是嘛…不过好在我们来了，封印星核后，他们就不用遭这么多罪啦。
E: It sure is... but at least we're here. Once we seal the Stellaron, they can get back to the good life.

C: 根据勘测结果，「星核」大概位于贝洛伯格的北方——也就是茫茫雪原的某处。
E: According to the survey results, the Stellaron is likely to the north of Belobog... somewhere in the vast Snow Plains.

C: 哎呀，你不是一直很反感我当众叫你「老弟」嘛！我觉得你说得对，平时还是用名字称呼你比较好，对吧老弟。
E: *sigh* You said you hate it when I call you "bro" in public! Well I agree. It'd sound better if I started using your full name. Right, broseph?

C: 哈哈哈，我只是开个玩笑，别放在心上。
E: Hahaha, I'm just joking. Rest assured I won't damage it.

C: 今天这件事，我们回了机械屋再算总账……
E: Serval, you big mouth! I'll sort you out once we get back to the workshop...

C: 啊，你也来了…那些残次品机器人，都处理好了吗？
E: Ah, you're here as well, I see... Have those defective robots been dealt with?

C: 裂界就像我家一样…
E: I visit the Fragmentum like it's my home...

C: 那你家可能有点不太宜居……
E: Then your home must be quite the hell hole...

C: 据我所知…目前铁卫能接触到的官方记录里，相关记载也寥寥无几。我只知道这是阿丽萨•兰德时期打造的巨型地质改造单元，而且已经全部遗失了。
E: To the best of my knowledge, there are very few relevant records, even in the official documents the Guards have access to. All I know is that this is a giant geological transformation unit built during the Alisa Rand era, and it's all lost now.

C: 其实我根本不用试图改变别人…这样只会分散我的注意力，凭空消耗我的热情。
E: The truth is, I shouldn't even try to change people at all... It's all just a distraction that keeps draining my passion for life itself.

C: 至于可可利亚…至少她能以伟人的身份被大多数人记住。这样也好……
E: As for Cocolia, the best side of her will live on in people's memory. That's not all bad...

C: 我也知道，这个要求实在太突然、太任性了…先提前给你道个歉啦。
E: I know this is a lot to ask out of the blue, so apologies in advance.

C: 没问题，包在我身上。
E: Not a problem, just leave it to me.

C: 那倒不是，她读的是军事史专业，和我八竿子都打不着。
E: Not really, no. She was a military history major — very different from what I was doing.

C: 原来你还有在给爸妈写信啊……
E: You're still writing to Mom and Dad...?
