C: 现在想想…我还是太天真了。也许她早就忘了还有这么一样东西了。
E: Now that I think about it... perhaps I was too naive. She'd probably forgotten it even existed.

C: 欸，对了！{NICKNAME}，你之前不是在我这学了一手维修机械的本事吗？要不要再拿这老古董练练手？
E: Hey, wait a minute! {NICKNAME}, didn't I teach you a few machine-overhaul skills? Wanna practice on this old antique?

C: 你毕竟是拯救了贝洛伯格的英雄，在下层区颇有人望。如果有你陪同开路，多少能减轻铁卫重新入驻下层的阻力。
E: You're Belobog's hero — I'm sure you must be popular in the Underworld. The Silvermane Guards will face less resistance if you come with us.

C: 虽然你已经搭乘过星穹列车这样神奇的交通工具，贝洛伯格的小汽车还是会引起你的注意。
E: Despite having traveled on miraculous vehicles like the Astral Express, cars in Belobog still attract your attention.

C: 小卖部里的食物吸引了你，但是这个世界还没有资本家推行无人售货。
E: The food in the shop draws you in, but apparently this world has yet to conceive its first self-service promoting capitalist.

C: 调查垃圾桶似乎并没什么意义。
E: There doesn't seem much point in investigating a trashcan.

C: 呃…你想干什么？
E: Ugh... What do you want to do?

C: 你克制住打开它的冲动。
E: You try to hold back the urge to open it.

C: 不对，你弯腰把手伸进垃圾桶里，从桶底捡起一块铁片。功夫不负有心人，你终于找到了宝藏！
E: Wait! You reach deeper into the trashcan. There's a piece of iron scrap on the bottom. Your hard work paid off! You finally found the treasure!

C: 「今日本店爱情花全年最低价，是时候送花给你的伴侣啦！」
E: "This will be our best price for valentines flowers for the entire year! Take this chance to send your loved one some flowers!"

C: 明智之举。你退开十步以外，深深呼吸，让新鲜的空气重新充盈鼻腔。没错，这才是人生，这才是活着，活着就要懂得放弃。
E: Wise choice. You back away ten paces, take a deep breath, and let some fresh air into your lungs. Yes, this is real life, this is living. In life, you need to know how to give up.

C: 跟我说实话，桑博，你打算怎么处理那个上层区的小丫头？
E: Tell me the truth Sampo — what are you gonna do about the Overworld girl?

C: 想问有关「地火」的事…
E: I want to ask about Wildfire...

C: 小心点儿，要保重身体哦。
E: Okay, take care, and make sure you look after yourself.

C: …不行，我的正义感开始报警了。
E: ...Despicable. My "criminal activity" senses are tingling.

C: 你有耐心，我可没有！他们都是我认识的人！
E: You stay calm if you want. I'm taking action! I know those people!

C: 史瓦罗！上次的账还没跟你算清楚呢。
E: Svarog! We haven't settled our final score.

C: 隶属「地火」的希儿…你们的抵抗是无价值的。计算结果非常清晰：留在下层是最优的生存策略。
E: Seele, subordinate to Wildfire... Your resistance is futile. The result of my calculation is unequivocal: Remaining in the Underworld is the optimal strategy for survival.

C: 至于你…铁卫丫头，有空吗？我想单独跟你聊聊。
E: As for our Silvermane girl here... do you have time? I'd like to talk with you in private.

C: 那边的家伙，好像一直在偷瞄我们？虽然还在跟虎克他们玩游戏…但还是上去确认一下吧？
E: That guy's been staring at us this whole time... Hide-and-seek might have to wait — let's see what he wants.

C: 反过来想想，要是我没跑，杰帕德把咱们一锅端后还会给你们说话的机会吗？早就直接扔大牢了。
E: Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa rewind. If I hadn't made a break for it, Gepard would've caught all of us. And do you think he would've given you a chance to explain yourselves? Hmm? He would've checked you straight into the graybar hotel!

C: 下层区的人？
E: How about the Underworlders?

C: 你也知道，地下的资源一直很紧缺，加上事发突然，诊所的医疗物资快要见底了，我们得从别处弄一些过来。
E: As you know, the underground is lacking resources to begin with. Add on the sudden nature of the incident, and it's no surprise that the clinic is almost out of medical supplies. We need to acquire more... somehow.

C: 我…能给你们解个闷吧——玩笑！我开玩笑！这条路被封锁十几年了，没几个人知道怎么走，你们还是需要我的！
E: Well, for my sparkling companionship of course! ...I jest, I jest! The path has been blocked for over ten years, and very few know how to get through. That's where I come in.

C: （去跟三月和丹恒会合吧。）
E: (I should go meet up with March and Dan Heng.)

C: 说实话，虎克。
E: Be honest with me, Hook.

C: 你每次都这么说，但是……
E: *sigh* You say that every time, and then...

C: 连上去打拳都不敢，还说什么「真正的拳击」，装得一副很懂的样子，吓唬谁呢？
E: You don't dare enter the ring, and then you talk all high-and-mighty about my boxers being "weaklings." Am I supposed to feel intimidated?

C: 我考虑一下吧。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 出事了可别来找我。
E: Don't come to me if something goes wrong.

C: 这些东西我实在用不到，能麻烦你帮我送给其他有需要的人吗？
E: I'd hate to see these go to waste. Could you help me give them to someone who needs them more?

C: 包在我身上了。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 好了，快去吧。
E: Alright, let's go.

C: 小家伙为什么会哭个不停啊？
E: Why would the little guy keep crying?

C: …爸爸睡在矿井里了。妈妈说，他还要再睡好几年才会回到我们身边……
E: ...daddy is sleeping in the mines... and mummy said he'll need to sleep a few more years before he comes back...

C: 你…你是妈妈的同事吗？之前好像从来没见过你……
E: Are you... are you mum's work friend? I don't think I've met you before...

C: 欸？抱歉，你是在和我说话吗？
E: Eh? Excuse me, are you talking to me?

C: 我有那个什么…「特殊礼遇」？
E: I have that... house special.

C: 这是……
E: It's...

C: 你紧张个什么劲？
E: What are you so worked up about?

C: 人一旦尝到了自由的甜头，就再难接受隔绝和闭塞了。我们这代人在童年经历的悲剧…绝对不能再在孩子们身上重演。
E: ...Once you've tasted freedom, it's difficult to accept a life of separation and isolation. Those of us whose childhoods were marred by tragedy... we must strive to do better for the next generation.

C: 正好{NICKNAME}也在，咱等会儿把该聊的聊完，你们几个一起留下来吃顿饭吧——先前一直没能好好招待，我和娜塔莎可惦记着呢。
E: And it's good to have you here again, {NICKNAME} — it bothered me and Natasha that we never arranged a formal welcome for you. Once we're done talking, you must all join us for a meal.

C: …好、好了，快把我的东西交给我吧。
E: ...O—okay. Just give me my stuff.

C: 你看目录里「消失的矿灯」那一章，下面写着<color=#dbc291ff>「在磐岩镇的大矿区里」</color>，这是不是在说书页就在那里呢？
E: Look at the chapter "The Missing Miner's Lamp." It says: <color=#dbc291ff>"In the Great Mine of Boulder Town..."</color> Is that where some of the missing pages are?

C: 作者就一直把读者叫作「第四只小鼹鼠」，所以我也是鼹鼠队的一员。
E: The author always calls the reader "the fourth little mole," so I am also a member of The Moles.

C: 当你来到这座垃圾箱面前时，你感到一阵解脱。结束了，贝洛伯格冬日在呼吸声中说，这就是最后一个。你的感觉已经无关紧要，创造这群垃圾箱的人已经完成了最终的创作。
E: You feel a sense of relief when you stand before this dumpster. "It's all over," breathes Belobog's winter, "This is the last one." Your feeling no longer matters. What matters is that the ones who created these trashcans have fulfilled themselves.

C: 污黑的液体从垂死的垃圾桶的身下流出，蜿蜒向前。它向上望，盯着垃圾桶冰冷的双眼。十五年前，当垃圾桶还是一个小垃圾桶的时候，它就见过这样的眼神。
E: A goo of darkness dripped out of the dying trashcan's form and continued to snake its way forward. It looked up at the cold eyes of the other trashcan. Fifteen years had passed since it had last seen that gaze, when the standing trashcan was still tiny.

C: 你把纸条上的数字改成了<unbreak>84</unbreak>——这么做或许只是一时兴起。但是，冥冥之中你有种预感，这改变了很多事情。有一个包裹将消失在地底，有一只铁瓶将坠落，有一个人将哭泣。
E: You changed the number on this piece of paper to <unbreak>84</unbreak>. You may have done this out of no reason, but you have a feeling that this has changed many things. A package will be forever lost in the underground. An iron bottle will fall. Someone will cry.

C: 星际和平公司在此呼吁：银河各方势力须保持冷静克制，切勿因一己私仇伤及无辜民众。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation calls for prudence: Entities throughout the cosmos should exercise caution and self-control, ensuring personal grievances do not result in the harm of innocent civilians.

C: 小三月说的不错。试图遮遮掩掩，只会让我们显得别有用心。
E: March is right. If we're too scripted, it'll sound like we're hiding something.

C: 妙极，一言为定。我这便下令，着驭空分享一切情报，拨出精锐人手，助各位展开搜捕。
E: Wonderful, it's a deal then. I shall notify Yukong that all intel is to be shared with you, and that our best personnel are to aid you in your search.

C: 是这样没错，但总觉得哪里不大对劲。
E: Theoretically, yes. But something feels off.

C: 谁问你长相啦！虽然确实不错……
E: I'm not asking about that! Although, you're not wrong...

C: 有一个疑团，只要它还没解开，这局棋就只能僵持不动。那就是「星核」。
E: There is something we must take care of before making our next move. As long it remains unresolved, we're at a stalemate. That something is the Stellaron.

C: 停云小姐熟悉这里吗？
E: Miss Tingyun, are you familiar with this place?

C: 如果埠口还在通航，我会建议阁下立刻坐船前往「星槎海」，不过，据说离开这儿的航路暂时停运了。
E: If the port is still open, I would suggest you take a boat to Starskiff Haven right away, though I heard the route may have been temporarily suspended...

C: 虽然我想说不辛苦…但，我已经连续在这儿站了六个时辰了。这场灾难，什么时候才能结束呢？
E: I want to say it's all in a day's work, but I've been here for twelve hours already... When will this end?

C: 这「流云渡」的运货通道若是稍有变化，整个路线就截然不同了。
E: If the shipping passages in Cloudford changed even a little, the entire route would be drastically altered.

C: 罗浮封锁之事，你知道多少？
E: How much do you know about the Luofu being sealed off?

C: 我？我没什么可说的呀……
E: Me? There's not much to talk about...

C: 好吧，你快点哦。
E: Okay, but think fast.

C: 是在哪里呢……
E: Where would it be...

C: 那边是吗？
E: Is that the one?

C: 你原本要去哪里？
E: Where were you going?

C: 不会。
E: Of course.

C: 变换了路线不要紧吗？
E: Is it okay to change our route?

C: 发送失败？怎么回事啊？
E: Message not sent? Why not?

C: 一枚雕琢成锦鲤形状的精巧扇坠，被孤独地弃置在了街道不为人知的角落里。
E: A refined pendant of a fan in the shape of a koi, but is left alone in some forgotten corner of the street.

C: 在离开列车前，姬子给了你一百信用点零花钱。现在也许是用上它的时候了。
E: Before you leaving the Express, Himeko gave you <unbreak>100</unbreak> credits as pocket money. Maybe it's time to spend them.

C: 可疑的线索应该就是这些了…但，它们都是卡芙卡留下的吗？还是故布疑阵？
E: I think we've rounded up all our suspicious clues... but did Kafka leave them behind on accident or on purpose?

C: {NICKNAME}，你怎么那么冒冒失失！
E: {NICKNAME}, can you watch what you're doing!?

C: 好罢，事急从权…你们三个，和我一同去太卜司。
E: Very well, urgency demands fluidity... The three of you shall accompany me to the Divination Commission.

C: 小心夜长梦多。
E: We shouldn't delay.

C: 我看是全军覆没…
E: Seems to me, her troops were wiped out...

C: 这是古时候丹士们阐演仙道的地方。他们在此建起丹炉，汲取「建木」之力，化奇想为现实。因为炉中烟霭不息，故得名「云霞紫府」。
E: This is where the alchemists practiced the way of immortality in ancient times. They erected elixir crucibles here to absorb the power of the Arbor, turning fantasy into reality. Since the smoke from the crucibles never ceases, this place was named Evemist Mansion.

C: 我控制不住我自己了——
E: I can't control myself anymore...

C: 那颗发光的种子？哈哈，我见过呀，它可真美。望进去，里面有声音会说话哩……
E: That shining seed? Haha, I've seen it, so beautiful. If you gaze into it, there's a voice inside that speaks to you...

C: 在长生种都回忆不起的神降时代，药王「丰饶」将建木赐给罗浮仙舟。借着这株神木，人类实现了无数奇迹：息壤、木无患、自在应身…
E: In the {RUBY_B#Theophany Era}befall era{RUBY_E#}, so far in the past that even long-life species cannot recall, Sanctus Medicus the Abundance gifted the Ambrosial Arbor to the Xianzhou Luofu. With that sacred tree, humanity realized many miracles: The fallow earth, the western soapberry, the altered flesh...

C: 我…看到了我看到我自己成了雷霆我看到自己变成风暴……
E: I... saw it... I saw myself become thunder... become a storm...

C: 列位「恩公」，容我重新介绍——
E: Benefactors, allow me to reintroduce myself...

C: 我没骗你们吧？说把你们带到安全的地方，就言出必践！虽然…绕了点远路……
E: I didn't lie to you, right? I told you I'd bring you somewhere safe, and I did! Though... we did take a bit of a detour...

C: 你来了。
E: You're here.

C: 别急，等战事落定，我亲自送你和罗刹先生回家～
E: Relax. When the fight is over, I'll personally escort you and Mr. Luocha home~

C: 你们等着瞧，我会…让你们见识药王的恩赐。
E: Just you wait — I'll show you the blessing of Sanctus Medicus.

C: （我得小心行事，以免引起云骑的警惕，若有人对我好奇…）
E: (I need to be careful. If I alert the Knights, they might take an interest in me...)

C: 丹恒，你…？
E: Dan Heng...?

C: 谢谢你，丹恒。
E: Thank you, Dan Heng.

C: 我在。
E: Here, general.

C: 破绽百出。
E: Not as strong as you look.

C: 我们是来帮忙收拾停云小姐物品的。驭空大人打算把其中一些用在「慰灵奠仪」上。
E: We're here to help sort out Miss Tingyun's things. Madam Yukong wants to use some of them for her soul-soothing ceremony.

C: 我之前按她的提议，改良鳞渊春、荫山绿和朝露小芽的品种，新制了一种茶饮，滋味甘爽悠长，特意取了姐姐的名字，唤作「遏云歌」。
E: Based on her suggestion, I improved the Whale-Tide Spring, Emerald Hills, and Dawndew strains to make a new variety with a sweet, long-lasting taste. I called it "Tingyun's Blend."

C: 各位…不会是骗我的吧？
E: This... This is real, right...?

C: 接渡使的印鉴
E: The Amicassador's seal

C: 我明白。
E: I understand.

C: 按照列车智库的记载，匹诺康尼原本是公司用来流放罪犯的监狱星，至少在记录它的时代是如此。
E: The Express' records show that Penacony was a prison planet used by the IPC to exile criminals... At least, it was at the time of recording.

C: 我平时摸鱼打牌累了，都往那边的小吃店里吃碗陈婆豆腐。不好，你这一提，我不想上班了，赖你。
E: Whenever I'm tired of celestial jade or slacking off, I head over for a bowl of Granny Chen's Tofu. Darn it, now that you've brought it up, I suddenly don't feel like clocking in for work anymore.

C: 我打算离开罗浮仙舟了。
E: I'm leaving the Luofu.

C: 好啊，老夫就在这工造司，随时欢迎你回来。
E: I'm glad. I'll still be here at the Artisanship Commission. You're welcome any time.

C: 果然狗是人类最好的朋友。
E: I guess a dog really is a man's best friend after all.

C: 礼物？他终于良心发现，要补偿咱们这一路的辛苦了吗？
E: Two gifts? Has his conscience finally gotten the better of him? Is he going to make up for all our hard work along the way?

C: 带些吃的。
E: Take some food.

C: 带上我。
E: Take me.

C: 谢谢，你的好意我心领了，但我不喜欢太过喧嚣的地方。列车的工作也总得有人来处理。
E: Thank you, I appreciate the invitation, but I don't like bustling places, and someone has to handle the work on the Express.

C: 每一个人，他们记忆中的每个人，那些笑容和眼泪，完成与未能完成的约定…最后都将迈向既定的终局。如果在启程之初，你便已知晓此行的终点……
E: Everyone, and every face they remember, the joy and the heartaches, the vows sealed and those left hanging... all will inevitably march towards a predetermined ending. If you had grasped the journey's finale right from its inception...

C: 我会放弃——我已体会过美好的梦。
E: I would abandon it — I have already tasted the beauty of dreams.

C: 没想到这么可爱的小姐也是我的歌迷呢。
E: I never thought a cutie like yourself would be a fan of mine.

C: 叮——一枚筹码被抛向空中，又眨眼间消失不见，取而代之的是两只紧握的手，横在你的面前。
E: Ding— A chip is tossed into the air, and in the blink of an eye, it disappears, replaced by two clenched fists held out in front of you.

C: 没了那块「砂金石」，你就只是个被公司判了死刑的茨冈尼亚奴隶——还是说，你脖子上那行「商品编码」也是琥珀王的恩赐？
E: Without that aventurine stone, you're nothing more than a doomed Sigonian thrall sentenced to die by the IPC. Or is that serial number on your neck a cherished memento from the Amber Lord?

C: 说重点。办法是什么？
E: Get to the point. What's your plan?

C: 谈及盛会之星，就不得不提到「钟表匠」，匹诺康尼家喻户晓的大亨。财富、名誉、地位…他靠双手打拼出了所有人向往的事业，成为梦想的象征。
E: One can't discuss the Planet of Festivities without mentioning the Watchmaker — Penacony's household name and figure. Fortune, fame, status... He built everyone's futures with his bare hands, and became the symbol of dreams.

C: 这是阿基维利的记忆？
E: Is this the memory of Akivili?

C: （我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。在这枚梦泡中，您将共享梦泡主人的记忆，亲身经历他的所见所闻。）
E: (I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble. In the dream bubble, you'll be living through another person's past memories — you will experience what the original owner of the memory once experienced.)

C: 你潜入哈衣艾怡邦立动物园，用列车组半个琥珀纪的预算买下二百五十只鼻行兽幼崽，将它们豢养在洗手间内令其无限增殖，导致大量污水灌满其他车厢——
E: You sneaked into the Hyai'i Zoo and splurged half an Amber Era's crew budget on <unbreak>250</unbreak> Nosewalker cubs. You kept them in the restroom, where they were left to breed and multiply uncontrollably, causing other carriages to be filled with sewage...

C: 点好了吗？那我买单啦。
E: Are you done ordering? Then I'll pay up.

C: 啊，这…这……
E: Um, this is...

C: 不会要收费吧…
E: Aha, I know how this goes. You're gonna charge me a lot just for taking the pic, aren't you?

C: 这取决于你想做什么。
E: It depends on what you want to do.

C: 你默默地守护着美梦小镇的和平。根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: You silently protect the peace of Dreamville. According to your character traits, you can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

C: 嗯…我的眼睛成色是不如你，但我不瞎……
E: My eyes might not be as pretty as yours, but there's no problem with my vision...

C: 你成功了！可他怎么变成了这个样子？
E: You did it! But how did he end up like this?

C: 噢，天哪！看来你在他们心里有相当的分量啦。既然这样，你是不是也能叫他们离开了？
E: Wow! Seems like you've established yourself as an important figure around here. In that case, can you ask them to leave now?

C: …我刚才是…怎么了？
E: ...What got into me just now?

C: 当然、当然！一切都由各位说了算——小的们，散了！别打扰我们的贵客享受休闲时光！
E: Sure thing! You're the boss... Gang, let's give our VIP some space!

C: <size=36>是！老大！</size>
E: <size=36>Yes, boss!</size>

C: 我猜，是不是和那个…只有你能看见的钟表小子有关？
E: Could it have something to do with... That Clockie that only you can see?

C: 但倘若这位钟表小子真的存在，许多事就解释得通了。
E: If Clockie really exists, that can explain a lot of things.

C: 你究竟是谁？
E: Who exactly are you?

C: 做牛做马…这么说来，匹诺康尼有这种生物吗？感觉从没见过啊——牛也没有，马也没有…喔不对——我不就是牛马吗，这下破案了！
E: Dog... Are there even dogs in Penacony? I don't think I've ever seen one... Wait a minute... Aren't I a dog myself? Case solved!

C: 我们又见面了，亲爱的……
E: We meet again, my dear...

C: 这也太…「壮观」了……
E: This is too... overwhelming...

C: 要去很远的地方？
E: You're going to a faraway place?

C: 险象环生…但我们成功了。
E: That was a close one... but we made it.

C: （这都什么跟什么……）
E: (I'm confused...)

C: 对不起，我…别无选择。
E: Sorry, I... had no choice.

C: 隐瞒？在一位忆者面前，我应该做不到这事。
E: Hiding? I don't think I'd be capable of that in front of a Memokeeper.

C: 我们现在就在天花板上。
E: We're standing on the ceiling right now.

C: 领衔主演\n{NICKNAME}
E: Lead Actors\n{NICKNAME}

C: 我不求自己走得安详，只愿您能告诉我，在襁褓中熟睡的孩子…他可否梦见母亲的心跳，梦见雨落在大地的声响？求您告诉我，生命是否只是一场转瞬即逝的梦……
E: I don't ask for a peaceful death, just for you to tell me — does the baby swaddled sweetly asleep... does he dream of his mother's heartbeat and the sound of falling rain? Please tell me whether this life is all just a fleeting dream...

C: 筹码有很多，但得精挑细选。最直截了当的…还得是知更鸟。记得么，那假面愚者让我*找个哑巴做朋友*。
E: There are plenty of chips, but it'd be best to choose carefully. The most straightforward... has to be Robin. Remember? That Masked Fool once told me to find a mute as a friend.

C: 你隐瞒不了自己的身份。拔出那把刀吧，我们诚然会留在这里，我们注定会决一死战，因为我*选择*这么做。
E: You cannot hide your true identity. Draw that sword, for we shall indeed remain here, bound to fight a decisive battle to the death, for I choose this.

C: …我会向你坦诚。
E: ...I'll reveal the truth to you.
You...

C: 我们会让美梦恢复正常的。
E: We'll restore all the dreams back to normal.

C: 街上的人们依旧好开心，没人知道发生了什么…好不真实，就好像流萤和知更鸟小姐，还有我们…是另一个世界的人。
E: Everyone's still having a great time out there on the streets. Nobody knows what's happened... It's all so unreal, as if Firefly, Miss Robin, and us... were all outsiders from another world.

C: 泯灭帮？
E: The Annihilation Gang?

C: 那种事应该不会发生…但如果能让各位无名客少些防备，我乐意效劳。
E: That shouldn't be necessary... but if it makes the Nameless feel less defensive, I'll be happy to abide.

C: 我注视她很久了，第一次「邀约」是在酒店的宴会厅。
E: I've been watching her closely for a while now, and the first "invitation" was in the banquet hall of the hotel.

C: 现实中的客房倒是意外朴素……
E: The guest rooms are charmingly minimalist...

C: 您好，欢迎来到「黄金的时刻」基底模型。
E: Hello. Welcome to the Golden Hour base model.

C: 哈，你回来了——！把它放在这儿就行——感激不尽——！
E: Ha, you're back! Just place it here... Thank you...!

C: 拿来吧。存放基石的匣子是特制的，除公司高层及相关人员外，没人能打开它——但我恰好位列其中。
E: Bring it. The box containing Cornerstone is unique, and only IPC senior staff and related members can access it — but I happen to be among them.

C: 全部搞定，轻轻松松。
E: All done. Piece of cake.

C: 能麻烦您调取这些记录吗？
E: Can I trouble you to access the records?

C: 我在黄金的时刻与这位{M#先生}{F#小姐}有过一面之缘，记得当时那位银色头发的小姑娘也在……
E: I had an encounter with this {M#gentleman}{F#lady} in the Golden Hour. I remember that little silver-haired girl was there too...

C: 他是神话中的{RUBY_B#伊卡洛斯}逐日者{RUBY_E#}，向天飞翔，并以坠落迎来自己最终的胜利。
E: He was the {RUBY_B#Icarus}sunchaser{RUBY_E#} of legend, soaring towards the sky, and embracing his final victory with his fall.

C: 你就不怕这钱白花了？
E: Aren't you worried that the money you spent on me will go to waste?

C: 脸色很差啊。还是说，这也是你的演技？
E: You look pale. Or, is that also part of your act?

C: 去你该去的地方吧，我迫不及待想看到公司舰队包围匹诺康尼的样子了。你也拿到你想要的东西了，不是么？
E: Go, do what you must. I look forward to the sight of the IPC fleet surrounding Penacony. You've achieved what you desired, haven't you?

C: 结果呢？你搞砸了不说，还把自己给赔进去了。让你和哑巴交朋友，没让你身先士卒成为哑巴，真是辜负了人家的一片好意啊。
E: And what did you do? You messed it up and ended up as their prisoner. I told you to make friends with a mute, not become one yourself. You really let me down.

C: 你只要知道我有这个本事就行。
E: I have my own ways. That's all you need to know.

C: 即便在现实中，调饮也不只是酒水和食材的混合，调饮师会捕捉吧台上的氛围，注重手法与故事的结合，再加入一点小小的神秘和期待……
E: Even in reality, mixing drinks is more than just throwing ingredients together. A bartender needs to capture the bar's atmosphere, master technique, and spin a tale of mystery and anticipation...

C: 哼，很麻利嘛。让我看看……
E: Nice work. Let me take a look...

C: （再让她发散下去就大事不妙了…再想想办法吧。）
E: (Things might get out of control if she gets any angrier... I need to come up with another plan.)

C: 米哈伊尔…
E: Mikhail...

C: 是啊，我就说在哪听过…{NICKNAME}被那个假面愚者姑娘迷晕的时候，好像听见过有人在念叨这个名字，对不对？
E: Yeah, that name does sound familiar... When you got knocked out by that Masked Fool girl, {NICKNAME}, I think I heard someone calling that name. Do you remember?

C: 我是负责查案的治安官，怎么可能不知道…我猜你们一定也察觉到这句留言并非出自家族之手了——甚至两者的关系没那么好这件事？
E: No... but I'm the officer in charge of this case, and how could I not know?... I'm sure you must have noticed that this message didn't come from The Family. You might even have guessed that the relationship between The Family and the Watchmaker isn't as close as it seems?

C: 但凡事总有代价，美梦也不例外。最后，梦境也无法消解人们现实中的苦难，在一位囚犯的带领下，边陲监狱砸碎了公司的镣铐，开始为自由而战……
E: But everything has a price, and sweet dreams are no exception. In the end, the dream world was unable to alleviate the suffering of prisoners in reality. One of the prisoners broke free from the IPC's shackles and fought for freedom...

C: 原来《钟表小子》是纪录片…
E: So that Clockie cartoon is actually a documentary...

C: …「钟表小子」。
E: ...Including Clockie.

C: 就像你们一样，我也曾拥有亲密无间的伙伴。我们为匹诺康尼呕心沥血，可*橡木家系*…却陷我们于不义。
E: Just like you, I had close companions. We dedicated ourselves to Penacony, but the Oak Family... they set us up.

C: 还有…家族并非万众一心。
E: And that... The Family isn't all "united as one".

C: 跟你的说法相比，拉帝奥的「阿蒂尼孔雀」都显得动听极了。
E: When you put it like that, even Ratio's "Attini Peacock" analogy sounds pleasant.

C: 你好，我们又见面了，眼睛很漂亮的先生。
E: Hello, we meet again, Mr. Pretty-eyes.

C: 不知道为什么，先生，你总给我一种特别的感觉…让我很好奇，跃跃欲试。
E: I don't know why, Mister, but you always give me a special feeling... that makes me more curious about you.

C: 但无论你是否相信，这就是真实的「我」。
E: Whether you believe it or not, this is the real "me."

C: 你是在威胁我么？
E: Are you threatening me?

C: 方才那场事故，给部分宾客带来了不好的体验。作为家族的一员，我理应前来向各位致歉。
E: Regarding the recent mishap... I understand it negatively impacted some of our guests. As a member of The Family, it's only right for me to come forward and offer my apologies to everyone.

C: 唉，也有这种怎么都不听劝的人啊。没完没了…我也是会累的。
E: Ugh, some people just never listen, do they? It's never-ending. It just goes on and on... I'm getting really tired of this.

C: 但一瞬的麻痹散去后，我发现自己的身体完好无损。
E: But after the momentary numbness subsided, I found that my body was absolutely unscathed.

C: 那只迷因的每一次出现都与「钟表匠」有关，既然流梦礁是它将众人掳走的目的地，想必不少困扰我们许久的问题，都能在此地得到启发。
E: Every emergence of that meme is related to the Watchmaker. Since Dreamflux Reef is where it brings its captives, it's likely that many of our longstanding questions will be answered in this place.

C: 看见这大空洞了么？很多年前它还只是一道缝隙，现在已经长成了一个大洞。这附近的忆质一直以某个恒定的速度缓慢流向空洞的另一端。
E: See that huge gaping hole? It was just a narrow rift many years ago, but now it's grown into a giant hole. The surrounding memoria has been flowing towards the other end of the hole at a constant velocity, slowly but surely.

C: 在启程来到匹诺康尼前，列车长拜托我们打听的几位无名客里就有她的名字。看来她在流梦礁进行了大量的研究与测算，而后匆匆离世。
E: Before we came to Penacony, the conductor had given us a list of Nameless to look into — her name was mentioned. It seems like she did a great deal of research and calculations in Dreamflux Reef... before abruptly passing away.

C: 最近生面孔是越来越多了，美梦中肯定发生了不少事吧。阿斯德纳仅剩的几片自由之地，也要不得安宁了啊……
E: There have been a lot of new faces lately. Things must be tough in the beautiful dream. *sigh* The few remaining havens of freedom in Asdana will soon face trouble...

C: 既然你身在此处…我们可否认为，知更鸟小姐已经充分知晓了匹诺康尼的现状？
E: Since you're here... can we assume that you're fully aware of the situation in Penacony?

C: 他总是对无名客抱有莫名其妙的信心。在他的布置里，「开拓」永远占有一席之地，我不知道这自信从何而来…他还活着的时候，从来没有成功联系上列车。
E: That old man always had this strange belief in the Nameless and the Trailblaze, and I never understood where he got that confidence from... especially since he never managed to get in touch with the Express while he was alive.

C: （不像是演的。也就是说，就连酒店员工也不知情。）
E: (She doesn't appear to be acting. So it seems that even the hotel staff are out of the loop.)

C: 那就来杯今日特调「玻璃村庄」吧，经典苏乐达配上爆炸柠果汁，口感清爽，也符合您清冷的气质。请二位稍等。
E: Then I would recommend today's special, Glass Village — it's Classic SoulGlad mixed with Leboom juice. It's refreshing and suits your cool demeanor. Just one minute.

C: 哎呀！不要大庭广众之下喊我网名好吗！
E: Ah! Don't expose my net handle to everyone!

C: 已经换题啦！现在要表演「惊喜」，不是「失望」……
E: We're already at the next scene! You need to convey surprise now, not disappointment...

C: 快起来啦…没有人靠磕头打商战的吧……
E: Get up! No one wins a trade war by kowtowing...

C: 那我们就再来一次吧…准备好了吗？
E: Well, here we go again... Ready?

C: 前进吧，朋友们——等那个时刻到来，我和所有迷钟都会为你们加油的！
E: Go forth, my friends — when the moment comes, all the Dream Tickers and I will cheer for you!

C: 我获悉庆典召开在即，便让「希世难得号」开足马力，将我引领至匹诺康尼。然而没有「纯美」看顾的银河举世混浊，我在前来途中为救死扶伤耽搁许久……
E: Upon hearing of the impending festivities, I commanded the One and Only to bring me to Penacony with full haste. Alas, in a cosmos unguarded by the Beauty, disorder prevails, thus my passage was delayed by tending to the sick and injured...

C: 你…也对瓦尔特做了同样的事吗？
E: Did you do the same to Welt?

C: 那只雏鸟还小，连羽毛都没长齐，也不会唱歌。我们发现时，它落在草丛中奄奄一息，似乎是被父母遗弃了。
E: That baby bird was tiny, it didn't even have all of its feathers, and it couldn't sing. When we found it, it was already on its last breath, having fallen into a shrub — probably abandoned by its parents.

C: 好问题。人类的意识本质上是种幻觉，是一座座名为「自我价值」的监牢。人被这幻觉诱导，犯下错误，后果却要由外物承担。
E: Good question. Human consciousness is fundamentally an illusion, a cage known as "self-worth." People lured in by this illusion, make mistakes, yet still ask that external influences bear the burden.

C: 但这与伟大的事业并不冲突。唯有承认这点，我们才能理解人性的软弱，进而包容，进而庇佑。
E: But this is not in conflict with the grand plan. Only in acknowledging this, can we truly understand the frailty of human nature, and from there, show compassion and protection.

C: 就是这，我记得这条走廊。
E: This is it. I remember this corridor.

C: 米沙，又想起什么了吗？
E: Have you recalled anything, Misha?

C: 我本应留在梦泡中等待各位到访，但现实和记忆重叠在一起，让我不自觉地推门而出，带着钟表小子离开了这里。
E: I should have stayed here and waited for you, but when reality and memories merged, I unconsciously pushed open that door and left the bubble with Clockie.

C: 感谢各位帮我找回这段漫长的旅程，容我重新做个自我介绍吧。
E: Thank you all for helping me rediscover my true self. Now, please allow me to reintroduce myself.

C: 我知道它原本长什么样，挂链断裂，背壳破损，刻度也都快磨没了…你是怎么做到的。
E: I know what it looked like before. Its chain was broken, the back case torn, and the marks on the dial all worn out... How did you manage to fix it?

C: 从他身上，我感受到强烈的信念和支配欲，倘若不能堂堂正正地胜出，想必他也没法给自己一个交代吧。
E: I sensed a strong conviction and a desire for dominance in him. Maybe he won't accept the outcome unless he wins fair and square.

C: 别在意。逐渐丧失自我的存在…是每个自灭者都要面对的现实。至少，我还没有完全失去感官和记忆。
E: Don't worry about it. Losing oneself is a reality that every Self-Annihilator must face. At least, I haven't completely lost my senses and memories yet.

C: 这就是匹诺康尼大剧院的内部了。
E: This is the interior of the Penacony Grand Theater.

C: 「三位无名客留在此地，试图向边陲监狱传递『开拓』的教益，但可惜，无济于事。」
E: "The three Nameless stayed on the planet, endeavoring to spread the tenets of Trailblaze throughout the frontier prison. Alas, their efforts proved futile."

C: 「接下来的故事围绕着权力斗争。树、草、花、鸟、兽、果、虫七大家系在匹诺康尼一一落成。」
E: "Behold the ensuing tale, a struggle for power. Penacony witnessed the ascent of the seven major lineages — Tree, Grass, Flower, Bird, Beast, Fruit, and Insect."

C: 听，整个阿斯德纳都在下雪！天空摇摇欲坠，大地积重难返。银色宇宙的尽头——朝阳冒出了初生的芽！
E: Listen, snow blankets all of Asdana! The sky trembles, and the earth teeters on the brink of collapse. At the edge of the silver universe, the first buds sprout under the rising sun!

C: 不对，不是这个画框，是那个有很多人偶围着的。
E: No, not this frame. It's the one surrounded by puppets.

C: 「惟有<color=#dbc291ff>理性</color>才能令其免于过去的流毒。」新至的主人如是说。
E: "Only {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>reason</color>{RUBY_E#} can shield people from the lingering poison of the past," proclaimed the new master.

C: 学会和天才俱乐部同样对匹诺康尼此次灾难报以高度关注。最后，我双方决定达成全面合作，对匹诺康尼的重建予以技术支持……
E: The Guild, much like the Genius Society, has taken a keen interest in the recent calamity in Penacony. Ultimately, both parties have agreed to a comprehensive collaboration, offering technical support for the reconstruction of Penacony...

C: 一段时间后……
E: Some time later...

C: 虽然他们的经历有些遗憾，但我想他们应该也了却了各自的心愿…这都多亏了你们。非常感谢各位帕。
E: What they had to go through was regrettable, but I reckon they all fulfilled their wishes... And it was thanks to all of you — thank you, everyone.

C: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》
E: Honkai: Star Rail

C: 加拉赫
E: Gallagher

C: 我不想，可是……
E: No, but...

C: 「巡猎」的死志直至生命终结也不会平息，但好在…我们终于引渡了这些亡魂。他们生前都是英雄，再也不会沦为「虚无」的傀儡了。
E: The unwavering determination of The Hunt followers persists even in death, but thankfully... we've guided those lost souls to their lives beyond. They were heroes in their time, and they won't be reduced to puppets of the Nihility in their death.

C: 正如每一个迈向死亡的生命都在热烈地生长，向着「虚无」的尽头……
E: Just as every life that edges closer to death fervently approaches the end of the Nihility...

C: 星穹列车的故事既告一段落，也重新开始。时间滚滚向前，而「开拓」之旅亦即将翻开新的篇章。
E: The tale of the Astral Express reaches both its conclusion and a new beginning. Time marches forward, heralding the arrival of a new chapter in the history of Trailblazing expeditions.

C: 可是妹妹，你知道吗？没有一颗星星属于「现在」。我们看见的星空，都是它们在很久以前发出的光芒。
E: But do you know, sister? No star actually belongs to the present. The light we see from them is from a long time ago.

C: 这些人是…？
E: These people are...?

C: 再讲讲匹诺康尼的现状…
E: Tell me more about the current state of Penacony...

C: 我还以为他们会挑个更低调，更正式点的地方谈事，没想到居然找了艘豪华空艇……
E: I thought they would choose a more formal and low-key location for the conference. I didn't expect them to go with a luxury airship...

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，没错，一语中的！简简单单的几个字，里面牵扯到的利害关系可是盘根错节，好不复杂！
E: Ohohoho! Precisely! Those few words represent a terribly complicated situation indeed!

C: 继续刚才的话题吧。
E: Please continue the topic.

C: 三杯「开拓的光辉」，向各位致敬。
E: Here's a toast, with three glasses of "Glory of the Trailblaze" to all of you.

C: 然后，公司便能操纵一切。
E: And then the IPC will be able to exert influence over everything.

C: 他们也会认清局势的。当问出最后一个问题的时候，老奥帝代表的，就不止是苜蓿草家系了。
E: They will soon realize the situation. When the last question was asked, Old Oti represented more than just the Alfalfa Family.

C: …怎么抓到他的？呵…有贵人相助。细节就别问了。
E: ...How did I find him? Well... let's just say I had some help from an influential figure. Don't ask for all the details.

C: 他是我此行的监考对象。哼，教务办公室的任务罢了。
E: This individual is my responsibility during the trip. Hmph, nothing more than an errand from the Office of Academic Affairs.

C: 行了，谐乐大典不是马上要开始了么？机会难得，去吧，只有劳逸结合才能更好地汲取知识。
E: Very well, the Charmony Festival is about to commence soon. Take advantage of this unique opportunity, a blend of work and play is essential for superior knowledge absorption.

C: 不瞒你说，我之所以成为法外狂徒并不因为我他宝贝的是一颗炸弹，而是因为我他宝贝的掌握着一则古老而疯狂、为人伦所不容的亵渎咒语。
E: To be frank, I didn't become an outlaw because I'm a fudgin' bomb. It's because I'm the fudgin' owner of an ancient, mad, forbidden curse.

C: 并非是命运塑造了我们，而是我们塑造了命运。
E: It is not destiny that shapes us, but we who shape destiny.

C: 匹诺康尼的夜很长，还远远未到所有人都能安眠的时候。至于那边的美梦……
E: Penacony's nights are long, and there are many who are still far from a good night's sleep. As for the sweet dream over there...

C: 就算没有它，我们不也活到现在了么？
E: We're still managing without it, aren't we?

C: 看来，这就是加拉赫先生留给我们的最后一道「谜题」了。
E: Looks like this is the last riddle that Mr. Gallagher left for us.

C: 只要不代入，就没有影响。
E: You won't be affected as long as you don't live vicariously through them.

C: 我想，它并非外物，而是来自我们自身，是从过去的某个时刻…跨越时间而来的感情。
E: I believe it's not something external, but something that originates within us, an emotion that traverses time from a certain moment of our past to reach us.

C: 每次…每次不管列车停靠在哪，你们总是要搞得天翻地覆帕！帕姆预先计划好的发车时间，根本没有乘客会遵守！再这样下去，列车的燃料就要耗光了帕！
E: No matter where the Express stops, you lot always manage to cause chaos! My well-thought-out timetable? Completely ignored! If you carry on like this, the Express is going to run out of fuel!

C: 但因为此前的遭遇…燃料的消耗比预想中更迅速，再进行两次跃迁可能就是极限了。
E: But because of our previous encounters... fuel is being used up much faster than expected. We can probably only pull off two more warp jumps at most.

C: 上次的时光可不怎么愉快呀……
E: We didn't have an enjoyable stay the last time, though...

C: 大老远就瞧见你们了，带着相机的粉红系美少女…你就是「赵相机」同学吧！
E: You guys were easy to spot. You, the pink pretty girl with the camera, you're Say~Cheese~, aren't you?

C: 我拒绝回答。
E: I refuse to answer.

C: 哇，好刺激的口感，像是什么东西在咬我的舌头……
E: Woah, it's intense! It's as if something is biting my tongue.

C: 啊…真是美味的甜品，好开心……
E: Ahh, this dessert is so tasty. I feel so happy!

C: 正是在下！
E: That's me!

C: 遵命，飞龙忍者•AOI•丹恒阁下。
E: Understood, Ninja Hiryū Aoi Dan Heng.

C: 要逃吗？
E: Should we run?

C: 这事你说了不算，自说自话把这块地据为己有…恐怕没人会接受吧？
E: It doesn't matter what you say. You can't just stake your claim on this place. No one's going to accept that.

C: 不知为何，那种杂音虽然没有实质性的影响，但每当我使用「同谐」的力量进行调律时，却会感到无比疲惫。
E: Even though the noise doesn't cause any tangible impact, it leaves me feeling awfully drained every time I use the power of Harmony for tuning. I can't explain it.

C: 用不着那么客气，叫我哥们就得了。
E: Hey, don't be a stranger. You can just call me "pardner," yeah?

C: 请问：睡蕉社的成员都有哪些级别？
E: What tiers make up the Slumbernana Association's membership hierarchy?

C: 这不对吧……
E: I don't think so...

C: 和一个好消息？
E: And good news too?

C: 「转变」仍在继续，流梦礁的猴子越来越多了，毫无疑问都是这里的居民。
E: The "conversion" is still in progress. The number of monkeys in Dreamflux Reef is still increasing, and I'm certain they used to be residents of the place.

C: 哈，还抢起我的词儿了？那也好办。
E: Sheesh, isn't that one of my lines? But sure, if you prefer it this way...

C: 你收回蕴含开拓之力的铁拳，但它的表情没有任何变化。你以暴力痛吻它，它却报之以笑容。
E: You retract your iron fist imbued with the Trailblaze power, but its expression remains unchanged. You have struck it with violence, but it responds with a smile.

C: 二者皆非。在我看来，他们需要的只是一个镜头。然后，坐在屏幕前的人就能看见这世上最精彩的戏码。
E: I'd say neither. All they need is a camera to capture them. That's when others would be able to see the most wonderful show in the entire universe.

C: 这哥们没搭理你，看来无穷的苦闷已经闭塞了他的视听。
E: This guy doesn't acknowledge you. It seems like his endless troubles have shut him off from the world.

C: 哟！球棒•忍者。琉璃•忍者。飞龙•忍者。
E: Yo! Baseball Bat Ninja. Ninja Ruri. Ninja Hiryū.

C: 当然。忍者所见略同，这名为「课堂」的道场定有诡诈。此地亦有邪祟出没，诸位忍者务必小心•行事。
E: Certainly, great ninjas think alike. This "class" dojo seems shady. It harbors fiendlings. Exercise caution, fellow ninja warriors.

C: 唔！
E: Uh!

C: 还是认清现实，早点放弃这条路吧，蕉蕉蕉。
E: It's better to face reality and give up on this path sooner rather than later, bana tsk.

C: 什、什么？你是谁，什么时候上来的……
E: Wh—Wha? Who are you? And when did you get here—

C: 来——让我们拿出热情，欢迎新同学！
E: Join me in a round of applause for our new student!

C: 所以阁下所行之事，就是令痛苦之人失明失聪？实在荒谬！
E: In that case... Your calling is to render those in misery blind and deaf? Utter absurdity!

C: 盛会巨星来了！
E: Festive Superstar's ready to roll!

C: 因为除了睡蕉小猴，其他角色都不重要蕉。
E: All other characters are second to Slumbernana Monkey. They're not important.

C: 那就赶紧上台！芮克先生，准备开机蕉。
E: Then get on stage! Mr. Reca, get the cameras rolling, bana!

C: 让在下来唤醒大家吧！缭乱•空手道•正气断惑手刀•连打式！
E: Watch me snap everyone back to their senses! Hi-yah! Dazzling Palm: Righteous Chop!

C: ——雷霆激响之声
E: — A rumble of thunder

C: 这家伙也停止运作了，真的就像有人在背后操纵一样。
E: This one has ceased operating as well. It's as if some unseen puppeteer cut its strings.

C: 这位同学，你的话真的很难懂，不会是在骂我吧？
E: Girl, I cannot begin to fathom your cryptic speech. It doesn't sound like you're speaking ill of me... Or are you?

C: 博士的<color=#dbc291ff>「失败品」</color>？
E: Doctor's <color=#dbc291ff>"failed creation"</color>?

C: 请便吧，我期待您为我的证明补上最后的一环。
E: As you wish. I look forward to you providing the last link in my proof.

C: 我这是…在做梦吗？
E: Am I... dreaming?

C: 蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bana bana!

C: 难道是说钟表把戏…
E: Do you mean Clockwork...?

C: <size=36>皆非！</size>
E: <size=36>Nay, none of these!</size>

C: ——所以，你要自己决定。
E: So, the decision is yours to make.

C: *大师密咒*，那是我们从小养大的孩子，你就没有一丁点道德吗？！
E: How could you!? We brought her up since she was a baby! Do you not have a shred of morality!?

C: 好了，牛仔演员，不必再跟玩偶对戏了。
E: Alright, cowboy actor, you don't have to continue acting with that puppet.

C: 当然，在银河忍界中，恶徒如绮罗星般纷繁。神明无暇顾及众生，拥有超凡忍•力的忍者•大师亦在互相争斗，这便是末法之世。
E: Of course... In the Cosmic Ninja Realm, evildoers are as abundant as the glittering stars. The gods have no spare attention to protect the mortals and the powerful ninja masters with extraordinary ninjutsu powers constantly fighting against one another. That is the Mappou Age of the Dharma.

C: 快看，是姬子姐姐和杨叔！
E: Look! It's Himeko and Mr. Yang!

C: 「为了公平，权赐你『纷争』之血一用吧！」
E: "In the name of fairness, I grant you the blood of Strife!"

C: …阿格莱雅，恕我直言。
E: Aglaea, with all due respect...

C: 不错，这是一种可能性。再回想下翁法罗斯的特征——一个「陷入永夜」、「与世隔绝」且「遭到不知名力量蚕食」的世界……
E: That's right. If you think about the various characteristics of Amphoreus — an isolated world of eternal night being eroded by an unknown power... we cannot discount this possibility.

C: 破坏一切，卑劣的王…来取我性命，终于？
E: Destroyed all, the wicked king... Here to take my life, finally?

C: 「为什么？她为捍卫你的尊严，明知自己将死于毒计，却仍向悬锋先王发起角斗。难道你想说，这一切都不过是她空自劳苦么？」
E: "Why not? She challenged the former Kremnos king to a duel, even knowing that it was a deadly trap, all to protect your dignity. Are you suggesting her efforts were for naught?"

C: …你为什么在这儿？
E: ...Why are you here?

C: 不辛苦！伤员们都很配合治疗，能让大家健健康康回家去，我就心满意足啦。
E: It's no trouble at all! The patients are very cooperative when we attend to them. I'm just thrilled to see them all going home healthy again.

C: …是缇安发现的！缇安今天早上心情不好，就跑到奥赫玛的郊外散心，然后，然后就发现他倒在了路边！
E: ...Was discovered by Trianne! Trianne was in a baaaad mood this morning, so we went to the outskirts of Okhema for some fresh air... b—but then we found him collapsed on the roadside!

C: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的气息…吾认得汝，哀地里亚的死亡女神可是声名在外。
E: The scent of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... I recognize you. Aidonia's renowned Goddess of Death.

C: 求求你，别笑了…
E: Please, stop laughing...

C: 这颗心脏是树庭一切水流之源……
E: This heart is the source of all water in the Grove...

C: 你就拿这个考验我无名客？
E: Is this how you're going to test a Nameless?

C: 有蝶在，好让人放心呀。那人家也得开动脑筋——
E: It's so reassuring to have Cas around. I should put my brain to use too, then.

C: 知道了。抱歉呢，粉色的小兔子。
E: Understood. My apologies, pink bunny.

C: 这回又是「粉色小兔子」了吗？人家的物种还真是包容万象呢……
E: It's pink bunny this time? I'm truly an all-encompassing species...

C: 喏，小小的「死亡」女神，轮到你了。
E: Well, it's your turn now, little goddess of Death.

C: 不过…你们要是别让人家变成这些小东西嘴里的点心，就更好了…！
E: But... It would be best if you could keep me from becoming a snack for these little things...!

C: 正是，分作了三份。一份藏于「金枝誓言」中，一份与{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的余火一道封入琥珀……
E: Indeed, I split it into three. I hid one within the Golden Bough of Vows, and sealed another in the amber along with {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s remaining embers...

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 呼，终于能呼吸到新鲜空气了！
E: Phew, finally! Some fresh air!

C: 天上飘来睡莲了…好厉害！大家是不是可以走上去？
E: I see water lilies floating in the sky... So cool! Can we walk on it?

C: 这也在你们的布局中么？
E: Is this also part of your grand scheme?

C: 还有什么事？
E: Is there something else?

C: 缇安…？
E: Trianne...?

C: 感觉，我俩都很久没有笑过了。
E: It feels like neither of us have laughed for a long while.

C: 它瞠乎其后。
E: It fixated on its rival's fleeing form in the chase.
Hmph...
...Ugh!

C: 单方面开启的竞赛，如何能够作数？
E: How does one contender alone make a valid competition?

C: 嗯，我丝毫不感到意外。如你所见，我既是幸存者，又了解灾变始末，在身负一颗火种的同时，还毫无反抗能力。
E: That does not surprise me. And now, I'm a survivor who witnessed the entirety of the disaster, as well as the defenseless bearer of a Coreflame.

C: 就算我不节外生枝，老老实实跑去向那女人献忠心，她就会给我好脸色？我可不惮往她的脸上多宣泄几分忿怒。
E: Do you really think that woman would treat me well even if I behaved and proved my loyalty? I wouldn't mind seeing a bit more anger on her face.

C: 牺牲者和家属们都令人敬佩。
E: Those who sacrificed their lives and their families are truly admirable.

C: 拒绝？你错了，是死亡惧怕我。拜它所赐，我才有了这副钢铁之躯。
E: Defy? You're wrong. Death fears me. It's the reason I have this body of steel.

C: 但悬锋的城墙不会随我一同崩塌…吾儿，你以为自己逃得出命运的掌心？
E: But the walls of Kremnos will not fall with me. Do you truly think you can escape fate's grasp, my son?
(Mama...)

C: 在那艘好大的船上，会有一位厉害的船长。她开朗乐观，胆大心细，能把大家联系在一起。
E: There will be an amazing captain on that big ship. She's cheerful, optimistic, bold, and cautious. She'll be able to get everyone together.

C: （可现在…我连这是梦还是记忆…都分不清了。）
E: (But now... I can't even tell if this is a memory or a dream...)

C: 嗯，看到了。那是…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}在警告*我们*吗？
E: Yeah, I saw it. Was that... a warning from {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?

C: 久违了哪…尼卡多利。
E: Long time no see... Nikador.

C: 在我们前去重渊之时，那刻夏老师已带着{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的火种离开圣城，提前赶往战场布局。
E: Anaxa had already left the holy city with {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} Coreflame while we were on the way to the Abyss, so he can make preparations for the battlefield.

C: 是我。
E: Yes.

C: …你，等等。
E: ...Hold on.

C: 但，这张照片…真挺好的。
E: But this one... It's pretty good.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝女士…不在此处么？
E: Is Lady Tribios not here...?

C: 我看不见了…
E: I can't see...

C: 和元老院说的一样，大敌当前，黄金裔只会引发更多战乱，而不是考虑民众的安危……
E: It's as the Council of Elders said. We face a dangerous threat, yet the Chrysos Heirs are only inciting more chaos. They don't care about the people's safety...

C: 可以麻烦你吗，缇宁？
E: Trinnon, would you mind?

C: 原来那天，你看见*我们*争吵了吗？
E: Oh, so you saw us arguing that day?

C: 因为……
E: It's because...

C: 呜，我也想去…我有问题想问{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}。
E: I wish I could go too... I have something to ask {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}.

C: 大部分不是，但过会儿就不一定了。
E: Mostly, but it might not be the case later on.

C: 唉…也好。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}为您指明出路。
E: *sigh* Alright then. May {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.

C: 圣城卫队豢养的奇兽？明明只有一步之遥了……
E: A creature of the holy city guards? But I'm already so close...

C: 她还会穿过这道山门，踏上旅途吗？
E: Would she still have chosen to walk through the gate and start her journey?

C: 若我果真能冲破世间的至暗……
E: If I can truly pierce through the utter darkness...

C: 放心，在球里呢。
E: Don't worry. They're inside the ball.

C: 我不想做非黑即白的断定，但他们的行事方式…确实令人不快。
E: I'm not ready to label them as good or bad, but their conduct... is certainly irritating.
Hehe...

C: 可惜，我得代表奥赫玛，请你们放缓脚步了。
E: Unfortunately, on behalf of Okhema, I must ask you to slow your pace.

C: 这台设备，就是测试「差分宇宙」的装置吗？
E: So this is the device for testing the "Divergent Universe," huh?

C: 所以，圣杯真的能实现我的愿望吗？
E: So, the Holy Grail... Can it really grant my wish?

C: 接下来，就是最激动人心的时刻了！{NICKNAME}将踏入召唤阵，念动咒语，召唤出匹诺康尼历史上伟大的灵魂…之一！
E: Next up is the moment we've all been waiting for! {NICKNAME} will step in the summoning circle, chant the spell, and summon one of the greatest souls in Penaconian history!

C: 不错的提议。不过，我这不是钓上了你这条大鱼吗？
E: Not a bad idea. But you see, I just hooked a big one.

C: 在过去的圣杯战争中，有过几次交手。虽然我们经常立场相悖，但他人还不错。
E: We've crossed swords a few times in past Holy Grail Wars. Our allegiances often clashed, but... he's not a bad person.

C: 这的确是个不得了的从者，但……
E: No doubt, he's an incredible Servant. But...

C: 一阵疾风拂过，蓝发的年轻人已消失在众人眼前。
E: A breeze blows past and the blue-haired man disappears.

C: 不，{F#她}{M#他}让我们去克劳克影视乐园，谈谈结盟的事情。
E: No. {M#He}{F#She} wants us to meet at Clock Studios Theme Park. Says {F#s}he wants to talk about an alliance.

C: 不必担心，我的御主。无论发生什么，我都会保护你的。
E: Don't worry, Master. No matter what happens, I'll protect you.

C: 因为现在的生活不称心如意，就觉得自己应该属于其他地方，这不过是另一种美化了的逃避现实的借口罢了。
E: They think they should be somewhere else because life isn't going their way. It's just another dressed-up excuse to escape reality.

C: █奇物██审批。
E: █Curio██ Approval.

C: 轻松完成工作。
E: Breeze through the work.

C: 我不应该是地概科科员。
E: I shouldn't be a member of the Department of Cosmic Geography.

C: 我确实想过，如果有另一个人拔出了选王之剑，也许他会比我做得更好。
E: I did wonder whether someone else might have done a better job as king if they pulled out the Sword of Selection.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我以第三划令咒下令，作为舞台上的后辈，我归还您身为人的自由。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>With the third Command Spell, as your junior on the stage, I return to you your freedom as a person.</color>

C: 他们将自己的梦注入其中，让匹诺康尼成为了如今的模样。那么，匹诺康尼有没有回应他们的愿望呢？
E: They poured their dreams into Penacony to shape the planet into what it is today. But the question is... has Penacony ever answered their dreams?

C: 我剪去了涉及参赛者隐私的内容，保留了这场「圣杯战争」最精彩的部分。也许它在艺术性上谈不上是什么优秀的作品…但在商业性上，它应当不会令您失望的。
E: I've cut out everything related to the participants' privacy and kept only the most thrilling parts of the Holy Grail War. It may not be an artistic masterpiece, but it should meet your commercial expectations.

C: …不对劲，难道说有人捷足先登，趁我们来之前把{F#她}{M#他}和从者都干掉了？
E: ...Something's off. Maybe someone got the jump on them and took {M#him}{F#her} and {M#his}{F#her} Servant out before we got here.

C: 「你们是一群星际和平公司的员工，为了表彰你们本年度的杰出业绩，公司特地为你们组织了一场酒店度假。」
E: "You are employees of the Interastral Peace Corporation. To reward your outstanding performance this year, the IPC has organized a special vacation at a hotel."

C: 桀桀桀桀桀，想跑，有问过主角我的意见吗？
E: Kekekeke... Trying to run? Did I, the protagonist, ever gave you permission to run!?

C: 咱们可都还好好的呢。
E: We're all just fine for the time being.

C: 不用你说，刚才我已经试过了…只是没想到，葛瑞迪还挺贪财。
E: You don't need to remind me of that. I've already tried it... But didn't expect Grady to be such a greedy money-grubber.

C: 御主，台词！念登场台词！
E: Master, your line! Say your entrance line!

C: 走吧，按那位大导演的说法，我们该去被恶灵折磨了。
E: Come on. According to that great director, it's time for us to be tortured by the evil spirits.

C: 果然，我在这场战争中根本一事无成，不配被称作英灵。
E: I figured I've managed to do nothing in this war. I don't deserve to be called a Heroic Spirit.

C: 如果我在这里退缩了，和其他斯科特还有什么分别！想要伤害知更鸟小姐…除非，从我的尸体上跨过去呱！
E: If I back down now, I'd be the same as all the other Skotts. So... If you want to hurt Miss Robin... You'll have to walk over my dead body! *ribbit*

C: 救命啊！
E: Help!

C: 当然，哈努兄弟说，他要一拳把恶灵给揍趴下啾啾！
E: Of course! Brother Hanu says he's gonna punch that evil spirit right in the face!

C: 发出沮丧的*哼*。
E: Let out a dejected *hmph*.

C: 你的钟表把戏的力量来源于钟表小子，而我是钟表老子，小子见了老子，自然就失灵了。
E: The power of your Clockwork comes from Clockie, but I am Old Clockie. When the junior meets the senior, it's only natural for you to fail.

C: 哼，只是不想遂了葛瑞迪的愿而已。
E: Hmph, I just didn't want to give Grady the satisfaction.

C: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}，我说谎了。
E: Apologies, {NICKNAME}, I wasn't being honest.

C: 这又是唱的哪出？挑拨离间？
E: What are you yapping about this time? Tryin' to drive a wedge?

C: 但请相信宇宙时代的医疗技术——没有任何一个斯科特，在圣杯战争中受到了不可逆的伤害，尤其是在梦中。
E: But have faith in the medical advances of the cosmic age — No Skott was irreversibly harmed in the Holy Grail War. Especially not in a dream.

C: 那股柔和的力量，把怪物们全镇住了……
E: That gentle force... it stopped every single monster...

C: 我怕，换别的吧。
E: Sounds scary. Can we go somewhere else?

C: 那她呢？
E: What about her?

C: 「哦，你可以重获自由，但作为代价，必须与过去的家人为敌」——类似这样？
E: Did they make you a deal? "You can have your freedom back, but in return, you must turn against all whom you once called family" or something like that?

C: 或是偿还旧事。
E: Or by making amends for past deeds.

C: 而在辞别故乡时，也应当如此。
E: The same applies when bidding my home farewell, too.

C: 我也没想到会在匹诺康尼遇见螺丝咕姆先生，还以为天才俱乐部没有收到盛会的邀请函呢。
E: Neither did I expect to see you here in Penacony, Mr. Screwllum. I had assumed the Genius Society wasn't invited to the festivities.

C: 但我们没法离开梦境，做不了外贸，这不是见三月七小姐聪敏过人，想拉您来做对外接洽嘛！
E: I know we can't leave the Dreamscape to trade with the outside worlds, so that's where you come in, Miss March 7th! Your wits surpass many others, making you the perfect person to handle liaison negotiations on our behalf!

C: 这里三人可长着四对眼睛。
E: Know that there are four pairs of eyes between the three of us.

C: 怎么这就忘了呀！停云小姐要回联盟了，咱们是来替她挑伴手礼的。
E: Did you forget already? Miss Tingyun is going back to the Alliance, so we're here to help her pick out souvenirs.

C: 有点神秘。
E: A bit mysterious.

C: 各位恩公，停云向你们郑重道谢。
E: Dear benefactors, I extend my heartfelt gratitude to you.

C: 你是想说好糊弄吧……
E: So easy to take advantage of, you mean?

C: …她不该为我的私心承担任何风险。
E: ...I shouldn't put her at risk for my selfishness.

C: 虽然只是梦中的星空呢。
E: I know these stars only exist in the dream but...

C: 关于这一点，也许梦境和现实没有区别。
E: Well, perhaps the dreamscape is not so different from reality.

C: 我的看法和杨叔不同…
E: I don't agree with Mr. Yang...

C: 既然我们在匹诺康尼的事了结了，按原计划，差不多该准备跃迁了？
E: Now that our business on Penacony is settled, it's about time we get back on track and prepare for our next warp jump?

C: 而他们将会再度相见的人…除了朋友，也有敌手。
E: And those they will meet again... include not only friends, but also foes.

C: 不能让她得逞。
E: Let's prove her wrong.

C: 同意。
E: Agreed.

C: 当然。星穹列车一直沿着阿基维利开辟的银轨行驶，正常情况下，是没有办法前往「开拓」认知外的世界的。
E: Absolutely. The Astral Express has always traveled along the silver rail laid down by Akivili. We don't normally get to venture into a world beyond the knowledge of the Trailblaze.

C: 抱歉，不知怎的…跃迁结束后，就使不上力了……
E: Sorry, guys. I don't know what's wrong... I just feel really weak after the warp...

C: 别，我不要留下你一个人…
E: Nooo, how could I leave you by yourself...?

C: 别着急，因为…就算着急也没用嘛。不如先跟我来，让我给你讲讲发生在银河另一端的故事……
E: Heh, keep it together. All that excitement isn't going to get you anywhere, you know. Why don't you follow me into another tale on the other side of the cosmos...?

C: 你以为呢？整个黑塔空间站的能源都被我转化成了虚数态，蓄存在这个扇区。要是不配置点超低温环境，空间站早就被炸上天了。
E: Hmph, why else? I've converted the energy core that supplies all of Herta Space Station into Imaginary state and stored it in this zone. If not for the ultra-low temperature here, the space station would have long blasted off into the sky.

C: 救命！虫子的体液，崩到我的镜面上了！
E: Ew, yuck! Help me! Goo from those bugs got onto my reflective surface!

C: 黑塔女士，您身后——
E: Madam Herta, behind you—

C: 发现。入侵。
E: Intruder. Detected.

C: 唔…唔……
E: Mmph...! Nngh...!

C: 别看只有第四面镜跟在我身边，它的兄弟姐妹们早就把你的行踪一览无余了。让我想想…该怎么惩罚一个胆大包天的窃贼呢？
E: Think I only have Fourth Mirror following me around? Then you've let your guard down, because her siblings have long been watching your every move. Now, let me think... What kind of punishment should I subject a brazen thief like you to?

C: 有点像幕后黑手。
E: The mastermind behind everything?

C: 然后你回过神来，似乎听到一个调皮的声音在耳边轻语——
E: Then you regain focus, hearing a playful voice softly whisper in your ear—

C: 我只是想用最稳妥的方式解决问题。
E: I was just trying to fix our problem in the safest way possible.

C: 都是些小卒，云吟术足以应付。
E: They're just minions. My cloudhymn magic will be sufficient.

C: 谁在哭喊？头好疼，要被撕裂了……
E: Who's wailing? My head feels as though it's being ripped apart...

C: 请稍等片刻。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 翁法罗斯也有新闻学？
E: They also teach journalism here in Amphoreus?

C: 会吗？我觉得很甜蜜…是生命的香气。
E: Really? I find it rather sweet... It's the fragrance of life.

C: 粉霞天女，喔…你是来自天上的恩赐，太阳的女儿~
E: Oh, Rosy Celestial Maiden... You truly are a gift from the heavens, a daughter of the sun!

C: 这里可是生命花园，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}「裂分之枝」{RUBY_E#}的圣地！你要亵渎神明吗？
E: This is the Garden of Life, the holy ground of the {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Bough of Rift{RUBY_E#}! Are you trying to defile the gods?

C: 吼吼吼！瞧啊，瞧瞧这是谁来拜访本狮了！
E: Roarrr! Look who came to visit this mighty lion!

C: 咳…没什么，别在意。
E: Ahem... It's nothing, don't worry about it.

C: 上古畴昔，满溢之杯，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}用波涛藏匿起世界的起点。
E: In ancient times, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}, the Chalice of Plenty, concealed the beginning of the world amidst billowing waves.

C: 红土饲料
E: Redsoil Feed

C: 此处正是列车车厢坠毁之地，你至今心有余悸。如今想来，应当是尼卡多利的长矛击落了车厢。不知道把车厢打捞起来修理修理，还能不能让它重新驰往天际。
E: This is the site where the coach crashed, and even now, the memory of the incident fills you with unease. Thinking back, it was likely Nikador's spear that brought the car down. You can't help but wonder — if the wreckage was salvaged and repaired, could the car once again take to the skies?

C: 我后悔了，压根就不该出手！
E: I regret what we did. We shouldn't have aided Okhema at all!

C: 白厄，你会尽到东道主的义务，照看好我们的客人吗？
E: Phainon, will you fulfill your duty as host and look after our distinguished guests?

C: 当然，我还没忘记这个话题。
E: Worry not, I haven't forgotten about that.

C: 离开翁法罗斯。
E: Leave Amphoreus.

C: 体感上，我们用大约二十个系统时就摸清了翁法罗斯的现状，还和本地人建立了联系，这是个不错的开始。
E: By estimation, it took us about twenty system hours to figure out the current conditions on Amphoreus and build connections with the locals. A pretty good start.

C: 疑团重重，只能全力应对了。
E: With all these doubts in our minds, we can only just do our best.

C: 但我察觉到了遐蝶的不安。她信任他们，还私下联络了白厄，以为我不知情……
E: But I noticed a sense of unease in Castorice. She trusted in them and even reached out to Phainon in secret, believing I was unaware...

C: 金线今天格外平静，天、地与海洋都屏住了呼吸，是在为一位泰坦注定的亡逝哀悼吗……
E: The golden thread hangs unusually silent today, as if the heavens, earth, and ocean are all holding their breath. Could they be mourning the impending downfall of a Titan...

C: 我，哀丽秘榭的白厄，愿前往讨伐{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
E: I, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, wish to join the crusade against {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你在说什么…不是开玩笑的时候。
E: What are you talking about? Now's not the time for jokes.

C: 它不仅是一柄武器，更是悬锋人的信仰。在战场上英勇牺牲的灵魂，会为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}手中的锋刃淬火，成为神王伟力的一部分。
E: It's not just a weapon, it's the faith of the Kremnoan people. Souls who died heroically on the battlefield will further temper the blade in {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s hand, becoming a part of the god-king's power.

C: 猜猜我在想什么，万敌？
E: Guess what I'm thinking, Mydei?

C: 还愣着做什么？
E: Why are you still standing there?

C: 打倒了两个，不错的开始。
E: That's two down. Not a bad start.

C: 对不起，是我太弱小……
E: Sorry, it's because I'm too weak...

C: 果然是中心地带，阵仗不小啊。
E: This is the center all right. That's a sizable formation.

C: {NICKNAME}，还没和你提起过吧？黄金裔们可是各个身怀绝技。
E: {NICKNAME}, did I ever tell you? The Chrysos Heirs are all endowed with unique powers.

C: …从命运三相殿内传来了沉重的机关声。
E: ...The sound of heavy mechanisms comes from the Temple of the Three Fates.

C: 你能听懂它的话？
E: You can understand what they are saying?

C: 居然是这样的解法…幸好有丹恒和{NICKNAME}在我们身边。
E: That was an unexpected solution... Thankfully, we had Dan Heng and {NICKNAME} here with us.

C: 他的确背负了些不好的名声…若不是他的作为，你和丹恒阁下也不会遭受阿格莱雅大人的审讯。
E: He certainly has a bad reputation. If it weren't for him, you and Dan Heng wouldn't have been interrogated by Lady Aglaea.

C: 似乎没有太多守卫。我本以为场面会更加…激烈。
E: They have fewer guards than I expected. I thought we'd be greeted with something more... intense.

C: 先礼后兵，还挺讲究。
E: Observing formalities before aggression, now that's a thoughtful approach.

C: 哼，威胁……
E: Hmph, grave danger, you say...

C: 抱歉，我刚才…有些失态。
E: I am sorry... that you had to witness my earlier outburst.

C: 已触发<color=#dbc291ff>压力机关</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Pressure mechanism</color> triggered

C: 是我身上的毛打结了吗？还是耳朵…耳朵挺好的呀？你看，它们还会一抖一抖的。
E: Are there... knots in my fur? Is it my ears? No, they seem fine. Look, I can even flap them!

C: （泰坦的呓语）
E: (Titan's murmurs)

C: 终有一日…他会带领所有人——剩下的人——敲开奇迹的大门。
E: There will come a day when he leads everyone — everyone we have left — through the gates of the miracle.

C: 是你啊，蝶。前阵子你借给我的诗集，我读完了。还给你。
E: Ah, it's you, Cas. I finished the anthology of poems you lent me — here it is.

C: 对了，以防万一，如果你们想了解元老院和公民大会，不妨读读这份书卷。
E: Oh right, you can read this scroll if you want to find out more about the Council of Elders and the citizens' assembly.

C: 还没到安心的时候啊…我们得在这张大网中找准自己的位置。
E: We can't let our guard down yet... We have to find out where we stand in this large interwoven web.

C: 等等，还有事没做。
E: Wait, I still have some things to do.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它好可怜，被黑斗篷抢走了火种，只能在这么狭小的地方孤独等候……
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... How heartbreaking. Ever since the figure draped in the black cloak robbed them of their Coreflame, they have been relegated to waiting in isolation in such a confined space...

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 岁月的权柄…必须有人…承载……
E: Someone must... inherit... the authority of Time...

C: 我名为吕枯耳戈斯，唤我「来古士」便可。现今是为奥赫玛元老院的名誉元老，以「神礼观众」之名，捍卫每一位正直的公民自我表达的权利。
E: I am Lycurgus, though you may call me Lygus. Holding an honorary position within the Council of Elders in Okhema, and as the Theoros, I stand to protect the right of all upright citizens to express themselves freely.

C: 看来您已有对策了？
E: May I interpret this as you having a countermeasure?

C: 每一株植物、每一条枝蔓、每一片林叶都可能是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的化身……
E: Every plant, every tendril, no, even every leaf could be the embodiment of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}...

C: 那刻夏，你……
E: Anaxa, you...

C: 可惜…即便吾有意述说自己的过去种种，可吾所知者，未必比汝等更多呢。
E: Unfortunately, even if I was willing to talk about my past, I may not know more about it than you do.
(...Hm? Who could it be?)

C: 我对加诸此身的衰老，还有临近的死亡…开始感到恐惧了。
E: For I have come to fear... my declining health and impending death.

C: 卷轴上的话应该是真的，那么你想修复的是哪一根短矛呢？
E: The words on the scroll should be true, so which short spear do you want to repair?

C: 她在一阵自我拉扯中得出了肯定的结论：大地兽确实就是猫咪。
E: After a moment of inner conflict, she reached a definitive conclusion: The dromas is indeed a cat.

C: 那是。别看我低调，可是名副其实的半神。
E: Of course. I may keep a low profile, but I'm still a bona fide demigod.
Hmm...

C: 你要多少，我给多少！
E: I'll give you however much you want!

C: 等我满血复活你就知错了。
E: I'll show you who's boss once I've recovered with full HP!

C: 次日 奥赫玛
E: Next day, Okhema...

C: 她是「诡计」的半神，当她将「翻飞之币」高高抛起，便会获得无可比拟的神速，来去只在一瞬间。
E: She's the demigod of Trickery. When she flips the Coin of Whimsy into the air, she gains incredible speed that lets her travel anywhere in an instant.

C: 呃…怎么是大地兽？
E: Uh... Why is there a dromas here?

C: 只能…卖鱼。你…要买鱼吗？
E: I can only... keep selling fish. So... do you... want to buy any fish?

C: 城邦中仍有争议，学者们认为这一灾厄前所未见，应当被冠上新的称呼。
E: While there is still dissension within the city, the scholars agree that this calamity was so unprecedented that it needed to be given a new designation.

C: 与生俱来的诅咒…我无力让渡。但从今往后，我会听凭您的心意将其运用，绝不会有多余的举动。
E: I am... unable to rid myself of this innate curse. However, from this day onward, I shall use it according to your will. I will never make any superfluous moves on my own.

C: 看见这些立体结构就害怕。
E: I get scared when I see these vertical structures.

C: 在那神话的年代里，或许你们还尚未出世，但在炼金术的领域，已无人能够望我项背。我将在这冥河流经的浅滩，使玻吕刻斯再度腾飞…让「死亡」复归于世！
E: During the age of myth, a time likely before your birth, I was the unsurpassed zenith of alchemy that none could reach! On the shoals of the River of Souls, I shall make Pollux soar again... and bring "Death" back to the world!

C: 请你一定要将她抚养成人…别让她再经历我们所遭遇的苦难。
E: Please, you must nurture her to adulthood... and prevent her from experiencing all of the suffering that we went through.

C: 「比起犹豫，还是启程更好。也许就在今天，命运会恻隐一时，抛下些许仁慈。」
E: "Rather than standing still, taking action is by far the better option. Perhaps fate might take pity on us today and show some compassion."

C: 这种时候就别开玩笑了！
E: That's not funny!

C: 让他们听听吧——那些发动了残暴战争的黄金裔——！
E: Let those Chrysos Heirs who started this terrible war hear you!

C: 别摆谱了！你以为自己是什么东西，要我们陪你在这儿浪费时间？
E: Cut the act! Who do you think you are, wasting our time like this?

C: 平衡已被打破，结果已经明朗。{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}在上，以神礼观众之名，我见到——
E: With the balance shattered, the result is clear. By {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} above, as the Theoros, I have observed...

C: 我见到——奥赫玛已选择了她的命运。公民大会决定继续支持逐火之旅！该决议并将张贴于纪名英雄墙前，全体公民应知晓城邦的前路。
E: ...I have observed that Okhema has chosen her destiny! This citizens' assembly has resolved to continue the Flame-Chase Journey. This resolution shall be put up on the Wall of Heroes such that all citizens are aware of the city's way forward.

C: 元老们，公民们，请肃静！神悟树庭的阿那克萨戈拉斯请求向公民大会宣告。还请各位留步，以便聆听其宣言。
E: Elders and citizens, your attention, please! Stay for a moment more, if you will. Anaxagoras of the Grove of Epiphany has an announcement for the assembly.

C: 告诉我！在座各位，有多少人敢对{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}起誓，「再创世」的尽头必将如诸位黄金裔所说，是一片没有灾厄与疯狂的美丽新世界？
E: Tell me, who among you dares swear on {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s name that Era Nova will truly welcome the fairy-tale ending that the Chrysos Heirs have promised? A beautiful new world free of calamity and madness?

C: 哼，废物！那换你来，看你鼻子早就翘到天上去了。这么有能耐，你敢保证逐火之旅是最好的选择吗？
E: Hmph, useless! Your turn, then. With that smug look of yours, you must be confident that the Flame-Chase Journey is the best course to take, right?

C: 正如凡间死生有序，这些花也会在成长的尽头枯萎、凋零，化作泥土，乘着雾气和海潮，升入天空……
E: Similar to the structured cycle of life and death in the mortal world, these flowers too shall wither and fade, returning to the earth and then ascending to the sky with mist and tides...

C: {NICKNAME}，这边这边！
E: {NICKNAME}, over here!

C: 空无？
E: Nothingness?

C: 你似乎很了解我啊。那你应当知道，我凭什么要听你的？
E: You seem to understand me very well. Then you should know that I have no reason to listen to you.

C: 你放心，人家心高气傲，瞧不上咱们。
E: Don't worry, he's too full of pride to pay us any attention.

C: 原因没那么复杂，凡人哪够得到{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的国度呢？它和瑟希斯不同，是严厉而不近人情的神明，「理性」愿与他人分享，但「天空」…只需要人们的敬畏。
E: Don't read too much into it. I mean, can mortals even hope to reach {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} realm? They're a strict and draconian god, nothing like {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Reason is willing to share what is theirs with others, but Sky... only expects people to revere them.

C: （还是换个问题吧。）
E: (I should probably turn my attention to something else.)

C: 尤绪弗罗老师是「敬拜学派」的贤人，总是和那刻夏老师针锋相对。
E: As the sage of the Venerationists, Euthyphro has always been at loggerheads with Anaxa.

C: 根据积攒的灰尘和完好的封装来看，被投诉者根本没有把它们打开过，随手丢弃在了角落里。
E: Based on the dust accumulated and the perfectly intact seals, the complainee did not even bother opening them and just chucked them aside into a corner.
...Huh?

C: 当然。令我忧心的，反在战胜它之后啊……
E: Of course. Though I am worried about what will happen once I've emerged victorious...

C: 最后…只剩下「理性」了么。
E: And finally... the only thing that remains is Reason.

C: 嗯。玻吕茜亚……
E: Mm-hmm. Polyxia...

C: 实在是…令人难以置信。
E: This is... utterly unbelievable.

C: …凯妮斯阁下，遵行阴影之道的强者。
E: ...Lady Caenis, you are the strong one who follows the path of shadows.

C: 「揭露历史吧，『天象画壁』。」
E: "Reveal the history, Celestial Mural."

C: （嗯嗯，黎明机器，创世奇迹，陈词滥——）
E: (Mmhmm, the Dawn Device, the miracle of Genesis, the usual clichés...)

C: 我…向所有人隐瞒了天父给出的时限……
E: I... have concealed the deadline the sky father set for everyone...

C: 我…不知道。
E: I... don't know.

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 嘿嘿……
E: Heh...

C: 提议：当务之急是找到两位无名客的下落。对「毁灭」的研究，优先级顺延。我们需要争分夺秒，在那位智械启动反制手段前有所收获。
E: Suggestion: The immediate priority now is to find the whereabouts of the two Nameless. Research priority on the Destruction can be lowered. Every second counts, before that Intellitron's preventative measures kick in.

C: 黑塔，你听到了么？从山城中心传来了迭迭哭喊，此地的生命正在经受激烈的创伤。
E: Herta, do you hear that? A wave of desperate cries from the heart of the mountain city. The lives there are undergoing intense suffering.

C: 对咯，就是这样——我所做的，只是通过各种诱导和暗示，让你们对一件并不存在的事信以为真……
E: Yep, exactly. I just used some hints and mental suggestions to help you believe in a lie...

C: 阁下不必自咎。令翁法罗斯众多学者费神千年的难题，即便您天资过人，也不可能于一朝一夕间得到解答。
E: Don't be too hard on yourself, my lord. This puzzle has stumped Amphoreus's scholars for centuries. It isn't something you can solve overnight... even someone as gifted as yourself.

C: （凑过去看看吧。）
E: (Let's take a closer look.)

C: 万一占卜出来的是坏结果呢？
E: What if divination predicts something bad?

C: 三、三位大人！云石天宫，出…出大事了！
E: Please! Something terrible has happened at Marmoreal Palace!

C: 你都带来了些什么，让我看看吧。
E: What have you brought? Let me see.

C: 喏，尽管看！都是一等一的好货——你看这颗蓝宝石，简直比法吉娜的眼珠子还要蓝哪！
E: Here, take a look! Only the finest goods — see this sapphire? It's even more blue than Phagousa's eyes!

C: 哼，你们这些有钱人就是喜欢多管闲事！那我可拿走了，你再想反悔就晚了！
E: Hmph, you rich folks just love sticking your noses in everything, don't you? Well, I'm taking these now, so don't get any second thoughts!

C: 有本事就和我比跑步啊？长跑、短跑、转着圈跑，随便挑！
E: Why don't we have a race? Long-distance, sprint, or laps — take your pick!

C: 对啊对啊，真丑啊…丑到连我这个没有消化系统的小鬼都觉得反胃！
E: Yeah, yeah, so ugly... ugly enough to make even me, a little imp without a digestive system, feel nauseous!

C: 若是畏惧这些，我便不会向你发出邀请。
E: I wouldn't have invited you if I were worried about those things.

C: 客观而论，「清洗者」的出现是必然，亦是必须。但他们凶险恶毒的行事手段为众人所不齿，因而落得了被史书唾弃的下场。
E: Objectively, the rise of the Cleaners was both inevitable and necessary. Yet, their ruthless and twisted methods earned them nothing but disdain and condemnation from history.

C: 这具躯壳内的神性或许可以永续——但那终究不是「我」的本源。我是人之女，自母亲的胎盘中降生，亦会以人的姿态死去。
E: The divinity in this body might be eternal — but that is not the essence of "me." I am a daughter of humanity, born of my mother, and I will die as a human.

C: 更好的人！更好的人！更好的人！
E: Better people! Better people! Better people!

C: 因为和你一起说笑时，我偶尔会忘记自己是谁…对于拥有我这般力量的人，那非常危险。
E: Laughing and chatting with you, I sometimes forget who I am... and for someone with my kind of power, that's a real hazard.

C: 咱们之间又不是生离死别，你只是去悬锋城看门了而已，就别掺和这么催人泪下的场合了。
E: We aren't parting ways forever. You're just off to guard the gates at Castrum Kremnos. Let's not make this a tearful farewell.

C: 不知不觉中，她的光芒变得和艾格勒一样耀眼，盖过了地上万物……
E: Her brilliance had become as blinding as Aquila's, lording over everything on the ground.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>只有这样，地上的生灵才能创造出通往天空的彩虹桥。</color>而我要寻访的第一位先祖，他的灵魂就驻留在树庭。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That's the only way for creatures on earth to forge the rainbow bridge to the sky</color>, and the soul of the first ancestor I want to see is here in the Grove.

C: 嘟！嘟嘟！
E: Doot! Doot-Doot!

C: 是谁…唤醒了我？
E: Who... has awakened me?

C: 啊，我还记得！没想到你会一直坚持到现在，真不愧是丹宝。
E: Ah, I remember! I didn't expect you to keep at it this long — that's so like you, Dannie.

C: 阿格莱雅…？千年以后？她竟还走在逐火的道路上么……
E: Aglaea...? Is she still on the Flame-Chase Journey after a thousand years?

C: …你真的很喜欢这个称呼呢。算了，接受了这个设定后，人家内心已经毫无波澜啦！
E: ...You like calling me that, don't you? Well, I've embraced it now. It doesn't even faze me anymore!

C: 她率领两头翼兽伙伴将愤怒的泰坦逼入绝境，一同消失在了天空的尽头。哪怕传说有夸大其词的成分，塞涅俄丝的战绩也十分惊人。
E: After driving the enraged Titan to the brink of defeat with her two winged companions, they all vanished somewhere in the sky. Her achievements were unparalleled, even if later legends exaggerated the details.

C: 不必担心，恐怕天象画壁早已失去了以前的作用。奥赫玛的白天，倚仗的也是刻法勒背上的黎明机器。
E: Don't worry. The mural probably lost its original function ages ago. Okhema's light comes from the Dawn Device shouldered by Kephale anyway.

C: 我们已令其他泰坦一一安息。如今，逐火的终点正是这座天空堡垒的主人。
E: We've laid all the other Titans to rest, one by one. Now, the final target for the Flame-Chase is the master of this sky fortress.

C: 所以…天空泰坦真的在偏袒晖之民吗？
E: So... Did the Sky Titan really take the side of the Sunfolk?

C: 那时，我们才终于明白：艾格勒在躲避的并非云雨，而是蛰伏于阴影中的恐怖。
E: Only then did we understand that Aquila wasn't hiding from the clouds and rain, but from the horror that lurked within the unlit shadows.

C: 聆听塞涅俄丝和晖之民的对话。
E: Listen to the conversation between Seliose and the Sunfolk.

C: 两位阁下…塞涅俄丝大人是如何变得如此强大的？
E: Honored ones... how did Lady Seliose become so powerful?

C: 但在那之前…我们会先揭示历史的全部真相——
E: But first, we shall reveal the whole truth of history —

C: ——你的好朋友，缇宋。
E: — Your good friend, Trissha

C: 巴特鲁斯…小白还不知道奥赫玛永昼的真相。
E: Bartholos... Snowy still doesn't know the truth behind Okhema's eternal daylight.
Ah...

C: 雅努斯密径——必须靠它穿过神界湖！
E: Janus's Hidden Passage — we have to use it to cross Theosphere Lake!

C: 就这样离开，我会十分遗憾。
E: Leaving like this... I'll definitely regret it.

C: 可以两人一起留下。
E: Two people can stay.

C: 看不出，他以前这么中二。
E: I had no idea he used to be so chuuni.

C: 这是什么动物的爪印？
E: Are these... animal footprints?

C: 好诗，好诗！
E: Now that's poetry!

C: 她们在开茶话会呢？
E: Can we jump in and fit right into their convo?

C: 嗳，不过…以现在的感受来看，好像和普通的纸牌也差不多嘛……
E: But... now that I'm holding them, they don't seem all that different from ordinary playing cards...

C: 烧焦的糊味，还有浓烟，好呛人…从迷境外面传来的呀！
E: Burning... smoke everywhere... It's all coming from beyond the Maze!

C: 真正的战士知道何时该放下武器。公正的{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}将主持这场对决，裁定胜负，你们只需要在它的天平上各自放置一样东西……
E: True warriors know when to sheathe their blades. The impartial {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#} shall oversee this duel. You need only place your offerings upon their scales...

C: …我？跟他？哈，别开玩笑了，朋友……
E: Me? With him? Pfft, don't joke around like that...

C: 我想，泰坦的意思是，比世界命运更沉重的不是个人的信念。
E: I think the Titan means that it's not anyone's personal convictions that outweigh the fate of the world.

C: 那，为什么……
E: Then why...

C: 现在，去吧。别垂头丧气，做好你该做的最后一件事——
E: Now go. Stand tall and finish your final task—

C: 亡灵们的心愿，我也会尽数收下。既然如此，就请各位和我一起，战斗到最后一刻吧。
E: I will take all the wishes of the departed with me. Please, everyone, fight with me, to the very last.

C: 明明在每一个正确的时间点，大家已经尽己所能，做出了最正确的选择。
E: We made the best choices we could, whenever we could!

C: 再见啦，卡厄斯兰那。
E: So long, Khaslana.

C: 我相信你…你是「负世」的黄金裔，必能引领我们…这个世界……
E: I believe in you... You are the Chrysos Heir of Worldbearing, the one who can lead us... lead this world...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>属于你的「自我」，就无法诞生了啊。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You lost the chance to ever be yourself.</color>

C: 醒醒…迷途者啊……
E: Wake up... lost one...

C: 无妨，就让这轮烈阳……
E: No matter, let this blazing sun...

C: >>>永劫回归#5297：对象卡厄斯兰那第<unbreak>5266</unbreak>次对权杖内核层发动攻击失败。十二黄金裔生命周期依次结束，速率呈现上升趋势。对象卡厄斯兰那回退演算进程。
E: >>> Eternal Recurrence #5297: Subject Khaslana's <unbreak>5,266</unbreak>th attempt to breach the Scepter's core layer has failed. Lifecycles of the twelve Chrysos Heirs terminated in sequence, with a trend of acceleration noted. Subject Khaslana regressed the extrapolation process.

C: 该出发啦，好伙伴！愿你的「开拓」之旅，永远有清风和涟漪相伴……
E: It's time to go, my dear friend. May your Trailblazing journey always be accompanied by a cool breeze and rippling waves...

C: 哈，我一点都不意外。果然还是得有本姑娘在，才称得上是完整的开拓小分队！
E: Well duh! What's Team Trailblaze without its star member?

C: 我们带着上一次逐火的记忆回到这里，时间的起点，是为了履行和白厄的约定。
E: With the memories of the previous Flame-Chase still intact, we've returned to this place at the beginning of time, so we can carry out our promise to Phainon.

C: 「信号强度…<unbreak>14.8%</unbreak>…对话窗口…<unbreak>16</unbreak>分<unbreak>22</unbreak>秒…前提：无外部干扰……」
E: "Signal strength... <unbreak>14.8%</unbreak>... Dialogue window... <unbreak>16</unbreak> minutes <unbreak>22</unbreak> seconds... Prerequisite: No external interferences..."

C: 像面对任何一位同伴那样，就好啦。你看，我们有共同的目标，共同的敌人……
E: Just treat me like any other friend you have. We share a common goal and common enemies...

C: >>>SkeMma<unbreak>720</unbreak>，原动力：██，泰坦权能：理性，命途：██<<<
E: >>>SkeMma<unbreak>720</unbreak>, Primum Mobile: ████████, Titan Authority: Reason, Path: █████████<<<

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而我恰好正是其中之一。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And I happen to be one of them.</color>

C: 我会在这里战胜你。
E: I'll defeat you right here, right now.

C: 我已将金血分给你们。现在，英勇的同胞，跟随我，成为命运的主人！
E: My blood flows in you now! Heroic compatriots, follow me, and we'll seize the reins of fate!

C: 我们…这是在哪里？
E: Where... exactly are we?

C: 凯撒确实做过类似的事，而且不止一次。不过，至于历史是否会重演…二位稍后便会明白了。
E: Yes, similar acts have occurred, and not just once. However, whether history will repeat itself... you'll soon see.

C: 你在说什么？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 什么同盟会议…不过是流着黄金血的禽兽们张牙舞爪的兽圈！
E: Alliance Meeting... More like a cage where creatures with golden blood claw at each other!

C: 好啦好啦，将来会的。但现在客随主便，她也随时都有可能回来…聊重要的事，还得留个心眼才行。
E: Yeah, yeah, in the future. But for now, we're at the mercy of the host, and she could return at any moment... If we're having an important discussion, we must remain vigilant.

C: 我们暂时也这么怀疑，但还得进一步验证。
E: We also have the same suspicions for now, but further verification is needed.

C: 在你撕破脸皮后，逐火之旅也不可能进行下去了。你觉得自己还有赢面吗——看在俱乐部的份上，别让事情变得太难看。
E: There's no way the Flame-Chase Journey will continue after you've burnt your bridges so thoroughly like this. Do you really think you can still win? ...Seriously, don't embarrass the Society.

C: 「智识」会把和实验无关的结果都当成没用的废数据，丢进垃圾站里，但我们可不那么想。
E: Erudition would treat any results unrelated to the experiment as garbage and throw them out, but we don't work like that.

C: 昔涟！太好了，你还在…
E: Cyrene! I'm so glad you're still here...

C: 正因如此，*我们*才必须这么做。
E: That's exactly why we have to do this.

C: 至于那「救世主」要如何完成「再创世」，就不是我们需要操心的事了。
E: As for how the "Deliverer" will complete the "Era Nova"... well, that will no longer be our concern.

C: 我会将你们所有人带往新世界。
E: I will take all of you to the new world.

C: 没错。还未成为凯撒的刻律德菈，早已满怀雄心。
E: Yes. Cerydra, long before she became the Imperator, was already burning with ambition.

C: 杀死她的人……
E: The one who struck her down...

C: 我不明白，如果海洋的欢宴、凯撒的愿景、翁法罗斯的存在都是虚妄…那我们的征程还有何意义？
E: I don't understand. If the ocean's feast, the Imperator's dream, and even Amphoreus's existence are all illusions... then what's the point of our journey?

C: 结局早已写就，即使阁下也无可更改…就像这盏可怜的灯。
E: The ending was written long ago. Even you cannot rewrite it... just like this poor chandelier.

C: 风堇…「天空」的半神创造的桥梁，助你横跨了空间的距离——而他们对你的信任，也横跨了时间的距离。
E: Hyacine... The bridge forged by the Demigod of the Sky helped you cross the chasms of space — and their faith in you spanned the vastness of time itself.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>逐火是不断失却的旅途，生命亦微不足惜。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value.</color>

C: 终于…<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次轮回又<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年后，翁法罗斯的终幕将要落下了。
E: At long last... <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> cycles and <unbreak>4,931</unbreak> years later, Amphoreus' final curtain is ready to fall.

C: 为表歉意，以见证此世全部命运的神礼观众之名：让我加入您的悼念，送别长眠于此的英雄们……
E: As an apology, and in the name of Theoros who saw all destinies in this world, let me join you in mourning. Let us bid farewell to the heroes who sleep here...

C: 凯撒…凯撒…
E: Imperator... Imperator...

C: 棋局…该收官了……
E: The game... is nearing its end...

C: 虽然这一世，翁法罗斯没有「岁月」的半神，但「岁月」始终站在人类这边。
E: Even though this cycle has no demigod of Time, Time has always stood on humanity's side.

C: 是我低估了「记忆」的手段。这场谈判，马上就要被第三者介入了。
E: I underestimated the Remembrance's methods. A third party is about to join our discussion.

C: 「智识」和「毁灭」的信息，我大致理解了。不过，「记忆」的搅局者在翁法罗斯扮演的又是什么角色？
E: I mostly understand what we've learned about the Erudition and the Destruction, but what roles do the Remembrance's intruders play in Amphoreus?

C: …我也没数那么清啦。就当四十二个吧？再多来点，我也吃得下！
E: ...I didn't really count carefully either. Maybe around forty-two? There's still room for more!

C: 三月，你说她和「记忆」息息相关。她在做的事和这些人有关吗？
E: You said that March is closely linked to the Remembrance. Is what she's doing related to these Memosnatchers?

C: 瓦尔特乘客发来消息，他们找到丹恒乘客和{NICKNAME}了帕！
E: Passenger Welt says they've found those two passengers!

C: 不。
E: No.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>操作已授权，协议名：【██ ███】</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Operation authorized, protocol name "███████"</color>

C: 最后，她只剩下一个选择。如她所愿，以「忘却」的力量——我抹去了一切。
E: In the end, she had only one option left. Just as she wished... I erased everything using the power of "Oblivion."

C: 它刚才说…「回归」？
E: Did it say... "recurrence"?

C: 哀丽秘榭？
E: From Aedes Elysiae?

C: 「只要我把故事的每一页都记录下来，为你讲述……」
E: "As long as I record every page of this story and tell it to you..."

C: 交给你了。
E: I'll leave it to you.

C: 「于是，天空降下彩虹，对世界展露温柔的微笑。」
E: "Then, the sky sent down rainbows and showed the world a gentle smile."

C: 「如果我把所有关于『明天』的故事讲给你听……」
E: "If I tell you all the stories of 'tomorrow'..."

C: 如果不能将祂和祂狂热的党羽铲除，「三月七」将永远无法得到安宁。
E: "March 7th" will not find peace as long as THEY and THEIR fanatical henchmen exist.
What... is this...

C: 「我会在过去等你。」
E: "I'll be waiting for you in the past."

C: 如今，我无意代你做出选择，因为你已决定自己的下一站。所以，让我最后一次行使「忘却」……
E: As of now, I have no intention of making choices for you. You've already decided on your next destination. So, let me exercise "Oblivion" one last time...

C: 对了，剧本上的「那一段」——现在是不是个好机会？
E: By the way... "that part" in the script — could this be the right moment?

C: 只是我的猜测，被卷入翁法罗斯后，三月七或许经历…不，应该说预见了某种惨烈的结果。
E: This is only speculation, but after being drawn into Amphoreus, perhaps March 7th experienced— No, she likely foresaw a tragic end.

C: 太好了……
E: Very good...

C: 她说，酒要在凯旋后喝才有滋味。
E: She said that wine only has flavor after a triumphant return.

C: 用「不朽」唤起坠落的巨龙，令「大地」长出不灭的血肉！
E: We will use the Permanence to awaken the fallen Giant Dragon and give the "Earth" an everlasting body!

C: 今时不同往日，层岩…已尽在我的掌心。
E: Times have changed... The cliffs... are now in the palm of my hand.

C: 来得正好……
E: You're right on time...

C: 诚是为置你于死地而来啊。
E: Are indeed here to bring you to your demise.

C: 当然，我们会共同写就。
E: Of course, we'll write it together.

C: 请你带上所有美好的愿望，坚定前进，不要回头。
E: Take all beautiful wishes with you, march forward with determination, and don't look back.

C: 那个人，会是「赞达尔」吗？
E: Could that someone be "Zandar"?

C: 恐怕，就连「赞达尔」也不知道这座大墓的存在，以及埋藏其中的秘密。
E: I'm afraid not even "Zandar" knows about the existence of this great tomb, or the secrets buried within it.

C: 「准备好，该启程了。」
E: "Get ready. We're about to head off."

C: 毫无反应的窃忆者。像是在中深海域中遭遇海难而溺毙的尸体，缓缓地漂浮，空无一物。
E: The Memosnatcher gave no response. It was like a corpse, drowned in a deep-sea shipwreck, drifting slowly and completely empty.

C: 能走到这一步，离不开两位天才的倾囊相助。
E: We couldn't have made it this far without the wholehearted support of the two geniuses.

C: 好奇怪呀，到最后，我也没能找回这三千万世的记忆。
E: Weird... I still couldn't recover the memories of these thirty million lives in the end.

C: 天击将军，莫不是怕罗浮摘了曜青战功？
E: Oh my, Merlin's Claw, are you afraid the Luofu might steal the Yaoqing's glory?

C: 一个坏消息，「智识」的溃败不限于无机体。
E: The bad news is, the collapse of the Erudition won't just affect inorganic beings.

C: 大恩不言谢。这次「巡猎」同意出兵，景元将军想必费了不少心思。
E: Words cannot express our gratitude. Getting the Hunt to agree on sending troops must have taken quite some effort from General Jing Yuan.

C: 这片风景，还是一点没变，对吗？
E: This view hasn't changed at all, has it?

C: 悬锋印戒。我每一世诞生与死亡的见证，它是「万敌」未尽的命运……
E: The Signet of Kremnos. It has witnessed every birth and death of mine. It is Mydei's unfinished destiny...

C: 怕是，也只有他能忍受了。
E: He's probably the only one who could've endured that.

C: 能以这双手为更辽阔的世界送去希望…即便在梦中，也是难以想象的奢求。
E: To bring hope to a world so vast with these hands... Even in dreams, it always felt like too much to ask for.

C: 都说了，这种话让别人来讲啦。
E: Told ya. Let someone else say that kinda stuff.

C: 感应白厄的气息。
E: Respond to Phainon's presence.

C: 为什么他们会在这里？
E: Why are they here?

C: 那位创造了我们，又遗弃了我们的{RUBY_B#博识尊}神明{RUBY_E#}，它难道不该遭受惩罚吗？
E: That {RUBY_B#Nous}god{RUBY_E#} created us, and then cast us aside. Shouldn't they be punished for that?

C: 遗憾？
E: Regrets?

C: 牵住我们的手，一起出发吧。
E: Take our hands, and come with us.

C: 「哎哟。小王子，你也在呢？」
E: "Well, well. If it isn't the little prince himself."

C: 还有一件事，各位理应知情——
E: There's one more thing that everyone should know...

C: 那种事，我现在还不想考虑…
E: I'm not ready to think about that right now...

C: 其实，{NICKNAME}，你不必独自背负这个世界的。
E: Y'know, {NICKNAME}... You don't have to shoulder this world all on your own.

C: 一定，要再见面啊。
E: We'll definitely meet again.

C: 「你的命途性质很特殊，绝不会只是『忆灵』这么简单。但有一件事我可以确定——」
E: "The Path characteristic you exhibit is very special. There's no way you're just a simple 'memosprite.' However, I'm sure about one thing..."

C: 但我不一样……
E: But I'm different...

C: 但翁法罗斯已经拥有了「明天」。所以，只要{NICKNAME}悉心保留、照看所有的种子。在未来的某一天，当「开拓」再度创造奇迹后……
E: But Amphoreus already has a "tomorrow." So, as long as {NICKNAME} carefully preserves and tends to all the seeds, then when the Trailblaze creates another miracle someday in the future...

C: 别担心，人家已经帮你把所有种子都收在了「最初的果实」里……
E: Don't worry. I've already kept all the seeds safe in "The First Fruit" for you...

C: 梦、梦游？！糟糕糟糕，我可不想在大家面前出洋相啊……
E: S-sleepwalking?! Oh no, oh no, I don't want to make a fool of myself in front of everyone...

C: 我来。悬锋人的字典里没有「拖泥带水」。
E: I'll do it. There's no "dragging one's feet" in the Kremnoan language.

C: 欸…欸？！
E: H-huh!?

C: 银河里的神明，也是这么不讲道理呢。
E: So even the gods of the cosmos are unreasonable.

C: 这一刻，是「铁墓」宣告胜利，将「毁灭」洒向群星的瞬间？
E: Is this the moment Irontomb declares victory and casts the Destruction upon the stars?

C: 虽然，那道信号也吸引了一些…不那么愉快的注目……
E: Though that signal drew some... unpleasant attention as well...

C: 聪明的你，应该早就猜到了，对吧？
E: You're clever. I bet you figured it out long ago, didn't you?

C: 那一刻的它…一定是幸福的吧？
E: In that moment... it must feel happiness, right?

C: 播下因果的涟漪——
E: Let the ripples of causality spread...

C: 莉维娅，记住啦！那你也要记住我的名字，我是——
E: Livia. Got it! Then you have to remember mine too. I'm—

C: …翁法罗斯的{RUBY_B#十一月}哀悼月{RUBY_E#}，大地上的所有争斗都会止息；哀悼月的第十一个日夜，逝者将离别，生者将相拥，雪花将落下，篝火将升起，照亮每一颗哀怜的心。
