E: ...In Amphoreus's {RUBY_B#11th month}Month of Mourning{RUBY_E#}, all conflicts across the land come to rest. On the eleventh day and night of the Month of Mourning, the dead will part, the living will embrace, the snow will fall, and bonfires will rise to warm every heart aching with lament.

C: 大门…惊动……
E: Big door... moving...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌，从一开始就在人们的视线中……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That the Demiurge has been in everyone's plain sight all this time. Yet...</color>

C: 所以，再多给我一些时间，好吗？我还想为「未来」留下更多「记忆」……
E: So... could you give me more time, please? I want to leave behind more "memories" for the "future"...

C: >>>关联：梨。杏。
E: >>> Related to: Raisin.

C: 原来如此。人家理解了，完全明白啦。
E: I see. I get it. I get it all.

C: 桃子，要走了吗？没关系，我等你回来。
E: Are you leaving, Peach? It's okay. I'll wait for you to come back.

C: 大言不惭。如果你失败了呢？
E: What hubris. And what if you fail?

C: 吕枯耳戈斯阁下，莫非……
E: Lord Lycurgus? Could it be...

C: 记着你刚才说的话，别去打扰<color=#dbc291ff>老大</color>。
E: But remember what you said. Leave the <color=#dbc291ff>boss</color> alone.

C: 感叹号？
E: Exclamation point?

C: 研究全部说拜拜，独自乐逍遥~
E: Time to bid farewell to research, and retire to a quiet, leisurely life~

C: 如今在这里，头发保住了，也不用担心混得比别人差，大不了大家一块玩儿完。
E: I've already made it this far, and with a full head of hair at that. No need to worry about other people living better than you, the worst that can happen is we all perish together.

C: 你看，这汽水起子也不知道扔在零件箱里多久了，总算给我找出来啰！
E: Look, I don't know for how long this bottle-opener has been in the toolbox. I finally found it!

C: …不过，那么多年过去，我早就释怀了。
E: ...Nevertheless, it's been so many years. I have long since learned to let it go.

C: 艾丝妲这个站长当得也真不容易。
E: It must be difficult for Asta. Being the lead researcher isn't easy.

C: 那个，帕梅拉她跟我们走丢了。那边有个很吓人的怪物，我们不敢过去。
E: W—We lost sight of Pamela... There's a terrifying monster over there — we didn't dare to go over on our own.

C: 哈哈，你谁啊，你以为你是下一任空间站站长啊？
E: Haha, who do you think you are? The space station's next lead researcher?

C: 这叫什么乱花钱？公司的预算卡那么死，流程又那么长，等我申请完下来那要浪费多少时间？！
E: This isn't wasting money! The IPC's budget is so stringent, and the process takes so long! By the time my application would've gone through too much time would've been wasted!

C: 随着偶然的光线折射，可以发现上面印着模糊的「千星」字样。
E: When the light is at a certain angle, the words "Thousand Stars" can vaguely be seen printed on the card.

C: 一重…二重…三重权限认证通过。
E: First... Second... Third authentication passed.

C: 莱斯莉是…
E: Who is Lesley...

C: 监控拍到的这段时间，接待大厅似乎尚未设立安全区。
E: During the time captured by the camera, the safe zone in the Reception Hall hasn't been set up.

C: 狠狠地…揍他们一顿……
E: A good, violent lesson...

C: 复兴计划可是她多方搜集空间站受损信息后，与五大科室负责人共同制定的一套灾后运转机制。
E: Project Revival is a set of post-disaster operational protocols that Miss Asta and the heads of the five departments collaboratively developed, using data gathered about the damage sustained by the space station.

C: 就算忽略他的容貌，你只要耐心旁听他的自言自语，不出五句，必有这一句。
E: You don't even pay attention to how he looks. You can just take a moment to listen to the words being said. He somehow always manages to drop this line at least once every five sentences.

C: 这几卷录像带，在内容上似有交叉…应该记录了同一个人的不同人生阶段。
E: These videotapes seem to be related... they seem to be records of different stages of life of the same person.

C: 但据我所知，空间站中从未出现过窃忆者的行踪。
E: But as far as I know, those Memosnatchers have never been seen in the space station.

C: 这位{M#先生}{F#小姐}说话真是风趣。不过，我很确信我所遗忘的是非常重要的东西，甚至事关「我是谁」这样的命题……
E: That's a good one, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}. But I am sure what I have forgotten is very important, even questions like "who am I"...

C: 不，{M#先生}{F#小姐}。从我…降生以来，我从未离开过空间站。我想，在我魂归…银河之前，我也不会离开空间站。
E: No, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}. I've never left the space station since I was born. I don't think I'll leave the space station until my soul returns to the cosmos.

C: 无头无尾，无始无终。好像有人把它塞进了我的脑海，又像是一段完整记忆的残片。
E: The scene goes on forever without a beginning or an end. It is as though someone forced this image into my mind, but at the same time, it feels like a complete memory.

C: 所以，当听说希拉正在医疗舱接受乔安科员的治疗，我就第一时间赶来，试图再次「修正」她的感知。
E: So when I found out that Sheila was being treated by Researcher Joanne in the medical cabin, I came as soon as I could to try to "fix" her cognition once again.

C: 我明白了，那么这些报酬请拿着，希望以后还有机会见到你。
E: I see. Please take these rewards. I hope to see you again in the future.

C: 咦，梅厄前辈，你最近的脸色比之前好多了，难道是我之前跟前辈说的那个…看来是起作用了？
E: Mare, you look much better lately. So the thing I told you about. It actually worked?

C: 是反物质军团的残党，似乎只是落单的普通虚卒，没有什么特别之处。
E: It was a remnant of the Antimatter Legion. Seems like it was just an ordinary voidranger that had fallen off the grid, nothing special.

C: 哎，想不到你竟然是这么顽固的家伙。看来你心灵之灯已经蒙尘许久了啊！
E: *sigh* I didn't take you to be so stubborn. The light in your heart has been clouded for too long!

C: 你少瞧不起我们波少了！他不是你想的那种人！
E: Stop looking down on Master Capote! He's not the kind of person you think he is!

C: 你可真是，毫不悔改，腐朽得相当彻底！
E: You really know nothing about repentance! You're totally corrupt!

C: 这么油腻…感觉的确是卡波特的手笔。
E: Yuck, so slimy... it does sound like Capote.

C: 嗯…我要深刻感受一下阿兰心中的压力，到底是什么样的。
E: Mm... I need to feel the pressure he's feeling so I can understand what it's all about.

C: 首先，是你的从心修行！你为了能够深入了解上司的心理，专程求助了卡波特教授，请求他与你模拟对话。
E: Firstly, your trial of the heart! You went to Professor Capote and asked him to simulate conversations with you so you could better understand your boss.

C: 啊啊啊啊，鬼啊！
E: Aaaah! It appears!

C: 一部分生物型藏品常年被关在暗无天日的收容舱内，这种暴行令人发指。听说在军团入侵期间，它们中的一部分趁乱出逃。
E: Some living collection entries have been locked inside lightless, isolated containment chambers. This act of cruelty is deplorable. I have heard that some of them were able to escape containment during the Legion invasion.

C: 十分有可能！
E: It is entirely possible!

C: 「呜呜伯」是星灵亚种，以灵体形式存在，在民间又有「戏命鬼」的谑称。如果二位对它好奇，也许我可以讲解一二。
E: Wubbaboos are considered a subspecies of Astral Spirits that exist in the form of spiritual entities. They are also known as Jinx to some people. If you are curious about them, I may be able to give you a brief explanation of their existence.

C: 呜。
E: Woo.

C: 啊，你们已经见过它们之中最「可怖」的那一个了吗？看来之后不好忽悠了呀——好在你们已经把需要的东西都找齐了。
E: Ahh, you've already seen the Scariest of Them All? Looks like it's gonna be harder to bluff you in the future... Fortunately, you've already gotten all the things they need.

C: 没想到看似凶恶、没心没肺的银河星灵呜呜伯，竟然比空间站的人类更加珍重幽微的情感。
E: I didn't think Wubbaboos, the seemingly feral and heartless astral spirits, would cherish friendship more so than the humans do on the space station.

C: 不不，她今早吃的是布丁。这是特地为你做的。
E: No, she had pudding this morning. I made it especially for you.

C: 唉，你真乐观，我就不一样，你看，要不是有你在，我这会儿估计已经躺地上了。
E: Well, I don't share your optimism. If it wasn't for you, I'd probably be lying on the ground right now.

C: 唔，感觉越说越心虚了，我还是找点自己能做的事吧…看，这儿有个定分枪，我还不知道自己能在它这儿拿多少分……
E: *sigh* ...The more I talk about it, the worse I feel. I should probably find something that I can do... Hmm, there's a rating pistol here. I wonder what my rating would be...

C: 呃，从结果而言，是的。记录显示，这件奇物最后被送进了…黑塔女士的办公室？然后就消失了？
E: Hmm, from the way things look, yes. The records show that this curio was last sent to... Madam Herta's office? And then it disappeared?

C: 真精彩。
E: It's really fun.

C: 但故事终有句点，他们也已消失在聚光灯下了。很久很久。
E: However, all stories come to an end, just as they disappeared from the spotlight long ago.

C: 就像蝴蝶，鲸鱼，和你——在数据的海洋中，生命只有一种形式，通过字段长短的差异，来界定描述的边缘。
E: You see, in the vast sea of data, life exists only in one form: A line of code. Whether it's a butterfly, a whale, or even you — the length of that line of code dictates the boundaries of what the entity entails.

C: 唉，谢谢你安慰我……
E: *sigh* Thanks for trying to comfort me...

C: 是真人？
E: It's a real person?

C: 但愿她发现不了…
E: I hope she doesn't...

C: 哼，大获全胜——小家伙，现在知道黑塔的厉害了吧。
E: Hmph, a flawless victory — hope you caught a glimpse of Herta's awesomeness, kiddo.

C: 谢谢你。这次不会再有什么说明了，我只希望…你能玩得开心。
E: Thank you, I won't have any explanation for you this time. I just hope... you would have fun.

C: 我还没准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 怎么就打起来了？！
E: Why are you fighting!?

C: 很抱歉，我得打断二位的…兴致。
E: Sorry to interrupt... whatever's happening here.

C: 哪个人会起这么拗口的名字？我就是个普通上班族，哪知道什么「纯美」的星神啊？
E: Who came up with such an awkward-sounding name? I'm a pencil pusher, what the heck do I know about the Aeon of Beauty?

C: 欸？电话…姬子！我看到了奇怪的东西！
E: Huh? My phone... Himeko! There's something really weird happening!

C: …且慢，我好像有了些头绪。
E: ...Wait, I think I understand.

C: 你这么做真是有点没头脑！你把自己置于危险境地里了。一定要履行骑士职责？换种方式不行？我们这种俗人实在难以理解。
E: ...I—It's reckless to put yourself in danger! Do you really have to fulfill your knightly duty? Isn't there another way? I just don't get it.

C: {NICKNAME}，你的进展如何？
E: Any progress, {NICKNAME}?

C: 嗯！等你噢！
E: Okay! I'll be waiting!

C: 等你准备好后就回来找我！
E: Alright! Come see Pom-Pom when you're ready!

C: 这会儿<color=#dbc291ff>辛克尔和■■■</color>就在附近，我建议你向他们打听一下。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Hinkel and ■■■</color> are around here somewhere. I'd suggest you ask them about it.

C: （难道是我把不相关的事记在一起了？）
E: (Did my memory piece together irrelevant information?)

C: …丢失的奇物？原来如此，那是该找他。
E: ...A lost Curio? I see. He'll be able to help.

C: 待到不安的种子生根发芽，便发出袭击声明，将暗中发酵的危机推至台前，催它生长，开花结果。
E: Once the seed of unrest has sprouted, he will then send out an announcement for an imminent attack. It will push the crisis from the dark into the light, catalyzing it into new growth and bloom.

C: 真搞不懂。算了，她开心就好。
E: I don't get it. Whatever. As long as she's happy.

C: 阮•梅让我来的。
E: Ruan Mei asked me to do this.

C: （呼噜呼噜…）
E: (Purring)

C: 谢谢你告诉我这些。
E: Thank you for telling me that.

C: 它居然发出了我的声音！
E: It actually made my voice!

C: 这花真漂亮啊，希望你送的人能够喜欢。
E: These flowers are beautiful. I hope the person you are giving them to likes them.

C: …原来如此，我们是第七小队，在下是这里的指挥官，奉命驻守于此。这片区域非常危险，闲杂人等切勿靠近，以免受伤。
E: ...So that's what's going on! We are squad seven. I am the commanding officer, and we have been ordered to guard this place. This area is extremely dangerous, and those with no business here must stay away for their own safety.

C: 娜塔莎向铁卫士兵们讲述了贝洛伯格后来所发生的事。
E: Natasha explains to the Silvermane Guards everything that has happened in Belobog since they took up their post.

C: 没想到你也在慢慢成长。
E: I never realized that you are also capable of further growth.

C: 噢，你们不是银鬃铁卫？早说呀，自家人打自家人，这不是多此一举嘛！
E: Wait, you're not Silvermane Guards? Well, why didn't you say so? Turns out we're on the same side after all!

C: ——都未必等得到。
E: ...As in, forever.

C: 你们还没见过自己的星球长什么样子吧？给你们看我拍的雅利洛-Ⅵ……
E: You've probably never seen what your planet looks like, right? I took this one. Behold, Jarilo-VI...

C: {NICKNAME}，托帕之前不是给了我们她的号码吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, I just remembered Topaz gave me her number.

C: 与此同时，在史瓦罗的聚落……
E: Meanwhile, at Svarog's settlement...

C: 呃…不对，我管你们是谁？「战略投资部」员工没有义务和不相关人士解释项目的细节。
E: It doesn't matter. The Strategic Investment Department has no obligation to talk to anyone not related to this project!

C: <unbreak>60%</unbreak>？！完、完蛋了！
E: <unbreak>60%</unbreak>!? We're done for!

C: 不过除了你们提到的大矿区，其它地方倒是没有出现剧烈的冲突情况。大概是因为托帕下了命令，不允许他们肆意骚扰市民。
E: The silver lining is that apart from the mine incident you mentioned, there haven't been any major conflicts in other areas. I suppose Topaz must have issued an order against harassing the citizenry.

C: 两位请先看一遍上面的内容吧…然后再告诉我你们的看法。
E: Please, take a look at the contents... and then tell me your thoughts.

C: 放心，我们会找到托帕的。对方是银河中一等一难缠的势力，所以这次我会和三月、{NICKNAME}一起行动。
E: Don't worry, leave it to us — we'll find her. It won't be easy dealing with her, but March and {NICKNAME} will help me get the job done.

C: 当然~死线已经过了，但布洛妮娅还没有在合同上签字。这背后的阻力，稍微动动脑筋就能猜到了。
E: Of course! The deadline has already passed, but Bronya still hasn't signed the contract. I think I can guess what's holding her back...

C: …就由我来承担吧。
E: ...I'll handle it.

C: 有趣，什么案子让你也学会「合作」了？
E: Huh, and what prompted the mighty Aventurine to start collaborating with others?

C: 用双手为后人筑造地基——听上去特别伟大，对吧？但是对于切身参与到这项工程中的人们来说，这里面又有多少乐趣可言呢？
E: Building a better world for future generations sound great, right? But is it any fun for the engineers and Architects who are directly involved in such a pursuit?

C: 还有克拉拉在呢。
E: At least Clara's here.

C: 可不是嘛，还好现在领导贝洛伯格的是她……
E: Right? I'm glad Belobog has someone like her in charge...

C: 我觉得托帕已经很强硬了。
E: You mean Topaz didn't make things complicated enough?

C: 先把借的零花钱还我…
E: Give me the change you borrowed first...

C: 您听说过「互助会」吗？
E: Have you heard of the mutual aid society?

C: 啊？原来和她有过节的是你啊？
E: Huh? So you had a dispute with her?

C: …她可是下层区唯一一个良心医生。我只是不太认可她的做法，缺乏效率，而且太过理想主义……
E: ...She's the only kindhearted doctor in the Underworld. I just don't really approve of her methods, that's all. Too idealistic, and no real efficacy...

C: 那位医生执意想要研制一种能够使人体不惧严寒的药物，他为自己的研究项目取名「风雪免疫」。
E: The doctor was set on developing a medicine that would steel the human body against the cold. He named his research project "Blizzard Immunity."

C: …得知这个消息的妹妹当然喜出望外。毕竟在医学方面，哥哥是她一直以来憧憬的目标。
E: ...Naturally, his sister was overjoyed. After all, as far as medicine was concerned, her brother had always been the standard she'd strived to attain.

C: ——「波少」一向大人有大量，其实，你完全有机会重获我的青睐…只要你肯为了之前的那些行为道歉！
E: I've always been a rather magnanimous person. In fact, here is a chance for you to regain my favor... As long as you are willing to apologize for your behavior!

C: 啊，是空间站的英雄{NICKNAME}，久闻大名，没想到有机会近距离见到……
E: Oh, it's {NICKNAME}, the hero of the space station. I've heard so much about you. I didn't expect to have the opportunity to see you up close.

C: 唉，如果{NICKNAME}还是坚持不肯放弃的话，那我就帮你帮到底吧。
E: *sigh* If you still insist on continuing, I'll help you to the end.

C: 再正确不过！不愧是我们，{NICKNAME}！竟然把一切都看穿了。
E: That's right! Well done, {NICKNAME}! You saw through everything.

C: 我一度以为只要好好帮他做事，至少还有机会熬出头。没有功劳，硬熬总行吧？
E: I once thought that if I just served him well, I would at least get a chance to succeed. Hard work always pays off, right?

C: 你的勇敢用错了方向。
E: Your bravery is wasted in the wrong pursuit.

C: 但是在那之前，我会向你证明，经历了这番曲折，我已经做出了改变。
E: But before that, I will prove to you that I have really changed because of this experience.

C: 后来{NICKNAME}出现，不啻为最好的人选。我急中生智，想着让你和拉明娜共同经历一番，也许能有意想不到的收获。
E: Then you appeared, {NICKNAME}. And you turned out to be the best candidate. So I came up with the idea to let you and Lamina share some experiences together, see where it takes you.

C: 那个女人身上有种令人不安的气息…直觉果然不会撒谎。
E: That woman had a troubling aura... our instincts were correct.

C: 看不出有什么特别的…也没有藏宝图或者暗语之类的记号，好像没啥价值。你要是觉得有点意思，不如就自己留着吧？
E: I don't see anything special... There's no treasure map or secret code words. Nothing of value. You can hold onto this if you want.

C: 难道这是什么压力机关踏板？
E: Is this some kind of pedal trigger?

C: …不要这么冷漠地复述悲惨的现实啊。
E: Now you are making me all sad.

C: 好，我们出发……
E: Okay, let's go...

C: 我也考虑过这个问题，但那时除了喊也没其他办法了。好在它们并没有被我的喊声引过来，就结果而言还是没问题的。
E: I was aware of this, but there was simply no other way at that time. Lucky for us, they didn't come.

C: 关于上次回收处理「特效药」的事，我想再郑重地和你道一次谢。
E: I want to thank you again for recovering the wonder medicine. It meant a lot to me.

C: {NICKNAME}，能请你为我挑一束送给母亲的花吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, will you choose some flowers for my mom?

C: 养父喜欢的花是…
E: What was your father's favorite flower...?

C: …你把信带在身上了吗，奥森先生？给我看看吧。
E: ...Do you have the letters on you, Mr. Oswell? Let me take a look.

C: 城墙外很危险…
E: It's dangerous outside the city walls...

C: 除非真的有「风雪免疫」这种药物的存在……
E: Unless Blizzard Immunity is real...

C: 你看，这里有些类似实验仪器的东西，说不定是瓦赫留下来的。
E: Here, this looks like lab equipment. Maybe Vache left it behind.

C: 我和哥哥确实经常戴一样的项链…怎么了？莫非你们认识瓦赫医生？
E: My brother does wear an identical necklace... Do you know him?

C: …翻修工程遇到了一些阻力，银鬃铁卫正在尽力解决。
E: ...We encountered a problem during the renovation process. The Silvermane Guards are doing all they can to figure it out.

C: 唉…别吓我呀。告诉你吧，其实是原本陈列在这个柜子里的展品最近失窃了。
E: *sigh* You're in a museum, remember!? Here, let me explain – this exhibit was recently stolen.

C: 说来听听。
E: I'm all ears.

C: 颜色…质地…嗯，这确确实实是博物馆丢失的「流星碎片」——太好了！
E: The color... the texture... Yup, this is the stolen Meteor Fragment alright — fantastic!

C: 啊…史瓦罗，我还没见过他呢。听说他不太好相处……
E: Umm... I've never met Svarog before. I heard he's not easy to get along with...

C: 恰巧，最近本人身边发生了一件怪事，令我颇为疑惑…思考良久，我觉得还是该把这件事告知公职人员最为妥当。
E: As it so happens, I witnessed a strange incident recently that left me quite puzzled... After reflecting on it for a time, I decided it would be most appropriate to inform public officials.

C: 就算他们想为自家少爷保密…只要稍加敲打就一定会招供。
E: Even if they want to keep the young man's secret... they'll cough it up with the right kind of encouragement.

C: 动作很快啊，凯尔。从交通部大臣那里打听到什么了吗？
E: You were quite expedient, Kyle. Did you find anything out from the Department of Transportation?

C: …那就一刻都不能再等了！{NICKNAME}，我们赶紧出发去逮捕那个家伙吧。
E: ...We can't hold off a moment longer! Hurry, {NICKNAME}, let's go arrest that scoundrel.

C: 好，你再多准备准备，不过别花太久了。
E: ...Okay, whenever you're ready, but don't take too long!

C: 都在这儿呢，少爷！买家就快到了，您往这边走！
E: Right here, boss! The buyer is arriving soon. Here, this way!

C: 小子，有件事我突然记不清了，你提醒我一下——
E: Y'know, I just realized there's something I forgot — maybe you could help me remember.

C: 是啊。好久不见了，佩拉小姐。
E: Indeed. Good to see you again, Miss Pela.

C: 对，对对对！就是这个志愿者！
E: Yeah, that's the one! A volunteer!

C: 添…添麻烦了！真的很不好意思！
E: I'm... sorry for imposing this on you!

C: 呜…也不全是啦……
E: Um... Not exactly...
...*sigh*

C: 好了，今天就先到这里吧，想必你们也都累了。之后如果还想再试试的话，就来休息区找我吧。
E: Well, let's call it a day. I'm sure you two are tired, too. If you want to give it another shot, just drop by the Rest Area.

C: 乐意效劳！
E: I'm happy to help!

C: 不错，这下事情有趣起来了。
E: The plot thickens!

C: 有吗？我倒没什么印象了。我接受过严格的军事训练，能在任何情况下与战士们协同作战…
E: We do? I hadn't realized. I've received rigorous military training — coordinating with soldiers under any circumstances is easy for me...

C: 我来了！全都住手！
E: I'm here! Everybody, stop!

C: 不要紧张，这只是正常的询问。
E: Don't get upset. It's a perfectly reasonable question.

C: 绝对和他有关系！
E: It definitely has something to do with him!

C: 你只是在嘴硬吧？
E: You're just trying to trick us.

C: 不介意的话，我现在想跟匹克老弟聊点商业机密…你还在等啥？赶紧去寻宝吧。
E: If you don't mind... I'd like to discuss some confidential business with Peak... What are you waiting for? Go find the treasure!

C: 嘿嘿，过誉了，桑博我只是比较有眼光罢了。好了，这下你也该相信我了吧。
E: Hehe, you flatter me. I'm just gifted with the insight to do some good business, that's all. So, I think you can trust me now!

C: 是！
E: Yes, sir!

C: 也是。希望那一天能早点到来。
E: That's true. I hope that becomes a reality one day.

C: 收集食材是可以，但那个元件肯定很难找……
E: Finding food is easy, but finding that component is gonna be hard...

C: 嗯…这样对雪原生态比较好。
E: Yeah... It's better for the Snow Plains' ecosystem.

C: 我在那里等你。
E: I'll wait for you there.

C: 谁、谁要你们多管闲事啊？我本来马上就能逃走了，根本用不着大人帮忙！
E: Wh—Who asked you to do anything? I was just about to escape, I didn't need your help at all!

C: …我没听错吧？你居然还想谈条件？
E: ...Are you kidding me? You want to negotiate?

C: 我也…我出任务的时候都不带钱包的。
E: Me neither... I never bring my coin purse with me on a mission.

C: 我们知道了，多谢提醒。
E: Got it. Thanks for the tip.

C: 宝贝可不会长出腿自己来找我们！快点，咱们出发吧！
E: Well, the treasure won't grow legs and find us, will it! Come on, let's go!

C: （尽量速战速决吧。）
E: (Better make this quick.)

C: 可算找到你们了！居然跑到这种地方玩捉迷藏，太危险了！
E: Found you! You ran all the way out here just to play hide-and-seek? It's too dangerous!

C: 不许叫我「大姐」！虎克她们人呢？赶紧把大家叫出来吧。
E: Since when did I become "Miss" March? And where's Hook and the others? Come on, call them over.

C: 还好来的是我们！要是被娜塔莎捉到，你们就等着挨罚吧。
E: You should be happy it's us and not Natasha! If she'd found you, you'd be in big trouble already.

C: 想想就来气，不说这个啦！你们跑老远来找鼹鼠党有什么事，快点说吧！
E: Anyway, enough about hide-and-seek. You came all this way to tell The Moles something, so spit it out.

C: 啊，对——刮目相看！我、我能想起来的，才不需要你们提醒！
E: Ah! Yeah — sit up and take notice! I—I would've figured it out myself. I didn't need you to remind me!

C: 它说得应该没错…史瓦罗先生向克拉拉作出了保证，绝对不会出尔反尔的。
E: It's telling the truth... Mr. Svarog made a promise to me, and he never betrays his promises.

C: 这里就是「淬火工坊」…帕斯卡果然在这里。
E: Hey, this is the Tempering Workshop. And look, Pascal is here.

C: 咦？这是什么，是日记本吗？
E: Huh? What's this? A diary?

C: （试着梳理整个事件的脉络）
E: (Try to sort out the whole story)

C: 也就是说，我们的目标都是史瓦罗。不解决那个「大佬」，后面的东西都是废话。
E: In other words, Svarog is the target of both our efforts. If we can't deal with the boss, we can't deal with anything.

C: 那「地火」在干嘛？
E: What will Wildfire be doing?

C: 这破玩意还醒着吗？不会已经坏掉了吧？
E: Is it even awake in there? Maybe it's broken down.

C: 请回答问题——「内燃机说唱大赛」的总冠军是？
E: Please answer the following question: Who is the reigning champion of the Internal Combustion Engine Rap Tournament?

C: 又要修东西了？我现在可是轻车熟路啦！
E: More fixing? I'm getting good at this!

C: 重新评估目标状态——威胁指数上升。我要求你们告知真实的来意！
E: Reassessing targets... Threat index raised. I demand that you reveal your true intention.

C: 可不是嘛！要不然就算打倒了史瓦罗，他也不会让我们接触那些信息的吧？
E: Yeah! Without her, even if we'd defeated Svarog, there's no way he'd have given us access to the intel, right?

C: …我没事，我只是…感觉有些头晕 。
E: ...I'm fine. I just... feel a little faint.

C: 除了谢谢，就没点实际的么？
E: Any chance of a more... tangible show of thanks?

C: 她受到了很大的冲击。
E: She got a big shock.

C: 你该找个人聊聊了。
E: Hey... maybe you should find someone to talk to...

C: 记忆模块有没有受损呢？克拉拉也想尽可能地帮忙。
E: Did your memory module get damaged? Maybe I can fix that too.

C: 我们要去参加拍卖…
E: We're going to the auct...

C: 谢谢娜塔莎姐姐！走吧，荣誉队员——去拍卖会咯！
E: Thanks, Natasha! Honorary member, let's head to the auction!

C: 你说什么呢？那是「菌菌」的眼睛，不准取下来！
E: What are you talking about? You can't just take Junjun's eyes off!

C: 唉，真是诸事不顺…拿不回合同的话，大熊玩偶也要离我远去了……
E: *sigh* Just my luck... If I can't retrieve the contract, I won't be able to buy that bear...

C: 你好…请问，和你一起注册的那位矿工朋友，他现在去哪了？
E: Hi, excuse me... may I ask where the miner who registered with you has gone?

C: 咳，算了，外来者，你们去磐岩镇找他吧。我得确保其他的买家没有擅自离场，万一你们扑了个空，那小偷说不定还混在这儿的人群里……
E: Ahem, anyway. Outsiders, you should go and look for him in Boulder Town. I need to make sure the other buyers haven't left. If you don't find anything, the thief might still be among us...

C: …都到这份上了，我骗你们干嘛？
E: ...Why would I lie to you at this point?

C: 克拉拉将机器人的核心移入了新的机械外壳中……
E: Clara transferred the robot's Core Module into the new Robot Shell...

C: 哪些部分不正常？
E: What about Pascal isn't normal, exactly?

C: 简单地说，帕斯卡的脑袋里塞满了来源不明的「垃圾」。这些「垃圾」，再加上跟核心不兼容的硬件，让它忘记该怎么说话了。
E: Simply put, Pascal's brain is filled with junk information of unknown origin. This junk, along with hardware that's incompatible with his core, caused him to lose his ability to communicate.

C: 唔，之前和史瓦罗先生一起讨论的对策，克拉拉想稍微总结一下。
E: I'd like to recap what I discussed with Mr. Svarog earlier.
██Lost█Pascal█. █Protect█good██! █Hurt██? No██...

C: 简易结论：无法判断该个体的生产时间、用途及归属。
E: Conclusion: It is impossible to determine the time of manufacture, purpose, and ownership of this robot.

C: 考虑到自动机兵仍有可能通过自身算力开发出情感模块，我对此已有预案。
E: Given that automatons can still develop emotion modules using their own processing power, I have a backup plan in place.

C: 唔，所以…我们该拿帕斯卡怎么办呢？
E: So, what should we do with Pascal?

C: 该方案可以将对内和对外的损失皆控制在最小幅度。尽管根据克拉拉的描述，该个体的状况暂且稳定，但根据演算……
E: This option minimizes both internal and external losses. Although Clara's account indicates that the robot is relatively stable, the assessment based on the computations shows that...

C: （史瓦罗认为有必要对帕斯卡进行格式化，纳入基地网络，但这会使帕斯卡失去来之不易的情感智能。）
E: (Svarog thinks that formatting Pascal's data and integrating him into the base's network is necessary, but doing so will deprive Pascal of his special emotional intelligence.)

C: 帕斯卡和你很类似，不是吗？
E: Pascal is similar to you, no?

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}……
之前，在史瓦罗先生的帮助下，帕斯卡顺利完成了格式化，被纳入基地网络。可在那之后……
E: Mr. Svarog helped to format Pascal and integrate him into the base network, but after that...

C: 啊…克拉拉也尝试过维修帕斯卡的逻辑语言中枢，我还特意加装了新的芯片。
E: Oh, I tried to fix Pascal's language module by installing a new chip.

C: 但…似乎没有起到什么效果。不过，考虑到这样也不影响交流…克拉拉就先让帕斯卡保持原状了。
E: ...It didn't seem to make much difference though. Still, at least we can understand what he's saying... I'll leave him alone for now.

C: 你们戴的是…临时证？
E: Hmm... Are those... temporary passes?

C: 我参与过这种栈桥的底层逻辑编写，它是靠几台终端机联合控制的。我们去找找。
E: I helped set the underlying mechanisms for this type of gear bridge. It's controlled via different terminals in combination. Let's go find them.

C: 哟！晚上好，大兵！
E: Yo! Evening, soldier!

C: 齐心合力突围吧！
E: If we work together we can break through their ranks!

C: 都走到这里了…就算摔折胳膊再赔上条腿，我也要见到「星核」。
E: We've made it up till now... I could lose an arm and a leg for all I care — I have to lay eyes on the Stellaron.

C: 等等，杰帕德！听我说——
E: Wait, Gepard! Listen to me—

C: 你理解布洛妮娅的苦衷了吗？
E: Do you understand Bronya's struggles?

C: 等等，你们…莫非是通缉令上的「外来者」？之前筑城者兴师动众想要抓住的人…难道就是你们？
E: Wait! You are... aren't you the "Outsider" on the warrant that the Architects were so desperate to apprehend not so long ago?

C: 谢、谢谢您，谢尔盖科夫娅长官！
E: Oh... Thank you... thank you so much Captain Sergekevna!

C: 给我谢尔盖耶夫娜个面子…
E: For the sake of Miss Sergeyevna...

C: 欸？你是…我们之前见过面吗？
E: Hmm? Are you... have we met before?

C: 斯捷潘先生在那儿，就在我身边。姐姐没来…我真希望她也在。
E: Mr. Stefan is there, and he's with me. My sister's not there... I really wish she were.

C: 他们…他们在说一些不好的话。诉苦、抱怨，还有…咒骂。
E: They... they're saying bad things. Complaining, grumbling, and... cursing.

C: 我不赞成与深层裂界里的物件做过多接触，但是……
E: I can't say I like the idea of interacting with our surroundings — especially this deep into the Fragmentum. However...

C: 几近绝望之际…她选择把目光投向「星核」，许下最初的愿望。
E: When all was nearly lost, she chose to set her sights on the Stellaron... and made the first wish.

C: 那段阶梯…只有这一条路了。
E: Those stairs... it's the only way forward.

C: 比、比史瓦罗还大一万倍的机器人！
E: Th—This robot's a thousand times bigger than Svarog!

C: 不…服从我的命令！我的！
E: No... No! Obey my commands! Obey me!

C: 如果可可利亚拿布洛妮娅来要挟我们……
E: If Cocolia threatens us by taking Bronya hostage...

C: 怎么了，布洛妮娅？哪里不舒服吗？
E: What's wrong, Bronya? Do you feel sick?

C: 在我看来，这倒是充实列车智库的好机会…想必你对这颗星球还谈不上非常了解，倒是不妨趁机了解一下相关历史——你觉得呢，{NICKNAME}？
E: The way I see it, this is a good opportunity to enrich the Express' data bank... I assume you don't yet know everything about this planet, and you might as well take this chance to learn a bit about its history. What say you, {NICKNAME}?

C: （…咦？是手机响了吗？）
E: (...Huh? My phone's ringing?)

C: 所以它为什么会出现在那里？
E: So what was Findie doing there?

C: 好像不太对。
E: That's not quite right.

C: 笔记上还写着「联系方式」。
E: A contact number is listed in the notes.

C: 证言我已经很清楚了。
E: The testimonies are clear to me.

C: 趁眼下没人，拿武器用力砸树。
E: Hit the tree with your weapon! No one is watching.

C: 我<color=#dbc291ff>甚至看到有几册书不知为何挂在了树上</color>。
E: I even saw some books <color=#dbc291ff>hanging off trees</color>.

C: 当然都要找回来了！
E: Of course I want them all back!

C: 看来它还没忘本，但是时候该让它回家了。
E: Sounds like it hasn't forgotten its roots... But it's time for it to come home.

C: 你想起了小聪的建议，找准了忧郁诗人的后盖，试图将「忧郁」情绪权重调低。幸好，忧郁诗人也没有拒绝的意思。
E: You remember Cong's suggestion. You locate the back flap and try to reduce the Gloomy setting. Luckily, there is no resistance from Gloomy Poet.

C: 「人道海水深，我是大海坑。海水尚有涯，不如吃豆芽。」
E: "Humans compare depths to the ocean, I am a tsunami in motion. Oh ocean, a mistress so fickle, but I would rather just eat a pickle."

C: 你可算回来了啊，我还以为你被悲悼伶人给带走了呢？
E: You're finally back. I thought you were taken away by the Mourning Actors?

C: 路上小心一些。
E: Be careful out there.

C: 我赞成。
E: Yea.

C: 我将这句诗刻在了灵感玉兆上，以此纪念今日之所见。来，给你。
E: I've engraved this poem on the Inspo Jade Abacus to commemorate the experience of today. Here you go.

C: 执手哽咽诉离愁
E: as they clasp hands in imminent sorrow.

C: 说让我走我就走
E: if you want me to go, I'll go.

C: 我、我……
听说她和这位大诗人有过一段甜蜜时光。不过现在的她看样子依然单身。也许大诗人蜕生去了，也许他移情别恋了，谁知道呢。
E: I heard that Jingzhai had a sweet relationship with him. But she seems to be single now. Perhaps, the poet has gone through hatching rebirth or fallen in love with another. No one is sure.

C: 不是打磨几颗形状特殊的小石头，就是买些哪儿都能买到的廉价小工艺品。
E: Their gifts are either tiny stones polished into unique shapes or small cheap crafts that can be bought anywhere.

C: 你为什么让小聪扔掉同心锁？
E: Why did you ask Cong to throw away the Unity Lock?

C: 我能理解，但是……
E: I understand, but...

C: 温符瑞让我去寄礼物…
E: Wen Furui asked me to deliver the gift...

C: 你可真敢选啊，明明你根本就没有预约过。
E: Are you sure? You didn't book anything before.

C: 要是真的美丽狐仙，当然可以骗我，这有什么问题吗？
E: If they were true foxian beauties, of course they can trick me. Is there a problem with that?

C: 我们是鹤运物流的快递员。
E: We're delivery workers from Heron Express.

C: 我们还是去地衡司吧。
E: Maybe the Realm-Keeping Commission could help us sort things out.

C: 啊，你来了，我拜托你调查的事情进展如何？
E: Oh, you're here. How goes the thing I asked you to investigate?

C: …呃，没有装吗？
E: Uh, you weren't pretending?

C: 那个狐仙提出要和你见一面，你就去嘛，真相只差一步了。
E: The Foxian Beauty has offered to meet with you. The truth is only one step away now, so you may as well accept the offer.

C: …需要我去跑腿？
E: ...You need me to run errands for you?

C: 唔，龙尊雕像么？亲眼所见，真是胜过照片百倍。
E: Oh, is that the high elder statue? Nothing beats seeing it in person.

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么样，找到我的笔记本了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, did you find my notebook?

C: 可恶，别吓我呀…啊，等等，我见过你。
E: Ugh, then don't scare me like that... Ah, wait a minute — I've seen you before.

C: 先拿走吧。
E: I'd better take this.

C: （…现在还不知道药方跟半夏之间的关系，也许另有他用。）
E: (...Does this prescription really have anything to do with Banxia?)

C: （「治疗魔阴身」很可疑，有进一步证明她是药王秘传的证据吗？）
E: (Wanted her to treat the mara-struck? Suspicious... Could she be a disciple of Sanctus Medicus? I wonder if I have any evidence...)

C: 到底发生什么事了？
E: What in the world happened?

C: 我一直在想，要是那时候他们不总是出现打扰咱们，也许我现在该是十几个孩子的爷爷了……
E: I always wondered, what if they weren't always bothering me like that? Perhaps I'd have sired several grandchildren by now...

C: 游客？
E: Tourists?
Uh...

C: 放行！
E: Access granted!

C: 我…不行啦……
E: I... can't hold on any longer...

C: 明白了，真正重要的东西，还是亲自见面说比较好。
E: I see. Well, it's good that you're here in person — this is no simple matter.

C: 那个臭婆娘承诺了我无数遍，我好不容易才相信她，相信她能给我带来改变。
E: That woman promised me countless times... In the end, I finally trusted her — I genuinely thought she'd offer me change.

C: 封印既成，我在仙舟上的事就暂告一段落了。
E: Now that the seal is repaired, my affairs on the Xianzhou have drawn to an end... for the time being.

C: 「为止若木苏生，寿瘟遗祸。」
E: "Shun the tree's growth, the residual plague."

C: 你确定要重温之前的行动吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Are you sure you want to re-visit the previous operations, {NICKNAME}?

C: 久等了。我已经查阅了那片空地前的全部影像…不过，说是「全部」，其实丢失了非常多。
E: Thanks for waiting. I checked all the footage we have of the open area... I say "all" — a lot of it was lost.

C: 「蜕生」是持明的特性…人类也可以返老还童吗？
E: Hatching rebirths are specific to the Vidyadhara... Can humans also experience de-aging?

C: 我们可是列车组的！
E: We're the Express Crew!

C: 那么，他拿走的是哪本书呢？
E: So, what was the book?

C: 收下这个吧，就当做我的赔礼了，可好吃了。
E: Here — a little something for the inconvenience. It's yummy.

C: （他们这些大反派，往往都有比金钱更加重要的目的。所以赔钱做生意，也是非常合理，非常符合逻辑的。）
E: (You know how evildoers can be — sometimes they have a higher purpose than just money. It's only natural he'd try everything to achieve that purpose.)

C: 难道你们就是…「黑衣人」？你们怎么不穿黑衣了啊？
E: Are you two... *gasp* the people in dark clothing? What's with the wardrobe change?

C: （…越危险的地方越安全是吗。）
E: (...Hiding in plain sight, perhaps.)

C: 那么，我们就先行告辞了。因为晴霓的胡闹，给二位带来了这么多麻烦，请容我再次向二位英雄道歉。
E: Then for now I will excuse myself. Qingni's irresponsible actions caused much trouble for the two of you — allow me to apologize once again on her behalf.

C: 似乎每次与你们见面，都伴随着意外。希望下次能在更合适的气氛下与星穹列车的各位见面。
E: It seems our every meeting is accompanied by an incident of some sort. I hope I can meet the Astral Express crew under better circumstances next time.

C: 我第一次喝也被呛到了。但是再多喝几口，就有种说不清道不明的滋味盘旋在唇齿间，突然就爱上了这豆汁的怪味儿。
E: D—Don't worry, I choked the first time too! Have a few more sips, it takes a while for the unique flavor to, uh... work.

C: 你猜的一点儿也没错。
E: That's right!

C: 难道还有人比你{NICKNAME}更擅长从满地的杂物中找到一个不起眼的挂饰吗？
E: ...so, {NICKNAME}, when it comes to finding a needle in a haystack, is there really anyone more capable than yourself?

C: 如果是让我们帮你劝说令堂，这恐怕有些困难。清官难断家务事，我们终究是外人。
E: If you want us to help you persuade your mother, I'm afraid that could be difficult. It's not easy to solve a family dispute as an outsider...

C: 是什么让一名天才飞行士，一个明明热爱飞行的人变成了这样？
E: What turned an ace pilot — someone who loved to fly — into someone like her?

C: 铸成这些圣物的材料，便是帝弓神矢在战场上留下的「余烬」。对那些幸存者来说，其中掺杂着故友的鲜血，敌人的灰烬，还有自己的回忆……
E: Such divine objects were forged from the embers that the Arbiter's divine arrow left behind. For the survivors, these relics contain the blood of their comrades, the ashes of their enemies, and the dust of their memories...

C: 我不敢妄言令堂的想法，晴霓小姐还是应该亲自和她谈谈。
E: I can't guarantee that's what she's thinking, Miss Qingni. You should talk with her yourself.

C: 完全理解。瓦尔特先生一看就是这样的人，有一套坚定的原则，并且绝不会越线。
E: I understand, I can tell Mr. Yang is a principled person — there are some lines he won't cross.

C: 「别让那孩子触碰天空…」
E: "Don't let that child touch the sky..."

C: 她不想失去另一个采翼…
E: She doesn't want to lose Caiyi again...

C: 妈妈…我还有最后一个小要求……
E: Mom... I have one last request...

C: 我只是讨厌你。
E: I dislike you.

C: 好…再见了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Okay... Goodbye, {NICKNAME}.

C: 艾利欧可以窥见可能性，只要我按照他的指示行事，他就答应告诉我走向那个未来所需的条件。
E: As I told you, Elio is able to glimpse through possibilities. As long as I followed his instructions, he promised to tell me what it would take to move towards the future I wanted.

C: 未来会发生的事情依然清晰：真正的考验还在后面：年轻的云骑剑士，那可不是个好对付的敌手。
E: The future is still clear — the real test lies ahead... The young swordmaster of the Cloud Knights. He will not be an easy foe.

C: （作弊）我想再见到你。
E: (Ignore the rules of the game) I want to see you again.

C: 做好准备，{NICKNAME}，这个小孩子可不好对付呢。
E: You better be ready, {NICKNAME} — this kid packs a punch.

C: 窃忆者，吃我一刀！
E: Take this, Memosnatcher!

C: 出于安全考虑，你们还是尽快前往星槎海的中枢避难吧。我带各位觐见执掌天舶司的驭空大人，交予她来定夺。
E: For your safety, you should hurry to Central Starskiff Haven and take refuge. I'll take you to Madam Yukong of the Sky-Faring Commission and let her decide how to proceed.

C: 不妨事！这家伙，好大的怪力！
E: It's okay! Phew, this one's strong alright!

C: 啊，是呀，我作为接渡使去过不少星球呢，被「星核」侵蚀的惨状也见过不少…唉。
E: Yes, I am. As an Amicassador, I've been to many planets, and seen my fair share of Stellaron corrosion... *sigh*

C: 我可以是。
E: I would make a wonderful tourist.

C: 不不不，不麻烦了……
E: N—No, no... No trouble at all...

C: 而我并不介意将复仇这一过程拉得很漫长，这样也许更有趣。
E: I don't mind prolonging my vengeance... It might be more interesting that way.

C: 所以，你和龙师们一样，也想接续龙尊传承？
E: So, you also wish to restore the high elder succession, just like the Preceptors?

C: 不过嘛…眼下这一时片刻，阁下还有机会欣赏鳞渊境的美景，这将是你最后能见到的罗浮景象。
E: However... at present you have the opportunity to enjoy the beautiful scenery of Scalegorge Waterscape. It will be the last view of the Luofu you ever lay eyes on.

C: 我给了他重来一次的机会，这还算不上同情吗？
E: I gave him a second chance — does that not count?

C: 可惜鳞渊空悬，世事蓬转。我们五人有的在世重生，有的求死不能，有的人沦为罪囚，而有的人…再也没法赴约了。彼此情谊也荡然无存。
E: How sad that Scalegorge Waterscape remains empty while the world continues to turn. Some of us have been reborn, while others were denied death. Some have become criminals, while others... can no longer fulfill their promises. And in the end, our friendship is no more.

C: 二人同行片刻，在一处驻足。
E: The two journey together before coming to a stop.

C: 我会注意安全的。
E: I'll be careful.

C: 云骑警惕地看了看四周，在确认没人跟踪后，迅速离去。
E: The Cloud Knight vigilantly monitors his surroundings. After he's certain no one is tracking them, he makes a swift getaway.

C: （之前明明和绿芙蓉说好在这里汇合，可这人似乎不在？）
E: (Green Hibiscus agreed to meet me here, but there's no sight of him. What gives?)

C: （药王秘传还真是谨慎…看来只能先去帮他们完成任务了。）
E: (The Disciples sure know how to keep a low profile... Looks like I'll need to help them complete this mission.)

C: 这边物流机巧鸟的负责人和我一样是个持明。她到日子了，要去鳞渊境重入轮回了。
E: The person in charge of the courier cycranes here is a Vidyadhara — just like me. Her day has arrived — she's already headed to Scalegorge Waterscape to self-reincarnate.

C: 你说你以前叫什么？
E: What did you say your old name was?

C: 三月小姐，接下来可能会有些不舒服。本座会介入你的记忆世界，帮助你清除阻碍。
E: Miss March, this might feel uncomfortable, but I'm going to enter your memory world and help you clear out any obstacles.

C: 因为某种原因无法唤起回忆…
E: Unable to be awakened...

C: 艾丝妲站长说，前面那个房间里存放着星核…我猜军团对它也有很大的兴趣吧。
E: Asta said that the Stellaron is stored in that room up ahead... and I'm guessing the Legion might also be interested in its whereabouts.

C: 这是我对仙舟的美好回忆啦！
E: One of my fondest memories on the Xianzhou!

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 是啊，贝洛伯格是一个白雪皑皑的末日孤城…所以到处都是这样的加热器，不然人根本生活不下去。
E: Yeah, Belobog is a kind of snowy doomsday city... There are heaters like this all over the place, otherwise people wouldn't survive.

C: 因为她本就没有过去可言。她曾是一位星神，星神无有过去，当彼等飞升的那刻起，其存在的过去与未来就被命途所淹没。
E: ...because she had no past to speak of. She was an Aeon, and Aeons have no past... From the moment they ascend, the past and future of their existence becomes inundated by their Path.

C: 虽然我不懂那些真真假假的传说故事，但品鉴真正的宝剑，只需一眼我就能明白。
E: I might not know all the stories and legends, but I know a legendary sword when I see one.

C: 我的眼泪怎么也抹不净，什么也看不清，我越喘越急，再后来我摔倒在一片血泊之中……
E: My tears wouldn't stop, and I couldn't see anything. I kept gasping for air until I collapsed in a pool of blood...

C: 无论铸剑师怀着怎样美好的初衷，这些饱经杀戮的武器，最终都会沦为魔剑。
E: No matter how noble Hanguang's intentions were, those weapons, soaked in blood, turned into cursed swords eventually.

C: 所以爷爷才会瞒着我，是不想让我仓促地做出决定……
E: That's why Grandpa hid it from me, so I wouldn't make a hasty decision...

C: 简直就像是会洗脑的恶魔。
E: It's like a devil that can mess with your mind.

C: 我要…回故乡去了。回到天空之上，很远很远的地方。我不会再回来了。
E: I'm returning... to my homeland, a distant place beyond the sky. I'm not coming back.

C: （我有什么证明方法吗？）
E: (Can I prove this?)

C: 还是不要打扰他了。客人们的体验永远排在第一优先。
E: Best not to bother him then. Guests' experiences always have to come first.

C: 首先是店员阿佑，他是个皮皮西人，身高还不到花火大人的腰，这一点常被人取笑，令他变得有些阴暗。
E: First of all is the shopkeeper, Wright. He's one of the Pepeshi people and only stands as tall as Sparkle's waist, which is often a source of teasing for him. He can get pretty salty about it.

C: 真是一场惨剧啊，若不是有您这样明察秋毫的神探，三位嫌疑人一定会蒙受不白之冤！
E: What a tragedy. If it weren't for your incisive detective work, the three suspects would all be facing grave injustice!

C: 那就祝二位一切顺利！哦对了，如果你们不急着走，我可以给二位讲讲那几个你们没选择的谜底。
E: Then I wish you both the best! Oh yes, if you're not in a hurry, I can tell you the answers for some of the outcomes you never chose.

C: 以及，身为忆者，我也要履行自己的职责，去收获一些「足够有趣」的记忆。
E: And, as a Memokeeper, I also have to fulfill my responsibilities and harvest some interesting memories.

C: 这位钱可通应该就是这次被花火盯上的受害者了。
E: This Qian Ketong person should be Sparkle's targeted victim this time around.

C: 证据就是这条领带，对么？
E: This tie is a piece of evidence, right?

C: 据说，其中的符箓和原理问道于「遍智天君」博识尊。其深奥程度，整个太卜司里也只得太卜一人谈得上了如指掌吧。
E: They say the theory behind the symbols was handed down by Nous, the Wisdomwalker. The principles are so profound that in the Divination Commission only the master diviner truly understands them.

C: 太卜司自有办法从你身上挖出真相，远比话语所说的更多。
E: The Divination Commission has ways of extracting the truth, and they're far more effective than a conversation.

C: 那就去吧，我们会在这里守着。
E: Then go. We'll stand guard.

C: 你的样子很好…不狼狈。
E: You don't look like you're in a sorry state to me...

C: 符玄看见了什么？
E: What did Fu Xuan see?

C: 二、将星核带入仙舟并启动的另有其人，这其中既有内忧，也有外患。罗浮内部的叛徒和外界的敌人想要颠覆仙舟。太卜急着去找将军，想必是为了告知这一点吧。
E: Two, someone else brought the Stellaron into the Xianzhou and activated it — a result of internal unrest and external aggression. Traitors on the Luofu and enemies from outside want to overthrow the Xianzhou. The master diviner is in a hurry to find the general, presumably to inform him of this fact.

C: 那是你、我、星穹列车都无法企及的层次，在绝大多数的未来里，命运就在那一刻终结。但如果按照艾利欧的「剧本」走下去，最终会有一线生机。
E: ...proportions that neither you, nor I, nor the Astral Express will ever be able to reach. In the vast majority of futures, that's when destiny ends. But if we follow Elio's plan, there may be a glimmer of hope on the horizon.

C: 我知晓罗浮必有外敌，因为星核不可能凭空出现，一定有人用某种手段将它混入仙舟；罗浮之内患，则必是以丰饶之民自居的隐恶组织：药王秘传。
E: I agree there is a hostile external force at work on the Luofu. The Stellaron didn't appear out of thin air — someone managed to sneak it onto the ship. As for the culprits behind the Luofu's internal strife, I believe we are dealing with the so-called Disciples of Sanctus Medicus — that shadowy organization of the Denizens of Abundance.

C: 行有眚，无攸利…还真是应了卦象。可恶。
E: A step forward bridges no distance hence... Ugh, the hexagram was right.

C: 恩公们可得小心了。依我看，里头怕是出了什么天大的麻烦，叫这伙匠人去不敢去，逃又无路可逃。
E: It seems like the craftsmen are too afraid to go in, but they have nowhere to run to either. We should take care, benefactors — something terrible must have happened.

C: 今天司内突然遭灾，老夫料定是有人捣鬼！果然不出所～料啊！
E: Within Commission grounds today was sewn, an evil spun by hands unseen, unknown! No longer!

C: 接下来要做的便是……
E: So, the next step is...

C: （看来丹枢已经研究出结果了，去找她谈谈吧。）
E: (Looks like Dan Shu found something conclusive — let's go and talk to her.)

C: {NICKNAME}，谢谢你能来见我。
E: {NICKNAME}, thank you for coming on such short notice.

C: 有本事就喊啊！怕你不成？不就是抓进去教育一下又放出来……
E: Go ahead! You think we're scared of you? They'll just put us in detention — we'll be free again in no time...

C: …怎么回事？那孩子是遇到什么危险了吗？
E: ...What's happening? Is the girl in trouble?

C: 服之令人身轻体捷，延寿养生。对无名客而言，一定能让你的旅途更为轻松吧。
E: Consuming it will make your body light, agile, and promote longevity and well-being. As a Nameless, it'll make your journey a much less arduous one.

C: （那是…丹枢…既然她和一群药王秘传在一起，那么情况大约就是如此了吧……）
E: (That's... Dan Shu... with a group of Disciples... I guess that tells me all I need to know...)

C: 我没吃。
E: I didn't.

C: 再者说，罗浮上有羊肉菜的店多了，你凭什么在这里纠缠我啊？
E: Also, there are plenty of restaurants on the Luofu that offer lamb dishes. Why do you only look for my trouble?

C: 现阶段你可能还无法理解「放生帮」的主张，你只要理解「这些狼是有主的」就可以了。
E: At this point, you might not be able to understand the belief of the Unshackled. Just be aware that "these wolves are owned by someone." That's it.

C: 「放生帮」的成员却不乐见自己辛苦累积的放生功德彻底归零。
E: Members of the Unshackled wouldn't be happy to see their hard-earned merits going down the drain.

C: （似乎有人给我发信息…要不先去回复一下消息吧。）
E: (Someone seems to have sent me a message... I should reply to it.)

C: 最后是希斯曼，他的标准最简单也最麻烦，他只对植物感兴趣。
E: Lastly, it's Heathmann. His criteria are the simplest yet most demanding, as he's only interested in plants.

C: 「光合作用、好养活、无排泄物…」你的原话是这么说来着的吧。你瞧瞧，这是什么。
E: "Capable of photosynthesis, easy to cultivate, and has no excretion... Plants are the perfect living creature to be released." You said that, didn't you? Watch this.

C: 怎么样啊，贝娜？放生机械生物以后，功德积攒还顺利吗？
E: What's up, Benna? Did you increase your merits after releasing the mechanical creatures?

C: 行了，咱俩也赶紧撤吧，我感觉这希斯曼现在走投无路，快要狗急跳墙了。别一会儿给咱俩也咬出来……
E: Let's get out of here as soon as possible. Heathmann is at the end of his rope and seems desperate. He might sell us out soon...

C: 擅闯禁地的可疑人等，先抓后审，无一例外。
E: Suspicious individuals in a restricted area are detained first and interrogated later. No exceptions.

C: 不好奇！
E: No.

C: 你可以叫我「浮烟」，至于我的目的嘛，大可放心，我只想离开这儿，不想伤害你。
E: You can call me Cirrus. As for what I want... rest assured — I only want to leave this place... I have no desire to harm you.

C: 你可是判官，振作点。
E: Stay strong, Huohuo — you're a judge.

C: 我还小的时候，曾在罗浮的某个角落里看到了奄奄一息的一团火……
E: When I was littler, I saw a ball of fire that looked like it was about to turn to embers...

C: 瞒不住啦，浮烟。
E: The game's up, Cirrus.

C: 如何，考虑清楚了？
E: Have you made up your mind?

C: 所以，诱使恚炎崩溃…这个方法也许可行。趁着恚炎分裂，力量削弱，十王司可以用法器将它的碎片挨个封印起来。
E: Therefore... this might be the way to defeat Furynox. We can cause them to break apart and reduce their power, then the Ten-Lords Commission can use their sacred vessels to seal up all of Furynox's fragments.

C: …汝等离开后，寒鸦回十王司复命；如今她正带着增援赶来。
E: Hanya returned to the Ten-Lords Commission after you left. She is coming with the reinforcements as we speak.

C: 老子那是忠言逆耳！
E: Constructive criticism!

C: 穿过铜镜。
E: Pass through the mirror.

C: 相关人员已经对她的情绪做了「处理」，她应该已经忘了那些不愉快的事。相对的，健忘、嗜睡、反应迟钝是难以避免的副作用。
E: The relevant personnel have already "handled" her emotions accordingly. She should have already forgotten all the unhappy memories. Conversely, forgetfulness, sleepiness, and dulled reactions are unavoidable side effects.

C: 一切都过于「正常」了。
E: Everything is too "normal."
...Sure.

C: 这样做对客户不公平……
E: This is unfair to the customer...

C: （柯柯娜…你在哪里？）
E: (Cocona... Where are you?)

C: （柯柯娜……）
E: (Cocona...)

C: 抱歉，{F#女士}{M#先生}。这糟糕的惯性思维，它让我默认您是来索要签名的——我并非想在人前显得傲慢，还望您谅解。
E: Please excuse this terrible force of habit. I simply assumed that you were here for an autograph. I would not wish to seem arrogant. Please accept my apologies.

C: 我有个朋友想要你的签名。
E: I have a friend that would really like your autograph.

C: 「你没有家人，没有子女，没有牵挂——所以你可以为了自己的信念战斗，甚至战死。但他们呢？他们也都这么想吗？」
E: "You have no family, no children, no one to be concerned for... So, you battle for your beliefs. You would even take them to your grave. But what about them? Do they feel the same?"

C: 抱歉，稍后我会向您汇报其他事项。
E: Apologies, I shall inform you on other matters in a while.

C: …那就试试吧。
E: ...Let's try it.

C: 船长，很高兴见到您。我根据自己的管理准则招聘了新的船员。
E: Captain, it's an honor to see you again. I've recruited new crew members based on my own management guidelines.

C: 那<color=#dbc291ff>空艇就可以命名为：「塔塔洛夫号」</color>，它是传说中伟大的垃圾之王，它的模样极具前瞻性，兼有后现代的艺术感。
E: Then <color=#dbc291ff>the airship's new name shall henceforth be the Tatalov</color>. It is the legendary Garbage King, and it has a forward-looking feel with a post-modern aesthetic.

C: 口说无凭，就让我带您去个地方，您就知道了——这还是我大侄子跟我反馈的，我想着正好跟您汇报一下。
E: Instead of describing it, let me bring you to a place, and you'll know — my nephew told me about it, and I thought it'd be good to report it to you.

C: （让我想想…接下来该干什么呢？）
E: (Let me think... what should I do next?)

C: ——优秀的团队意识，老板！
E: ...Outstanding team spirit, boss!

C: （居然在一起行动…他们关系什么时候变得这么好了？）
E: (What are they doing out together... When did they become so close?)

C: 啊…这，原来如此。十分抱歉，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
E: Oh... I see. My apologies, {F#madam}{M#mister}...

C: 我感谢…呃，基因？
E: I'm grateful for... um, my genes?

C: 为、为什么？！这些巨人，居然免疫了我们灌注了信仰的攻击？
E: Wh—What's going on!? How come these giants are immune to our faith-infused attacks?

C: 呃…{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，您觉得呢？这牌桌三缺一的滋味确实不好受啊，您如此善解人意……
E: Um... what do you think, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}? It's terrible to have one player short for this 4-player game. Since you're so understanding...

C: 哎，我刚才是开玩笑的。
E: Ah, I was just joking...

C: 别担心，罗浮特产苏打豆汁儿还剩的很多！
E: Don't worry. I still have lots of Luofu's specialty mung bean soda left!

C: 我天，彦卿真的爱剑如命！
E: Wow, Yanqing really does love that sword more than his life!

C: 我的身份实在不适合参加这样的比赛，至于这边的两位嘛……
E: My identity makes it improper for me to take part in these kinds of competitions, but these two on the other hand...

C: 我喜欢暗中观察，伺机出手。不过很遗憾，演武仪典的赛制不会给我这么多时间。
E: I prefer to watch from the shadows and wait for my moment to strike. Unfortunately, the Wardance competition would not give me the time for this.

C: 我现在根本没有办法去想别的事。就带我去看看星槎，然后彻底死心吧。
E: I'm simply incapable of thinking about anything else. Take me to see the starskiffs, and maybe I'll get some closure.

C: 是从什么时候开始的呢？一转眼，他的头发全白了；再一眨眼，师傅突然就倒在了设计桌前。
E: When did it all begin? In the blink of an eye, his hair went white. And with another blink of the eye, he'd suddenly fallen over at his desk.

C: 也就是说，在这一阶段还是可能有中途报废的可能？
E: That is to say, during this phase, there's still a possibility of chucking out a failed seed?

C: 和你们一起走在迴星港的路上时，我其实一直很不安。
E: I've actually been quite uneasy during the whole of our journey to Stargazer Navalia.

C: 师傅的梦想……
E: My master's dream...

C: 铖杰师傅，你的星槎不追回来…没关系吗？
E: Chengjie, aren't you going to get your starskiff back?

C: 金人又停下来了。
E: The aurumaton has stopped moving.

C: 时机怎么这么巧？
E: How opportune for us.

C: 没想到穷观阵还能这样反过来使用，以确切的时间、空间、因果追溯定位人的信息。
E: I never thought that the Matrix of Prescience could be used to locate people retroactively using precise information of time, space, and karma.

C: 一艘星槎模样的纸船静静地躺在栏杆上，就像是经历了兜兜转转、世事浮沉之后，再次回到了最初的地方。
E: A paper boat in the shape of a starskiff rests peacefully on the railing. It looks like it has returned to its origin after going through ups and downs and twists and turns.

C: 我们刚才在聊我徒弟，卢卡。
E: We were talking about my student, Luka.

C: …要不就说到这儿吧，头儿。我可不想回忆那么尴尬的场景。
E: ...Why don't we stop there, chief. I'd rather not relive the moment.

C: 你们是专程来看我比赛的吗？那这排场可真不小。
E: Were you here just to see my fight? Well, I'm flattered.

C: …我可没娜塔这么好说话，这事不能就这么过去了。趁这功夫，你赶紧解释一下，之前到底是哪根筋搭错了？
E: ...I'm not gonna let you off the hook that easy — there's more to this story. You need to explain what the heck got into you today.

C: 你之前的「胜利口号」…
E: That victory slogan of yours...

C: 哈哈哈，看来你挺认同我的推断，是吧？
E: Hahaha, so you agree with my reasoning, right?

C: 哈，运气不赖，居然真让咱们找到了。
E: Haha, we really found it! Pretty lucky if you ask me.

C: 喂，它要飞走了！快跟上去！
E: Hey, it's flying away! Follow it!

C: 红色的系带…地、地火？！你们来这儿干嘛？我…呃，我过得挺好的，不用你们帮忙！你、你们赶紧走吧，去管别人的闲事！
E: A red ribbon... W—Wildfire!? Ha! How did you...? I'm doing just fine — no monsters around here. Why don't you go bother someone else?

C: …欸？你们这是什么反应，不能表现得开心点嘛？
E: ...Huh, why are you two so straight-faced? Can't you look a little happy?

C: 我更关心报酬…
E: I care more about what I can get as rewards...

C: 嘁…不赖嘛……
E: Tsk... not bad...

C: …怎么可能，离结束还早着呢！再来！
E: ...No way. I'm a long way from tapping out! Let's go!

C: 「让世界上的邪恶无处遁形！」
E: "...defeater of evil throughout the world!"

C: 卢卡，那家伙…还真是幼稚啊。
E: Luka... I think I get it now.

C: 说到底也怪我，活得实在是太久了些，难免遭人非议。
E: Well, in the end, I'm to blame. Living such a long life naturally brings its share of disapproval.

C: 飞剑？…喔，我还在想怎么行囊里凭空多出一把短剑，原来是你的。
E: Your Flying Sword?... Oh, so that's why I found a dagger in my bag. Turns out it's yours.

C: 但…这位怀炎将军看起来却像一个普普通通的老爷爷。他真的是仙舟将军吗？
E: But... General Huaiyan looks like an ordinary old grandpa. Is he really a Xianzhou general?

C: 求求你了、求求你了，我在朋友们面前夸下海口，说自己可以说服你…你要是不松口，我就没脸在他们面前混下去了！求求你不要这样狠心啊！
E: Please, help me! I mean it! I bragged to my friends that I could convince you... If you don't do me this favor, I'll be so embarrassed! Come on, don't be so cold-hearted!

C: 我要取走些样本，让丹士们分析分析，就能知道这生物组织的来源。
E: I'll take some samples for the alchemists to analyze and figure out where the biological tissue comes from.

C: 怎么突然聊起了严肃话题…
E: Why such a serious topic all of a sudden...?

C: 不是说喝茶吗？茶呢？
E: I thought we were here to have some tea, but where's the tea?

C: 斩杀孽物是云骑分内职责，不必灵砂小姐开口，彦卿会荡平这些孽物。
E: It's the Cloud Knights' duty to eliminate those abominations. You don't have to ask me twice, Miss Lingsha. I'll help you get rid of them.

C: 好好一句大白话，让你一翻译，我自己都听不懂了。总之，这是我打仗时的习惯，你们也给我习惯习惯吧。
E: A perfectly clear statement turned confusing thanks to your translation — you've made me lose where I was now. Anyway, this is how I operate in battle, so you might as well get used to it.

C: 哼，能不能夺走我手中这把剑，你倒是可以试试啊？
E: Heh, if you think you can just take this sword from my hand, go ahead and try.

C: 片刻之后，飞霄信步来到古海滨岸等待…
E: A moment later, Feixiao leisurely walks to the ancient seaside shore to wait...

C: 剑都把握不住的家伙，居然有点本事。
E: I didn't expect someone who can't even hold onto his sword to actually have some skill.

C: 关于建木重生始末，太卜符玄呈交联盟的一系列报告老朽都看过了。她本人也为此受召前往玉阙接受问话。联盟内部对此事疑虑重重……
E: Well, I skimmed through the reports about the Arbor's rebirth from the Master Diviner Fu Xuan. She's been summoned to the Yuque for questioning. There are a lot of doubts within the Alliance about this whole situation...

C: 看来三月是完全心动了啊。
E: Looks like March's curiosity has been piqued.

C: 罗浮的龙师也状告景元不顾盟谊，说他放任流徙在外的饮月龙尊重返罗浮，打开鳞渊境古海，干扰持明守望建木的责任。
E: The Luofu Preceptor has also leveled accusations against Jing Yuan for neglecting the Alliance's principles. She asserts that Jing Yuan enabled the exiled Imbibitor Lunae to reenter the Luofu, thereby unlocking the Lunarescent Depths within Scalegorge Waterscape, which in turn disrupted the Vidyadhara's dutiful watch over the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: （不行，可不能教两位老师生气…）
E: (No, both my masters will be mad if I do that...)

C: 不可懈怠，继续追索
E: We mustn't tarry. Onward with the pursuit.

C: 哎，彦卿师父，你怎么脸红啦？
E: Hey, why are you blushing, Master Yanqing?

C: 你笑什么？你也是粉毛！
E: What are you laughing at? You've got pink-hair, too!

C: 言重了，椒丘对武事一窍不通，只是被将军派来办些公务手续，无意打扰了两位的教学。见谅，我这就走。
E: Sorry for the misunderstanding. I don't know anything about martial arts. I'm just here on the general's orders to take care of some official business. I didn't mean to interrupt your training. I'll be on my way.

C: 如今听你侃侃而谈，心中倒是升起了几分好奇，不知你能否带我过去瞧瞧？
E: Hearing you speak so highly of it has piqued my curiosity. Would you mind showing me around?

C: 可惜，对手实在太警觉了。追踪失败，再来一次吧。
E: Alas, the opponent is too vigilant. The tracking fails. Time for another try.

C: Xuu harr，我来了！
E: Xuu harr, I'm coming!
Who's there!?

C: 拒绝回答
E: Refuse to answer anything.

C: …正如曜青仙舟最近所遭遇的情况。
E: ...Just as what happened on the Xianzhou Yaoqing recently.

C: 我见过箱中的机甲，造型与步离人颇为近似。真不知道这回他们打算做什么？
E: I caught a glimpse of the mechs in those crates, and they bear a striking resemblance to borisin. I wonder what they're planning this time?

C: 冥差呢？为什么没人增援？
E: Where are the spiritfarers? Why hasn't anyone come to help us?

C: 那个狐人奴隶，是献给我的食粮吗？
E: Is that foxian slave my meal?

C: 你的朋友落在了呼雷手里，你却要抛下他？
E: Your friend is in Hoolay's clutches, and you're just going to leave him behind?

C: 那么这个人质也就毫无价值了？末度，杀了他。
E: So, this hostage is useless now? Kill him, Mok Tok.

C: 对喽，这就是我把你们二位叫来此处的原因了。
E: That's why I called the two of you here.

C: 关闭后也会自启动的生物兵器…
E: A biomimetic weapon that will auto-restart even after being turned off...

C: 呼雷大人。
E: Lord Hoolay.

C: 就算你们能带走呼雷，你们也不可能逃得出去。
E: Even if you managed to set Hoolay free, you'd have no way to escape.

C: 我这也算是从业快一百年的老手了啊。安全，太安全了！
E: Hah! I've been in this business for almost a century! You won't find a safer starskiff around here!

C: 在古老的传说里，步离人的始祖都蓝不满于有限的生命和力量，他渴望主宰天空，成为群星的主人。
E: In our ancient legends, Duran, the ancestor of the borisin, was dissatisfied with his limited lifespan and power. He yearned to dominate the skies and become the master of all the stars.

C: 看看周围，想起什么来了吗？
E: Look around you, do you remember anything?

C: 谁能想到他竟然收了徒弟，还让自己的徒弟代替他守擂。这在我们曜青可是不战而逃的奇耻大辱啊！
E: Who would have imagined that he would take a disciple and have her be the ringmaster in his place? This is no more than running away from a fight and is a great dishonor to the Yaoqing!

C: 什么时间就要到了。
E: Almost time for what?

C: 天击将军，虽然咱们从未在战场上谋面。但这一路走来，我从属下和你的医士口中听到了不少关于你的有趣传闻。
E: The Merlin's Claw, though we have never met on the battlefield, I have heard many interesting things about you from both my men and your healer.

C: 说到底，这是来自步离人的馈赠。我们赠予的，我们也当有权收回——
E: When you think about it, this was a gift from the borisin. Anything that we gift, we are also free to reclaim...

C: 感觉你有点紧张了。
E: You still seem nervous.

C: 问问你自己，你是星穹列车无名客，一向来去自由，但为什么在爷爷把任务交给我们后，你和我一起登上了这竞锋舰？
E: Ask yourself: You are a Nameless of the Astral Express. You have always been free to come and go as you please. So, why did you board the Skysplitter with me when my grandfather gave us this mission?

C: 云璃小姐来得正是时候，就在刚才，我们收到了一个紧急登舰请求。
E: Your timing is perfect, Miss Yunli. We actually just received an emergency boarding request.

C: 十！
E: Ten!

C: 这里是…竞锋舰？还是其他什么地方？
E: Is this... the Skysplitter? Or somewhere else?

C: 就像现在这样，从来不知逃避为何物。
E: Even now, you would never run away.

C: 若是无血无泪、高高在上的神明不垂听凡人的祈愿，那我们就要为自己的渴望而战！
E: If the gods, who never bleed nor cry, who watch silently from above, refuse to listen to the prayers of mortals, then we have no choice but to fight for our own desires!

C: 绝不会让你们…离开竞锋舰！
E: I will not allow any of you... to leave the Skysplitter!

C: 消失吧，我将从你的血中凯旋！
E: Be gone! Your blood will give me victory!

C: 使用普攻击碎幻象
E: Use Basic ATK to break the illusion

C: 那遗骸是用云吟术隐藏行迹的刺客，在幽囚狱中助步离人一路畅行无阻。
E: These are the remains of assassins who used cloudhymn magic to conceal their tracks. They aided in the borisin's escape, allowing them unimpeded passage through The Shackling Prison.

C: 喂，小心说话！你可不要咒我师父喔！
E: Hey, watch your words! Don't you jinx my master!

C: 现在我还能听见海浪的声音，它们很清晰…这便足够了。
E: I can still clearly hear the sound of the waves. That's enough for me.

C: 想必诸位都听过天才俱乐部#81阮•梅的大名吧？玉阙的「眼」看到了，这位不请自来的客人已经抵达了罗浮仙舟。
E: I assume you've all heard of the famed Genius Society member #81, Ruan Mei, haven't you? The "eye" of the Yuque has just seen this uninvited guest arrive on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: <size=36>绿火腿夫人！出来！</size>
E: <size=36>Lady Greenham! Come out here!</size>

C: 哎哟，真不巧…我这才刚入梦，什么也没看见……
E: Ooh, how unfortunate... I just entered the dream, and didn't see a thing...

C: 免礼。朕是想打听一下，你们是否拘捕了一位名叫埃夫姆的宾客？
E: At ease. I wanted to ask, have you arrested a guest named Ephraim?

C: 不必感谢。朕只封赏心怀善念的「好人」。「好人」并不多见。
E: There's no need for gratitude. I only reward those with goodness in their heart. Good-hearted people are a rare find.

C: 还有事要忙。
E: There's something I have to do.

C: 你不可能想不起来！就算是再没人性的畜生，也不可能忘记那种程度的暴行！
E: You can't have forgotten! Even soulless livestock would not forget such an atrocity!

C: …朕应该找回记忆。尤其是，如果那些记忆里，藏着朕曾做过的「罪恶」……
E: ...I should find my memories. Especially if, in those memories, are buried heinous sins that I've committed...

C: 况且，我了解他…他可能不在乎边民，但一定在乎史书会怎么写他。
E: And, I know him... He may not care about the people, but he cares about what the history books will write about him.

C: 躲在我身后。
E: Hide behind me.

C: 陛下批评的对，我也在自省。但水火无情…放火这种事很难做到精准。
E: Your Majesty's words ring true, and I reflect upon my acts as well. But forces of nature can't be controlled... Arson is something that is hard to grasp with precision.

C: 灰骑士…灰骑士…灰骑士！
E: Gray Knight ... Gray Knight ... Gray Knight!

C: 蒂索克二世的统治必须被终结。这不仅是为了禁卫军，也是为了整个普普沙帝国。
E: Tizocic II's rule must be ended. Not just for the imperial guards, but for the entire Pupsha Empire.

C: 重新自我介绍一下吧。我是普普沙共和国旧帝国资产清算委员会的执行组长苏安瓜。
E: Allow me to re-introduce myself: I am Swanga, Executive Leader of the Old Empire Dissolution Committee of the Pupsha Republic.

C: 朕觉得，匹诺康尼确实让朕变成了…变回了原本的自己。
E: I feel that, Penacony has certainly turned me... back to my old self.

C: 很多人都没有意识到，在梦境里，呼吸其实是多此一举。
E: Many don't realize that breathing is unnecessary in the dreamscape.

C: 曾经，我只凭一个人的神态和穿着就能大概猜到对方的出身。但你…你很特别，孩子。
E: I used to be able to gauge a person's background from their demeanor and attire. But you... You're special.

C: 你还想起了什么？
E: What else do you remember?

C: 家族…一定是他们对我施加了某种影响，而且我无力反抗。
E: The Family... They must have done something to me that left me powerless to fight back.

C: 我想，我们大可不必让局面变得如此剑拔弩张。我猜家族的各位也不想惊扰到来往于大堂的宾客们吧？
E: Let's not escalate the situation. The Family wouldn't want to disturb the guests in the lobby, right?

C: 这样真的能算活着吗？
E: Can he even be considered to be alive?

C: 我相信这样东西能够让他…缓过神来。
E: I believe that thing will help him... come to his senses.

C: 你还记得，上次你们临别前，老人的语气里带着渴盼被拯救的希望——原本存留于他眼眸中的、那一撮跃动的火苗似乎又被掐灭了。
E: You still remember the elderly man's upbeat voice when you two parted ways last time. That tiny, flickering flame of hope in his eyes seems to have been snuffed out again.

C: 我所见过的一切，令我全然无法相信宇宙的基底是一棵无私的巨树，自愿为亿万枚树叶奉献、给养。
E: After going through so many things, I still find it hard to believe that the foundation of the universe is a giant tree that nurtures countless leaves selflessly and voluntarily.

C: 两个琥珀纪以后，查德威克博士终于获得了自由——他现在与我们同在。
E: Two Amber Eras later, Dr. Chadwick is finally freed. He is now with us.

C: 也有可能是完全空的…因为此处的卡尔德隆•查德威克不可能再私藏秘密。
E: It could be completely empty... because the Calderon Chadwick right here has no more secrets he can hide.

C: 托那位「钟表匠」的福，我正在忙着修这座流梦礁——哦，不对，应该说「钟表小子」让我建的「清醒村」。
E: It's thanks to that Watchmaker that I'm busy fixing up this Dreamflux Reef. Oh, correction — I should say it's thanks to Clockie that I'm building Rouseville.

C: 虽然只是我的猜测——钟表小子动画中那几位小鸟头领的原型，正是这几位「折纸筑梦师」。
E: This may just be my speculation, but the original inspiration for those leader-birds in the Clockie cartoons — they were these Origami Dreamweavers.

C: 你说的没错！
E: You're right!

C: 不用急着做决定，慢慢考虑就好~
E: Don't worry about making a decision now, consider it carefully!

C: 这片梦境发展至此，皈依家族已经是大势所趋。梦境需要的是平稳、繁荣，这里容不下你这种爱惹是非的异端——投降吧！
E: The Family's governance is what contributed to this Dreamscape's development. The Dreamscape needs stability and prosperity, not radicals like you who sow chaos. Surrender!

C: 总之，多谢你的帮助，呃咳咳——
E: Anyway, thank you very much for your help. *cough*

C: 哈…抱歉，我可能…就到此为止了。
E: Ha... Sorry, I might... have to stop here.

C: 如果之后还会见到奥尔拉…替我说声抱歉吧。没法遵守约定，继续陪他锻炼了。
E: If you get a chance to see Orla... tell him I'm sorry I couldn't keep the promise to keep training with him.

C: 小鸟的羽毛抖了抖，最终还是没有接过照片。
E: The bird's feathers ruffle slightly, but ultimately, it does not accept the photo.

C: 不客气。
E: You're welcome.

C: 啧，看我冯恩大爷暴力开锁！
E: Tsk, I'll blast the door open then!

C: （巴罗并不是沽名钓誉的叛徒…他是为同伴奋斗到最后一刻的英雄。）
E: (Barlow was no vainglorious traitor... He was a hero who fought for his companions till the last moment.)

C: 「『匹诺康尼折纸大学学院』正式建成。前隐夜鸫家主格拉克斯出任第一任校长，开设『筑梦学院』以为匹诺康尼培养更优秀的筑梦师人才。」
E: "Penacony Paperfold University has officially completed construction. Former Nightingale Family head Glaux becomes first dean, then opens Dreamweaver Academy to create more outstanding Dreamweavers."

C: 你这未免太霸道了些。
E: That's a little overboard, isn't it?

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 原来元老院也是强度党。
E: So the Council of Elders recognizes strength as well.

C: 我的肚子也有些饿——之前不是说过，到了圣城就可以吃上饱饭了吗？妈妈，我们什么时候才能到圣城？
E: My tummy is hungry too... Didn't you say that we'd have something to eat once we got to the holy city? Mama, when will we get there?

C: 想要直接带他们进城是很困难的，我们只能提供物质援助。对此，我有一个想法……
E: It would be hard to bring them directly into the city, so we can only provide supplies for them. And I have an idea about that...

C: 我再看看。
E: I'll take another look around here.

C: 外邦人啊…怎么说呢，这些吃食还挺宝贵的，我希望它们的美味能被充分享用…你懂我意思吗？
E: Outlanders eh... How do I put this... This food is quite valuable, and I hope that their taste will be fully savored... You get my drift?

C: 来，宝贝，你也跟这位{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}道声谢吧。
E: Darling, say thank you to this kind {F#lady}{M#man}.

C: 妈妈，苹果派，是我最想吃的烤苹果派！
E: Mama, apple pie, it's the baked apple pie that I want!

C: 你先冷静一下…
E: Catch your breath first...

C: 啥？这么严重的事情，无罪？！还有王法吗？还有法律吗？
E: What? Not guilty of such a heinous crime!? Does the law even exist in your eyes?

C: 不知不觉间，你已经代替了帕拉滕的辩方代表之位，而且获得了更多支持。
E: Before realizing it, you've replaced Palaten as the defense attorney and garnered more support.

C: 嗡！嗡嗡！
E: Roar! Roaaaar!

C: 但如果回到她的过去，或许能找到一些线索……
E: But, if we go back to her past... Maybe we can find some clues...

C: 这个…距离我上次听到这个名字已经有数十年了。之后我因事离开了圣城一段时间，当我再次回到奥赫玛，此人已不在城中了。
E: Well... It has been decades since I last heard that name. I was away from the holy city for a time and upon my return to Okhema, they were no longer here.

C: 我已备好了出逃的行囊，但在这之前，我希望能有人与我同行。你知道是谁的，对吧？
E: I have already prepared my bags for my escape. But, before I go, there is someone that I hope would accompany me. You know who that is, right?

C: 戍卫长！我们事后再来定罪，你伤势太重，请不要再多言了！
E: Captain! We can settle blame later. Your wounds are severe. Please save your words.

C: 确实。
E: Yes.

C: 果然，我果然不配做一位元老……
E: I knew it... I was never worthy to serve as an elder...

C: 你不知道，你耳边只有{RUBY_B#纷争}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的战鼓回荡。
E: You do not know. All that you can hear is the echoing war drums of {RUBY_B#Strife}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

C: 只是一捆再平凡不过的，染了色的细线。
E: It is no more than a simple and unremarkable dyed thread.

C: 它在他人耳边缄默，它在自己耳边喧哗。
E: Though it speaks not to another one's ear, I can hear it loud and clear.

C: 你好，帕西提亚。
E: Hello, Pasithea.

C: 别死我任务里！
E: Please don't die in my mission!

C: 少女枯瘦的身体，在辅祭的注视下瑟瑟发抖。她本想再说些什么，她还是担心欧洛尼斯会不小心撞碎自己。
E: The girl's waifish body quivers beneath the acolyte's gaze. She thinks of saying something, but she is still worried Oronyx might accidentally break her.

C: 你，还有那个老女人，都不过是玩弄诡计的骗子！
E: You, and that old woman, are nothing but scheming liars!

C: 抓住它！鞭打它！该死的骗子！扎格列斯的走狗！
E: Capture it! Flagellate it! Damnable liar! Lapdog of Zagreus!

C: 大家听到了吗？命运！伟大的命运会庇佑我们！
E: Does everyone hear clear? Destiny! Grand destiny will protect us!

C: 帕西提亚女士，请看看我！您有从泰坦的启示看到我的命运吗？
E: Lady Pasithea, please look at me! Did you see my destiny from the Titans' revelation?

C: 帕西提亚女士，您的预言果然没错，我们成功在废墟里找到了一对母女。
E: Lady Pasithea, your prophecy was true. We discovered a mother and her daughter in the ruins.

C: 我为什么不害怕？因为我并不畏惧死亡，我是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的眷属，只属于它的星夜。
E: Why am I not afraid? For I do not fear death, as I am {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} kin and belong solely to their starry night.

C: 所以啊，师妹，大变将至，何不来玉阙做太卜？这样我也能喘口气。
E: So, junior soror, great changes are coming. Why not join the Yuque as the Master Diviner? That way I could catch a breather too.

C: 一场难忘的旅程。
E: An unforgettable journey.

C: 而翁星中，白厄真君以身束缚大敌，十二金仙与之殊死搏斗。但见金丝浮荡、剑影刀光，破空飞矢、淋漓拳脚；自也有，烈风暴雨、奇术技巧，枪尖游龙、棋出杀招。
E: In the heart of Amphoreus, Lord Phainon restrained the enemy with his very body, while the Twelve Golden Immortals fought it in a battle to the death. Golden threads shimmered and drifted, blades and sword-lights flashed like lightning, arrows split the air, fists flew in a deadly dance. Then came storms and tempests, wondrous arts and cunning stratagems, spearpoints like swimming dragons, and lethal chess plays.

C: 冷静，杰克逊，你呼吸性碱中毒的可能已经抵达临界值，冷静！
E: Calm down, Jackson. Your risk of respiratory alkalosis is reaching critical levels. Calm down!

C: 那岂不是还有可能出现住满大地兽的星球？
E: Does that mean there could be planets completely filled with dromases?

C: 嘘，后头白厄真君那段更精彩！
E: Shh. The part about Lord Phainon is even better!

C: （看来，这场开拓……）
E: (Looks like this Trailblaze...)

C: 多少人就馋这一口哪…一口快乐无边，两口赛过神仙。
E: You have no idea, the kind of things folks are willing to do just for a sip of that... elixir from heaven!

C: 空间站里的年轻人多得是。
E: The space station is teeming with young people.

C: 这个简单，教她怎么做人，其实就是传授些你平时的吃喝喜好、娱乐消遣，把这些告诉她，让她自主学习就好。
E: Simple. Tell her about the foods and drinks you like, or what you do when you have spare time. She'll turn these into her own knowledge.

C: 对不起，我不是有意冒犯老师的。我只是太过好奇……
E: Sorry, I didn't mean to offend you, {M#mister}{F#miss}. I'm just too curious.

C: 听上去很枯燥啊。
E: Sounds pretty boring.

C: 看书用处小，还是得实践。
E: Reading is of little use. It must be practiced.

C: 我的情况你也知道，实在是很棘手…如果要改的话，只能从零开始学说话。
E: As you can see, my situation really is a tricky one... If I want to change it, I'll have to learn how to speak from scratch.

C: 别猜想了，机器人修好了吗？
E: Enough hypotheses. Did you fix the robots?

C: …被拒绝？不可能啊，我给机器人都开了权限的。
E: ...Denied? No way. I gave permissions to all the robots.

C: {NICKNAME}，正好，关于机器人的故障，我有个想法——
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, good timing. I have an idea about the robots' problems—

C: 但我认为正所谓无风不起浪，我猜测应该是有人亲历了这则怪谈。
E: But I think there's a grain of truth in such stories. I'm guessing someone must have seen or heard it themselves.

C: （虽然不是接头的人，但好像也算是做了一件好事。继续找找看吧！）
E: (That's not the right person, but it seems like I did a good deed. Let's keep looking!)

C: 辛苦辛苦，看你的样子，应该是有所收获了吧？
E: You've worked hard. Looks like you have some results?

C: 现在的就挺好。
E: The current color is fine.

C: 照你这么说，这两种色系…空间站里好像就有，但我完全没印象呢。
E: So you're saying the space station already... has these two shades? But I don't remember ever seeing them.

C: 拍完了？让我看看……
E: Done? Let's have a look...

C: …唔，刚才我也说了，以我的身份，满大街找人聊天实在不成体统。跑腿的事就麻烦你了…放心，我的家境你也不是不知道，报酬不会少了你的。
E: Hmm... Like I said, given my status, it's inappropriate for me to chat with strangers on the street. You know I am wealthy. If you help me with this, I will reward you handsomely.

C: 来吧，来行政区的南边找我。该让你看到华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀不一样的一面了。
E: Come and meet me on the south side of the Administrative District. It's time to show you a different side of me.

C: 听说你需要帮助。
E: I hear you need help.

C: 我原以为是自己误入别人的地盘，受到了警告…结果没想到，明信片上写的居然都是鼓励的话语。他说他看过我写的小说，很喜欢那些故事，希望我不要放弃。这可真是……
E: At first, I thought I trespassed somebody's territory and this was a warning... Unexpectedly, the postcard is full of encouragement. He said he's read my novel and he really loves my stories. He told me not to give up. It was really...

C: 一个纸团孤零零地卡在路灯上，你轻轻一推，它掉了下来。
E: A ball of paper is stuck on the street lamp. You give it a soft push and it falls.

C: 啊，外来者，是你们啊。来的正好，我有个差事想拜托你们，事成之后必有重谢。
E: Ah, outsiders. You've come just in time. I have something to ask of you. You will be rewarded, of course.

C: 听说你需要帮助。
E: I hear you need help.

C: 良性竞争是好事啊。
E: Healthy competition is always good.

C: 用不了多久，有关咱们的英雄事迹就会传遍下层区了…怎么样，是不是很期待？
E: Before long, our legendary story will be told throughout the Underworld. Don't you feel excited!?

C: 我和杰帕德切磋过两次…
E: I've fought against Gepard twice...

C: 他的役期马上就要到了，要我说，只要安安稳稳度过这几个月，等着回城里去和妻女团圆就行了……
E: He's about to retire. The way I see it, he should spend the last few months doing what he's been doing and return to the city to reunite with his wife and daughter when he finally retires...

C: 「七彩虹」买来了。
E: Here we go, I have bought the Rainbow.

C: 真是可爱的小花…没想到老爸还有这份心，妈妈看到了也会很开心的。
E: Aww... I didn't expect him to be this sensitive. Mom would be very happy too when she sees these pretty flowers.

C: …大地是我的教室。
E: The earth is my classroom...

C: 什么，就这？！就这破题你居然答不上来？
E: What? Is that it!? You can't even answer this basic question?

C: 选项1是正确的。
E: Option 1 is correct.

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 事先提醒您，这些题目的难度可不低…答不上来也不丢人哦。不多说了，看题面吧。
E: I would like to remind you in advance that these questions are far from simple... and it's no shame to get them wrong. Onto the quiz, then.

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 呼叫专业除水藻人士。
E: Call in a professional algae cleaner.

C: 但她每周都会来买好几十束七彩虹，算是我们店的大客户了，所以…咳，客户永远都是对的！
E: But every week she'll be in here buying a few dozen bouquets of Rainbow flowers. She's a big repeat customer for our store, so... the customer's always right!

C: 停！你要是再趁机开始拉着我讲那本小说，我就再也不来你这儿买花了。
E: Stop right there! If you try telling me about that blasted book one more time, I'm never coming here to buy your flowers ever again.

C: 我…我就是去做义工！
E: I—I'm going to do volunteer work!

C: …原来是这样。
E: ...So that's how it is.

C: 现在能说说为什么要拍照了吧？
E: Can you tell me now why you want a photo?

C: 哎…这我也承认。但我就是想喝个茶，逃避一下工作，不行吗？「会社」不就是做这个的？
E: Okay, that's true, but I just want to have some tea and get away from work. Isn't that enough of a reason? Isn't that what the Society does?

C: 都说了别聊工作！你这人怎么回事啊。
E: I said, don't mention work! What's wrong with you?

C: 别打了别打了…
E: Stop. Just stop...

C: 这炒饭…你怎么调味的啊？咋一点味道都没有？吃进嘴里跟嚼矿渣似的……
E: This fried rice... What did you do with it? It has no flavor! It tastes like mine dust...

C: 你看着面前的男人露出寂寞的神情，随后便如溃散的沙塔般于裂界的土地溶解。
E: The man before you shows a lonely expression before dissolving back into the Fragmentum soil like a collapsing sand castle.

C: 唔，我想这应该不是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}的技术问题…我再拜托别人帮我拍一张就好！
E: Mmm, it's probably not because of your photography skills... I'll ask someone else to take one for me!

C: 太好了、太好了！大兵，你可是为我们铁卫立了大功啊！
E: Nice! Soldier, you have done us a great service!

C: 这东西…是叫「愈合喷剂」吗？真是不可思议的想法……
E: Is this thing called... Healing Spray? What an incredible idea...

C: 总之，辛苦你了，这是你应得的报酬。
E: Either way, thank you for your hard work. Here are your well-deserved rewards.

C: 嘿，你还记得吗？凡人在世间的种种行为与观念都是与命途相关的。有时一念之间，你就<color=#dbc291ff>产生了某个具体的倾向</color>。
E: Hey, do you remember? Every action and belief a mortal holds in this world is connected to their Path. Sometimes, a single thought <color=#dbc291ff>can cause you to stray in a certain direction</color>.

C: …这也许是「欢愉」命途的体现。至少在当下，你走在「欢愉」的命途上。下次去模拟宇宙的时候，试试「欢愉」开局如何？
E: ...Perhaps this is a manifestation of the Path of Elation. At least, for now, you are ambling on the Path of Elation. How about trying out Elation at the start of your next Simulated Universe run?

C: 且慢，你忽然意识到它喝起来并不「燃」，没有辛辣的刺激感，这玩意真的还能算「烈焰浓茶」吗？
E: But then, you suddenly realize that it doesn't taste like it's "flaming" at all. What kind of Flaming Potent Tea would it be without that spicy kick?
Um...

C: 哎哟，总算把你给盼回来了。吓死我了。你喝完茶就急着要走，我还以为你嫌这茶太难喝直接拂袖而去呢！
E: Oh, finally, you're back! I was so worried about you. You finished the tea and just stormed out — I thought you were irritated by it!

C: 长久以来，奥赫玛应该都是一个四季如春的城市…至少雕塑上的人们穿得都很清凉。
E: Since a long time ago, Okhema should have been a city of eternal spring... A fortuitous phenomenon, for the statues are dressed lightly.

C: 浴袍、毛巾、枕头，甚至还有小憩时使用的薄被，浴场的准备是如此地周齐。就算丹恒想打地铺，想必也不会有着凉的烦恼。
E: Bathrobes, towels, pillows, even the thin blankets used during respite, the entire baths have been prepared meticulously. Dan Heng would be hard-pressed to kick up a fuss even if he wanted to sleep on the floor.

C: 你正准备坐下，突然瞥见躺椅扶手上的警示牌：「请勿在未擦干身体时使用」——这大概是某位浴场管理员的惨痛教训。
E: Just as you prepare to sit on it, you glimpse a warning label hanging off the side of the lounger's arm: "Please dry yourself before using" — probably a painful lesson of a certain bath administrator.

C: 如果不是用作大地兽的食物，这种粘土应该也是烧制陶器的好材料。你不禁设想，也许大地兽的肌肉其实是一种软陶…不对，软陶的主要成分好像不是无机物。
E: If not used as dromas feed, this clay would also make for excellent pottery material. You can't help but imagine that perhaps the dromas' flesh is also a clay of some kind... Wait, that's not right, polymer clay isn't primarily made of inorganic materials.

C: 我泪流满面，是我忘却了，星光早已隐去粲然，夜芒也不再闪烁。
E: Tears stream down my face, and it was I who have forgotten. The stars have vanished, and the night sky no longer shines.

C: 姻缘树
E: Tree of Union

C: 殿内卷宗堆叠如经纬，命运的丝线勾连过去与未来。
E: Within the hall, scrolls are stacked like warp and weft, threads of destiny weaving past and future.

C: 坍圮的石阶，朝拜者拓印下足迹和期冀。
E: Upon the crumbling stairs, pilgrims imprint their steps and aspirations.

C: 虔诚的使徒、渎神的学者，
E: Devoted emissaries, heretical scholars,

C: 晚钟敲响，
E: The evening bell tolls,

C: 倒也没有多久，只是……
E: Not that long ago, it's just...

C: 借助<color=#dbc291ff>扎格列斯之手</color>，把象征世界的<color=#dbc291ff>天球</color>放在<color=#dbc291ff>右侧</color>。
E: With the <color=#dbc291ff>Hand of Zagreus</color>, place the <color=#dbc291ff>celestial sphere</color> that symbolizes the world on the <color=#dbc291ff>right</color>.

C: 圣女大人，您偷摸给我点口信，要真不对劲，我还想着带我家老小逃奔个安宁地方过日子呢。
E: Great Holy Maiden, you must tell me. If there really is unrest, I would like to take my family somewhere safe to live out their days.

C: 也是。喏，圣女大人，这枚火山玻璃拿去吧，别再自己下矿区亲手去采了。
E: This is true. Ah, great Holy Maiden, take this volcanic glass with you. Please don't go down to the mines to source it yourself anymore.

C: 壁画上记载着树庭的历史：巨树的顶端绘着一道金色光芒，那是瑟希斯将智慧赐予人类的时刻。
E: The mural records the history of the Grove: at the top of the great tree shines a golden light — the moment when Cerces granted wisdom to humanity.

C: 你要选择你的臣民——
E: You need to select your subjects —

C: 黑衣剑士拔出造型古怪的剑，直指你的胸口。看来一场恶战在所难免——
E: The black-clad swordsman unsheathes a strangely shaped blade and points it at your chest. A fierce battle is inevitable...

C: …老提图斯，你动作快些，慈爱之庭已经失守，晚了就走不了了。
E: ...Old Titus, you must get moving. The Courtyard of Storge has been lost. You must leave now before it's too late.

C: 石头是浮起来的，这也不奇怪。
E: The stone is floating, but that's not strange at all.

C: 你是懂得保留一丝距离感的。
E: You understand the value of keeping a certain distance.

C: 你再次操控圣烛，金色流体在装置中起伏。你的意识不再悄然离开，它清晰地留在此刻。
E: You manipulate the holy candle once more and the golden liquid rises and falls inside the device. This time, your consciousness holds its ground firmly in the present.

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>墨涅塔的金茧上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>on Mnestia's Golden Cocoon</color>...

C: (x３っ「…豹有五只，代价有…」)∋
E: (x３っ "...Of five seals, three must..." )∋

C: Σ(:３っ「没错，终于能自信出门了！」)∋
E: Σ(:３っ "That's right, I can finally head outside with confidence!" )∋

C: 亲爱的，你的嗓子哑了。
E: You're losing your voice, dear.

C: 事到如今，我们也没办法把紧握着武器的大工匠硬搬回云石市集啊。
E: He's clutching his weapon, you see? We can't just drag him back to the Marmoreal Market.

C: …大工匠，请务必照看好自己！
E: ...Grand Craftsman, please take care of yourself!

C: …在靠近，敌人。举起武器，勇士们！
E: ...Enemies approaching. Raise your weapons, warriors!

C: …我做得…够吗？
E: Have I?

C: 智库上记载，数十个琥珀纪前，「柔性线路板」在旧世科技产品的部件选择中占据主要地位——而这条光带看上去很是相似。
E: According to records in the data bank, tens of Amber Eras ago, "flexible circuit boards" were a dominant choice in the components of the Old World technology products. This glowing ribbon looks remarkably similar.

C: 精美雕刻的通风口，设计与实用的结合之美证明它并非出自普通工匠之手。
E: The finely carved vent, a perfect blend of design and functionality, proves that it was not crafted by an ordinary artisan.

C: 或许是时候去别处整理思绪了，比如…一座世外的村庄？
E: Maybe it's time to clear your head somewhere else, like... a quiet little village beyond this world?

C: 「逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也微不足惜。」
E: "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value."

C: 寂静。似乎除虚空外别无他物。你打量四周，在唯一一块还算完整的内壁上，有着一个发着微光的按钮状凸起，其上的文字意为——
E: Silence. There's nothing but emptiness. As you look around, you notice a glowing button sticking out on the only part of the inner wall that's still intact. The inscription reads—

C: 天外，吓人。
E: Beyond the sky? Scary stuff.

C: 这正是你凭借海洋的权能，将我延续至今的原因吧。
E: I suppose that's why you kept me in existence using the authority of Ocean.

C: 哦？
E: Oh?

C: {RUBY_B#意思是「如果你卡关了」}倘若你四处寻路，却只能徒劳徘徊…{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#This means "if you're stuck"}If you're searching for a way but end up just going in circles...{RUBY_E#}

C: 我的腰有点不舒服…
E: My back's acting up...

C: 你也被叫回来了？看来帕姆这次是认真的……
E: Did they send for you as well? Looks like Pom-Pom is quite serious this time...

C: 列车长说的怪东西是什么啊？
E: What is this strange thing the conductor is referring to?

C: 你想立刻开始第二轮禁区演练吗，{NICKNAME}教官？
E: Would you like to start round two now, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}?

C: 只要本「副官」一声令下，随时可以开始。
E: As long as I give the order, it can start at any time.

C: 下次吧。
E: Maybe next time.

C: 虽然回廊里有奥列格兵长撑着，但我…我还是担心那里的局势。{NICKNAME}，你还会帮我们清扫战场吗？
E: Despite Captain Oleg being there, I... I'm still worried about our situation. {NICKNAME}, can you please help us clear the corridor?

C: 希望我们很快还能再见，{NICKNAME}！
E: Hope to see you soon, {NICKNAME}!

C: （还好我身上有喷气式推进装置，这些怪物没想到吧，佩佩还能飞！）
E: (Good thing I've got a jet booster equipped. I bet these monsters didn't think I could fly!)

C: 好吧…不打扰你们了嘤……
E: Okay... I'll stop bothering you eeep...

C: （我闻到房间里有几丝「分装快乐」的味道，进去看看吧。）
E: (I caught a few whiffs of the Joy Filtration Set in the room. Let's go in and take a look.)

C: （上面有你的信息素，你的同族都闻得到，这可抵赖不掉！）
E: (It has your scent on it, and your kin can all smell it. There is no denying it!)

C: （向小机器人出示工牌）
E: (Show the name card to the little robot)

C: 汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof woof!

C: （打听「管家」的秘密）
E: (Inquire about the butler's secret)

C: 就知道你会出来。
E: I knew you'd show up.

C: 人家喜欢听故事，更喜欢听{NICKNAME}讲故事！不过，要给人家留几个到睡前再讲哦？
E: I love stories, but I adore them more when {NICKNAME} tells them! Just... save a few for before bed, alright?

C: 大家的故事都好深奥，我的脑袋要转不过来了！{NICKNAME}会懂吗？「神」到底是什么呢？
E: Everyone's stories are so deep, I can't keep up! Does {NICKNAME} understand them? What is a "god," exactly?

C: 我总是一如初见。
E: I always remain just as I was when we first met.

C: 嘻嘻，是不是吓到了？别紧张，人家只是在斟酌，如果要为一本纪念册写下卷首语，那必须得是一句翻开多少次都能让人动情的话才行。
E: Hee-hee, startled you, didn't I? Don't worry. I was just thinking. If I had to write a preface for a yearbook, it'd have to be a line so heartfelt, you'd be moved no matter how many times you've seen it.

C: 哎呀，出什么事了？我听见声音就赶紧赶过来了……
E: Oh dear, what happened? I heard the sound and rushed over...

C: 这工作好危险啊！
E: This job's dangerous!

C: 来吧，让我变得完整…
E: Come on. Help me become complete...

C: 平稳落地，安全第一
E: Smooth landing and safety first.

C: 上次我俩大发神威之后，我就一直想着要再提升这机关装置的性能。
E: After what we did last, I have been thinking about improving the performance of this mechanism.

C: 这岁阳能量的击发器脾气不太好，岁阳能量容器耗尽之后，需要用能量冷凝器进行补给，就像是电池一样，千万不可以勉～强。
E: The heliobus energy trigger has a bad temper. After the heliobus energy container is exhausted, just like a battery, it needs to be replenished with an energy condenser. We can't just use it whenever we want.

C: 如果再稍加改动，还能做成刀枪剑戟、斧钺钩叉，这样，即便是大型金人也能使上云～骑～武～术～
E: If we make a few more changes to its shape, we can also make knives, spears, swords, axes, halberds, and hooks. In this way, even a large aurumaton can use the Cloud~ Knights'~ combat~ arts~

C: 感觉还挺好看的。
