E: They look good.

C: 对了，眼下负责穷观阵检修的匠人不在，能不能拜托{NICKNAME}配合我一同例行占算？
E: By the way, the craftsman responsible for the maintenance of the Matrix of Prescience isn't here at the moment. Could I trouble you to help me with some routine divinations please, {NICKNAME}?

C: 就这形势，还需要预测？
E: Do you need to run predictions for that kind of thing?

C: 大师，你是谁啊？
E: Who are you, great master?

C: 真磨蹭。
E: Stop dillydallying.

C: 你的套路我已经摸清了，还敢来挑战吗？
E: I have figured out your ways. Dare you begin another challenge?

C: 来吧。
E: Come on then.

C: 你走吧，我要回去生闷气了，要是再有下次，我可不会手软！
E: Leave. I wish to head back and sulk. If there is a next time, I will not be merciful!

C: 我的玉兆在猛烈震动，这周围一定有「寻径指津」的高手！
E: My jade abacus is vibrating violently! A "Pathfinder" pro must be nearby!

C: 现在就玩。
E: Let's play!

C: 你再怎么准备也不可能赢。
E: Hah, prepare all you want, but you'll never win.

C: 别忘了，如果不满意，在完成前再来找我就行，我会在这等着。
E: Don't forget. If you are dissatisfied, you can just talk to me before completing it. I will be here waiting.

C: 滴答，游客，周围如此嘈杂，表针的声音却无比清晰…不可思议。
E: Tick-tock, hello guest. It's so noisy around us, but the sound of the clock hand is crystal clear... Incredible.

C: 滴、答…？
E: Tick, tock...?

C: 你想起自己在奥赫玛也见到过这样的人台，说不定它现在发生了变化？你应该再去看看。
E: You remember seeing such a dummy in Okhema. Maybe it has changed now? You should go check it out again.

C: 别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
E: Don't worry. I will assist you throughout the process and share the interpreted content with you.

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 桀桀桀，要把咱头都给笑掉了！
E: Hehehe, I'm gonna laugh my head off!

C: 你来得我就来不得？
E: You're allowed to be here, but I'm not?

C: 您要是不想回答，大可以保持沉默，没必要随口乱说！
E: You could've just remained silent if you didn't feel like answering, instead of spouting rubbish!

C: 您想听哪一类，是最有惊无险的、还是我最引以为豪的？
E: What do you wish to hear? The most harrowing heist, or my proudest feat?

C: 我在过去见过你…
E: I have seen you in the past...

C: 您看我和这几个词，有一点搭边吗？
E: Do you see any resemblance between me and these phrases?

C: 来点警世恒言？
E: Any worldly warnings?

C: 那我就不送了——无所事事的午后，也让我闲逛一会儿吧。
E: I shan't see you off then. I should be on my walk on this idle afternoon.

C: 当然，飞不过沧海的蝴蝶多少降低了游戏的难度——所以你应该能猜到我接下来要做什么了？
E: Of course, having a butterfly that can't cross the vastness makes this too easy — so you can probably guess what I'm about to do!

C: …太棒了，你说得对啊！
E: ...Brilliant, you're absolutely right!

C: 唔…那可不一定吧？如果连老巴特鲁斯都不知道那东西在哪，也许它就真的从来没有存在过……
E: Well, that's... debatable. If even old Bartholos doesn't know where it is, maybe it never existed to begin with...

C: 巴特鲁斯大人雄才伟略，此去突然，想必只为「再创世」耳。
E: The talented and strategic Lord Bartholos — its abrupt departure must certainly concern "Era Nova."

C: 呃，至于这么神秘吗？
E: Um, is this necessary?

C: 嗯…比起经常在现实中碰头，还是这样更安全一些。
E: It's much safer compared to meeting up in person frequently.

C: 哈哈，你是因为前辈在群里发的消息来的吧！
E: Ha, you're here because of the messages from the teleslate, right?

C: 《英雄未死之前》
E: Before Their Deaths

C: 先前玩过两次。
E: Played that game twice before.

C: 也没好到哪去啊！
E: Still not much better!

C: 来吧。
E: Let's do it.

C: 另外，还有些许旧卷遗存，多是无主无名的条目，没有报酬，难度极高。若能将它们解决，也称得上是祭司的荣光…感兴趣的话就来找我吧。
E: Additionally, there are a few old scrolls left, mostly unidentified and masterless entries, offering no rewards and posing significant difficulty. Resolving them would truly be a priest's glory. If you're interested, come find me.

C: …愿你的前路明晰，辅祭。门径会永远为你敞开。
E: ...May your path be clear, acolyte. The Passage will always remain open to you.

C: 当然可以，我面前站着一位见多识广的辅祭，想必聊多久都不会无聊。
E: Of course! It is fascinating talking to a well-traveled individual such as yourself, no matter how long we chat.

C: 这…{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}并未给出推演的流程？数百个光历年来可从未发生过啊！
E: What? {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} has not provided the extrapolation process? This hasn't occurred for hundreds of Light Calendar years!

C: 先不打扰了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 没关系，就在刚才我悟了。
E: It's fine, I just figured it out.

C: 另外，<color=#dbc291ff>浮台现在还不会动</color>呢，不知道那边的祭器是不是和它有关。
E: Also, <color=#dbc291ff>the floating platform isn't moving yet</color>. Maybe it's connected to that ritual vessel over there.

C: 铁球压住了浮台。你试着推了推，它纹丝不动。附近好像看不到什么机关。
E: The iron ball pins down the platform. Try as you might, it won't move. No obvious mechanism can be found nearby.

C: 你就是伊来内吗？
E: Are you Alain?

C: 所以余火到底在哪里？
E: So where exactly is the ember?

C: 「再创世」就要完成了…
E: The Era Nova is almost complete...

C: 奇怪，记得掌账祭司明明说它已经被「贼灵」偷走了啊……
E: That's odd... The accounting priest claimed it was stolen by the Spirithief.

C: 啊…抱歉，我没瞧着血迹，还以为没事…原来你是{RUBY_B#机械改造人}机巧偃偶{RUBY_E#}。
E: Ah... Sorry, I didn't see any blood, so I thought you were okay... You're a {RUBY_B#cyborg}puppet{RUBY_E#}.

C: 若不是遭遇了奇异变故，吾的「阳寿」也许就此折损了。
E: If it hadn't been for a strange accident, my wakespan might have been cut short.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「啊，我懂了。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Ah, I get it."</color>

C: 所以我们打算另辟蹊径…就找到了你。
E: So, we decided on a different approach... with you.

C: 你说还有别的合伙人？
E: You said there are other collaborators?

C: 因为战斗是最能展示命途倾向的行为。只有通过与命途的连接，才能把我们设计好的虚拟「星神」召唤出来。这些家伙虽然没什么本事，麻烦程度上却一点不比本尊逊色……
E: Because combat is the best way to demonstrate which Path one is likely to walk. We can only summon those simulated Aeons we designed when there's a connection to a Path. Those creatures don't have any special powers, but are as much a real pain in the butt as the actual gods...

C: 你都不关心我！
E: You don't care about me at all!

C: 「这是休整区域，在可怕的模拟宇宙中为你提供喘息之地。我们希望这里能够回复生命，复活队友，购买装备，强化祝福什么的。」黑塔用不负责任的声音说道，「你可以在我这<color=#dbc291ff>强化祝福</color>，至于其他功能，你在房间里自己找找。」
E: "This is the resting area, giving you a place to catch your breath in an otherwise scary Simulated Universe. We hope you can restore your health, resurrect your team, buy equipment, and enhance your Blessings here." Herta says irresponsibly. "You can <color=#dbc291ff>Enhance Blessings</color> with me, and as for the other functions, you can find them in the room itself."

C: 那个就是下载终端，去试试。
E: That's the download terminal. Go give it a try.

C: 先带上我，把队伍凑足四个人，也能最大限度地发挥「记忆」祝福的作用。
E: Take me with you so you can get four people in the team. This also maximizes the effects of the Remembrance Blessing.

C: 什么问题？
E: Yes?

C: 他对你表示感谢，微笑，接着对你破口大骂！
E: He thanks you, smiles at you, and then lets out a torrent of furious curses!

C: 你知道，你永远不会再见到它了。你相信不会有任何人知道…一只渊兽的内心。
E: You realize that you will never meet it again. You believe that no one will ever understand... the soul of a Depth Crawler.

C: 「不必了。」阮•梅说，「实验到此为止吧，下次我会换一种生命形式。」
E: "That won't be necessary," replies Ruan Mei. "The experiment ends here. I'll choose another life form next time."

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了骰蛊里封存的无数记忆重合。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into the overlap of countless memories sealed within the dice holder.

C: 「在此之后，终于——『秩序』太一示现，祂的面容神圣，声音此般空濛。」
E: "After that, at last, the Order's Ena made THEIR appearance. THEIR visage was divine, THEIR voice sublime."

C: 「博识尊」的计算：在祂的计算下，宇宙将迎来三个不可违逆的「时刻」。
E: Nous' calculation: The universe will undergo three unchangeable "Instants."

C: 在此后的旅途中，会有无数个「假面愚者」声称自己名叫「安达吐尔•扎扎罗」。他们只想逗你开心，但你会陷入苦闷的想念。
E: In your journey ahead, there will be numerous Masked Fools who claim to be Andatur Zazzalo. They just want to cheer you up, but you'll only be left feeling melancholic.

C: 这正是我所追求的。
E: This is exactly what I'm looking for.

C: 好饿。
E: I'm starving.

C: 我最酷的朋友们！
E: My coolest friends!

C: 钩爪正正落到轰开的入口处，牵引着你堪堪从终结单元的头顶飞过。卸下了飞行装备的它们，一时半会儿应该是追不上来了。
E: The hook lands right at the entrance, pulling you just over the top of the termination units. With no flight gear, they probably won't be catching up to you for a while.

C: 学者，你好香。
E: Scholar, you smell delicious.

C: 这是一种幸运。
E: In a way, I am fortunate.

C: 这句话在学生中引起了轩然大波，认同、困惑、错愕，各种情绪淹没了教室，唯独没有知识的容身之处。
E: This one sentence sent shockwaves throughout the classroom. Agreement, confusion, astonishment, and a myriad of emotions flood the room. The only thing there was no room for, was knowledge.

C: 我知道你会自问自答的。
E: I know you'll just answer your own question.

C: 一场无从死去的求药苦旅。
E: An undying and tragic voyage in search of divine elixirs.

C: 决策智能黑塔女士提议，最好把飞船换成自动驾驶。好吧，你就是那个自动驾驶程序。
E: The strategic intelligence, Madam Herta, proposed that it may be best to have the ship run on autopilot. So, you are the resulting autopilot program.

C: 凭什么黑塔是决策智能？
E: Why should Herta be the strategic intelligence?

C: 不求问于任何个体，只依靠自己的大脑。正因如此，他才是帝皇，无需星神权能的授勋。无限延续的方程，遍布寰宇的视线，以及受「权杖」扩展的思维，他将自己塑造成理想的完美学者。
E: To never question any other being, but simply rely on one's own mind. That is precisely why he was the Emperor, why he never required the honor of Aeonic authority. With an infinitely expanding equation that spreads across the galaxy and the thought expansion provided by the Scepters, he made himself into his ideal of the perfect scholar.

C: 一只蝴蝶扇动翅膀，鳞羽上的粒子恰到好处地发生反应。它飘进防护网，意外干扰到某段维护控温系统的内部信号，将监牢内的空间变作火海。
E: When a butterfly flaps its wings, the particles on its scaled wings conjure a reaction in just the right amounts. It drifts into the safety net, accidentally disrupting some internal signal within the temperature control maintenance system, sending the space inside the prison into a sea of fire.

C: 「寂静领主的目标是要阻止我们走出知识圆圈。那么，她的出现，是否意味着我们已身处圆圈边缘？」
E: "The goal of the Lord of Silence is to stop us from leaving the Circle of Knowledge. Then, with her appearance, does it mean we are currently at the edge of the circle?"

C: 我变成了一片叶子。
E: I have become a leaf.

C: 但你正感受着自我的存在，庞大的身躯，密集的热源分布在周身的各处。你曾大得像一座山脉，现在的你比山脉还要广阔。
E: But you can currently sense your own existence. Your gigantic body has concentrated heat sources distributed across it. You were once the size of a mountain range, and now you are even vaster.

C: 我成功了。
E: I succeeded.

C: 如何，{NICKNAME}，模拟宇宙挺有趣的，对吧？
E: What do you think, {NICKNAME}? The Simulated Universe is pretty fun, no?

C: 黑塔的人偶实体又一次出现商店门口，她仍秉持不屑一顾的态度。
E: Once again, Herta's puppet appears in front of a store, still maintaining a dismissive demeanor.

C: 「{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我仍在研究此刻发生的代码膨胀。」螺丝咕姆气质彬彬，向你鞠了一躬，「结论：由我暂为您带来更多『祝福』。」
E: "{F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, I am still investigating the code expansion happening right now." Screwllum gracefully bows to you. "Conclusion: For now, allow me to bring you more 'Blessings.'"

C: 踹它一脚。
E: Kick it.

C: 你感受圆盾的荣耀，骑士的「英勇」震撼了你。
E: You can feel the glory from the shields, and you are shaken by the valor of the knights.

C: 你的鸡尾酒在你眼前发生了爆炸！
E: Your cocktail explodes in front of you!

C: 「我是街机中的*完美型男*！」这个街机开始播放电子音，你认为这是某位玩味的程序爱好者为其设计好输入的声音……
E: "I'm the perfect man in the arcade!" The arcade machine starts to play an electronic voice. You suppose this was added by a playful programmer...

C: 你还是选择了绕路…你屏息静气，目光注视着前方道路——但你忽视了脚底…你不小心碰到一些碎石！
E: In the end, you still decide to take a detour... You steady your breath and fix your gaze on the path ahead. Yet, you overlook the ground and step on some gravel accidentally.

C: 「逻辑：本机仍处于战时管理模式，请证明您拥有比战争另一方更高的投资价值，以及更高的获胜几率。」
E: "Logic: This machine is still in wartime management mode. Please prove that you have a higher investment value and greater chance of victory than your adversaries."

C: 长久以来，垃圾桶承受着不平等的待遇，作为人类的工具，毫无尊严可言。
E: For a long time, trashcans have endured unequal treatment. They are treated as mere tools of humanity, devoid of dignity.

C: 是臣服于冉比希三世，接受皇帝的加冕，还是效忠你所归属的人类，继续对垃圾桶的压迫？
E: Will you kneel before Rumbas the Third and accept the emperor's honors, or swear loyalty to the human race to which you belong and continue to oppress the trashcans?

C: 「哦，忘记说说说了，这艘船的转向得靠笑话来完成，嗝，你想要要要听什么样的笑话？」远处的猩红色山峦逐渐向你逼近，在这艘船一头撞进胃壁前，你最好真的让这醉鬼讲出点什么。
E: "Oh, I forgot to t-t-tell you. You need to tell a joke to get this ship to turn *hiccup*. What kinda j-j-joke do you wanna hear?" The carmine mountain ranges in the distance gradually loom near. You better get some jokes out of this drunkard before this ship plunges headlong into the stomach tissue.

C: 「正宗公司产品，质量您绝对放心。」你拆开包装，看着上面长达十个琥珀纪的保质期陷入沉默。
E: "Don't worry. The quality of authentic IPC products is assured." You open the packaging and fall silent as you see that it has a shelf life of ten Amber Eras.

C: 「天才！我为何不仿造古代的僭主，造一艘天舟亲自上去看看？」希望艾格勒发怒的时候，他能离你远一点。
E: "Genius! Why don't I emulate the tyrants of old and create a skyship to see for myself?" You hope he stays far away from you when Aquila unleashes their wrath.

C: 为何千年以来，尼卡多利唯独对晨昏之眼穷追不舍？是因为它的雷枪杀死了僭越天空的狂徒，故而要向天空的暴君复仇？还是因为，浴血的战士希冀挑战翁法罗斯最为强大的权威？
E: Why has Nikador relentlessly pursued the Eye of Twilight for a thousand years? Are they seeking vengeance against the tyrants of the skies for striking down the rebels who dared to reach their heights with their Lightning Spear? Or does the blood-stained warrior aim to challenge the most supreme authority in Amphoreus?

C: 即便如此，在神明的殿堂里，宴会仍永不停息。
E: Even so, in the halls of the gods, the banquet never ends.

C: 人子啊，海洋将庇佑你们的征途，所以——即使黑潮正吞没世界，即使众神已陷入疯狂，也不要遗忘欢宴。
E: Children of humanity, the sea will bless your voyage. So — even as the black tide swallows the world and the gods descend into madness, do not forget the banquet.

C: 唉，再谈谈「美」吧，纪念曾屹立不倒的璀璨岁月。你去过帕福斯吗？以美为荣耀的城邦，就连高贵的墨涅塔，也曾在那儿败下阵来。
E: Ah, let us speak of "beauty" once more, in tribute to the resplendent eras that stood unshaken. Have you ever been to Paphas? A city that glorifies beauty, where even the esteemed Mnestia once met their match.

C: 这些框架成为翁法罗斯变化的源动力，所以轻盈的会上浮，沉重的会坠落。
E: These frameworks become the driving force behind Amphoreus' transformations, causing the light to rise and the heavy to fall.

C: 欧洛尼斯的价值终会体现。
E: Oronyx's value would finally reveal itself.

C: 而它那些人间的信徒，也被这如同毒蛇一样的诅咒缠绕着，再也没有金盆洗手的可能。
E: And the ones that believe in them in mortal realms are also afflicted by this curse, coursing through them like a snake's poison. There is no more hope of absolution for their like.

C: 这便触怒了瑟希斯，它命令所有的植物枯萎，忍饥挨饿的人子或许很快就会从大地上消逝。
E: This angered Cerces, who commanded all plants to wither. The starving children of humanity would soon vanish from the earth.

C: 于是，最初的人子得以诞生。
E: Thus, the first children of humanity came into being.

C: 我好像还没睡醒…
E: Am I dreaming...

C: 不对不对！这个东西的颜色一看就不是什么普通液体！品尝新饮料的好意我心领了，只要给我最普通的纯净水就行。
E: No no no! This thing is not a normal color! I appreciate your offer to broaden my tastes, but the simplest pure water will do.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 卢卡哥哥，你以后会教我们拳击技术吗？
E: Big Brother Luka, will you teach us how to fight in the future?

C: 你当然很明白…这些该死的节肢生物根本没有沟通的智能！那副垂着粘涎的恶心口器本该只用于咀嚼进食——但你确信你听到了……
E: Of course you know these despicable arthropods have no intellect to communicate with you! Their disgusting mouthpieces, dripping with sticky saliva, should only be used for chewing and eating — but you are sure you heard something...

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：全然蒸发。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Complete disappearance."

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 预备…起！
E: Get ready... go!

C: 坚不可摧的意志…这就不必了，因为我早就已经有了喀~
E: There's no need to ask for an indomitable will... Because that's something I've always had~

C: 矿脉一言不发，它的伟岸已经足够令你落泪——
E: The vein is silent. Its greatness is already enough to move you to tears.

C: …对，伙计，太倒霉了！你离胜利就差那么几秒钟……
E: ...Yes, my friend. Quite unfortunate! You were just a few seconds off from victory.

C: （不再发问。）
E: (Don't ask any more questions.)

C: 「亲爱的住客，请您评价本宾馆房间床铺的舒适度。」
E: "Dear guest, please rate how comfortable the bed is in your hotel room."

C: 小巷？
E: The alley?

C: 但无论是与不是，你都获得了一笔意外之财——你就当是替铁卫收了罚款吧。
E: Right or wrong, you did receive some unexpected cash. Let's just say you've accepted the fine on behalf of the guards.

C: 喀喀——吾王剑锋所指，就是吾等心之所向。如此霸气的君王，还有什么能抵挡得了？
E: Crrk crrk — Wheresoever my master's sword points, that is where my heart rests. What can stop such a mighty king?

C: 喀！这么说倒也不算错喀……
E: Crrk! When you put it like that, you're not exactly wrong...

C: 这只若虫一跃而起，强有力的双钳猛夹在你的膝盖上。当你意识到疼痛时，喊叫已经晚了…原来夜空中的星星这么美丽。
E: The nymph springs up suddenly, its strong claws gripping your knee. When you finally feel the pain, screaming is already futile... Oh, how lovely the stars look tonight.

C: 一顶华盖？
E: A canopy?

C: 哦，那个装着「幸运」的箱子——现在归你了。
E: Oh, the chest that contains good luck now belongs to you.

C: （还是找找更合适的藏身处吧……）
E: (Maybe I should look for a better hiding spot...)

C: 用尽全身力气敲下去。
E: You throw all of your strength into striking the rock.

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 和它聊聊。
E: Chat with it.

C: 黑潮实在是太可怕了…远处那几个黑潮怪物，我更是拼尽全力也无法战胜嘤！
E: The black tide is terrifying... Those black tide monsters over there — I can't beat them no matter how hard I try, eep!

C: 好，我出。
E: Yes. I'll leave.

C: 你要记住，先别管记住什么但你记住——在这个世界里，是什么都可以发生的嗡！
E: You must remember this, it doesn't matter if you can't remember anything else. In this world, anything can happen!

C: 卓有成效嗡！
E: Made some solid progress!

C: 哼哼，追得上吗？
E: Heh, think you can catch me?

C: 哎，你说的对，我这小小内存不够去想那些复杂的事情。
E: Ah, you're right. I have far too little RAM to understand such complex matters.

C: 我也会失望。
E: I would feel hopeless, too.

C: 就当作是我的赠礼吧。
E: Consider it my gift.

C: 确实把持不住。
E: No, it can't.

C: 摸摸看就摸摸看。
E: Might as well touch it.

C: 我不吃亏，就这样办吧。
E: This works out nicely for me, so be it.

C: 货全老哥对不起！
E: Sorry Salesby, my guy!

C: 注意看，眼前的这个男孩叫小帅，这个女孩叫小美。<color=#dbc291ff>他们俩各自负责在<unbreak>10</unbreak>个花盆里种花。</color>
E: There is a boy called Little Johnny, and a girl called Little Susie. <color=#dbc291ff>They have each been tasked with planting flowers in ten pots.</color>

C: …我还以为自己凭智慧争取来的地位呢，没想到你们是真的崇拜我。
E: ...I thought I earned my position with my wisdom. I didn't realize your admiration for me was genuine.

C: 为什么只有我一个站在最低处，也太不公平了喀。
E: Why am I the only one left standing at the lowest point? This is so unfair!

C: 有多少喝多少！
E: Drink as much as you want!

C: 哈！你终于醒了！见你吃着吃着就咣地一声倒在地上，可把我们给吓坏了！
E: Ha, you've finally come to! Watching you fall to the ground with a thud after eating so much... You really had us worried for a while there!

C: 这是你的奖励，请拿好！明年也请记得再来小店看看啊！
E: Here's your prize. It's all yours! And we'll see you next year for the next annual contest.

C: （就用「{NICKNAME}」吧）
E: (Use "{NICKNAME}")

C: 是哦！和他们一起生活太久，都有点代入了喀。
E: Oh, right! Living among them for so long... I guess I got a little too into character, crrk.

C: 我带来了一台古早型号的金人「平戎」丙型。师傅说，在古老年代里，仙舟上的金人是被允许自行其是的。
E: I brought an old aurumaton model designated Pingrong Type-C. Master said that in ancient times, the aurumatons on the Xianzhou were allowed to act on their own.

C: 嗯，再做一些稍微复杂的动作。
E: Uh-huh. Now do something slightly more complicated.

C: 求你了！我就扔这么一次。
E: Please! Just let me toss it once.

C: …她过去的模样只是伪装吗？被怪物刺穿时的流泪是演技吗？那个浑身浴火、带着热浪战斗的家伙，才是真实的她吗？
E: ...Was her past identity all just a ruse? Were those tears when she got stabbed all just an act? Is that being... that thing which fought while being covered in heated flames... who she really is?

C: 有个钟表，两栋很高的楼——好吧，你并没能理解这张地图到底想表达什么。
E: There's a clock and two tall towers... Alright, you have no idea what this map is trying to tell you.

C: 我们那儿甚至有个赌局，赌下个月能跳多少人！反正在梦里，谁在乎你？
E: We've even got a gamble going on over there to see how many people are gonna jump next month! It's a dream after all. Who cares about anyone else's well-being?

C: 所以…有人听我说话吗？什么时候才能收工啊？
E: So... is anyone listening to me? When can we pack up?

C: 左侧的碑面上镌刻着拉扎莉娜•简•艾丝黛拉。她向往群星，最终归于群星。
E: Carved on the left flank of the stele's surface, is Razalina Jane Estella. She reached for the stars, eventually returning to them.

C: 富有格调的装潢…
E: Tasteful decors...

C: 艾格勒必秒欧洛尼斯！
E: Aquila will instantly defeat Oronyx!

C: 最近这么热闹啊。
E: It's really been bustling recently.

C: 居然发生过这样的事…
E: To think something like this would happen...

C: 美丽的旧世界，如今在何处？
E: O beautiful old world, where are you now?

C: 她在我面前染成红色…
E: She turned crimson right before my eyes...

C: 星槎海的码头一如往常，星槎起起落落，成就了一片喧闹的景观。
E: The docks at the Starskiff Haven are the same as always, with the starskiffs coming and going creating a bustling scene.

C: 而且我只剩下三枚硬币了。这是伙伴们专门铸造的，用于敬礼神明的专用硬币…每年的配额都很有限，用完了就没了……
E: And I've only got three coins left on me. These are special coins minted by my friends to pay homage to the gods... Because they're limited edition, once they're gone, they're really gone.

C: 呜…好奇怪…有点想唱歌是怎么回事？
E: Ooh, strange... Why do I suddenly feel like singing?

C: 眼见为实，你去试试就知道了——对了，你想好现在需要补充什么物资没有？
E: Seeing is believing. You'll know it once you try it... Speaking of, have you figured out what supplies you still need?

C: 怎么样？让列车长看看你的成果帕！
E: How'd it go? Let me see how it turned out!

C: 怎么可能会是我的！最近又没有换季，而且我作息很健康，才不会发生这种事！
E: How could it be me! There hasn't been any change of season recently, and Pom-Pom's been keeping a healthy schedule so that this doesn't happen!

C: 呜…呜呜……
E: *sob*... *sniffle*...

C: 如果不脱鞋子就躺上去…帕姆的表情一定会很精彩吧？
E: Lying down with the slippers on will surely make Pom-Pom all worked up, right?

C: （还是再想想别的方法吧）
E: (Think of another way)

C: 唔，高品质的茶叶有点难找，不过这难不倒列车长！
E: Um... High-quality tea is a rare find, but it shouldn't be much of a problem for me!

C: 谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客，不过你得答应我，这件事不许传出去。
E: Thanks, {NICKNAME}. Please promise me not to tell anyone about this.

C: 你有想过要邀请谁上来玩吗？
E: Have anyone on your mind you want to extend an invitation to?

C: 要是可以有谁帮帮帕姆就好了…你说是吧，{NICKNAME}乘客？
E: It'd be great if someone could help me... Don't you think so, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我就说嘛，你果然是在贝洛伯格认识了不少新朋友，那就麻烦你代我去请教一二帕！
E: As expected, you have met many new friends in Belobog. I would like to trouble you to reach out for advice for me!

C: 哔——啵。
E: Beep — boop.

C: 谢谢你愿意担当铁卫的陪练，{NICKNAME}。这些作战经验对我们来说非常宝贵。
E: Thanks for sparring with the Silvermane Guards, {NICKNAME}. This combat experience really is invaluable for us.

C: *电波滤音*我们侦测到最后一只次元扑满逃走了。
E: *electronic voice* We've detected that the last Warp Trotter has escaped.

C: …地衡司不会还有麻烦事吧？
E: ...So, no more troubles in the Realm-Keeping Commission, I guess?

C: 你得到了石头老板夺走的财宝，还有《小小哈努行动》的限量版故事书！
E: You receive the treasure looted by Boss Stone and the limited-edition storybook of Hanu's Adventure!

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 神秘的孩子
E: Mysterious Kid

C: 风险太大，我还是走吧。
E: It's still risky. Perhaps I should just leave.

C: 好吧，听你的。
E: Fine, I'll do that.

C: 此处贴着一幅艳美绝俗的画像…或者说，通缉令。画中的女性笑靥如花，手捧…呃，相机？含情脉脉地望着你，或者你身后的某处。
E: There's an otherworldly, sensuous portrait here... or rather, a Wanted poster. The woman in the poster is smiling like a flower, holding a... camera? She looks at you affectionately — or possibly at somewhere just behind you.

C: 唯一重要的一点是：那片地块在星球仪上呈现出来的形状，简直和列车长帕姆一模一样！
E: Perhaps the only meaningful aspect is how that piece of land on the armillary sphere is shaped exactly like Conductor Pom-Pom.

C: 你放弃了许愿。就这样吧，喷泉欢迎你之后再来拜访。
E: You've given up on wishes. That's it. You're welcome to visit the fountain again.

C: （应该会有人需要这个吧……）
E: (Somebody might need this...)

C: ——或许更主要的原因还是那个肮脏的听筒。那玩意对你的听觉肯定没益处……
E: Or maybe it's the filthy phone. Nothing good can come out of touching it...

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 不过，既然你帮我找到了，那我肯定要如约重谢——我华劳斯绝不会亏待朋友！
E: Nevertheless, since you are the one who returned it to me, I will reward you handsomely as promised. I, Wallace, will never mistreat a friend!

C: 是谁，何时，又为什么要弃置这样一柄刀器？
E: Who, when, and why was such a weapon abandoned?

C: 我们来问问云骑军…
E: Let's ask the Cloud Knights...

C: <unbreak>500</unbreak>信用点。
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak> Credits.

C: 你保住了一位陌生人的尊严。
E: You have preserved the dignity of a stranger.

C: 你看了看手中的几袋垃圾，又看了看那个算不上大的罐子。这么多的垃圾，真能塞进这个罐子吗？
E: You gaze down at the trash in your hands, then back at this relatively small vase. Can you really stuff this much trash into this vase?

C: 你再好好考虑一下吧。与你不同，我有很多时间。
E: Have another think about it. Unlike you, I have all the time in the world to spare.

C: （呼，准备清理怪物了。）
E: (Phew, it's time to get rid of the monsters.)

C: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在宙合阵阵基附近。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索<color=#dbc291ff>阵基穹顶上方</color>。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near the Temporal Terminal. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>above the base terminal's dome</color>.

C: 信号监测系统已上线，正在搜索目标区域。
E: The signal monitoring system is now available and searching the target area.

C: 我要去干什么来着？
E: What do I have to do?

C: 我曾经将那枚零件狠狠攥在手里，流出了血…零件的缝隙里留着血渍。而这一枚零件却干干净净，仅是有一些锈渍。
E: I remember gripping onto that component so tightly that dug into my skin... There should still be bloodstains on my component. But this one's clean besides the rust stains.

C: 这不过是善于观察而已，雕虫小技，不足挂齿。
E: That's just my knack for observational deduction. It's really nothing special.

C: 如你所见，我是一个持明族。我在上一次蜕生之前遇到了一位化外民，他自称是「流光忆庭」的信使，能帮我保存回忆。
E: As you can see, I'm a Vidyadhara. Before my last hatching rebirth, I met this Outworlder who claimed to be a messenger from the Garden of Recollection who could help me preserve my memories.

C: 现在的难度还是太低了。
E: It's not difficult enough.

C: 没有该死的考核，没有逼得人掉头发的论文，也没有整天用鼻子看人的上司……
E: No cursed examinations, no more pulling my hair out writing theses, no more arrogant higher-ups looking down their noses all day long...

C: 在黄金的时刻有个叫阿然的梦境鼓励师，她对我来说…非常重要。
E: In Golden Hour, there's a Dreamscape Motivator called Ran. She is... very important to me.

C: 他就是…他就是个浓缩身高的禽兽！我恳请您不要再和他来往了……
E: He's just... He's just a shrunken little beast! I'm begging you, please don't have any further contact with him...

C: 这样啊…看来她是真的很讨厌「我们」啊。
E: I see... Looks like she really hates "us" then.

C: 唔…我倒是不介意。你真是个怪胎，哈哈哈！不过，我喜欢你——要是M能有你一半有趣就好了！
E: Oh... I don't mind. You really are a freak, y'know? Haha! But I like you — if only M were half as fun as you!

C: 那些负面情绪飘散在空气里，就像传播瘟病的孢子…而我们既要想尽办法把那些污染源从火坑里拉出来，还要时刻警惕不被他们扯进去。
E: Those negative emotions float in the air like spores spreading a plague... We have to both pull those sources of contamination out of the fire, while staying vigilant not to be pulled in by them.

C: 这种无可救药的家伙…根本连做梦的资格都不配拥有！
E: These incorrigible filths... they don't even deserve to dream!

C: 总感觉怪怪的…有谁在看着我吗？
E: Something's off... Is someone watching me?

C: 原本最适合做这活的是无名客，谁料到阿基维利那倒霉蛋死得早，那帮人紧跟着销声匿迹了…少了这个第一选择，宇宙行商无疑是最靠谱的次选——所以他们邀请了我。
E: At first, the best candidate for the job was the Nameless. But unexpectedly, that poor chap Akivili ended up kicking the bucket, and the rest of the gang disappeared without a trace soon after... Without this first-choice option available, a traveling merchant was the most reliable — and so they invited me.

C: 你向科琳概述了星穹列车一路的经历。
E: You share with Colleen an overview of your experiences aboard the Astral Express.

C: 况且这到底是机缘亦或诅咒，还尚未可知呢…恐怕只有时间能给出答案了。
E: What's more, I have no idea right now whether this is a blessing or a curse... I'm afraid only time can deliver an answer.

C: 是啊！不过我并没有被吓到，我的大心脏可是比钻石都坚固——即便这怪物长着两对眼睛，皮肤比伊须磨人都光滑，我内心也毫无惧意。
E: Yeah! But I wasn't scared. My heart is tougher than diamond — despite this monster having two pairs of eyes and skin smoother than an Insumousu local. There was no dread in my heart.

C: 漂亮！我就知道「无名客」是天底下最靠得住的一群人！
E: Sweet! I knew the Nameless are gonna be the most reliable people in the cosmos!

C: 在外面是，但对你我就说实话吧…那是个假身份。
E: To other people, sure, but I feel like telling you the truth... That's just a convenient disguise.

C: 这些措施真能保护奥特兰吗？
E: Would these measures really be enough to protect Outerland?

C: 结果呢？我在第五层，家族在第一层——除了那俩骚扰我的公司喽啰外，什么麻烦都没有。
E: Guess what happened in the end? I was on the fifth floor, but The Family was on the first floor. Aside from the two IPC minions who messed with me, there were no other troubles.

C: 话说回来，你这张脸还挺面生的…是新人？没关系，欢迎加入筑梦师的大家庭！
E: By the way, I don't think I've seen you before... Are you a newcomer? That's okay. Welcome to the family of Dreamweavers!

C: 伙计，你确定自己是来上班的吗？再说一遍，我是班尼，筑梦边境开辟项目的总工程师！
E: Buddy, are you sure you work here? Again, I'm Benny, the chief engineer of the Dream's Edge development project.

C: 如果可能的话，最好让他们打个具体的分数…至于具体该找谁打听，你自己定吧。放心，凡是家族里稍微有点地位的人应该都已经来过这里、体验过一遍了。
E: If possible, I'd like them to rate our work... It's up to you who you want to approach. Don't worry, as anyone who holds a position in The Family should have already been here and tried what we have to offer.

C: 靠谱，伙计，真不枉费我对你的信任！
E: You're so reliable, buddy! I knew I could trust you!

C: 这…有什么稀奇的，我们可是、可是活在梦里，哈哈……
E: What's... special about that? D—Don't forget we're... living in a dream, haha...

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I won't bother you.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 你很需要钱？
E: Are you in urgent need of money?

C: 供游客欣赏梦境时刻壮丽景象的望远镜。居然连这种基础设施都不放过，真有你的啊艾默里奇。
E: A telescope for tourists to enjoy the breathtaking views of the Dreamscape. Emmrich doesn't even leave behind such infrastructure. What a total jerk.

C: 「啪」——你将「长效专利捍卫一纸通」贴到了望远镜上，心想这种东西不太可能侵权。
E: With a "slap," you stick the Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier onto the telescope, thinking to yourself that it's unlikely to infringe on anything.

C: 等着瞧吧，等艾默里奇的商业帝国拔地而起…老子绝对要让那个叛徒吃不了兜着走！
E: Just you wait... Once my business empire takes off... I'll make that traitor pay for his misdeeds!

C: 原来如此，现在我明白了。这位客人的境遇值得同情——对此我深表遗憾。
E: Ah, I see, and I'm deeply sorry for that. That guest's situation deserves sympathy.

C: 当然…二十分之一难道还不够吗？
E: Yeah... Isn't one-twentieth more than enough?

C: 对明星来说，一句错话就可能毁掉职业生涯，哪有让他学着懂事的机会？我们可不像公司那样有那么多洗白明星的手段！
E: One wrong sentence from a star can wreck their whole career. They can't afford to be naive! We don't have those PR tricks as IPC does!

C: 早就听说无名客喜欢多管闲事…但公司的繁荣离不开你们的「开拓」，所以我尊重你们的作风。
E: I know the Nameless are famous for meddling in other people's businesses... but as your "trailblazing" is crucial for IPC's prosperity, I respect what you do.

C: 我是人，不是只会听从您命令的自动乐团，请不要再这样折磨我了。我也不会让「纯美之歌」被世人肆意诋毁，这是对「纯美」女神的不敬。
E: I'm human, not an automated orchestra that only obeys your commands. Please stop torturing me this way. I won't allow the "Song of Beauty" to be disparaged by the world, as it would be disrespectful to the Goddess of Beauty.

C: 是一个人名吗？
E: Is it someone's name?

C: 至于说服她的方式…可以先进行一场路演，看看宾客们的反应。只要听众们能给出认可，那经纪人就没办法拿市场评价作为打压我的借口了。
E: As for how to persuade her... I can start with a roadshow and assess the audience's reaction. If the audience approves my performance, she won't be able to use "market reviews" as an excuse to dissuade me.

C: 啊，过了这么久，经纪人应该要来找我了！
E: Ah, it's been such a long time! My manager should be coming for me!

C: 你为什么觉得自己失败？
E: Why do you see yourself as a failure?

C: 只剩下你了，警官，只剩你没能走出来了。你打算让昨天的意外，缠住迈向明天的脚步吗？
E: You're the only one left, detective. Are you going to let an accident in the past stop you from embracing your future?

C: 你说我管这些闲事干啥？都不如去搞几瓶苏乐达。也不知道兜里的钱还够不够……
E: Why bother to help when others see me as a busybody? My time is better spent on getting myself some SoulGlad. I wonder if I have enough money in my pocket...

C: 明明是你自己怂了。
E: You clearly chickened out just now.

C: 怎么，打算接我的活了？那提前给你透露一下工作内容也不是不行——
E: Why? Have you decided to take the job? Well, I can tell you something about the job first...

C: 你没逛过「黄金的时刻」？
E: Haven't you been to Golden Hour?

C: 为了匹诺康尼整体的和谐着想…希望您往后能够加倍慎重。
E: For the sake of Penacony's comprehensive harmony... I hope you will be more discreet moving forward.

C: 麦考先生从大衣的口袋中掏出了一张照片……
E: Mr. McCoy fishes a photo from out of his breast pocket...

C: <size=28>偿还…偿还！！！</size>
E: <size=28>Payback... payback!!</size>

C: 我们兄弟姐妹三人，躺在一片被暖阳染成金黄色的草坪上…姐姐哼唱着小时最熟悉的歌谣，约翰在一边把玩一根不知从何处捡来的树枝……
E: We three siblings were lying on a mound of grass that had been dyed a light yellow by the warm sun... My sister was singing a nursery rhyme from our childhood, as John was off playing with a branch he picked up somewhere...

C: 基金会致力于消除战争带来的苦难，迄今已有数家跨星系企业加盟，为共八十亿以上的难民提供了医疗、食品、就业等人道主义援助。
E: The foundation is dedicated to eliminating the suffering caused by war, with several intergalactic enterprises joining forces to provide medicine, food, employment, and other forms of humanitarian assistance for over eight billion refugees.

C: 可惜你还只是个孩子，没法跟上这历练的舞步。
E: It's a real shame that you're just a kid and can't keep up with the pace of life's dance.

C: 让我猜猜她是怎么和你说的，「啊！自从我儿时的好友因慈善事业而死，我便继承了她的衣钵，立志要抚平战争的伤痛，为此我们建立了基金会。」
E: Let me guess what she told you: "Oh, since my childhood friend died in the name of charity, I've taken up her mantle and dedicated myself to relieving the torments of war. And that's why we decided to establish this foundation of ours."

C: 这笔钱，就当是我骗过你的补偿，从此我们互不相识，你没见过我，我也没见过你。
E: This sum should make up for me deceiving you. From now on, we don't know each other. You've never seen me and I've never seen you.

C: …可恶…那家伙一定作弊了，我必须将{F#她}{M#他}的卑鄙手段揭露出来才行……
E: ...Blast... That person must've cheated. I must expose {F#her}{M#his} despicable methods...

C: 你认识我？
E: You know me?

C: 你不在的时候发生了很多事…
E: Many things happened while you weren't around...

C: 极端？我那个爹，当初口口声声说要支持我实现梦想，结果只是为了让我做企业代言人，好帮他那些见不得人的生意打掩护！
E: Extreme? Back then, my dad kept saying that he would support my dream. However, he was just paying lip service to me in order to convince me to take on the role of enterprise ambassador and help him cover up all of his shady businesses that couldn't see the light of day!

C: 可其他人看不到你…
E: But other people can't see you...

C: 再打开一个木桶。
E: Open another barrel.

C: 你怎么这么会说话，我会不好意思的啾！
E: Aww, you have such a way with words. I'm gonna blush, tweet!

C: 我只是看你们在排队才过来的……
E: I only came because I saw you all in queue...

C: 你没事吧？！我都说了这玩意是为我度身定做的，你怎么不听呢。
E: Are you okay!? I kept telling you but you wouldn't listen — this thing was tailor-made for me.

C: 行，反正我们几个一直在这，等什么时候你有空了再来。
E: Very well. We will be here, so come back when you have time.

C: 之后不管是卖给「公司」还是拿来自用，都会比现在富裕多了。
E: Whether we end up selling them to the IPC or using them ourselves, we will end up far richer than we are now!

C: 保守的选择，但确实不容易出错。
E: A safe choice, but it is indeed unlikely to cause problems.

C: 对于造物引擎这样庞大的机器来说，持久的动力是最重要的。地髓结晶可以维持极长时间的燃烧，从而为造物引擎提供源源不断的能量——就是需求的量级可能有点大...
E: For a giant machine like the Engine of Creation, having power that lasts is crucial. Geomarrow crystals can sustain combustion for a long time, allowing them to provide endless energy to the Engine of Creation. The only problem is that the quantity needed will be considerable...

C: 这好像只是鹰…
E: It looks like an eagle...

C: 嘿呀！终于出来了啾！
E: Hi-yah! Finally out, tweet!

C: 哇，你可真是个灵巧的人啾！
E: Wow, you really are quite a nimble one, tweet!

C: 让我看看！让我也看看啾！
E: Lemme take a look! I wanna look too, tweet!

C: 折纸小鸟！
E: Origami birds!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个痴情的助手喜欢上了小镇宾馆中的小鸟，似乎总是徘徊在<color=#dbc291ff>能看到宾馆的「望远镜」附近</color>啾？
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a lovesick helper who fell in love with one of the birds working at the Town Hotel. It's always hovering around places where you <color=#dbc291ff>can see the hotel's telescope</color>, tweet?

C: 哼哼…没错，有个淘气的助手热衷于给其他小鸟的造物上新增一笔，听说它的最新目标是<color=#dbc291ff>地下区域的「钟表小子广告牌」</color>啾？
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a mischievous helper who always likes to add on to other birds' creations. Heard that its newest target is the <color=#dbc291ff>Clockie's Billboard at the underground zone</color>, tweet.

C: 钟表小子这么做一定有自己的道理…
E: Surely Clockie has good reason for doing that...

C: 你指的是那些鸟毛吗？
E: You mean those feathers over there?

C: 谢谢你，好心的人。我要回去试试新方法了啾~
E: Thank you, kind person! I am going to head back and try this new method, tweet~

C: 啾！或者我们可以让节奏再快点啾！
E: Tweet! Why don't we make it a faster rhythm!

C: 即使是哈努兄弟，咱也不会放水的啾！
E: Even if you are Brother Hanu, I will not let you off lightly, tweet!

C: 啾？是钟表小子的朋友啾！在下正在想你呢啾！
E: Tweet? If it isn't Clockie's friend, tweet! I was just thinking about you, tweet!

C: 小鸟礼貌地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
E: The bird politely picks up the coin, then... gobbles it up!

C: 欢迎您来到汇聚美梦小镇一切欢乐与梦想的乐园——「钟表公园」啾！
E: Welcome to the garden that holds all the joy and dreams of Dreamville — Clock Garden, tweet!

C: 再见，一想到下位挑战者会被它狠狠修理一顿，我就不忍心看下去了啾。
E: Goodbye. The mere thought of the next challenger being pummeled to fine dust — I don't even want to be around for that, tweet.

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 多么美丽的误会啾，倘若这里真是我搭建的，小鸟便死而无憾了啾。
E: What a beautiful misunderstanding, tweet. I'd die with no regrets if I was the one who built this place, tweet.

C: 看来得找其他人了......
E: Looks like you'll have to call someone else...

C: 怎么这么不小心，让我看看...
E: How could you be so careless? Let me take a look...

C: 「活该」——玲可没有再言语，但你确信自己听到了那两个字。
E: "Serves you right"! ...Though Lynx didn't actually say anything, you are certain you heard those words.

C: 虽然比不上翅膀，但也聊胜于无——等等，我是不是有翅膀啾？
E: Can't compare to wings for sure, but it's better than nothing... Hold on, do I have wings, tweet?

C: 真是个神气的家伙啾，也不知道他什么时候才能回来。
E: He's quite something, tweet. Not sure when he'll be back though.

C: 这里的节目虽然比不上音符小姐的演出，但也一点不差啾。

C: 喝下这杯苏乐达…
E: Drink this SoulGlad...

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 秃头，秃头，是知识的诅咒——难怪我算术老是不及格啾。

C: 好心人，好心人，能不能帮我占占这个位置啾？
E: Kind soul, kind soul, can you help me watch this spot, tweet?

C: 啾~我要上厕所，快憋不住了。
E: Tweet! I need the restroom. I can't hold it in anymore.

C: 那还要你做什么？
E: Then what's the point for you?

C: 每天玩8小时就行了。
E: Just play for eight hours a day.

C: 既然事已至此，那我就不再掩饰了...还请收下这个。它蕴含着我满满、满满的心意！
E: As you have already learned all this, there is no use in covering things up anymore... Please, take this. This is filled... absolutely filled to the brim with my love and admiration!

C: 什么？可恶，难道是那只机巧鸟擅自…等等，你不会是真的想做掉我吧？
E: What? You... Did that cycrane just... Wait, you're not really going to kill me, are you?

C: 请问是需要找回什么书吗？
E: Do you need to retrieve any books?

C: 没有关系，丹鼎司内知道「禁忌书典」的人不少，比你的嘴巴更松的人也有的是。
E: Don't worry. A lot of members in the Alchemy Commission know about the forbidden tomes, and some of them have a reputation for having loose lips.

C: 小女孩的话唤起了你的记忆。丹枢是药王秘传的魁首，你曾听说那位盲眼魁首特别关照一个盲童，恐怕就是眼前的女孩。
E: The girl's words ring a bell. Dan Shu was the master primus of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and rumor had it that she took special care of a blind girl much like herself. That must be the girl in front of you.

C: 我想你也听明白了，我就是这样一个不幸的人。我今天要抽人生最后一次签，如果还是凶签，我的人生就已经盖棺定论了！
E: I think you get what I'm trying to say: I'm simply jinxed. Today, I'm going to draw one last time, and if it's still a "Woe" hexagram, I might as well give up on my life!

C: 其实我刚才那一瞬间已经想明白了，要我把命运赌在这玩意上面，那也太吓人了！回想起来，我都惊出了一身冷汗……
E: To be honest, when I drew the lot, I almost freaked out realizing that I had bet my fate on its result! I was in a cold sweat before I realized it...

C: 来，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，也辛苦你特意跑一趟，咱也不好叫你吃亏，咱这就给你做几道拿手好菜去。
E: Here, {F#miss}{M#mister}, thank you for all your effort. I don't want to put you out, so I've prepared several specialty dishes for you.

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: …我被困在了这里。
E: ...I'm stuck in here.

C: 没事没事，现在的年轻人都不爱听戏了，有些不懂规矩也不是不能原谅。
E: It's alright. Young folks these days care not for opera. It's forgivable if you're unfamiliar with the rules and norms.

C: 一人一岁阳，就这样唱到了天明。等第二天人们进入新房时，却只看到了新郎官枯朽的尸体。
E: A human and a heliobus, singing until dawn breaks. When people come to visit the next day, all that remains is the withered husk of the husband's corpse.

C: 那是个愚蠢的家伙，早早地占据了绥园，却被浮烟给骗了。他们俩自称商量出了一个能绝对战胜十王司的计策。结果呢，笑死我了。
E: It's that knucklehead who used to haunt Fyxestroll Garden but got tricked by Cirrus. They claimed to have devised this strategy capable of decisively defeating the Ten-Lords Commission, but it just left me laughing my pants off.

C: 不知道你开心了没有，我、我…我现在是挺开心的……
E: I don't know if you're happy or not, but I... I... I'm pretty happy...

C: 我打小就聪明。
E: I have always been a genius.

C: 你找的位置太奇怪了。
E: You picked a strange place to hide.

C: 哎，疼疼疼！
E: Ow, that hurts, oww!

C: …我在路上开得好好的，那铁皮脑袋突然从一旁窜出来，直接往我的车上撞。
E: ...I was just driving on the street when that iron skull suddenly jumped out from the side and rammed straight into my car.

C: 据说家族把这件事定性为皮皮西主责，让他赔偿智械的维修费…这点钱对皮皮西人来说倒也不算什么就是了。
E: I heard The Family found the Pepeshi at fault and asked him to pay back maintenance costs for the Intellitron... But that fine's just a drop in the bucket for a Pepeshi.

C: 还以为能看到血流成河呢，真扫兴。
E: I thought we'd see blood in the streets. That's disappointing.

C: 但随着时间流逝，现实一步步开始侵蚀梦想。直到某个瞬间，我满怀恐惧地发现：我毕生的梦想，我甘愿为之赴死的那个愿望，或许再也没有实现的可能了。
E: But, as time went on, reality began to eat away at my dreams. That was until one moment, I became clenched in fear as I realized: This dream that I had held my entire life, the dream that I would die to have realized, may never come true.

C: 爸爸？爸爸！你怎么了？
E: Father? Dad! What's happening?

C: 诡谲的电流声仍在你脑中回响，你仿佛听见了什么，却又什么都没听到。
E: A strange electric buzz reverberates through your mind as if you hear something, but you cannot make it out.

C: 都不敢？…喂喂，不会吧。出来玩胆子大点好嘛，别这么无聊！真拿你们没办法。
E: You're all too scared? Come on... seriously? Have some gut and give me a challenge, don't be so boring! You're all incorrigible.

C: 快些走吧。当心那群人追上来。要是真遇到什么麻烦事，也还得仰仗您……
E: Let us walk faster. I don't want them to catch us. If we get into trouble, I also have to rely on you...

C: 时长有限，请尽兴享用。拍照上传到社交平台并撰写五星好评，还可获得大额满减优惠券哦。
E: The service runs for a limited time, so please enjoy it while you can. Share a picture on social media and leave a 5-star review to receive high-value discount coupons.

C: 只想寻个消遣也无妨。您是自由身，行动念想可都不必受限于人。
E: If you are merely passing the time, that is no problem. You are a free soul, your will need not be limited by anyone.

C: 还记得我吗？
E: Do you remember me?

C: 闹街彷徨梦思迷。

C: （试着往出钞口塞点钞票）
E: (Try stuffing some coins in through the dispenser)

C: 一个清脆的声音直接在你脑海里响起，每个音节都像是小巧的银勺轻轻敲击高脚酒杯的杯口时发出的叮当声。
E: A crisp voice rings in your head, each syllable resembling the clink when someone gently taps the rim of a tall wine glass with a small silver spoon.

C: 有什么事吗？
E: What is it?

C: 不巧还有别的事…
E: There's something else I need to attend to...

C: 它们三位就在旁边，不如您直接和它们聊吧？
E: The three of them are right there. Do you want to chat with them now?

E: The bottle of green rum stands on the ground with other vessels strewn around it haphazardly. You have no clue what has taken place.

C: 我…那你不也跟着进来了？

C: 英雄请留步，帮帮忙吧，我什么都会做的！
E: Please wait, hero! Help me, I will do anything!

E: You want me to tell you which of us is the finest wine? With me around, they are nowhere near!

E: They said you were industrial alcohol.

C: 哈哈…真是太阳打西边出来了。

E: Do THEY bless humans too?

C: 多亏有你的点拨，我意识到自己编故事的水平确实欠佳，桶王这神听起来就不太好骗——赚钱。
E: Thank you for your feedback. I realized that I was awful at making up stories, and the King of Cans doesn't sound like a good scam... for making money.

C: 双手叉腰。
E: Put your hands on your hips.

C: 刷会儿手机。
E: Play with your phone.

C: 为了前途，我没意见！
E: This is for my future. I have no problem!

C: 知更鸟只兀自低头，怔怔地看着怀里的笔记本，什么也没有说。半晌，她终于开口。
E: Robin simply bows her head, staring dumbly at the journal in her hands, and says nothing. She finally speaks after a long silence.

C: 不到半秒钟，所有商品库存都被抢光了。没办法，谁让全宇宙到处都是知更鸟小姐的歌迷呢，大家都在等这个时候。
E: All of the stock was sold out in less than half a second. It's just the way it is... Miss Robin has fans everywhere throughout the universe, and they've all been holding out for just this moment.

C: 可以的可以的，老板你的品味真不错啊。
E: Of course, of course, you've definitely got taste, Boss.

C: 现在已经好多啦，抱歉，最近都没怎么锻炼，没想到跑两步就累，让您见笑了。
E: Thanks, I feel much better now. Sorry about that, I haven't been getting much exercise lately. Didn't expect to wear myself out from such a short run. How embarrassing.

C: 该放映哪一段好呢？
E: Which memory to project?

C: 姬子对你笑了笑，温柔地表示了某种肯定，你确信你感受到了她对你的某种期许。
E: Himeko gently smiles at you in affirmation. You feel as though she has high expectations of you.

C: 我说过了，我不会根据正确错误来判断。

C: 现在该你来提问了，嫌疑人乙。
E: Now's your turn to ask a question, Suspect B.

C: 那我现在把你抓起来？
E: It's not too late to order your arrest.

C: 「无相者」嘟嘟，你可知罪？还是说，非得用这谛听验一验你的成色？
E: Shapeless Doot-Doot, will you admit guilt? Or do we have to get the Diting to verify your identity?

C: 我看你还挺会藏的呀。
E: You're pretty good at hiding.

C: 在逃五名犯人，在狱中相识，试图寻找其中一人承诺的「黄金乡」，由于越狱未果，最后五人越狱，三人收监，剩余二人死于谁手，十王司自会查清楚。
E: The escaped five met in prison, and attempted to seek this "Goldville" that one of them had promised. Their jailbreak was thwarted, and of the five who escaped, three have been retrieved, while the remaining two have been murdered by an unseen hand. The Ten-Lords Commission will get to the bottom of this.

C: 好像听到了有人走动的声音，应该不是狱卒，而是逃犯……
E: I think I hear footsteps — it's probably not a guard's, but the fugitive's...

C: 总感觉有一种似曾相识的感觉。
E: Why does this plot sound so familiar...

C: 掌握大厨的厨艺是要时间的。
E: It takes a lot of time to master the skills of a master chef.

C: 听好了，我知道你有很多想问的。你先问吧，问完以后，我…我需要你的帮助。

C: 哦哦，好的！
E: Okay!

C: （你知道这人啥来头吗？）
E: (Do you know who that is?)

C: 咱也是。
E: Nor me.

C: 飞行编队迟迟未到，你感觉身后的仁科隐隐有一些不安感。
E: The flight team is still yet to arrive. Behind you, you can sense a restlessness emanating from Renke.

C: 橙衣武者带着洞悉一切的自信，从容地走入门中。
E: The orange-clad warrior calmly walked through the door, confident that he could perceive all.

C: …抱歉，已检索到身份为来自星穹列车的旁听生。
E: ...Apologies, we have verified your status as a guest student from the Astral Express.

C: 你搞不懂那些图形的具体含义，它们只让你想起托帕，然后是账账，再然后是大大小小的宝箱…等你终于神游匹诺康尼一周之后，课程已然过去了大半。
E: You are confused by the exact meanings of the drawings — they only make you think of Topaz, and then Numby, and then a myriad of big and small chests... When you're done daydreaming all over Penacony, the lesson has passed its halfway mark.

C: …是这样的，其实我对你一见如故，既然难得缘分一场当了回同桌，能不能跟我合个照，再签个名？
E: ...Actually, I felt an instant connection when I saw you. Since it's fate that we are desk mates, can we take a photograph together, then give me an autograph?

C: 你点燃圣烛，有阵阵幽香传来，连附近的食物看起来也比往常更可口了。
E: You light the holy candle, and a faint fragrance wafts over, making the food nearby seem ever more palatable.

C: 你联想到身后的闹剧…这似乎…该不会…难道…你愣住了。
E: You think of the scene unfolding behind you... This can't be... can it? You find yourself dazed.

C: 就算你在底下摆再多的水果、鲜花、石板也没用，放久了发烂发臭只会有碍大家在图书馆的学习生活！
E: It doesn't matter how many more fruits, flowers, or slates you place here. With time, all they will do is rot and reek and affect everyone's studies in the library!

C: 亲爱的开拓者，心理诊疗师「闭嘴」为您服务。
E: Dear Trailblazer, Psychotherapist Shush is at your service.

C: 哦？有回音，看来「脑波扫描」成功了！
E: Oh? There's an echo. Looks like the Brainwave Scan was successful!

C: 晚安，星穹列车。
E: Goodnight, Astral Express.

C: 哈哈，纵横银河这么长时间，见过的谜语人还少吗？见招拆招，你的心中已经有了答案。
E: Haha, having traveled the Cosmos for so long, you've surely seen your fair share of riddlers. It's all about spontaneity — you already have an answer in mind.

C: 使用传信石版求助。
E: Ask for help with the teleslate.

C: 白厄继续思索着正确的答案，低着头离开了……
E: Phainon leaves with his head lowered, his mind still foraging for the right answer...

C: 错了错了，吼吼，本狮说过，题目里的「每个字」都很重要吼！
E: Wrong! Ho-ho, I said that EVERY WORD is essential!

C: 吼吼，听好了，问题很简单：<color=#dbc291ff>「什么东西只能把他人打倒，自己却永远站不起来？」</color>
E: Ho-ho, listen well. This one's an easy one: <color=#dbc291ff>"What can only be knocked down by others, but can never stand up on its own?"</color>

C: 哦吼？爱好智慧的人不一定拥有智慧，但不爱智慧的人一定离智慧很远吼！
E: O-ho? Even those in pursuit of wisdom may find it out of their reach. The ones who abhor wisdom might never even have a glimpse of it.

C: 再想想吧。
E: Let's think about it.

C: 试着自己想想。
E: Try thinking about it yourself.

C: 不急，再想想吧。
E: Don't rush. You can think hard about them.

C: 这头狮子都说到这份上了，还是接受它的歉意暂且作罢吧。
E: This lion is so sincere with its words. Let's generously accept its apology and call it even.

C: 超智能病毒很快把回收站一扫而空，懒散地躺在桌面上。
E: Quickly, the Supersmart Virus emptied the Recycle Bin and lay on the desktop idly.

C: 消化得差不多了，请听听我的第二个心愿！
E: It's almost digested. Please listen to my second wish!

C: 难怪我段位一直上不去！
E: No wonder my rank can't be upgraded!

C: 然后，你点开了最后一份文档——那封邮件的收件人竟然是你自己。
E: And then, you opened the last document — the recipient of that email was yourself.

C: 姑且算是处理完了。接下来…该给这个冰箱定点规矩了！
E: Well, that's that taken care of. Now... it's time to enforce some rules on this refrigerator!

C: 让我写个纸条贴在冰箱上——关于今后冰箱的使用……
E: I'll write a note to stick on this refrigerator... Regarding how it is to be used in the future...

C: 苏乐达。
E: SoulGlad.

C: 你长得很好看啊。
E: You look appealing.

C: 嘘，小点声，这可是单大买卖，别被哈努兄弟和钟表小子他们发现了。
E: Shh, keep it down. This deal is huge. Keep it from Hanu and Clockie.

C: 你已进入了不可名状的恐怖之地，这伟大站台所潜藏的危险足以将常人杀死十次！
E: You've entered an arena of terror beyond description. The dangers that this great station harbors are enough to kill ordinary people ten times over!

C: 首先是开篇…对于一篇文章来说如何开篇很关键。咪发迷似乎察觉到了什么，该怎么糊弄过去呢？
E: First up, the opening... The soul of any letter. Mifamem seems to have noticed something amiss. How to convince her otherwise?

C: 出发的时候到了迷。
E: The time to depart has come, memi.

C: 毕竟，所有孩子都是要离开家乡的啊。
E: After all, every child must one day leave their home.

C: 鲜花的芳香、绵软的草坪、叶隙中筛下的阳光……
E: The scent of fresh blooms, the softness of the grass, the sunlight filtering through the leaves...

C: 好适合的名字，小家伙看起来就软软糯糯的！
E: Perfect! It does look soft and squishy!

C: 播下种子。
E: Sow the seeds.

C: 会是更好的模样。
E: Even more beautiful.

C: 还是交给我吧。下次见面时，{NICKNAME}的小稻草人就布置妥当啦。
E: Leave this to me. When we meet again, the {NICKNAME} scarecrow will be firmly in place.

C: 诶，{NICKNAME}都学会抢答啦，我还没问你呢…看来，你已经完全融入哀丽秘榭的生活了呢。
E: I've yet to speak, but I see you've learned to take the initiative... You're all settled into Aedes Elysiae now, aren't you?

C: 这样一来，哀丽秘榭也种下了「开拓」的种子呢。把它当作下一段旅途的起点……
E: Now, we've also planted the seeds of the Trailblaze in Aedes Elysiae. Take it as the start of another journey...

C: 你能说出他的模样么？
E: Can you describe him to me?

C: 要是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}在场，你的勤勉与节制绝对能获得它的嘉奖。可惜它并未回应，你还有足够的时间来思考究竟该如何行动。
E: If {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} were here, your diligence and self-control would have no doubt been commended. Unfortunately, there was no response. Although, you still have plenty of time to consider what action to take.

C: 毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
E: There is no doubt about it. The giant wooden prop before you is one you recognize from an old story. Its head raised high in the sky and room in its stomach for several people — it has all the familiar characteristics you expect.

C: 呜——困死了，究竟是谁在外面吵。让我看看…你不是大祭司，是谁啊？
E: Mmph — so exhausted. Who's that racket outside? Let's see... you're certainly not the High Priest, so who are you?

C: 至于到底在哪…或许等我继续思考个上千年，就会有结论了。
E: As for what that purpose might be... well, perhaps another thousand years of contemplation will reveal the answer.

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Enter the horse's stomach)

C: 呼…潮湿、灰暗…还没有完成，再创世！
E: Hah... damp, gray... It's not finished yet, Era Nova!

C: 为什么会选择研究珍稀物种？
E: What made you study rare species?

C: 你是什么科室的研究员。
E: Which department are you from?

C: 来到空间站的人，本就有一些是失去了家园的流离之辈。空间站对于他们而言，就是第二个家园。
E: Some people came to the space station because they lost their homes. The space station is like their second home.

C: 真好，真好啊。
E: Good. It's really good.

C: 所以去那个地方的最安全路径……
E: So the safest way to go...

C: 真希望站长可以快点修复机器人配送系统啊……
E: I wish the lead researcher can fix the robot distribution system as soon as possible.

C: 你可能认识的人还不多，有些故事跟你讲了，你连名字和脸都对不上号，听着没意思。如果你认识的人多，我可就能和你好好讲讲咯。
E: You may not know many people here. If I tell you a story where you can't match the names with the actual people, it won't be very interesting to you. If you know more people, I can tell you a lot more.

C: 每天收拾打扮得称心如意，是我保持活力与开心的秘诀，偷偷分享给你吧。
E: Dressing up every day is my secret to staying energetic and happy. This is my secret.

C: 这个空间站是怎么运作的？
E: Why do you own this space station and how do you run it?

C: 总是跟着艾丝妲的那个小子？无所谓，我不在乎。
E: The boy that tags along with Asta all the time? Okay, whatever.

C: 你怎么不待在办公室里？
E: Why aren't you staying in your office?

C: 长得高又不是我的错。
E: It's not my fault I grew so tall.

C: 它看起来很难过，将尾巴紧紧地卷在自己脚边，不安地看着你。
E: Looking distraught, it curls its tail tightly around its feet and stares at you uneasily.

C: 如果、如果她真的想我了，为什么还要让你把我安置在这里，却又不来见我呢？
E: If she's really thinking about me, why does she send you to accommodate me here and refuse to visit me?

C: 诶，你到底有什么事，快说啊？我还有一大堆事要做呢！
E: Hey, just tell me what you need from me. I have a pile of tasks to complete.

C: 和你聊天倒是感觉…嗯，怎么说呢，同为领导者，有种惺惺相惜的感觉。太好咯，总算有个知音人能听我讲讲我的管理规划！
E: When I talk to you... Hmm, how should I put it? I feel like we share a rapport, like we're both leaders. This is great! I've finally found the right person to share my management plan!

C: 怎么突然就改头换姓了？
E: Why the sudden name change?

C: 喂！
E: Hello!

C: 你怎么会出现在这里？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 唔，当然，{NICKNAME}。我记得你的笑容、惊恐、温度和眼睛。
E: Oh. Of course, {NICKNAME}. I remember your smile, fear, temperature, and eyes.

C: 我没什么要问的了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 押注「最强之盾」。
E: Bet on the Strongest Shield.

C: …还真给你找来了？
E: ...You really found one?

C: 在下定决心亲自举行仪式后，你认真研读了卷轴上的内容。
E: Having made up your mind to carry out the ceremony personally, you begin to carefully study the contents of the scroll.

C: 空间之外，同样有物存在。我们衡量空间，必然是测算物体间的距离，比较物体间的位置。我们只能说某物离某物近，某物在某物的旁边。
E: There are also objects that exist outside of space. When we measure space, we have to measure the distance between objects and compare their locations in space. We can only say that something is close to something else, or that something is beside something else.

C: …为了我？别再给你的卑劣找借口了！可笑…在一起这么多年，我竟然到现在才认清你的真面目！
E: ...For me? Stop making excuses for your own despicability! What a joke... All these years together, and I've only just seen your true colors now!

C: 讨论一下「卷轴」。
E: Talk about the "scroll."

C: 这玩意叫「艾格勒之光」，使用后会有明亮的光团从卷轴中释放，极其瞩目。
E: This thing is called the "Light of Aquila," and it releases a bright ball of light out of the scroll after you've used it. It's quite bright and noticeable.

C: 好主意啊！
E: Great idea!

C: 振作点！我宁可相信「黎明机器」再也不会发光，也不相信宁芙不爱你！
E: Pull yourself together! There's more chance of the Dawn Device never lighting up again than Nympha not loving you!

C: …得找那孩子问清楚。或许附近有人看清她逃跑的方向了？
E: ...I have to find and interrogate that kid. Maybe someone around here saw where she ran off to?

C: 这里应该就是那孩子的藏身处，她似乎还没回来？
E: This must be her hiding place. I guess she hasn't made it back here, yet?

C: …节哀顺变。
E: ...I'm sorry for your loss.

C: 在绝望的洪水淹过人们的脖颈之前，屋顶是他们唯一的希望所在。
E: Before the flood of despair submerges people up to their necks, the roof is their only hope.

C: 将奥赫玛推理协会三位成员的遗物交给珀里法斯
E: Hand over the belongings of the three members of the Okhema Deduction Society to Periphas

C: 别的部分是指？
E: By elsewhere, you mean...?

C: 你们只能眼睁睁地看着这头大地兽再次从面前飞奔而过，卷起一路的烟尘。
E: You can only watch helplessly as the dromas dashes past you again, kicking up clouds of dust.

C: 在这样的世界中，能平静活着便是种奢侈。而悬锋的王为他们扛起了重量。
E: In such a world, being able to live peacefully is a luxury. And the King of Kremnos bore that weight for them.

C: 或许你可以去工坊找份新工作，陪科可波阁下散步的活可不是谁都能干的。
E: Perhaps you can find work in the workshop. Walking Kokopo isn't a job just anyone can do.

C: 可我挺喜欢浴场的…
E: But I quite like the baths...

C: 蕾莉亚！快振作起来！
E: Lelia! Stay with me!

C: 我不是泰坦，我怎么可能是泰坦！
E: I am no Titan! How could I be a Titan!?

C: 嗯？你不知道吗？圣城中发生纠纷时，并非所有事务都劳烦元老。双方同意时，我们会找来「一日塔兰顿」来担当仲裁，解决纠纷。
E: Huh? You've never heard of it? In the holy city, not every dispute requires the elders' intervention. When both parties agree, we appoint a One-Day Talanton — a neutral party to mediate and settle disputes.

C: 我的爱人，你快醒醒。
E: My love, please wake up.

C: 威吓特性生效了。
E: The intimidation trait took effect.

C: 希瑞雅大声地祈祷着。知晓泰坦真相的你很清楚，刻法勒并不会真的回应她。
E: Serena prays aloud. You, knowing the Titan's truth, are well aware that Kephale won't truly answer her.

C: 呵呵，我们先去避难？临阵脱逃可不是我们的作风！哪怕是卖假货被抓，我们也是坦坦荡荡，从不退缩。
E: Hehe, go take shelter first? Fleeing in the face of danger is not our style! Even if we were caught selling counterfeit goods, we'd face it head-on without hesitation.

C: 我知道，他父亲也是一名圣城卫兵，杀死过黑潮怪物…他一直想做同样的事，好证明自己也有能力保护家人与奥赫玛。
E: I know. His father was a guard of the city too, slaying monsters of the black tide... He always wanted to do the same thing, to prove he had the strength to protect his family and Okhema.

C: 「呲啦——」一声，有什么动静从它的盔甲下传出。你仔细检查，发现源头是一枚石制的扩声器。
E: "Click..." A sound comes. A disturbance resounds from beneath his armor. You check carefully, and discover the source to be a stone-made voice amplifier.

C: 他抄起投石索，将沉石向瑟希斯的神体掷去，吓得其余贤人抱头鼠窜。
E: He grabbed a sling and lobbed a heavy stone at Cerces's divine form, sending the other Sages scurrying away in panic.

C: 而维吉妮娅只愿将浪漫吐露与心上人，哪怕知晓彼此只是记忆催生的蜃景，必不动摇半分。
E: And Verginia would only share her romance with her beloved. Even knowing they were only an illusion born of memories, her resolve would not waver in the slightest.

C: 看看「未解之谜」那页。
E: Check out the "Unsolved Mysteries" page.

C: 选择卷七
E: Select Volume 7

C: 我们来谈谈委托费……
E: Let's discuss my payment...

C: 这手感…老身也无法断言。救世主阁下，能麻烦您帮忙确认一下吗？
E: It feels... hmm, I'm not entirely certain. Great Deliverer, could you give it a taste for me?

C: 这是海瑟音大人的认知中，您来到翁法罗斯后，最为熟悉的饮品。
E: Lady Hysilens somehow knows that this is the drink you've become most familiar with since arriving in Amphoreus.

C: 她没有到访的我们的欢宴，但却对这座城邦中的每个人都无比熟知……
E: Despite never gracing our revelry, she possesses an intimate knowledge of every person in this city-state...

C: 说好的跑腿费…
E: About that payment you promised...

C: 有新论文选题？
E: Have you got a new thesis topic?

C: 不用紧张，并不是什么大事。
E: Don't look so worried! I'm not throwing you another mission.

C: 比如…怎么才可以让帕金斯它们飞起来，像列车一样飞到更高的地方呢？
E: Like... How can we get Perkins to fly — how can we get him to fly to super high places like the Express?

C: 这儿的沙发都是现成的，当作贵宾席正合适。
E: The sofas here all look tailor-made — perfect for VIP guests!

C: 正因为是朋友，心底多少有些过意不去……
E: It's because we're friends that I feel a little guilty...

C: 好，那就听{NICKNAME}你的了。
E: Alright, lead the way, {NICKNAME}.

C: 抱歉…我只是希望能帮到你。
E: Sorry... I was just trying to help.

C: 原…原来是这样吗？看来的确是我精神太紧张了。
E: H—Huh? *sigh* You're right, I need to learn to unwind.

C: 但是他们平时喝的咖啡都没有这种特殊香味。或许这就是姬子女士自研秘方的魅力所在吧？
E: Still, none of the coffee they drink has the same aroma as Himeko's brew. She must have a few secret ingredients up her sleeve.

C: 佩佩也来了？
E: Is Peppy here, too?

C: 听说在丹恒兄弟上车前，列车里有个跟我长得很像的乘客。
E: I heard Dan Heng mention that before he boarded the Express, there was a passenger who looked remarkably like me.

C: 重建中，闲人止步。
E: It's under reconstruction, no entry for unauthorized personnel.

C: 我感谢你们才是。
E: I should be thanking you.

C: 这下相信了吧？要是还不放心，你可以断开网络连接，那样就看不到我了——除非你把它再连上。
E: Seeing is believing, right? If you're still not convinced, you can cut off the network connection on the Express and I'll disappear into thin air — until you turn it back on, of course.

C: 哦，{NICKNAME}，表情很严肃啊。你这是看见了什么？
E: {NICKNAME}, that's a serious expression you've got there. Did something catch your attention?

C: 习惯了网络漫游，反而不适应正常的交通工具了……
E: I've grown so accustomed to network roaming that normal transportation feels weird now.

C: 你在做什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: 列车被将军扣留了。
E: The Express has been detained by the general.

C: 嘿嘿，不然的话，你就见不到这么可爱的神医大人啦。
E: Hehe, they better be... or I won't be coming back!

C: 我在禁邸后面的小院子里养了好多药草，颇有心得。
E: I've been cultivating medicinal herbs in the Forbidden Residence's rear courtyard. I'm becoming quite the expert.

C: 你要是有了什么疑难杂症，记得来找我，有我「衔药龙女」在，保证药到病除。
E: If you ever have any unusual ailments, come find me. This Healer Lady is guaranteed to get to the bottom of them.

C: 我在这里，就是想要为这座空间站，也是为了黑塔大人，做出一点微薄的努力。
E: I'm here to make my humble contributions to this space station, as well as to Madam Herta.

C: 有多少人被你化解过苦难？
E: How many people have had their pain "soothed" by you?

C: 谢谢你愿意听我讲话。如果之后你有需要，我也愿意随时倾听你的发言。
E: Thank you for listening to me. I am also always ready to listen whenever you need me.

C: 现在的生活感觉如何？
E: How does life feel nowadays?

C: 等一下直接去问问帕姆老师好了…也许帕姆老师愿意和我过上几招呢。
E: I should go and ask Pom-Pom about it — maybe I could pick up a few tricks!

C: 我还有些事想问你…
E: There's something else I want to ask.

C: 你不会要全部背下来吧…
E: You're not gonna memorize it all, right...?

C: 没想到那个黑色的饮料味道竟然还不错，而且还很提神！要是熬夜工作的时候能来上这么一杯该有多好……
E: I didn't think that black drink would taste so good... and really energizing too! If only I could get a cup when I'm pulling those all-nighters...

C: 难怪…那我就放心了。
E: Really? Well, that's good to hear.
*snoring*

C: 听说雅洛…啊不，应该是雅利洛-VI，对吧？听说雅利洛-VI以前不是白茫茫的一片，还有各种各样的地形跟自然环境。那些画面实在是神奇，靠我自己根本想象不出来。
E: I heard Jalo... Uhh I mean Jarilo — right? I heard Jarilo-VI didn't use to be all snowy like this, and it had all sorts of landscapes and natural environments. They are totally magical to me. I'd never have imagined it myself.

C: …这个点子好！
E: ...That's a good idea!

C: 能与博学之人闲谈足足半日，真是人生的一大乐事。
E: It is indeed a pleasure to converse with such a knowledgeable peer for so long.

C: …巴里也有事？让他转备用线路，我现在有急事处理，晚点再回。
E: Barry needs me too...? Put him on another line — I have something urgent to take care of. I'll contact him later.

C: 话说回来，我只是突然有了这个点子，至于具体该怎么实现还完全没有头绪。
E: It was just a random idea that popped into my head — I've no idea how to actually implement it.

C: 原来是诸位齐心协力的结果。
E: So this is a product of teamwork.

C: 我为列车带了份礼物。
E: It is Xianzhou etiquette that as a guest, I come bearing gifts.

C: 改变是一种痛苦，也无可避免地伴随着旧事物的消亡……
E: Transformation is a kind of suffering, yet it invariably accompanies the end of what once was...

C: 对…对哦！你已经是列车上的一员了…能认识新的伙伴，就是旅途的意义。
E: Oh, that's right! You're already a part of the Express... Making new friends is what it's all about.

C: 真希望有一天，列车停靠站台的时候，我也能站在车门边，迎接永不停下脚步的「无名客」们。
E: I really hope that one day I can stand by the door and welcome the ever-wandering "Nameless" onto the Express.

C: 大家会喜欢吗……
E: Do you think people would mind?

C: 咖啡这种东西果然不能多喝，看来得经历一个不眠夜了。
E: Coffee is not something you should drink too much of. Looks like it'll be another sleepless night.

C: 谢了。都怪这不争气的手腕突然「脱臼」。要是不赶紧上螺丝，一会儿整只手掉下来可能会有点惊悚。
E: Thanks. This useless wrist suddenly "dislocated." I'd better screw it back on quick, before the whole hand falls off and gives you a scare.

C: 彻底绕进去了…
E: My mind's a complete jumble...

C: 这个故事怎么样？我还编了一个恐怖版的，想不想听听？
E: How'd you like that story? I even came up with a scary version — wanna hear it?

C: 它可爱而独特，颇具魅力。我将它置于肩甲上，作为荣誉的象征。
E: It is cute, unique, and quite charming. I wish to wear it on my armor, as a badge of honor.

C: 丹恒先生方才带我拜访了列车的智库。
E: Mr. Dan Heng showed me the Express' data bank just now.

C: ——老铁也这么说。
E: Old Mettle says so too.

C: 好奇怪，为什么大家都说我们身上有妈妈的味道……
E: That's weird. Why does everyone say that we smell like Mama's Kitchen...

C: 好的，再见。
E: Alright, bye.

C: 你「没见过」我？没见过我华劳斯？呵呵，那你一定不是本地人。
E: You've NEVER seen me before? Never seen Wallace? Hehe, then you must not be a local.

C: 再考虑下去，花店的花都要谢了！要是有什么关于买房的问题，我建议你现在就问。
E: It'll be too late if you don't make up your mind soon! If you have any questions regarding the property, I suggest that you ask me now.

C: 模型？模型在哪儿？
E: Model? Where's this model?

C: 得想办法解雇那个配音演员。
E: Need to find a way to get your voice assist fired.

C: 「初雪八落」？
E: First Snow?

C: 又见面了客人，瓦丝卡为您服务！您如果需要一些买花的建议的话，可以随时来问我。
E: Nice to see you again! Vaska at your service. If you need some help picking the right flowers, feel free to let me know.

C: 算了，我再努力忍忍吧。说不定过了这阵就好了……
E: Forget it, I'll try to endure it. Maybe everything will be better soon...

C: 我问他打印机的原理，他立马开始给我灌输一大堆天花乱坠的科学概念，差点把我说懵了。
E: Well, I asked him how the printer works... and he immediately started rambling on a bunch of smorgasbord about science stuff. I was almost caught up in it.

C: 听说布洛妮娅大人要比前任大守护者开明得多。她现在正在克里珀堡广开言路，人人有份…那我们「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」自然不能放过这个机会。
E: I heard that the Supreme Guardian Lady Bronya is far more open-minded than the former Supreme Guardian. She is encouraging people at Qlipoth Fort to air their opinions. Everyone has a responsibility to speak... Well, the Dark-Blue Scam Victims Association naturally isn't going to let this opportunity get away.

C: 让我看看…
E: Let me see...

C: 嚯，那您可得好好说说…那大守护者到底出什么事了？
E: Huh, then you have to tell me about it... What happened to the Supreme Guardian?

C: 话说回来…你把我叫醒，是有什么事吗?
E: By the way... Why did you wake me up again?

C: 你在做什么呀？
E: What are you doing?

C: 什么捉迷藏…？完全没印象。
E: Hide-and-seek...? That doesn't ring a bell.

C: 是漆黑的虎克大人让我来的…
E: Pitch-Dark Hook the Great sent me...

C: 嗯？虎克老大？找我「千面尤利安」有什么事吗？
E: Huh? Boss Hook? What does she want from Julian of a Thousand Faces?

C: 「雪地跳跳糖」到底是什么？
E: What on earth is this snow-white popping candy?

C: 美少女的事你少管。
E: Don't stick your beak into ladies' affairs.

C: 然后就是，我是做什么的…我应该是个矿工，没错吧？
E: And then what do I do...? I'm a miner, right?

C: 行，就当我是吧。我叫马克西姆，是个矿工。
E: Okay, let's just assume I am. I'm Maxime and I'm a miner.

C: ——不是那种只会按照预先定好的程序、你一问它一答的机器！是真正能理解人的语言，并且能像正常人类一样说话、做事的机器人。
E: Not the kind of machine that only follows a program or answers the question you ask — A robot that understands human language, and speaks and acts like a normal human being.

C: 辛苦你啦。
E: Thank you.

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: Can we talk...?

C: 至于其他的，就先不用看啦…那些菜做出来效果都不是很好，我还在想办法改进呢。实在不好意思呀。
E: That's all for now... The rest of the dishes don't come out very nice. I'm still working on them. I'm so sorry.

C: 饭店的主人是歌蒂大婶，也是我师傅，不知道你们见过没…
E: Gertie is the owner of the hotel and also my master. Not sure if you've met her...

C: 没事了，你加油。
E: I shouldn't keep you. Best of luck.

C: 小到地髓供暖器，大到汽车引擎，甚至是铁卫制式的自动机兵，对我来说都不成问题——啊，不过汽车和机兵车当然不能在这里修，有需要的话我会上门的。
E: Anything as small as a Geomarrow radiator to as large as a car engine — or even a Silvermane automaton — ah, but of course cars and automatons can't be dragged into this small room. I offer an outcall service for those.

C: 家庭也好，友情也好…面对挫折，以前的我只知道逃避，从没考虑过该怎么从根本上解决问题。
E: Whether it's family or friendships... In the face of setbacks, all I used to know how to do was escape. I never thought about trying to fix the root of the matter.

C: 幸好有杰帕德戍卫官在…类似的事还一次都没发生过。
E: Fortunately, we have Captain Gepard... So things like that have never happened.

C: 好，我也该开工了。
E: All right. I should get back to work too.

C: 又见到你了，{NICKNAME}。想来聊聊天吗？
E: We meet again, {NICKNAME}. Are you here for a chat?

C: 一旦噪音比例达到阈值，该个体便会不可避免地陷入失控。那时，我们必须再次进行同样的抉择。
E: Once the noise reaches a threshold value, this machine will be unable to avoid malfunction. When that time comes, you all must make the identical decision.

C: 我想多了解一些鼹鼠党的事。
E: I'd like to know more about The Moles.

C: 别当软脚虾，别把秒表掐
E: Don't be such a coward. We gonna stop the clock

C: 后面那个牌子呢？
E: And the sign in the back?

C: 明明已经到嘴边了…成年人应该懂得变通，你很快就放弃了无用的挣扎——还是掏出手机查查看吧。
E: It's right on the tip of your tongue... An adult should know how to be flexible, so you give up the futile struggles — just take out your phone and check.

C: 喂它吃东西。
E: Feed it something.

C: 万一，我是说万一啊——万一事情败露了……
E: What if — I mean, what if I got exposed...

C: 哎，早知道不结婚了……
E: Oh, I regret getting married...

C: 跟你们说个劲爆的消息，你们可千万别传出去。
E: Let me tell you some awesome news — but you have to promise not to tell anyone.

C: 哎哟，这有啥啊！铁卫写个小说画个画怎么了？
E: Heck. It's just a storm in a teacup! What's wrong with Silvermane Guards writing fiction and making illustrations?

C: 你都几天没回家了？！
E: When was the last time you came home!?

C: 「琥珀 琥珀 再一块琥珀滋润」
E: "Amber, Amber, more Amber for thy soul"

C: 我一次都还没赢过…
E: But I haven't won a single time yet...

C: 我、我们还是来聊聊博物馆本身吧？！
E: L—Let's talk about museum, shall we?

C: 你比地髓加热器还要温暖…
E: You who art warmer than a Geomarrow heater...

C: 我必须要从他们试图掩盖的一切的话语和行为中觉察到他们的意图，与此同时，有一些智商极高思维敏捷的犯人也会利用这点来审视我。
E: But I need to be able to pick up on their intentions through their words and behavior, which they employ to shield their true thoughts. And while I'm doing that, quick-witted and intelligent prisoners would also use that fact to study me.

C: 我想给自己取个名。
E: I wish to name myself.

C: 一星就算是了不起的「星际严选」了，五星则会被称为「银河最佳餐厅」。整个仙舟世界唯一拿到他们五星评级的是朱明仙舟上的一家「龙宫私房菜」。
E: If you get one star, you're part of the "Interastral Selection." If you get five stars, then you're the "Cosmos's Finest Diner." Across all of the Xianzhou ships, the only place to ever get five stars from them is "Dragon Palace's Kitchen" on the Xianzhou Zhuming.

C: 咱急急忙忙从厨房里出来，看着那建木缓缓地长起来了。我也算是见过世面了，但也着实是吃了一惊。
E: I rushed out of the kitchen and watched as the Arbor slowly grew. I had been pretty well-traveled, but I was flabbergasted.

C: 话又说回来，那位老板其实也不在意书店生意。关于老板…你看，这是他写的书，叫作《厌作人间语》，是本志怪小说集子。
E: But then again, the boss here doesn't really give a darn about business at all. Here... This is a collection of short supernatural stories he's written, called "Otherworldly Delights."

C: 好的，恕不远送。
E: Away you go, then. Take care.

C: 我为此赋了一首诗，你听完我给你吟一下啊……
E: I composed a poem for this. Listen up. I'll chant it for you...

C: 写的，不过这次我不再依赖诗仙机器人了，我想自己写一些。
E: I do, but I no longer rely on the Poetic Genius Ingenia. I prefer to write the poems myself.

C: 再见，有空再聊。
E: So long. Catch you again later.

C: 这难道不就是诗吗？
E: Isn't that poetry?

C: 我和你闹，那还是不是因为艺术创作嘛…那个{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}我来解释一下，我们俩是搞托蝶幻境的，她是制片人南洁，我是导演武赫。
E: I'm arguing with you out of creative license, right... Let me explain to the {F#girl}{M#boy} here — we're Butterfly Immersia creatives. She's Nanjie, the producer — and I'm the director, Wu He.

C: 你学镜流？真的假的？
E: Like Jingliu? Are you serious?

C: 不久后，我就和这位白鸟老弟一起成立了「阿合马铁窗集团」，专注于用有限的资源为客户提供无限的服务！
E: Not long after, I established the Arma Correctional Group with Shiratori. Our goal is to provide limitless service to our customers when we only have limited resources!

C: 真的只是惺惺相惜吗？
E: Is it really just an appreciation for each other that you have?

C: 如果有效工时不达标的话，我可就成不了年了，懂吗？
E: If I don't clock enough effective on-the-job hours, then I won't be considered an adult. Do you get it?

C: 哎…您说是那就是。眼下我还是得先想想如何转型，免得没法填饱肚子……
E: Ack... You're right. I have to focus right now on changing things up so that I don't end up starving...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 我得提醒你，异邦人想要了解军机重地的工作，一般会被称为「间谍行为」。
E: I have to warn you, travelers' making inquiries into military secrets is generally known as "espionage."

C: 我们每年都会举办劳军文艺汇演，景元和彦卿会一起上场说相声。去年那场《怯走镖》真精彩啊…有机会的话，你也可以来听听。
E: We have this annual arts and culture show where Jing Yuan and Yanqing do a crosstalk skit together. Last year's The Cowardly Escort was really awesome... If you get a chance, you should come and check it out too!

C: 卑职主要负责景元将军的安全，而卑职手下的诸位云骑则负责神策府、乃至整个长乐天安全之守备。
E: I'm mainly responsible for General Jing Yuan's personal security, while my Cloud Knights are in charge of public security for the Seat of Divine Foresight and all of Exalting Sanctum.

C: 神策府作为军机重地，安全护卫的工作是重中之重。我身为侍卫长，自然应当比别的兄弟干的多一些。
E: We're an important military department, and our security work is of the utmost priority. As the chief guard, it's only fair that I put in a little more effort than the rest.

C: 年轻人怎么你了？
E: How have the youths wronged you this time?

C: 这您大可放心，这案牍库归根结底只是个远程访问接口，一锅端了也没用。案牍原件全部都存储在某个玉兆阵列中。
E: You can rest assured about that. This document office is ultimately just a remote access interface. Even if the office was somehow "eliminated," it wouldn't have any effect. All the original documentation are stored on a certain jade abacus matrix somewhere.

C: {NICKNAME}，你好。我是太卜司卜者，叫做绘星。负责管理「大衍穷观阵」。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}, I'm Huixing, a diviner at the Divination Commission. I manage the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.

C: 大概三十岁出头的时候吧…有一次我去见先代宰相维森纳女士…我和她说，我准备参选宰相……
E: When I was in my early thirties... I once went to see the late Madam Wiesener... I told her I was going to run for prime ministry...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 都是成年人啦，甭管您是化外民，还是我们仙舟本地人，都得为生计而努力嘛！何况这种事…咱们也没得选不是吗？
E: We're both adults. You understand, right? Whether you're an Outworlder or a Xianzhou native, we all need to earn a living! ...It's not like we have a choice in the matter, right?

C: 您说的没错。这建木生发之后，太卜司内全力运作，可以说是忙得手忙脚乱。
E: That's right. Since the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth, we've been firing on all cylinders here at the Divination Commission. Just flat out busy.

C: 我正好路过，想跟你聊聊…
E: I was just passing by and wanted to stop in for a chat with you...

C: 我？哈哈哈，{NICKNAME}大人，您说笑了。
E: Me? Hahaha, you must be joking, {NICKNAME}.

C: …唉，阁下真是求知若渴。您问吧，请尽量问一些在下能回答的。
E: ...Ah, your thirst for knowledge is unquenchable. Please ask away and I'll answer what I'm able to.

C: 你是…来丹鼎司求药的化外民？你来晚啦。这儿如今求不到治病的灵药，只有看着扎眼的云骑。
E: You are... an Outworlder seeking medicine from the Alchemy Commission? You're too late. There's no cure to be found at all anymore, only those Cloud Knights sticking out like a sore thumb.

C: 唉，持明族无父无母，无有繁衍，永远在蜕生轮回中循环。每一个持明的死去，每一颗持明卵的损毁，将是整个持明族永远的损失。
E: Alas, we Vidyadhara have no parents, no reproductive process, and are forever stuck in the cycle of our hatching rebirth. Every death and every destruction of a Vidyadhara egg is an eternal loss for our species.

C: 比如这些叶子、果实、树皮、根茎…它们大多是建木时代流传下奇特的植物，它们效用很难被寻常分析法理解——效力就像是某种奇迹。
E: Take these leaves, fruit, bark, and rhizomes for instance... Most are peculiar flora from the Ambrosial Arbor's time, and their effects are difficult for standard metrics to analyze. They just work like some kind of miracle.

C: 这次就这样吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 前段时间，我出差走了一段时间，回来发现丹鼎司被查封了。一问才知道，我们这有不少人加入了药王秘传。
E: I went away for business a while ago, and I came back to find that the Alchemy Commission had been sealed off for investigation. I was told that many of us had been found to be colluding with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 有些事想问你。
E: I have a few questions I wish to ask you...

C: 唉…借您吉言吧。您也多保重……
E: *Sigh*... I appreciate your encouragement. Take care...

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 那个，我得先说清楚——我才回罗浮不久，对这里的一切还不太熟，你要是想问路或者打听什么，我未必能帮到你，到时候你可别怪我。
E: Just so you know, I've only been back for a short while, and I'm not very familiar with things around here in Luofu. If you want to ask for directions or about the latest happenings, I might not be very helpful, just so you know.

C: 算了，我没什么想问的了。
E: Forget it. I don't have any more questions.

C: 我有种预感：今天一定能逃出去！
E: I have a premonition: Today is going to be the day I escape!

C: 世界上哪有这种好事！这种话，我们自己调侃一下自己就算了，有一天我收到朋友发来信息问我「卜者真的有么清闲吗」，我真是无言以对。
E: There is no such thing in this world! When we say that about ourselves, we mean it as a joke. One day, I received a text message from a friend asking me whether diviners were really so free. I was speechless.

C: 当然了，地区主管想把这里打造成商业港口，我觉得这里可以建立起大型购物中心，无论往哪个方向建设，总得赶走这些老店铺。
E: Exactly, we're planning to turn this area into a commercial hub with a large shopping center. But first, we've got rid of those run-down stores.

C: 慢走啊，希望日后有机会与您合作。
E: Take your time. I hope we'll get to work together in the future.

C: 劳你挂念了，咱放生帮现在混得可比以前好多啦！随喜赞叹！
E: Thanks for your concern. We are doing so much better than before! Praise be to happiness' dedication!

C: 还真是和我聊天？你可真有意思…你想聊什么？
E: Really? How curious... What do you want to chat about?

C: 而这些「坏掉的程度」往往需要卓越的技巧以及高昂的价格…简而言之，修理并不划算，购买新的更加便宜也更加方便。
E: And their disrepair often requires advanced skill and a high price to get them fixed... Simply put, repairs are not cheap, and buying something new works out cheaper and more convenient.

C: 我这辈子也没想过发大财，只有一个简单的愿望——「物尽其用」。仅此而已。
E: I've never dreamed of becoming rich in this life. I have just one simple wish: "to make the best use of everything." That is all.

C: 老板少了什么，我可以帮您狠狠进货。
E: What is it you're lacking? I can help you stock up on it big time.

C: 罗浮没有怎么我啊，我随口抱怨几句还不行了？
E: Nothing! Can't someone just complain about the world?

C: 我有些好奇…
E: I'm just a bit curious...

C: 这与你只剩下一颗头有关系吗？
E: Does this have anything to do with the fact that all that's left of you is a head?

C: 我想想…那时这里充满了金人，都是为了自己的主人来金人巷购物取货的，街道拥堵不堪，几乎没有落脚的地方。
E: Let me see... Back then, this alley was alive with aurumatons shopping and picking up goods for their masters. The alley was so crowded that you could barely get in.

C: 我虽然*不是*聊天机巧，但我将尽力回答您的问题或为您提供有用的信息和建议。
E: While I'm NOT designed for chatting, I'll do my best to answer your questions or provide you with helpful information and advice.

C: 可以随便聊聊吗？
E: Can I have a casual chat with you?

C: 真是令人印象深刻的演出。
E: That was an impressive performance.

C: 你的噪声吵到我了。
E: Such noise is really a nuisance.

C: 在下是博识学会的学士克利欧，师从陶德·雷奥登老师。之前老师曾多次写信催我来仙舟，还说为我找了位{F#师妹}{M#师弟}——百闻不如一见，没想到就是你啊。
E: I'm Cleo, a scholar of the Intelligentsia Guild, under the tutelage of Master Todd Riordan. Master has written to me many times urging me to come to the Xianzhou ship, and he told me that he had found a {F#junior soror}{M#junior frater} for me. Just when I was wondering what my new peer would be like, you appeared before my eyes!

C: 当初为什么加入药王秘传？
E: Why did you join the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus back then?

C: 你在这里执勤？
E: Are you on duty here?

C: 没事，不用跟本姑娘客气。
E: No worries.

C: 先不聊了。
E: Talk to you later.

C: 感觉很神奇，不像是科技？
E: It feels more like magic than technology?

C: 十王司的判官一应受过成体系的训练，各项差事都要历练。不过，最终落到实处时，还是分为「拘」「锁」「刑」「问」四部职责。
E: The judges of the Ten-Lords Commission must undergo systematic training to be ready for every task. However, when it finally comes down to it, they are categorized into four different divisions — Detention, Incarceration, Interrogation, and Punishment.

C: 哎哟，我算是听出来了，亲亲还不太了解玉兆对吧？我先给你介绍一下吧。
E: O-ho, I hear what you're trying to say. You're not that familiar with jade abaci, are you? Let me give you some tips.

C: 如何识别来者是客，还是另有所图，其实也是有点儿小技巧的。客人要是感兴趣的话，我可以介绍一二…客人要是对典当有兴趣，小店也随时为您服务。
E: The power to distinguish between a customer and a troublemaker is a particular trick of this trade. If you are interested, I could reveal a thing or two... I can also be of service if you are interested in our pledges.

C: 还得多亏了咱们各位化外民老爷，古玩还是古玩，文物还是文物，小店也能赚到一些蝇头小利。
E: I have you honored Outworlders to be thankful for — antiques and cultural artifacts all belong where they are, and I can still earn a little off the top.

C: 想要置换一些东西。（打开商店）
E: I want to buy some things. (Open Shop)

C: 「算盘书字银洋，件件要精，五者缺一，吃亏非小……」
E: "Abacuses, books, and silver, all of the finest quality. Taking one without the others would be such a shame..."

C: 好在这事总算过去了，建木不再生长，咱们的生活也重回正常。至于客官您这话，我就当是您给咱们小店的诚挚祝福吧。
E: To everyone's relief, the crisis is now over. The Ambrosial Arbor has stopped growing, allowing our lives to get back to normal. As for your words, I will take them as your sincere blessing to my shop.

C: 这小老板娘的父母与在下是旧识，他们将这一方小小茶楼留于小老板娘当作考验。
E: Her parents are old friends of mine, and they left her this teahouse here as a kind of a test.

C: 哈哈哈哈，经常有化外民问起这个问题——「你们仙舟上科技水平还挺高的，怎么还有人说书呀？」
E: Hahaha, I hear this from Outworlders all the time: "Xianzhou is so technologically advanced. Why do you still have storytellers?"

C: 这彪形大汉对云骑士兵的剑术连连摇头，再次开口「这百人试剑结束，竟无一人伤得了这小小靶人，看我一剑——」
E: This burly fellow kept shaking his head at the Cloud Knights Soldier's swordsmanship, and spoke again: "Thus ends the hundred-men sword trial. To think none could harm this meager dummy... Watch my blade!"

C: 好呀，你随便问问。
E: Sure, ask away.

C: 失忆前也是这么浪漫的性格吗？
E: Were you always as romantic as this before you lost your memory?

C: 哎…你有什么事吗？还是单纯想找本仙…我是说，找我聊两句？抓紧说吧，你也知道，我时间不多了。
E: So... is something the matter? Or do you simply wish to chat with your honored celestial... I mean, me? Hurry up then. You know I don't have much time left.

C: 我也想走上筋肉命途。
E: I want to embark on the Path of Brawn too.

C: 我看这鳞渊春就不错，暂点一杯也无妨。
E: This Whale-Tide Spring is awesome, and I'll sit on a pot of this for a while.

C: 想跟霍华德先生闲聊一下。
E: I want to chat with Howard.

C: 有缘再会。
E: Until we meet again.

C: 来旺说，他家太爷的太爷当时正在林子里打猎，第一个撞见了那景象。那颗蛋在地上生生犁出一条几十里长的山沟沟来，整片林子都烧起火来。
E: Laiwang said his great-grandfather's great-grandfather was hunting in the woods that day and was the first to see the scene. The egg cut out a ravine on the mountain that extended a few dozen miles, and the whole forest caught on fire.

C: 跟我聊聊神仙姐姐吧。
E: Tell me about this celestial lady.

C: 仙舟民和我们不一样，随便找几个人问问都是活了有几百岁。所以化外民心中久远的历史，不过是人家心目中的「童年回忆」。
E: The Xianzhou natives are different from us. Ask any of them, and you'll find they've lived for centuries. What we Outworlders consider ancient history is actually just a childhood memory for them.

C: 您如果有什么想邮寄的东西，正式下单之前，请阅读寄送规范。
E: Before you finalize your order with us, please make sure you read our shipping regulations.

C: 长生不老？
E: Immortality?

C: 我不太懂，您说说。
E: I don't get your drift. Please elaborate.
