C: 我已经见识过这宇宙有多广袤了，这辈子太短了，不足够满足我。
E: I have witnessed the vastness of the cosmos. One lifetime is too short to satisfy my curiosity.

C: 真的吗？谢谢你！凌解在笔记本上留了很多曲子，春分好奇得很，所以自己尝试着练习着唱了唱。
E: Really? Thank you! Ling Jie wrote down stacks of songs in her notebook, and I've been so curious that I started practicing my singing.

C: 也许春分唱得没有凌解好听，但唱曲这件事本身就很快乐，所以春分很满足！
E: I might not sing as well as Ling Jie, but singing makes me happy — so I've got no complaints at all!

C: 不说这个了，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你找春分有什么事吗？
E: Enough of that, though. {F#Miss}{M#Sir}, what can I help you with?

C: 靡靡赤龙、森森青松～
E: When the dragon turns red, then the green pines shall shed.

C: 另外，这是第二条建议——姐姐说自己是姐姐的时候，你就只管听着就是了。
E: Also, second tip: When someone older than you speaks, it's best to just listen.

C: 这里是天舶司，要是再口不择言，你的蠢样整个银河都会知道了。
E: This is the Sky-Faring Commission. Keep this candor up, and the whole cosmos will soon know what your foolish face looks like.

C: 唉，纯度实在是太低了——你又回来啦？这比赛简直是无聊透顶。
E: Sigh, so weak... Oh, you're back? This competition is painfully boring.

C: 筑城者和仙舟人不同，我们不仅关注眼前的世界，也关注未来的危机。
E: Unlike Xianzhou, we Architects keep our eyes on the future as well as the present.

C: 其实您也明白，这不过是一种促销手段，反正东西很便宜，你买了也划算。至于这是不是「最后三天」又有啥关系呢？
E: You understand that too; it's just a sales tactic. Everything's going cheap anyway, and you'll get a great deal. Why does it matter if it's really the "last three days"?

C: 后援会是基于「更好地支持彦卿大人」这一宗旨创建的粉丝群体。
E: The fan club is a group created by fans to better support Master Yanqing.

C: 那好，记得「彦卿全银河粉丝后援会」随时等待你的加入。
E: Alright, remember that you're always welcome to join the Yanqing Galactic Fan Club.

C: 其实我最近在控糖。
E: I'm actually cutting down on sugar these days.

C: 我现在就想喝苏乐达…
E: Would be nice to have some SoulGlad right now...

C: 那就一个都别买。
E: Then you shall get nothing.

C: 稍安勿躁，等待消息…
E: Stay calm and let's wait for the news...

C: 稍安勿躁，理解万岁！
E: Let's stay calm, mutual respect is key!

C: 这确实不好，我承认。
E: Indeed, it isn't.

C: 给你钱，你给我来点情绪价值。
E: Here's some money, lay some emotional value on me.

C: 花了<unbreak>27</unbreak>万。
E: They cost <unbreak>270</unbreak> grand.

C: 比赛的成功，肯定少不了你啊…
E: The success of the competition wouldn't be possible without you...

C: 再见了，我会好好生活的。
E: Farewell. I'm going to live out my best life.

C: 那太久了…
E: That's too long...

C: 对不起，是我不好。
E: Sorry, it's my fault.

C: 镇妖塔轻轻浮起，你想要与哪位岁阳对话？
E: The suppression towers float gently. Which heliobus would you like to talk to?

C: 故事听的开心吧？开心的话就别再来烦我！！
E: Are you enjoying the story so far? If you are, then don't come back and bug me ever again!

C: 宵炽。
E: Dawnyng.

C: 这些话，就请当作是我们俩的秘密。我呀，悄悄记住了竞锋舰上所有造访的选手，以及他们擅长的招式还有的弱点，无一例外，我都可以告诉你。
E: Let my next words be our little secret: I've surreptitiously memorized all the visiting contenders on the Skysplitter, along with their trademark moves and their weaknesses, all of them. And I'll tell you everything.

C: 很少选手都能像他那样自律，能和他一起见到凌晨四点的竞锋舰，实在是浪漫极了。我敢说，这份决心和毅力是他最大的武器～
E: Very few contenders are as disciplined as him. To be able to admire the Skysplitter in the wee hours of the morning with him, there's nothing more romantic than that. I'd dare say that this resolve and determination of his are his greatest weapons.

C: 恕我直言，你喜欢的不是「温吞的权利相争」。而是「撕破脸的瞬间」、「得势之人的落差」、或者说是「戏剧化的冲突」？
E: If I may say so, I can't imagine that you enjoy this kind of "tepid stalemate." I imagine you're more excited by "the rise against the tyrant," "the fall of the mighty," or the "dramatic conflict?"

C: 你是认真的吗？
E: Are you serious?

C: 要是想离婚，地衡司全力支持，请到我那里登记。
E: You have the full support of the Realm-Keeping Commission if you'd like to get a divorce. Register that with me.

C: 听说戒严以后太卜司就提前放假了……
E: I heard the Divination Commission got off early due to martial law...

C: 我们之后会去向何方？
E: Where are we gonna go now?

C: 比我俩工资加起来都高。
E: Its price is higher than our combined salary.

C: 他犯了什么事儿了吗？
E: Did he do anything wrong?

C: 化外民将这叫作葬礼…
E: The Outworlders call this a funeral...

C: 你几天没合眼了？你得休息休息，这样下去可不行。
E: How long have you been awake? You need to rest. You can't go on like this.

C: 抱歉，军令如山，我无法透露更多。还有，我是女的。
E: I'm sorry. Orders are orders. I can't tell you any more. Also, I'm a woman.

C: 唔…「欢迎来到昏光庭院。请问有什么可以帮到您？」
E: Hmm... "Welcome to the Twilight Courtyard. How can I help you?"

C: 确实，你说的没错。我承认了，我喜欢姐姐叫我「小夏」，这是我的感受。
E: Indeed, you're right. I'll admit, I like it when my sister calls me "Naxy." That's just how I feel.

C: 无论是谎言还是真相，只要是赛法利娅说的，奶奶都会相信。
E: Whether it's lies or truth, granny will believe anything Cifera says.

C: 我还有好多~好多精彩的冒险故事呢，等我慢慢讲给你听啊……
E: I have sooo~ many more exciting adventure stories to tell you, just let me share them with you slowly...

C: 那你不喝水液面会下降吗？
E: So does your water level drop when you don't drink?

C: 是啊，这其中也多亏了阁下所付出的努力，我很感谢你。
E: Indeed, this was all thanks to your efforts as well. I'm truly grateful to you.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 总觉得元老院又要遭殃了。
E: I've got a feeling the Council of Elders is in for trouble again.

C: 呵呵，这只是一枚普通的大地兽蛋。
E: Hehe. It's just a regular dromas egg.

C: 这的伙食也太好了吧。
E: The food here is so good.

C: 您不认识我啊？
E: Do you not recognize me?

C: 那能让我像幻戏里那样飞檐走壁如履平地么？
E: Then, can it make me walk on the wall like what they show in immersias?

C: 姐给你买艘新款的！
E: I'll buy you a brand-new one!

C: 重犯造父的囚室，曾横冲直撞的奔马，如今却安静得宛如一潭死水。
E: The cell of the criminal, Zaofu. Once a rampaging stallion, now as still as stagnant water.

C: 在囚犯出狱以前，他们的快递都只能老老实实地待在这里。但是，他们在牢里到底是怎么下单的？
E: Until the prisoners are released, their packages will be left here. But how exactly do they place their orders from inside the prison?

C: 《花儿与怪盗》
E: Beauty and the Thief

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 那么请闭上眼睛。
E: Please close your eyes.

C: *大声地咆哮*<size=36>嘎嘎！</size>
E: *howl loudly* <size=36>Ca-caw ca-caw!</size>

C: 看见大家没精打采的，先来个下马威吧！
E: Since everyone's looking sluggish, let's start off with a bang!

C: （再观察一下）
E: (Observe a bit more.)

C: 不要计较这种小事！
E: Don't fuss over such trivial matters!

C: 对！公司没少挤兑咱联盟。
E: Yeah! The IPC has been blatantly exploiting our Alliance.

C: 卢卡大战纯美骑士…
E: Luka's showdown with the Knight of Beauty...

C: 别慌，我们志如钢铁！
E: Don't panic, our resolve is as strong as steel!

C: 恭喜晋级！我们的英雄！
E: Congratulations on advancing! Our hero!

C: 化外民通常会把玉界门当作入境后见到的第一个仙舟奇观。但绝大多数人根本意识不到，自己正处于这宇宙最为壮美的奇观之一当中。
E: Outworlders usually consider the Jade Gate as the first spectacular sight they encounter after entering the Xianzhou. However, most of them are unaware that they are in the middle of one of the most magnificent wonders of the universe.

C: 一幅旨在提醒入境旅客配合通关检查的宣传画。
E: It is a poster designed to remind incoming passengers to cooperate with customs clearance.

C: 这座香炉没有任何气味，大概只是装饰品。
E: This incense burner has no smell. It is probably just a decoration.

C: 「在火劫大战尾声，岁阳一族已遭彻底禁绝。即便仅有极少数尚存于朱明仙舟之上……」
E: "Heliobi were wiped out toward the end of the Flaming Catastrophe. A small number of them could still be found on the Xianzhou Zhuming."

C: 戏剧社首席非我莫属~
E: I'm the only choice for the Drama Club's president!

C: 这个段子过时啦！
E: This joke is so outdated!

C: 假以时日，它将自壳中重获新生，成为他或她。届时，罗浮的匠人们技艺已有精进，必可再传于他，令她不负使命，返乡授艺。
E: One day, it will be reborn in the egg and become a male or female Vidyadhara. When the time comes, the Luofu craftsmen will have improved their skills and be able to pass back what they have learned to it. It will then be able to fulfill its mission and share its knowledge with the people in its homeland.

C: 显然它没能抵达自己本该前往的地点——或许你可以行个方便，将它交还至正迫切期待它归来的签收人手中。
E: Obviously, it is not where it is supposed to be. Perhaps you can do it a favor and deliver it to its recipient, who is no doubt looking forward to it.

C: 看得出，这本崭新的册子并非是快递箱原本所有，而是有人强行放进去的，就像是垃圾掉进了垃圾桶。你岂能坐视不理？
E: It's obvious that this brand-new notebook was not originally inside the parcel, but was forcibly stuffed inside, as if it was a piece of garbage being squashed into a trashcan. Can you really sit by and ignore this?

C: 你摸到了一个奇怪的花苞…这束花中的每一朵都是盛开的，唯独这一朵是待放的花苞。
E: Inside, your fingers grasp a strange flower bud... Every flower in this bouquet is in full bloom, but this stalk alone only holds a bud.

C: 拍个合照，看这边…披萨！
E: Time for a photo. Look over here... pizza!

C: 来都来了，听听吧。
E: We're already here. Let's have a listen.

C: 世界可真奇妙啊…
E: The world is truly miraculous...

C: 许多人类坚信世上有鬼。
E: There are many who believe in ghosts.

C: 咱自己不就是鬼吗？
E: Aren't we ghosts ourselves?

C: 你别被他的情绪传染了。
E: Don't let his emotions infect you.

C: 仙舟小说的篇幅之长你早有耳闻，但你相信这位作者的故事并不会就此完结，故事会在读者心间继续连载下去。
E: You've heard about the length of Xianzhou's novel, but you believe that this author's story will not end here. The story will continue to unfold in the hearts of readers.

C: 本机新上「梦境蓝环乌贼与草木灰」口味苏乐达，限时八折优惠，欲购从速！
E: The new SoulGlad flavor, "Dreamscape Blue Ring Squid & Plant Ash," is now available from this machine at a <unbreak>20%</unbreak> discount for a limited time only!

C: 各色商品在灯光下闪闪发亮，透过橱窗，你看见了精心包裹的欲望。
E: Various bits of merchandise glimmer under the light. Through the window, you see meticulously wrapped desire.

C: 苏乐达俱乐部的后门，一些注重私密性的顾客会从这里悄悄进出。
E: The SoulGlad Club's back door. Customers who value their privacy will enter or slip out through this exit.

C: 你很好奇，悬在空中的钢琴是否能发出和平时相同的声响，但似乎没有机会尝试了。
E: You're curious: Can a piano suspended in midair make the sounds it usually makes? But it seems you won't have a chance to try it out.

C: 已失去使用价值的电视，如抱团取暖般堆砌着，仿佛要对抗孤独带来的寒冷。
E: Televisions that have lost their value. They are all piled up, as if huddling together to fend off the chills from loneliness.

C: 门扉紧锁——这里似乎并不欢迎访客。
E: The door is tightly locked — this place seemingly does not welcome visitors.

C: 可以预见整理这些纸张会是件多么困难的事。
E: Tidying up these papers would be such a hassle.

C: 由于忆质的阻隔，酒店各层已经失去了联系，电梯自然也无法使用了。
E: Memoria isolation has caused all hotel floors to lose comms capability, which also means the elevator is naturally out of order.

C: …在打出第五杆前，你最好先祈祷物理学在梦境里也存在。
E: ...Before you bat your fifth shot, you better pray that physics exist in the Dreamscape.

C: 啊，请别在意。以我个人的名义，请你收下这份礼金。就把它当作我对你未来的…投资。
E: Oh, I was just mumbling to myself. Here's a gift from me. Just see it... as my personal investment in your future.

C: 那你愿意聊聊吗？
E: You want to chat?

C: 我们执着于为客户创造可能。苜蓿草银行——您最好的理财伙伴。
E: We are dedicated to the creation of possibility for our clients. Alfalfa Bank — your most trusted financial partner.

C: 年利率高达百分之三十四点八，稳定无风险，长线营收可观，不收取任何手续费，这边呢，想邀请您了解一下。
E: The annual interest rate is as high as <unbreak>34.8%</unbreak>. It's stable, risk-free, and will make a great long-term investment. No transaction fee is charged. Are you interested in learning more about it?

C: 嘿嘿，会耐心听我说的，你是第一个！好朋友！
E: Heheh, you're the first one who's ever had the patience to sit through my monologue! You're a good friend!

C: 求求你们了……
E: Please...

C: …您莫非…是在开玩笑？
E: ...Could you be... pulling my leg?

C: 你赢了！你很勇敢，没人能阻拦你了。尽情去做想做的一切吧！
E: You win! You are bold, and none can resist you. Go ahead and do whatever you want!

C: 它发出了开心的叫声，看起来对你无礼的举动并未感到冒犯。
E: It grunts happily and doesn't seem to be offended by your rude behavior.

C: 不偏不倚地落进了某个路人敞开的背包里。
E: It stages a perfect landing straight into the open inventory of a passerby.

C: 我看看…唔，居然还真有？这就是你在找的东西吧？
E: Let me see... Oh, there actually is something? Is that yours?

C: …哼，我看你是知难而退了吧？靠旁边站点，别影响我表演——我还得靠才艺赚润滑油钱呢。
E: ...Yeah, that's right. Back off and retain some dignity. Move aside and don't ruin my performance — I still have to busk to earn my lubricant oil.

C: 都是蛊惑人心的鬼话！她最擅长这个了…她从小就是那种孩子。
E: It's all a bucket of brainwashing balderdash! This is what she's best at... She's been like this since young.

C: 美梦脆筒。
E: Dreamy Cone.

C: 仔细想想，训练道具跟训练牲畜似乎也没什么不同，最后还是得能赚钱才行……
E: Come to think of it, there's no difference between training props and training animals. Most importantly, I must be able to earn money from it...

C: 我得走了。
E: I got to go.

C: 不，那样至少能有一方血缘关系…我是养子。
E: No, that's if I'm related to one of them... I'm an adopted son.

C: 希望你能珍惜自己的天赋，做出一番不会令自己后悔的事业。收下这个吧——我不需要它了。
E: I hope you'll value your talent and use it to do something you'll not regret. Take this — I don't need it anymore.

C: 我会帮你留意。
E: I will let her know.

C: 我曾是{RUBY_B#「蓝调的时刻」}第九梦境{RUBY_E#}的推销员，专门负责在车站前宣传它们的婚恋服务。
E: I used to be a salesman for {RUBY_B#Blue Hour}the ninth Dreamscape{RUBY_E#}. I was personally responsible for promoting their marriage services in front of the Golden Central Station.

C: 哈利伯顿的胸口中传来急促而沉重的滴答声。
E: A rapid and heavy ticking sound is coming from inside Haliburton's chest.

C: 不知不觉中，人群开始朝这边聚集；连空气渐渐都开始变得灼热而拥挤。
E: The crowd gathers, filling the space. Even the air carries a buoyant spirit.

C: 这确实是十分基础的工作，但基础不代表没有价值。家族的事业离不开为之付出的奉献者，唯有团结协作才能铸就伟大。
E: This may be a very basic job, but that doesn't mean it is meaningless. The Family's businesses rely plenty on patrons who contribute to them. Only in unity can greatness be achieved.

C: 在偌大的宇宙中，个人的力量实在太过渺小。唯有相互帮扶，万众一心，凡人才可能做出非凡的壮举。
E: In the vast universe, the strength of an individual is insignificant. Only through mutual help and binding our hearts as one, can humans perform superhuman feats.

C: 这也是{RUBY_B#「同谐」}神主{RUBY_E#}对我们的教导，任何人都应铭记在心。
E: This is also the {RUBY_B#Harmony}Great One's{RUBY_E#} teachings unto us. Everyone would do well to remember them by heart.

C: 要是没有我们保护匹诺康尼的梦境，这地界早就乱套了，哪儿轮得到他们夜夜笙歌？！
E: If we weren't around to protect Penacony's Dreamscape, this realm would plunge into chaos. Where would they have the idyllic moods to sing the night away!?

C: 自动乐团…真是可悲，没想到匹诺康尼这样高雅的地方会有这么卑劣的技术。
E: The automated orchestra... How tragic that an elegant place like Penacony would allow such vulgar technology.

C: 不算什么大事，但要真遇到还挺闹心的。要是您拥有了自己的车，这些烦恼就全免啦。
E: It may sound negligible, but things would've been bad if someone really got run down. If you had your own car, you'd be saved from all these troubles.

C: 「时刻谨记：客人的话都是对的，客人的指责都有道理，客人的意见必须听从，客人的期待就是你的目标…如果收到差评，无条件扣除半个月工资，并取消晋升资格。」
E: "Always bear in mind: The customer's words are always right, the customer's complaints are always practical, the customer's opinions must be adhered to, the customer's expectation is your goal... If poor reviews are received, half a month's pay will be docked without question, and promotion evaluation will not be considered."

C: 我一定要把这感觉记下来…那边那个，你也要加入派对？
E: I have to note this feeling down... You, over there, do you want to join the party?

C: 是否应该彻底抛弃掉所谓「久经市场验证的创作规则」，去拥抱更加不确定的可能性呢？
E: Are we supposed to completely abandon these so-called "creation standards that have repeatedly proven themselves in the market," to embrace more uncertain possibilities?

C: 也许只有搞清楚这件事，才能为常盘国的未来找到道路。
E: Perhaps figuring this out is my only way to find a path for Tokiwa's future.

C: 从那以后，我就恨透了我自己，也恨透了我那时迷信的「建筑艺术」…我们合谋，害死了很多很多人……
E: Since then, I have hated myself to my core and hated this blind worship of the "art of architecture"... This path we plotted killed so many people.

C: 当然，您有什么想要咨询的？
E: Certainly. Is there anything specific you would like to know about?

C: 感谢你的解答，我先走了。
E: Thank you for your answers. I'll take my leave now.

C: …哎！你这人，怎么什么都不知道啊？该不会是偷渡进来的吧……
E: ...Hey! How can you be so clueless about Penacony? You didn't sneak into this place, did you...?

C: 哈，苏乐达可真是…还搁这等他回来呢！回不去了，上标记了！我花那么大价钱跑过来，可不是为了看他们全场梦游的！
E: Hah, SoulGlad... they're still waiting for him to come back? No way, man! I'm telling you! I didn't spend a fortune to watch such a letdown of a game!

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 使用大堂中公用的「梦境电话」，您无需入梦就可以与各个时刻快速联系。
E: The public dreamphone in the lobby allows you to make a quick call to any "moment" without entering the Dreamscape.

C: 说起来…我最近总听到有来宾抱怨梦里的代币不够花，根本玩不尽兴。那么…请拿好，这是我个人为您准备的小小心意。
E: By the way... I've been receiving complaints from guests about not having enough tokens to fully enjoy their dreams. In this case... I've personally prepared a small gift for you.

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 其实我没找到「销毁」按钮。
E: In fact, I didn't see the "Destruct" button too.

C: 我该怎么充电？
E: How do I charge the car?

C: 行啊，当然可以。要是连这点小事都做不到，我还算什么豪华飞车。
E: Naturally. If I can't even perform such a small task, what kind of luxury speedster would I even be?

C: 到了那个时候，我就可以跟你、还有你的伙伴们一起玩咯！
E: When the time comes, I'll be able to hang out with you and your buddies!

C: 虽然我现在拥有的美梦能量还不足以让小镇上的所有人都看到我…但这已经是很大的进步了！这都多亏了你，灰色的朋友！
E: Although I still don't have enough dream energy to make myself visible to everyone in town... this is already a significant improvement! I owe you a big one, my gray friend!

C: 在那之前，我会继续以「钟表小子」的身份留在这里，守护梦境世界的快乐跟和平！滴~答！
E: Before that, I'll remain here as Clockie, defending the Dreamscape's happiness and peace! Tick-tock!

C: 看看他都做了什么——通过故弄玄虚的仪式、神秘晦涩的行话，将普通的学术交流变成门徒选拔大会…人们不再拥有自由交流思想的权利，所有反对他的声音都将成为异端邪说。
E: Look at what he did — he turned ordinary academic conferences into ceremonies for him to pick his disciples by setting up contrived rituals and throwing in convoluted jargon... People were no longer free to speak their minds and converse with each other, as all voices opposing him were labeled as heretical.

C: 哇哦，太酷了！
E: Wow, it's so cool!

C: 哟，老兄，来见识下我的战甲吗？
E: Hey buddy, wanna see my armor?

C: 那些地方充斥着毫无特色的建筑、乏味过时的娱乐、矫揉造作的景观…甚至还不如匹诺康尼呢！
E: They're all just filled with unremarkable buildings, outdated entertainment, and artificial scenery... They can't even measure up to Penacony!

C: 他们总说这梦境有多让人流连忘返，但看久了也就是座繁华一点的普通都市而已。
E: They all say how the Dreamscape is so amazing that people never want to leave... But after you've stared at it long enough, it's just another slightly more prosperous city.

C: 哈…现在我也分不清楚了——我没法忍受的究竟是家庭的巨变，还是当时那个没用的自己？
E: Ah... Now, I can't quite tell... Was it the changes in my family that I could not stand, or the fact that I was so powerless?

C: 哈哈，谢谢谢谢。
E: Haha, thank you, thank you.

C: 既然你这么努力推销，行吧…
E: As you're so intent on selling me something, go on then...

C: …关于过去。
E: ...About your past.

C: 后来，在和梅芙恩大吵一架后，我离开了鸢尾花家系，独自开了这间酒吧。
E: After that, I had a huge argument with Maeven and left the Iris Family. Then, I came and opened this lounge by myself.

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: 真的吗？人家好感动，那就赶快开始吧！
E: Really? Oh, I'm so touched! We have to begin immediately!

C: 我听说这些怪物都被训练得服服帖帖，才打算过来取经。但这哪是驯物啊，简直都把它们供起来了，还给道具调饮料，这不是搞笑吗？
E: I heard those monsters are incredibly obedient, so I came to see how it's done. But what do I find? This is not prop-taming at all! Those fools treat these monsters like their bosses and even mix drinks for them! It's downright hilarious!

C: 你没有误解。
E: No, you didn't misunderstand.

C: 我猜，他们巴不得把我的心、我的肝和肺全都拿走，摆在橱窗里卖掉。
E: I suppose they can't wait to take my heart, my liver, and my lungs and put them on display to sell them.

C: 再见，恩人！我也要专心准备…呃，「谐乐大典」了。
E: Goodbye, o patron! I have to focus on getting ready too for... er, the Charmony Festival.

C: 所以黑掉账户也是…
E: So all that about hacking accounts was also...

C: 红哨小姐发出一声短促、轻蔑的哨音。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a sharp, disdainful whistle.

C: 有吗？我对你倒是完全没印象，话说…你该不会是在通缉令上看到的吧？
E: Have you? I don't remember you at all. Say... I wasn't on a wanted poster, was I?

C: …什么意思？广告牌…等我干嘛？是我欠了它的钱吗？莫名其妙的。
E: ...What does that mean? Why would a billboard be waiting for me...? Do I owe it money or something? That's so strange.

C: 还是流梦礁适合我啊。自由，清净，没什么麻烦事。爽快！
E: I think the Dreamflux Reef suits me best. Free, peaceful, and free of trouble. It's refreshing!

C: 算了，来都来了…干脆在这边好好逛逛，权当度假吧。
E: Forget it. I'm here now... I'll just take a good stroll around here, like I'm on holiday.

C: 开拓，必须靠自己迈步向前，而非被鞭策或驱使。当你可以选择逃避时，勇敢才更显珍贵。
E: Trailblaze requires us to rely on ourselves to move forward, not to be spurred or urged in any direction. It is when you have the option to run away that courage can truly be considered valuable.

C: 好啊，要是不耽误您的时间，想聊多久都行！
E: Sure. If you have the time, I'm more than willing to chat with you!

C: 啊…梦是现实的延伸，记忆的枝桠。时间的光辉从天空洒下，树叶的缝隙间映射出历史的剪影。可那影子太过斑斓，让人看不清面孔，以至于任人打扮。
E: Oh... dreams are extensions of reality and branches of memories. As the light of time pours down from the sky, the silhouettes of history are cast upon the gaps in the leaves. Yet the shadows are too patchy to reveal its true face, allowing everyone and anyone to dress it in any way they wish.

C: 不过，对常年耽溺在金色美梦里的那些人而言，这里或许确如他们所说，是一场「恐怖的噩梦」吧。
E: However, for those who have been drowning in the golden dream for years, this place is nothing but a "horrible nightmare" to them.

C: 现在不行喽，人越来越少，也只有老顾客来光顾了。不知道你有没有碰到那个整天笑嘻嘻的维德，他可是每天雷打不动地买三个面包。生意都是靠他们撑着。
E: But not now. Fewer and fewer people come in, and we're down to regular customers only. I wonder if you've met Vader who just sits around grinning all day? He never fails to buy three loaves of bread from us, every day. Our very business depends on these people.

C: 嗯…有只脑回路很奇特的小鸟，最近常在<color=#dbc291ff>猫形摊车的附近</color>徘徊，据说是爱上了那只猫…折纸小鸟会梦见钢铁猫咪吗？谁知道呢。
E: Hmm... There's a bird that doesn't have its head screwed on right. It's usually pacing about <color=#dbc291ff>near the cat-shaped cart</color>. Apparently, it has fallen in love with that cat... Do origami birds dream of steel cats? Who knows.

C: 在赛场上得到冠军的镇民就能成为美梦小镇的「大明星」！哈努兄弟、钟表小子、音符小姐、仓鼠球骑士、木头老爷、猫头鹰老师，还有我们这几只鸟都是大明星！
E: Residents who won on the racetrack would become Dreamville's stars! Brother Hanu, Clockie, Miss Note, Hamster Ball Knight, Old Man Wood, Professor Owl, and us birds here, we're all stars!

C: 瞧，那忆质流淌凝聚的漩涡，那迷人的曲线、圆滑的折角…如此相似的两个{RUBY_B#梦境}世界{RUBY_E#}互为倒影，星光浮游其间、辉映鎏金灯火。
E: Look, that vortex of coalesced memoria flow, that mesmerizing contour, the smoothly rounded corners... These two similar {RUBY_B#Dreamscape}worlds{RUBY_E#} cast reflections on each other, floating starlight shining through like gilded radiance.

C: 柔声蜜语，鸩毒比蜜甜\n宝器珠光，自缚于绸缎
E: Soft whispers and honeyed words, bitter poison sweeter than saccharine.\nTreasures and gems, wrapped in satin.

C: 他希望这种美味的饮品可以让犯人向往美好、化解监狱中的矛盾。这位圣人的梦想便是某日宇宙中的所有人都能坐在一张桌子上，快乐地共饮苏乐达。
E: He hoped that this tasty drink would get the prisoners to pine for better days, and quell the uncertainties of imprisonment. This saint's dream was that someday, everyone in the universe would be seated at the same table, happily drinking and sharing SoulGlad.

C: 而在苏乐达企业与苜蓿草家系的努力下，我们在梦中重新培育了梦见草，让他的梦想在梦中永存——喝一口苏乐达，就是在向这位英雄致敬！
E: Through the combined efforts of SoulGlad Enterprises and the Alfalfa Family, we managed to regrow Dreamleaves in dreams. His dream will forever exist in dreams... Every gulp of SoulGlad is a toast to this hero's bravery!

C: 站在你眼前的是一个坚定的人，一个无需依靠他人来引导其心绪走向的人。
E: Standing before you is a resolute individual, one who does not rely on others to guide his feelings.

C: 对了——那个践行「虚无」之道的摄影师好像说过最近要开个人作品展，稍后可以问问他……
E: Oh right, that photographer who follows the Path of Nihility told me that he would be holding a personal exhibition soon. Maybe I'll be able to ask him about it later...

C: 我的「计划」也该差不多了……
E: My plan is close to fruition...

C: 当然，自我推销总会引人不快，您要是的确只想在这里看看云，我也不会再多说什么的。
E: Of course, no one likes a self-promoter, so if you really are just here to watch the clouds, I won't say more.

C: 多加三个零，不用费什么力气也能展现出自己显赫的身份。
E: Add three more zeros and you can easily flaunt your personage without lifting a finger.

C: 不过，刚才发光的那些可并不是容器里的全部哦？
E: But the lights you just saw in the container didn't come from all of them.

C: 它们自成世界，有些人偏偏却视而不见。
E: A whole biome right under our noses, and yet there are people who turn a blind eye to it.

C: 出于梦境的混乱，它们似乎残缺不全，但不论怎么看，那都像是一种失活的病毒。
E: Owing to the chaos of the Dreamscape, they were damaged and incomplete. But having examined them, I'm certain they're some kind of inactivated virus.

C: 而恰好，就有其中那么几位，他们痛苦的记忆沉积下来，并永远地留存在了忆域的深处……
E: Then, by coincidence, the painful memories of these individuals were deposited here, permanently etched in the depths of the Memory Zone.

C: 美食家挣钱的机会可不多，可我，哈哈哈哈哈！我还是抓住了机会！
E: I don't get a lot of opportunities to make money as a food connoisseur, but I found one and used it well! Hahahahaha!

C: 与你还算有缘，我偷偷告诉你吧，嘿嘿。
E: I guess we've been getting along, so I'll tell you my secret. Heh heh.

C: 当你饿得快被造物主回收灵魂时，你模糊的视界中爬过一只闪着白光的甲虫。它的壳太美了，像深海的白珍珠，可它更像救命的食物。
E: "Teetering on starvation, with your spirit fading, a luminous beetle emerges before your blurred eyes. Its shell is mesmerizing, reminiscent of a pearl in the depths of the ocean. Yet, to you, it is nothing less than a lifeline."

C: 你怕的是自己过气吧。
E: You're afraid of losing your popularity, aren't you?

C: 谈谈你在空艇上的见闻呗…
E: Tell me about your time on the airship...

C: 算是吧，你或许会在某些商业杂志的封面见过我。我的生活几乎被工作填满，有时候我会走到甲板上，独自看看空艇下方的风景。
E: Possibly. I've been on a few business magazine covers. Work pretty much fills my days, but sometimes I escape to the deck to enjoy the views, all by myself.

C: 投资并不会带给你快乐的，它只是一个过程，无关其他。
E: Investing won't bring you happiness. It's nothing more than a means.

C: 我接过的案子比你吃过的面包还多——我的对手也是。从法律界的巨鲨到街头混混…当全世界都在对你喊打喊杀时，保持冷静就变成了一门技艺。
E: I've taken on more cases than all the shoelaces you've tied, and so have my opponents. From the bigwigs of the legal profession to the street thugs... Basically, when the whole world calls for your death, remaining calm becomes an art.

C: 所以，我一直以来都会告诫自己的每一位客户，要准备好面对一切后果，更别怕脏了自己的手。哎，只可惜…并不是所有人都能听得进去。
E: That's why I've always been reminding my clients to be prepared for any consequence, even if it means having to get their hands dirty. *sigh* It's a pity my advice doesn't sit well with everyone.

C: 别误会，我不是想威胁公司。我只是喜欢这种仿佛在牌局里看清别人手牌的感觉。
E: Don't misunderstand me. I'm not trying to blackmail the IPC. I just enjoy the revelation I get when I discover what tricks people have up their sleeves.

C: 蛋笨是的读复着跟来过倒？
E: !drawkcab siht taeper uoy fi loof a er'uoY

C: 还有就是，我悄悄跟您说，麻烦您别声张——这套周边太抢手啦，我怕别的顾客听了不高兴——我给您留了一大箱，您可以敞开来买，不限量，价格的话就内部拿货价算。
E: Also, just between us: I saved a large crate, so you can purchase however many you like, all at an internal staff discount. But please don't tell anyone else about it. Our customers are already fighting to get their hands on this merchandise set. I wouldn't want to incur their wrath.

C: 只要你想，什么时候都不算晚。
E: It's never too late as long as you put your mind to it.

C: 很高兴见到您，船长。在这里，没有生物是完美的，我也不例外。
E: Nice to meet you, captain. You'll find that none of the lifeforms here are perfect, myself included.

C: 当世界把话筒交给你的时候，别像我一样哑了嗓，最终只落得在悔恨中度日的下场。
E: When the world hands you a microphone, don't let your throat seize up like me. Otherwise, you'll end up living the rest of your life in regret.

C: 怎样才能赖着不毕业？
E: How can I stay here and not graduate?

C: 正因如此，做好事前演练，就是提升商业活动成功率最有效的方式。
E: That's why rehearsing beforehand is the best practice for acing any business function you're expected at.

C: 别看我身边簇满了人，商人、星探、经纪人、赞助商…他们没一个真心相信我的。
E: Don't be fooled by the traders, talent scouts, agents, and sponsors gathering around me... None of them actually believe in my capabilities.

C: 我拼命学习，是为了折纸大学的奖学金，为了那份荣誉…为了找到一份好工作……
E: All of my hard work studying is so I can attain the Paperfold University Scholarship. For that honor... And for finding a good job...

C: 对了，我还没自我介绍呢。我叫诺伯蒂，目前是刚加入喜剧社的成员，主要是写写剧本、编排节目、做点幕后工作。
E: Oh, I haven't introduced myself. My name is Nobody. I've just recently joined the comedy club. I mainly write scripts, edit programs, and do behind-the-scenes work.

C: 那我们回头再聊吧。
E: Then let's chat again soon.

C: 希望你能和折纸大学的全体师生一起，共同享受这场音乐派对。
E: I hope you, along with all Paperfold University's teachers, will share in this music party's joy.

C: 我承认，这是我的个人判断。这种情况不应再次出现。对，不符合原则。
E: I admit, that was my personal judgment. Such instances shouldn't happen again. Yes, it is misaligned with the principle.

C: 感谢大佬！那我就把我的个人页上传过去了，我先发你一份吧，上面有我的联系方式，你可以随时找我——如果有需要的话。
E: Thanks boss! I'll send over my personal page first. Let me send you a copy too. My contact is on there, and if anything comes up, feel free to reach out to me.

C: 你知道吗？芮克先生选中了…虽然只是担任他新作的小配角，但好歹我也算是正式登上大银幕了！
E: Did you know that I was selected by Mr. Reca...? Although I'm just playing a minor role in his new film, at least I made it to the silver screen!

C: 「同学寄语」是什么？
E: What's a graduating message?

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 所以…我专门照着你们的影片内容做了一种新的甜品，不知道你会不会喜欢…如果感觉好吃的话，也可以给芮克先生和乱破同学带一份哦！
E: So... I specially made a new dessert in the theme of your film, but I don't know if you'll like it... If it tastes nice, you can bring a serving for Mr. Reca and Rappa!

C: 关于你的功能…
E: About your functions...

C: 「繁育」问道：「你为什么这么说？」
E: The Propagation replied, "Why is that?"

C: 学语的人偶表示，我不知道啊，我跟着大伙一起做的。
E: The puppet learning to speak states: I don't know, I just followed what everyone else did.

C: 惊了！全套的《哈努兄弟》官方小说，哪怕是你，也狠狠地羡慕了。
E: Whoa! The complete set of the official Brother Hanu novels. Even you are crazy jealous.

C: 瞧瞧这是谁？匹诺康尼的盛会巨星！无匹的开拓者！大家最爱的银河球棒侠！
E: Check out who it is? Penacony's celebratory superstar! The peerless Trailblazer! Everyone's favorite Galactic Baseballer!

C: 可以呀，签在哪儿？
E: Sure, where do you want me to sign?

C: 这座无机质的冰冷矩阵，却是「爱」下定决心出发的地方。
E: This cold, inorganic matrix is where "love" made its resolute decision to depart.

C: 提问：明明看上去这么锋利，还常常用在激烈的战斗中，它为什么不会伤及其创造者？答案：其实会的。
E: Question: If it looks so sharp and is often used in brutal battles, why doesn't it harm its creator? Answer: Actually, it does.

C: 要不去跟团吧。
E: How about a group tour?

C: 来来来！包您满意！
E: Rrroll up! Rrroll up! Satisfaction guaranteed!

C: 在梦里待了大半个月…
E: I stayed in the dream for a fortnight...

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 还有希望恢复正常吗？
E: Is there still hope for things to go back to normal?

C: 晕车晕船晕飞行器就算了，怎么做梦都能晕啊……
E: Can't believe I'm getting motion sickness even in my dreams...

C: 我还有梦想，还有大好青春。真不想就这样结束啊……
E: I'm still young! I still have lots of time to live! I don't want to end it here...

C: 你说，我们鸢尾花里也有叛徒吗？
E: Say, does the Iris Family have traitors too?

C: 是啊，真是意犹未尽，要是能抹除这份记忆再看一遍录像就好了。
E: Yeah, I can't get enough of it. If only I could forget everything and watch the recording again.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 谁说得清呢？
E: Who knows?

C: 是不是有点不对称…
E: Isn't it a bit uneven...

C: 再输下去，裤子都要赔光了。
E: If I keep losing, I'm gonna lose my pants too.

C: 无名客啊，我还以为是什么大富豪呢。
E: A Nameless eh? I thought it was gonna be some wealthy magnate.

C: 不急，谋定而后动。
E: No hurry. We plan ahead before acting.

C: 别再给我倒苏乐达了！
E: Don't pour anymore SoulGlad for me!

C: 面子不能丢！
E: I can't lose face!

C: 没呢，生意惨淡…
E: Nothing... Business is in a tailspin...

C: …我是来报名加入赛车社的，这和家人有什么关系？
E: ...I'm here to sign up for the Racing Club. What does it have to do with family?

C: 等等，你这是不是要上电视啊？
E: Wait, is this going on TV?

C: 和海报不同的是，这些摆饰可以放在任何地方…并且更加昂贵。
E: What's different from the poster is that these ornaments can be placed anywhere... and are even more expensive.

C: 这款饮料机附带的打气功能为任何液体注入二氧化碳，你甚至可以用它自己制作「苏打豆汁儿」。
E: This beverage machine comes with a carbonation feature that injects carbon dioxide into any liquid. You can even use it to make your own "mung bean soda."

C: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
E: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

C: 可能是现在市面上最流行的多人线上游戏。但星穹列车的网络信号始终不太稳定，再加上运营方的服务器质量一言难尽…你还是比较喜欢玩单人战役模式。
E: It's probably the most popular multiplayer online game on the market right now. However, the network signal on the Astral Express has always been unstable, and the quality of the game's servers leaves much to be desired... you still prefer playing the single-player campaign mode.

C: 你兴致勃勃地扫视了一圈游戏列表，突然感到索然无味。
E: You excitedly scan through the catalog list, only to suddenly feel bored.

C: 不用谢，我的好伙伴～
E: No need to thank me, my good partner~

C: 身为一支笔，似乎更应该呆在书桌上。
E: As a pen, it seems more fitting to stay on the desk.

C: 哼哼哼～唧！
E: Oink oink oink~ squeal!

C: 你这商队做什么生意？
E: What does your caravan trade in?

C: 由于制作工艺复杂，这种纱料的价格始终比较昂贵。人们一般会用它制作礼服，在祭典之类的场合穿戴。
E: Due to its intricate method of production, this silk tends to be on the pricier side. It's often used for crafting formal wear at festivals and grand events.

C: 不过没关系——我相信，只要黄金裔能解决预言中的问题，黑夜总有一天会重返天空，繁星将不再是任何人的禁忌。
E: But no worries... I believe that, as long as the Chrysos Heirs resolve the prophesied issues, the night sky will eventually return. By then, the starry sky will no longer be a forbidden topic anymore.

C: …嗐，你可别被有些咋咋呼呼的年轻人给骗了。总说什么世界末日之类的胡话——哪有的事！这传信石版上天天都在宣讲，元老院和黄金裔的团结坚如磐石，那还能有什么可怕的事？
E: ...Hah, don't let those rowdy youngsters get under your skin. They're making a fair share of doomsayers — it's all just noise! Have you seen what the government posts on teleslates every day? With the Council of Elders and the Chrysos Heirs joining forces, what could possibly go wrong?

C: 我要入浴！
E: I want to take a bath!

C: 隔着百步之距时，金线就已预知贵客的到来。{NICKNAME}阁下，想在此休息会儿吗？
E: The golden thread had already foreseen your arrival when you were a hundred steps away, dear customer. Esteemed {NICKNAME}, have you come to rest?
Hya!!!

C: 看看手工。
E: Let me see what you made.

C: 啊…我身上这些蝴蝶与花的饰品就是……
E: Ah... I made all of these butterfly and flower accessories on my dress...

C: 想听听哀地里亚的故事。
E: I'd like to hear stories about Aidonia.

C: 奥赫玛的繁荣离不开每一位居民的建设！啊，新面孔！
E: It is thanks to the hard work of its citizens that Okhema has come to be so prosperous! Ah, a new face!

C: 当然，我们都崇尚美德和正直。但同时，懂得如何与人相处、如何展现自己的长处，这些「软实力」同样重要。
E: Of course we all believe in personal virtues and integrity. However, if you know how to interact with others and also how to showcase your strengths, this kind of "soft power" is equally important.

C: 哼…那小子手艺倒是没得挑，我之前买过他家那套十二泰坦的小雕像，那造型、那上色…别的不说，里头那个刻法勒雕像，到现在还是我最喜欢的。
E: Hmph... I have to admit, that kid does some good work. I bought that Twelve Titans statuette set a while back. The shape, the colors... Even if we ignore the others, the Kephale from that set is still my favorite to this day.

C: 咦…你身上没有苹果啊，那算了，这次就不收你费用了。承蒙惠顾，欢迎下次光临~
E: Oh... you don't have any apples on you. Then forget it, this time you can have it for free. Thank you for coming, and please come again~

C: 好好好，慢走不送，有空可以多来陪老婆子我唠唠嗑啊~
E: Yes, yes, the exit's that way. If you're free, stop by and keep an old gal company with some gossip, alright~

C: …这下您知道我为啥只能悄咪咪推销东西了吧？
E: ...Now do you get why I can only sell things on the down-low?

C: 可前不久有个商队跟我反映的——他们商队的大地兽在回奥赫玛的路上，突然停下不走了，一直在「唱歌」，怎么哄都哄不动。
E: But not long ago, a caravan reported back to me that on the way back to Okhema, their dromases stopped and refused to walk. They started "singing" instead. They couldn't be pressed on no matter what.

C: 别提了！浴场的老顽固们把我赶出来了，就因为我在里面装了几瓶水，真是小题大做！
E: Don't mention them! Those old pigheaded folks at the baths kicked me out just for refilling a few bottles of water inside. Good grief!

C: 麻烦您了，客人。我去去就回。
E: Thank you, dear customer. I'll be right back.

C: 不…悬锋城毁后，我辗转各地，却仅有{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的圣城愿意接纳一位蒙尘的人。那时我就下定决心，不到必要的时候，不再拿起清扫工具。
E: No... After Castrum Kremnos was destroyed, I roamed various places, but only the holy city of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} would take in a stained fugitive like myself. I made a vow to myself at that moment that I would never again take up my cleaning equipment unless there was an absolute need.

C: 元老院曾派人暗示我重操旧业，但楼上那几位尊贵的人替我出面「婉拒」了下来。时至今日，这种手段早已不再可行，也不再有意义了。
E: The Council of Elders once hinted that I should take up my old post. However, a number of esteemed persons came forward and "declined" on my behalf. Nowadays, such methods are no longer feasible; nor do they have any meaning.

C: 据说他曾经带队阻击黑潮。他的战友们都选择了光荣赴死，只有他自己活了下来…呵，怕不是当了逃兵！
E: I hear he once led a company to fight against the black tide. His comrades all chose death in glory, leaving only him alive... Hah, he could have been a deserter for all we know!

C: 我不参加，就随便看看。
E: I'm not joining. Just looking around.

C: …久等，异邦的勇士。
E: ...Long have you waited, warrior of the outlands.

C: 踏实、认真，吉奥里亚喜欢。锻造，粮食，力量，都能得到。
E: Steady and diligent, Georios likes. Forge, grain, and strength, all shall gain.

C: …不过，我仍尝试在他人的故事中感受法吉娜的奇迹，试图拼凑出它的模样。
E: ...But still, I try to vicariously experience Phagousa's miracles through the stories of others, to piece together the Titan's visage.

C: 而且{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}教会了我…只要愿意做出改变，即便无情如命运，或许也会绽出崭新的生机。
E: And {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME} has taught me... As long as one is willing to make a change, even destiny, merciless as it is, may blossom with new life.

C: 这种玩弄文辞的论辩还是少听些为好。渎神的罪名暂且不论，要是因为沉迷驳倒对方，反而损害了思考的能力，就得不偿失了。
E: These debates of rhetorical wordplay are best avoided. Putting aside the matter of blasphemy for now, if you end up damaging your brain trying to refute your opposition's argument, the victory is still not worth the loss.

C: 我们真的拥有关于「阿卡索斯」的知识吗？从未接受过数学训练的孩童也能轻松辨认出圆形，并准确地描述出「黎明机器」更大，车盖更小。
E: Do we truly have knowledge of "Icatus"? A child that has never been educated in mathematics can easily identify a circle, and accurately explain that the "Dawn Device" is larger than a vehicle cover.

C: 不，我只是路过。
E: No, I was just passing by.

C: 我我我只是因为…浴池的温度还没到位。对，我天生体寒，需要等那水热热再下去。
E: I—I—I was just... waiting for the bath to reach the right temperature. Yes, that's it! I was born with a naturally cold constitution and need the water to be warmer before I can get in.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，我看你身强体健，有没有兴趣来给我的发明当测试员啊？
E: {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, you look strong and healthy. Would you be interested in testing my invention?

C: 你跳了足足十米高！只是落地时刚好有个客人路过，你差点砸到他。
E: You jump a full ten meters high! But as you land, a guest happens to walk by, and you nearly crash into them.

C: 行吧…
E: Alright...

C: 我会飞，是因为我知道我能飞，而不是我相信我能飞。
E: I can fly because I know I can fly, not because I believe I can fly.

C: 放心吧，只要您予我信心便足矣，我会用自己的力量向奥赫玛证明。
E: Rest assured. As long as you grant me confidence, that is enough. I will use my own strength to prove myself to Okhema.

C: 你都创作过什么？
E: What have you created before?

C: 你若是想随便翻翻，二柜到四柜的哲史典籍会是个不错的选择。数算在七柜，故事诗章在十五柜。另外，年轻人可能会喜欢二十柜以后的故事书…
E: If you're just browsing, the philosophical and historical texts in cabinets two to four would be a good choice. For math and numerical works, try cabinet seven. The narrative poems are in cabinet fifteen. Additionally, young people might enjoy the storybooks in cabinets after twenty...

C: 最繁闹那阵，这书库甚至年年举办「觅宝活动」，自从黑潮的情况愈加严重之后，这传统就暂停了。等黄金裔大人完成神谕之后，说不定还能再办上几场。
E: During the busiest times, this repository even held an annual "Treasure Hunt" event. However, since the situation with the black tide has worsened, that tradition has been paused. Once the Chrysos Heir completes the prophecy, perhaps a few more events will be held again.

C: 严格来说，生命花园是个学术组织，负责研究生命相关的知识。这里的学者很多都在神悟树庭进修过，接受瑟希斯的智慧熏陶。
E: Strictly speaking, the Garden of Life is an academic organization charged with researching all aspects related to life. Most of the scholars here studied at the Grove of Epiphany, where they were influenced by Cerces' wisdom.

C: 嗯，没事的时候，也可以来花园里找奇美拉玩。相信你也会像我一样爱上它们的！
E: Sure thing, you can drop to play with the chimeras if you're free. You'll definitely fall in love with them like I have!

C: 从奇美拉自「生命树种」继承的性状来说，最值得一提的应该是菲莉丝兽、卡尼兽、还有地行龙了。你想听我说哪一种？
E: From the traits inherited by the chimera from the Seed of Life, what are most worthy of mention should be the Felys, the Canis, and the Terrazard. Which one do you wish to explore?

C: 确实…如果我能全身心地投入培育奇美拉的工作，可能就不会在这里伤感了。
E: That's true... If I can devote myself fully into chimera breeding work, I wouldn't be wallowing in sorrow here.

C: 很好，既然你如此有精神，待会儿再多加五组吧。
E: Very well! As you've got the energy to argue, finish another five sets!

C: 哈！你以为我是在偷懒吗？大错特错！我告诉你，浴池就是我最好的研究场所！
E: Ha! You think I'm slacking off? Huge mistake! Lemme tell you: The bath is the best research lab I can find!

C: 给我来点。
E: Gimme some.

C: 对了，你要是有什么想学的，可以随时来找我 ，我看看能不能帮你从万帷网上搞点「种子」下来。毕竟，知识就是力量。而我这儿，可是有最直接的力量来源呢！
E: Oh yeah, if you have anything you wish to learn, you can look for me anytime. I'll see if I can help you acquire some "seeds" from the World Wound Web. After all, knowledge is power. And I am your direct source to this power!

C: 音乐公司那边很看重她，说她这低沉的嗓音是什么「烟嗓」，是唱爵士的好苗子～虽然小女子还没听过这种风格的音乐，但还是由衷地为塔米拉小姐感到高兴。
E: The music company holds her in high regard, calling her deep voice a "smoky tone" that's perfect for jazz. I haven't experienced that style of music myself, but I'm genuinely thrilled for her success.

C: 呃，收费吗？
E: Uh, does it cost anything?

C: 不瞒您说，我在奥莱诺斯的老家一直都维持着坚定的信仰，对泰坦的捐赠额度也是全城数一数二。家人从小就教我祈祷的流程，希望我能为信仰献身。
E: In my hometown of Oleinus, I've always been deeply devoted to my faith. My contributions to the Titans are among the highest in the city. From a young age, my family taught me the sacred rituals of prayer, instilling in me a hope to one day dedicate my life fully to the faith.

C: 暂时没什么需求。
E: There isn't anything I want for now.

C: 记忆的残像沉默不语，因为这是不曾发生过的对话。
E: The shadow of the memory remains silent, for this conversation never truly occurred.

C: 但他的学说，却再度驳斥信仰，以自己的性命掀起了弑神的骇浪……
E: But his philosophy has once again refuted faith, and stirred up a torrent capable of slaying gods with his life...

C: 如今，它已然落败。但就像「钟表小子」系列动画中的鳄鱼老板那样，反派很难真正被杀死——它们总是会从不知哪个下水道里重新爬出来。
E: Now, it's been defeated. But like the Crocodile Boss in the "Clockie" series of cartoons, villains are hard to truly kill — they always seem to crawl back out of some unknown sewer.

C: 这些事情，我都没有做过。
E: I didn't do any of those things.

C: 记录员，你应该记些正事。
E: Archiver, maybe you should focus on more serious matters.

C: 先不聊了，我还有事。
E: Let's talk later. I've got things to do.

C: 哈哈，您真会开玩笑……
E: Haha, you've got a sense of humor...

C: 当然，我喜欢「随便聊聊」。关于故乡，关于戏剧，关于你我的当下，让我想到哪说到哪。
E: Of course, I enjoy casual conversations. Whether it's about homeland, theater, or the present moment, let's see where our thoughts take us.

C: 为了守护永夜之帷的神圣，我们长眠在了著名的奥莱诺斯平原上。
E: To preserve the sacredness of the Veil of Evernight, we slumber forever on the famed Oleinus Plains.

C: 是这样啊，你是刚到奥赫玛来的外邦遗民吧？这个时节，确实有很多人来寻求庇护。
E: I see... you must be a foreigner who's just arrived in Okhema, right? Many come seeking refuge.

C: 这里已经没有更多若虫了。你做到了应做的，英雄。
E: There are no more nymphs here. You've done what was needed, hero.

C: 一时灾难，互助为先！
E: In times of disaster, mutual aid comes first!

C: 没办法像之前那样招待您，请多多见谅。
E: I can't host you as I did before, please forgive me.

C: 只不过，现在末日降临，又多了不少想从圣城离开，去其他城邦避难的人。
E: But now that the apocalypse is coming, many more people want to leave here and seek shelter in other cities.

C: 坚持到「再创世」就好了…
E: We just need to hold out until "Era Nova"...

C: 哎，可没人清楚末日会以怎样的灾难袭来，该采用何种保存物件的对策，我也毫无头绪……
E: Ah, but no one knows what kind of disaster the end of the world will bring, or what methods we should use to save objects. I'm at a loss too...

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 你已经身负找寻一只若虫的使命了，先专心完成它吧。
E: You're already tasked with finding a nymph. Focus on completing that first.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon fades, only a piece of golden brocade remains floating in the air. The Garmentmaker waves a hand, and it splits in two, with one half flying into your grasp...

C: 嗨，见到你真高兴！是来找人家玩的吗？
E: Hi! I'm so happy to see you! Are you here to hang out with me?

C: 听老爹的话、好好练射箭、不许挑食、不许旷课、不许欺负莉维娅…还有什么遗漏的吗？
E: Listen to dad, practice archery, no picky eating, no skipping class, no bullying Livia... Did I miss anything?

C: 哈，瞧这话说的，他现在不也还没长大呢吗。不过…要说他小时候，和我家兔崽子其实还挺像的。
E: Haha, come on now. He's still pretty much a kid, isn't he? But yeah... when he was younger, he was a lot like my little rascal at home.

C: 这么说…倒确实想去看看了。
E: In that case... I've gotta see this myself.

C: 好想赶快长大啊…呜，哀丽秘榭的日子，为什么就不能过得更快些呢？
E: How I wish I could grow up faster... Why do the days in Aedes Elysiae have to go by so sloooow...

C: 那天我刚想用花瓣换颗刺刺球吃，结果一阵风吹来，把花瓣吹进了小溪。
E: That day, I was just about to trade a petal for a Quillorb, when a gust of wind blew it into the stream.

C: 一下子什么都拥有了，好空虚迷。该用它们去换什么呢？
E: In an instant, I had everything. And it felt so empty, memi. What should I spend it all on?

C: 找到我啦！你的目光果然锐利，可不可以再陪我玩一次嘤~
E: You found me! Eagle eyes indeed! Wanna play again, eep?

C: 我真希望自己有羽毛和翅膀，像麦垛上的布谷鸟一样……
E: I wish I had feathers and wings, like the cuckoo that perches on the haystack...

C: 好呀！人家也有想做的事，可以和你一起吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Great idea! I have something in mind too. Can I join you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 好呀！人家也有想做的事，可以和你一起吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Great idea! I have something in mind too. Can I join you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 拉比努斯先生谬赞了…而且，还没有完工呢，文中有许多疑似叙述者添油加醋的部分，还需要反复考证……
E: You flatter me, Mr. Labienus... it's not even finished yet. There are still many parts in the text that seem embellished by the narrator. I'll need to verify and cross-check them thoroughly...

C: 凯撒大人治好我的伤，并叫我率军，用计多次战胜了那不可一世的悬锋军。
E: The Great Imperator mended my wounds and instructed me to lead the army. Through tactics and strategies, the Imperator laid low the formidable forces of Kremnos many times.

C: 默默走开。
E: Silently leave.

C: 法吉娜在上，让本狮，用，用一个绝考考你，对蜜酿的掌握…程度，究竟如何吧！
E: By Phagousa, a—allow me to test you with a stumper. We shall see how well you know your... honey brews!

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 泰坦眷属的战争没有止息，集齐火种的时刻也还很遥远，而我们呢？每天就在铺子里打铁！说真的，我已经不知道这种一成不变的生活有什么意义了。
E: The Titankin's war never ceases to an end. The instant when all Coreflames are collected is still far away. And us? We're hammering iron all day at the smithy! Honestly, I have no idea what the whole point is of living this monotonous life.

C: 正因为我们是外来人，我才更要努力。我要加入卫队，保护这座庇护了我们的城市!
E: I have to work harder precisely because we're outsiders. I want to join the guard squad and protect our city that gives us shelter!

C: 当然是因为——只有强健的体魄，才能承载强韧的灵魂；只有强韧的灵魂，才能触及纯粹的真理！
E: It goes without saying, a powerful soul must be paired with a strong body, or it will never reach the pure truths!

C: 不要哭，没有高高的个子，像你这样，也可以做很多事。
E: Don't cry. Not tall, like you, can still do lots of things.

C: 各位虔诚的信徒们，现在我们看到的是泰坦火种的保存处。请勿大声喧哗，这里人多，注意别走散了！
E: Dear faithful followers, what we see here is the storage place for the Titan's Coreflame. Please don't speak loudly. It's crowded here, so be careful not to get lost!

C: 哈哈，我只是路过而已，怎么可能懂呢…不过没关系。来，发个红包给你，开心开心。老先生也有份哦~
E: Haha, I'm just passing by, how could I know... But no matter. Here, madam, have this. Just a little something to cheer you up. And sir, here's some for you.

C: 年轻人，想要占卜吗？
E: Youngster, would you like to know your fortune?

C: 咕咕——这群调皮孩子，一个个全跑没影了。
E: Hoot hoot... These playful children, they've all gone missing.

C: 老鸟会在这里守着回来的小鸟，寻找的事就拜托你了！事后老鸟必有重谢咕。
E: I will stay here and wait for the returning birds. I'm leaving the search to you! This old bird will surely repay you lavishly, hoot.

C: 耳边传来一阵啾啾喳喳的吵闹声，五个圆滚滚的身影扑哧着翅膀飞了过来。
E: A chatter of cacophony reaches your ears — five rotund figures fly over with their flappy wings.

C: 既然你能察觉到，那就最好不要来烦我。
E: I'm glad you noticed. Then leave me alone.

C: 是的，安提西尼是我的名字，现在正需要你的支持。
E: Yes, Antisthenes is my name, and I need your support right now.

C: 感谢命运指引我们再次相遇，可爱的{F#女士}{M#先生}~想再来听利波吟唱一曲吗？
E: Thank the fates for guiding us to meet again, my dear {F#lady}{M#sir}~ Would you like to hear another song from Lipos?

C: 教了你这么久，记住刻法勒的祭仪最重要的是什么了吗？
E: After teaching you for so long, do you remember what's most important about the Kephale ritual?

C: 谁让你记那些了？这傻小子…当然是要虔诚！虔诚知道吗！
E: Who told you to remember all that? You silly kid... What matters is piety! Piety, you hear me!?

C: 我呢我呢？我最喜欢盯着铁匠铺看，铁锤每次打在铁胚上，都能蹦出好几个火星子，可有意思了！
E: Me! Me! I love watching the blacksmith shop! Every time the hammer hits the iron, sparks fly everywhere. It's so much fun!

C: 感谢你们的好意，但我这幅身躯由笨重石料铸就，比起宴会，更适合在战场上起舞。
E: I'm grateful for the thought, but my stone-forged body was made to dance in battle, not during banquets.

C: 我看强词夺理的是你才对，若论起对神明的虔敬，你比这位塔兰顿祭司相差甚远！
E: Look who's talking about blasphemy! If the Titans measured faith now, you wouldn't even register next to this faithful priest of Talanton!

C: 还是别管这两人了。对了，{NICKNAME}，下个月我打算和尼科马库斯订婚，你要有时间的话，可以来参加宴会吗？
E: Let's just ignore those two. Oh right, {NICKNAME}, I'm planning to get engaged to Nicomachus next month. If you have time, would you like to come to the celebration?

C: 呜嗡。
E: Grumph.

C: …它还在继续翻译。
E: ...It's still translating.

C: 呜嗡。（后来我才知道，它逗我玩呢，那就是个模型。送你了，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。）
E: Grumph. (Turns out it was just pulling my tail. That "child" was only a toy! Now I'll give it to you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. It's yours now.)

C: o((★ω★- )o「泡泡可是有伙伴的，你们呢？」)∋
E: o((★ω★- )o "I have my partner here. Where's yours?" )∋

C: 别忘了我们啊，灰子！
E: Don't forget about us, Gray Mystery!

C: 怎么会！我也是看到你跟歌耳戈王后和欧利庞王站在一起，场面难得温馨，才不忍心过去打扰的。
E: Of course not! I saw you with Queen Gorgo and King Eurypon, and the scene was so heartwarming that I didn't want to disturb you.

C: 我很欣赏她的个性，总有人因凯撒的威严对我心生敬畏，事实上，君王诞生于臣民当中，也应永远与臣民同在。
E: I quite admire her personality. Many revere and fear my authority as the Imperator, but in truth, a monarch is born from her subjects and should always stand with them.

C: 好啦！我会为灰宝准备的，想要健康小提醒、心情晴雨单，还是手绘的小表情？都可以满足哦！
E: Okay! I'll make some just for you, Grayie. Would you like health reminders, daily mood trackers, or maybe some little hand-drawn emojis? I can make anything you want!

C: 多亏有我在场，不然真不敢想现场会是什么样，火药味总算没那么浓了，是吧？
E: Good thing I was there, I don't even want to imagine what would've happened otherwise. At least the tension's not as thick now, right?

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 虽然很乐意被你夸，但——还是别打趣啦！
E: While I appreciate the compliment, stop teasing me already!

C: 如今还有怅惘的回忆吗？
E: Do you still have any melancholic memories?

C: 呵呵，这只是一枚普通的大地兽蛋。
E: Hehe. It's just a regular dromas egg.

C: 不客气，下次去偷夜宵时，记得你来打头阵。
E: Don't mention it. Next time we raid for midnight snacks, you'll take the frontline.

C: 普通的命途行者可做不到这一点。
E: It wouldn't be possible with a normal Pathstrider.

C: 我可以把理解原理的事物「拟态」为现实，这个能力在工作的时候还挺好用的。至于黑洞…那说来话更长了。
E: I can mimic anything as long as I understand its principles, which is useful for work. As for black holes... that's an even longer story.

C: 瓦尔特的同伴…
E: About Welt's friends...

C: 该智慧生物被称为星神，祂拥有的能量被称为命途。星神可以任意地使用命途中的能量，同时也被牢牢束缚在命途之中。
E: These intelligent beings are called Aeons and the energy THEY possess is called Paths. Aeons are free to use THEIR Paths' energy however THEY please, but are also bound by it.

C: 我懂了，这是小屁孩儿的爽文。
E: I see. So it's a fairy tale for naughty kids.

C: 我想想…哦，对了，确实有件事想拜托你。
E: Let's see... oh, yes, there is indeed something that could use your help.

C: 你来了！这不，我刚想出来个好点子，你来试试难度如何？
E: There you are! Look, I just came up with a great design. Let's see how you find this one?

C: 你说说你，我这都给你讲了几遍了！怎么就学不会呢？
E: How many times do I have to tell you? What is it you don't get?

C: 你看到矿区中央那片大矿脉没？壮观吧！之前做勘测的蠢货怎么就没早点发现，没想到最值钱的玩意居然灯下黑啊……
E: Do you see that big vein in the middle of the mine? Absolutely stunning! Why didn't those useless surveyors find it earlier! To think that the most valuable prize was hiding in plain sight...

C: 滴答——算了，算了，还是先拿到今年的奖金再说吧。
E: Tick-tock... Forget it. I'll decide after receiving this year's bonus.

C: 对不起！我绝不会再说这种话了，我真滴答的是个滴答！
E: Sorry! I will never speak like that again, I really am a tick-ing tock!

C: 时间…报时？我连时间都看不清了，好像…好像有什么很重要的东西丢了…我感觉心里空荡荡的……
E: Time... Tell time? I can't even see the time clearly. It's like... it's like I lost something very important... My heart feels so empty...

C: …没想到你真的能修好我。虽然我无法理解这是怎么做到的，
E: ...I didn't expect you to be able to really fix me. Although I don't understand how it was done,

C: 十分感谢您…您放心，我会准备些微薄的谢礼回报您的。
E: Thank you so much... Don't worry, I'll have a few small tokens of appreciation for you.

C: 我想听重点…
E: I'd like to hear the main point...

C: {NICKNAME}，您还在空间站呀？
E: Are you still in the space station, {NICKNAME}?

C: 这真是…太厉害了，{NICKNAME}！有了您收集的这些数据，我肯定能交出超出预期的测试报告——世玲姐一定会对我刮目相看的！
E: That's... utterly incredible, {NICKNAME}! With your data, I'll definitely be able to submit a report that exceeds expectations. This'll make Miss Shiling sit up and take notice!

C: 是星穹列车？
E: The Astral Express?

C: 哦，毕竟我的工作性质比较特殊嘛，不是在机房做维护，就是在谁的办公室检查电脑，偶尔也会离开舱段干点室外活儿。
E: Oh, that's the special nature of my work. If I'm not maintaining machines in the terminal room, I'll be in someone's office checking up on their computer. Sometimes I have to leave the zone for other jobs, too.

C: 嗯…嗯嗯…《劳动者》——呵，看来这家伙又有进步了。
E: Mmm... Mmm-hmm... The Laborers — Ha, looks like he's improved.

C: 辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。这下这幅画就能用于展出了……
E: Good work, {NICKNAME}. Now it's ready to be displayed...

C: 我来帮忙修复文物。
E: I'm here to help restore some relics.

C: 哈哈，谢谢你，我就知道你肯定会帮忙的。
E: Haha, thanks for that. I knew you'd help out.

C: 我可以开始战斗表演了。
E: I'm ready to give a combat demonstration.

C: 哈哈，谢谢你！我会好好观摩的！
E: Haha, thank you! Allow me to observe!

C: 想请你复述一遍她的故事…
E: I would like you to repeat her story...

C: 据说，母亲大人与我一样，也是从贫瘠的地底被选拔来到上层区的。那时的她对一切充满好奇——尤其是在地底时见不到的鲜花。闲暇时，她总爱去花店。
E: It is said that my mother, like me, was also selected from the barren underground and brought to the Overworld. At that time, she was curious about everything, especially the flowers that she couldn't see in the Underworld. In her spare time, she would always go to the florist.

C: 在那之后，母亲大人踏上了执政生涯，并以她的人格魅力和政治手腕获得了全城人民支持。在她督办下，银鬃铁卫终于得以反攻裂界…尽管那代价过于惨重。
E: After that, mother embarked on her career in governance, and with her charismatic personality and political measures, gained the support of the entire city. Under her supervision, the Silvermane Guards were finally able to counterattack and reclaim the Fragmentum... though it comes at too high a cost.

C: 作品中的下层区似乎与你印象里的磐岩镇有所不同。难道地下还有白昼和黑夜的区别吗？
E: The Underworld in the piece seems to diverge from your memory of Boulder Town. Does the day-and-night cycle also exist in the underground?

C: 在贝洛伯格，你随处都能买到贴身的衣物。但再奢侈的衣物，都不如一件别人用它专门为你编织的心意昂贵。
E: In Belobog, you can always buy clothing that fits you anywhere, but not even the most extravagant clothing is comparable to a piece woven with the sewing machine specifically for you.

C: 闲暇之余说些八卦闲谈无伤大雅，但这里是工作场合，应当谈论的当然是工作中的正事。
E: It's fine to talk about these rumors during leisure time, but this is a workplace. All discussions should only be related to work.

C: 是呀，越是强势的人，这一面藏得就越好，我娘就是这样的。
E: Exactly. The stronger the person appears to be, the better they are in concealing their soft side. That's how my Ma is.

C: 附身是这么个特效吗？
E: Does possession produce that kind of visual special effects?

C: 拍的是阿兰
E: Just snapping a pic of you

C: 你准备掏出手机，给三月七发送今天的照片……
E: You get ready to pull out your phone and send today's photos to March 7th...

C: 你这么会吃，推荐推荐？
E: You're the tour guide. What do you recommend?

C: 那我推荐你去点一碗「热浮羊奶」，甜甜的，不腻口。喝下肚去还会觉得自己体重变轻了——当然，不能替代减肥餐。
E: Then I recommend trying a bowl of steamed puffergoat milk. It has a mild, sweet flavor and a smooth texture. People say they feel lighter after drinking it! Of course, it's no substitute for a balanced diet.

C: 其实我也面子薄。
E: Yeah, I would feel bad asking for more, too.

C: 苏打豆汁儿，仙舟老饕都说妙！
E: The foodies here all say it's a must-try!

C: 公司将这片码头的经营权转租给了你们商会，希望金人巷从此飞黄腾达…你看看，这么好的货运码头全给浪费了！
E: We leased this whole dock to your Merchant Guild hoping that it would rejuvenate Aurum Alley, and look at it now — a perfectly good freight dock has gone to waste!

C: 我看这也省不了多少…
E: I don't think that would save much...

C: 公司想把这里建设成大型物流中转仓，到时小吃铺、旧货商铺都得搬离这里……
E: The IPC wants to turn this place into a big logistics warehouse. By then, the food hawkers and used goods stores will have to move away...

C: {NICKNAME}真厉害！你让我想起刚到罗浮时认识的一个好姐妹，她也和你一样既有救人所急的热心肠，一样的心灵手巧，本事不小。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're the best! You remind me of the friend I made when I first arrived on the Luofu — she had the same eagerness for saving people, and the same tenacity for solving problems.

C: 今天我不代表公司，我只是个金人巷的游客，你可以叫我斯科特。
E: I'm not here today as a representative of the IPC, I'm just a tourist. You can just call me Skott.

C: 会长自有手段。
E: The president has their ways.

C: 码头的租金也已经备妥了，你要是准备好接下来的谈判，就来码头上找我吧。
E: The payment for the dock is ready now. If you're ready for the next round of negotiations, come and see me at the dock.

C: 接下来，商会一方提出，斯科特代表一直在暗中破坏码头经营活动，对此你有什么要解释的吗？
E: Next order of business — the Merchant Guild has accused Representative Skott of secretly sabotaging dock operations. Do you have anything to say about that?

C: 公司特地将经营权租让给金人巷商会，就是为了谋求共同发展。
E: The IPC specially leased operations of the dock to Aurum Alley Merchant Guild in the hopes of seeking common interest and development.

C: 商会承诺，我们不会辜负大家的期待，会将这笔钱用在该用的地方。
E: The Merchant Guild promises that we will use the money where it is meant to be spent — no disappointments!

C: 我赞同会长维护传统。
E: I agree with the president in upholding tradition.

C: 他们老一辈匠人都是这样油盐不进…对了，这样吧，你们可以来家父的店铺做学徒。
E: The older generation of craftsmen can be rather set in their ways... Here, how about this — why not join my father's shop as apprentices?

C: 来来，{NICKNAME}，这边！这儿还有个玉兆你可以试试。
E: Over here, {NICKNAME}! See what you can do with this jade abacus.

C: 你是懂行的人。
E: Glad you think so.

C: 这份数据记录了同功坊与码头合作以来的营收变化，以及到店游客数量的变化。
E: This record reflects the change in Artistry Hardware's turnover and the increase in customers since it partnered with the dock.

C: 你先别急！
E: Hurry up pleaaaase!

C: 在金人巷，我驯服了人类。
E: Aurum Alley — where I tamed humanity.

C: 这句话真是太万能了。
E: One slogan to end them all.

C: 接下来应该会有一场恶战。
E: She's not making it easy for us.

C: 「罗浮第一夜市」？在公司注资后，仙舟罗浮上处处都会建起新的商业中心，人们为什么会专程来到你的金人巷呢？他们早就不在意谁才是「第一夜市」了。
E: "Best night market on the Luofu"? With the IPC's funding pouring in, hundreds of commercial centers will sprout. Why would people come to Aurum Alley when they have so many other options? Nobody cares about that title anymore.

C: 我们想要选择「最金人巷」的未来。
E: Our approach protects the people who made the Alley what it is today.

C: 经历会改变一个人。
E: We change as we live.

C: 你太客气了。
E: That's too kind of you.

C: 没错，你太客气了。
E: Yeah, all in a day's work.

C: 你们要检查货物，我们当然就把货箱拆了，不然，你要自己拆吗？
E: If goods need to be inspected, we remove the packaging ahead of time — you wouldn't want to do all that work yourself, would you?

C: 谁不知道他们想要利用码头债务，让商会彻底失去信誉嘛。商会雇佣了我，又不是公司雇佣了我，我不可能支持公司的。
E: Everyone knows the IPC wants to use the dock debt to discredit the Merchant Guild. The Merchant Guild are the ones who gave me a job, not the IPC — why would I side with them?

C: 现在罗浮处处都查得严，我这不是不方便嘛…但是呢，我有个客人急需一批药材，朋友，咱这码头物流是不是能帮个忙？
E: The authorities are cracking down everywhere on the Luofu. It's a real pain... But you know, I have a customer who urgently needs some of my medicine. My friend, can you help me out with the dockside logistics here?

C: 你真的觉得有问题，就不是我来找你了。
E: You really think I'm suspicious? If that's so, I would not have come here looking for you.

C: 可以雇点水军刷好评。
E: Ever thought about using bots to get good reviews?

C: 你怕不是特地来消遣洒家？
E: Are you a professional time-waster?

C: 啊…这个有些陈旧了，这是我为了自己方便而整理的笔记。但是随着化外民大量涌入，各种我没见过的病症也在不断增加。
E: Hmm... This one's rather old. Some notes I put together for myself. But with the recent massive influx of Outworlders, I'm seeing outbreaks of all kinds of things that I haven't seen before.

C: 对了，刚才小天已经同意与码头建立合作了。事不宜迟，{NICKNAME}，咱们现在就把「寿考堂」纳入到物流规划里吧，这样码头上就会有新的运单了。
E: Little Tian just agreed to collaborate with the docks. {NICKNAME}, please add Longevity Hall into the logistics plan. This way, the docks can get some new orders soon.

C: 呃呃呃…可恶的家伙……
E: Ughhhh... this guy...

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 没错，这又如何？
E: We did. So what?

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: <color=#dbc291ff>（我们可以用什么证明？）</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>(Do we have any proof?)</color>

C: 一旦装完，我就能更好地完成递送工作，让我为鹤运物流的工作效率提升百分之二十二之多。
E: Now that I'm updated, I can complete deliveries better bringing Heron Express over <unbreak>22%</unbreak> higher productivity.

C: 此后肯定还会有更多的商户想要与我们建立更加深厚的合作关系，也都麻烦你多注意了。
E: I'm sure there will be even more merchants who want to get in on a deeper business relationship with us, so please keep a lookout for them.

C: 后勤部的同事说您还没有领商会福利，千万别忘记了。
E: Workers from the Logistics Department said that you haven't claimed your Merchant Guild benefits yet. Please don't forget to claim them.

C: 这只机巧鸟有点小聪明，<color=#dbc291ff>发现有人来抓它就会装模作样地宣称是找错鸟了</color>。但它嘴巴很碎，<color=#dbc291ff>老喜欢缠着人讲些自己胡诌的见闻</color>，这一点倒是蛮好辨认的。
E: That cycrane is a cunning one. <color=#dbc291ff>If it sees someone coming to catch it, it will assert that you've found the wrong cycrane</color>. But the thing about this cycrane is that it's a chatterbox and always <color=#dbc291ff>pesters people with its made-up stories</color>. That's its signature characteristic.

C: 好了好了，老哥你能不能别再重复你的开头了，直接说后续行吗？
E: Come on, mate. Can you just skip the preamble and tell us what happened next?

C: 但…这东西做出来太久了，我也没办法确定它是用来追踪哪种波长的…所以需要有个人帮我去考察验证下。
E: But... this thing has been in use for so long, I can't determine what wavelength it is detecting... So I need someone to help me ascertain.

C: 又加钱？！加加加，前提是你得出意外。
E: Again!? Fine, I'll agree to it, but you have to get the job done.

C: 黑暗之中容易暗藏幽灵，而有的时候，自己也可以是幽灵本身。
E: In the shadows, spirits hide. Sometimes, you can be the spirit yourself.

C: 重重的一脚踢踹在坚硬而又冰冷的地髓表面。
E: A heavy kick lands on the cold, hard surface of the geomarrow ore.

C: 没听过——哈欠！
E: I've never heard of it... *yawn*

C: 我一个人吃整份！
E: I can finish the whole serving by myself!

C: 嘿，醒醒，别发呆了。
E: Hey, you need to snap out of it.

C: 又一批苏乐达被大规模破坏后，囚犯们的怒火爆发了。
E: After another batch of SoulGlad is destroyed, the inmates see red.

C: 灯光亮起，所有设备都已宣誓效忠。人们高举苏乐达庆祝，金色的糖浆如雨而下。
E: The lights come on, with all the equipment pledging their allegiance. Everyone raises bottles of SoulGlad in celebration while the golden syrup rains down from above.

C: 你明白，必须有人站出来拯救大家。成为英雄的时候到了。
E: You realize that someone has to step up and save everyone. It is time to become a hero.

C: 滴答，谢谢宾客的帮忙！
E: Tick-tock, thank you for your assistance!

C: 全靠您了，{F#小姐}{M#先生}…我有预感，我们离真相非常接近了。
E: I'm counting on you, {F#miss}{M#mister}... I have a hunch that we're getting really close to the truth.

C: 嘶～这身腱子肉我没有训练过～我们家天生就这样～怎么～你不相信吗？
E: Grrr... I don't have to go to the gym for this body! We're all born this way! You don't believe me?

C: 这片组合屏幕可真够大的…你有点看不懂这究竟是什么图案。
E: This is a massive spliced screen... There is a pattern on it that you don't recognize.

C: （咦，怎么好像听到有打架的声音……）
E: (Eh? Why is there a commotion...)

C: 你还想再被教训一顿？
E: You want me to teach you another lesson?

C: 那是很重要的东西吗？
E: Was the radio important to you?

C: 汪汪！！玩得好开心！怎么突然就消失不见了哇！！
E: Woof, woof! That was fun! Where'd you go all of a sudden!?

C: 唉，我们终将抵达命定的终点。
E: *sigh* We all meet our destined end someday.

C: 在我看来，你们已经是和我完全相同的生命了。我会永远陪着你们，直到梦境彻底崩塌。
E: In my eyes, you're no different from me. I'll stay with you forever until the Dreamscape collapses completely.

C: 我去过非常寒冷的地方。
E: I've been to some extremely cold places.

C: 欸，我还以为已经很有意思了。
E: Eh, and here I thought it was already pretty interesting.

C: 哦，列车的储物室还蛮大的。
E: Oh, the storage room on the Express is pretty big.

C: 从现在的视角来看，并没有。
E: In our current perspective? No.

C: 咳咳，该进入正题了。
E: Ahem, it's time to get to the main point.

C: 有人来寻宝吗…
E: Any treasure hunters here...?

C: 谁叫我？我来了！
E: Who called upon me? I have arrived!

C: 没错，梦境动画的后期制作并不困难，不需要高超的技术，我们缺少的是一个了解「钟表匠」、并能得到他的认可的导演——毕竟这是属于「钟表匠」的故事。
E: That's right! The post-production of Dreamscape animations isn't too difficult and doesn't require advanced skills. We only need a director who knows the Watchmaker well and whose ability is recognized by him. After all, this is his story.

C: 现在宇宙中的动画技术越来越高超，画面也越来越精细。但那些作品还是无法在梦中打败手工绘制的《钟表小子》，这也是我们剧组的骄傲！
E: As animation technology in the universe continues to advance, the graphics of films nowadays become increasingly sophisticated. Still, none of those works can rival the hand-drawn Clockie in Penacony. We're proud of that!

C: 或许真的有呢？
E: Maybe there really is a secret treasure?

C: 米莫萨面露怒意，攥紧了双拳，死死盯着柜中的胶卷。
E: Looking livid, Mimosa clenches her fists tightly and fixes her unflinching gaze on the film reel in the cabinet.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 大导演，我现在就是你的影迷了，以后多整点爱你片子吧！
E: Oh, my great director, I'm now a fan of yers. Please make more fudgin' awesome films like this one!

C: 发出一个帅气的*哼*。
E: Let out a cool grunt.

C: 咦？你是…哈努兄弟！
E: Eh? You are... Brother Hanu?

C: 车靠贴膜人靠装，厄皮洛斯购物爽~
E: Wrap up your ride, dress up your style — Shop at Epirus!

C: 毕竟有许多动作元素，不过对您来说肯定是小菜一碟。
E: It did have lots of action-heavy elements, didn't it? Must've been no big deal to you though.

C: 没问题！
E: No problem!

C: 这个好玩，但一个长着小胡子冒气泡的瓶子真的能当偶像吗……
E: This is fun, but can a bottle with a mustache that blows bubbles really be an idol...

C: 哎呀，急急急急急！急死了！别吵我！
E: Ahhh, move! Move move move! This is urgent! Be quiet!

C: 影城的新生时刻！
E: The theme park's moment of rebirth!

C: 但请相信我，报酬绝对令你满意。
E: But trust me — you're going to be happy with the rewards.

C: 游戏要去哪玩？
E: Where do I play the game?

C: 我想想…宣传词应该是这么说的……
E: Let's see... How did we put it in the tagline...

C: 记忆？你在说什么呢？现在可不是回忆过去的时候！
E: Memory? What do you mean? Now is not the time to reminisce about the past!

C: 太棒了！两位的台词功底真是无比深厚！不过，台词并非表演的全部，请在第二个舞台继续这个故事吧……
E: Fantastic! Both of you have an incredibly solid foundation in dialogue delivery! However, lines aren't everything in a performance. Please continue this story on the second stage...

C: 「其实，剧情要求你提供帮助。」——你很想对筑梦绅士这么说，但根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: "Actually, the plot dictates that you directly provide aid to us." - You really want to say this to the Dreamweaver Gentleman, but given your character's design, you can only respond with a cool *hmph*.

C: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。这可能是有史以来最酷的*哼*了。
E: You let out a cool *hmph*. It might just be the coolest hmph in history.

C: 「万物将以毁灭之名重新苏生，于终末之际、于终末之崖……」
E: "Everything shall be reborn in the name of Destruction... at the moment of Finality and atop Finality's cliff..."

C: 有些问题想问你…
E: I've got a few questions I'd like to ask you...

C: 但我仍对它的未来抱有着类似有机生命「期盼」的态度，因为我能从中感受到美妙的存在。
E: Nonetheless, I still possess an attitude similar to the organic beings' concept of "hope" for its future, as I have sensed remarkable entities within it.

C: 你同样可以依照自己的意志，决定它们的展示位置。
E: You agree to decide their display placement as you deem fit.

C: 总之，你要想当着我的面欺负小老板娘，最好问问我手里的家伙答不答应！
E: Anyway, if you're trying to bully this young lady, you'd better watch out for the weapon in my hand!

C: 我也没有自信到那种程度…谢谢您捧场了。
E: I'm not that confident... but thank you for believing in me.

C: 被你发现了。
E: Oh, you got me.

C: 虽然你说的挺有道理的，但这可不是糊弄我的时候，快夸夸我。
E: I get your point, but this isn't the time for deflections — quickly, say something nice about me!

C: 公司机甲，猪头才要——
E: IPC mechs are a total joke...!

C: 你要是能少创造一些这类耳目一新的词语就好了。
E: It'd be great if you could stop coming up with such fresh new terms.

C: 不过，老子听说忆庭使者有着比咱们岁阳更加柔和、更加安全的手段，将原本不存在的「剑法记忆」塞入脑海中…如果是这样，你还会拒绝吗？
E: Though I've heard of a much milder and safer method that the Garden's messengers have, that can shove non-existent swordplay memories into your mind... In that case, would you still refuse?

C: 嗯嗯，谢谢藿藿，谢谢尾巴大爷。
E: Sure, thanks Huohuo and Mr. Tail!

C: 我真为你感到骄傲！
E: I'm so proud of you!

C: 对不起，打扰了，我这就离开。
E: I'm sorry. I'll be on my way.

C: 我倒是有说服斯科特的经验…
E: Well, I know a thing or two about convincing Skott...

C: 那里围着好多人呀，难道发生什么事了吗？
E: What's with all the people gathered around? What happened?

C: …那么灵砂大人，「赤龙」在哪里呢？
E: ...Soooo, where is this Crimson Dragon, Master Lingsha?

C: 椒丘当着你们的面，将瓶中的「赤龙血」一饮而尽。
E: Jiaoqiu drinks the Crimson Dragon Blood in one swig in front of both of you.

C: 换句话说，它的原型出现了类似异形以太灵的「机械灵魂」，足以让以太战线的系统判定出现偏差…于是我问了问见多识广的公输师傅，现在就是来谈这件事的。
E: In other words, this rare spirit appears to be a Mechanical Soul with an Aberrant Aether Spirit, causing deviation in the Aetherium Wars' system judgment... So I consulted Master Gongshu, who is more experienced and knowledgeable. Now we're here to discuss this matter.

C: 现在该怎么办呢？
E: What should I do now?

C: 禁书改变了！青雀的诡辩成功了！剑魔…不对，那位平凡人想要的就是这样的结局。
E: The forbidden text changed! Qingque's convoluted theory was a success! That's exactly the ending that the Blade Demon... No, I mean the regular mortal wanted.

C: 你搜集这些离散忆质干嘛？
E: Why are you collecting all this scattered memoria?

C: 可是…如果你拒绝，你知道你的朋友们会发生什么吗……
E: But... If you refuse, do you know what will happen to your friends...?

C: 所以…我第一场比赛对手的教练，要在赛场上给我指导战术？我还是对仙舟人的热情难以置信。
E: So... the coach of my opponent for my first match, is going to give me tactical advice in the ring? I am bewildered by the Xianzhou people's hospitality.

C: 卢卡，准备好出战了吗？
E: Luka, are you ready to fight?

C: 我们「寻圈」每个人都认识你！
E: Every "Pathfinder" fan knows you!

C: {NICKNAME}，你得跟我玩一局「寻径指津」！不然我是不会让你带走青总的！
E: {NICKNAME}, you have to play a round of "Pathfinder" with me, or I won't let you take President Qing away!

C: 真不愧是传说中的{NICKNAME}！竟然这么快就解开了我留下的谜题！
E: They don't call you a legend for nothing, {NICKNAME}! You solved my riddle in a flash!

C: 刚才在丹鼎司就应该给你也开点药。
E: Looks like the Alchemy Commission should've given you a prescription as well.

C: 兄弟，你还没告诉我你的名字呢？
E: My friend, you haven't told me your name.

C: 你误会了，卢卡，这不是「施舍」。这场胜利是我借给你的，你要用演武仪典上的胜利来还给我。
E: You are mistaken, Luka. It's not pity. I am lending you this victory, and you will repay me by winning the Wardance.

C: *欢呼声*
E: Luka! Luka! Belobog! Belobog!

C: 波提欧先生，我不知道你与公司之间有什么恩怨…但我觉得我们没什么不同，不都是想要全银河的瞩目嘛！
E: Mr. Boothill, I don't know what kind of grudge you hold against the IPC... But I don't think we're too different. We both want the whole cosmos' eyes on us!

C: 嗯，谢谢你们，我绝对不会再打退堂鼓了。
E: Yes, thank you, all of you. I'll never back down from a fight ever again.

C: 嗯…那就拜托你啦！
E: Good... I'm counting on you then!

C: 对我有点信心嘛！况且就算输，我也要输得风风光光，绝不会像上次那样两腿发软被你们抬回来了！
E: Have some faith in me, please! Even if I lose, I'll go down with dignity. You guys won't have to carry me home like last time because my legs turned into jelly!

C: 银枝，果然是你。
E: As expected, it is you, Argenti.

C: 无妨，请记住一件事：你已是战斗之美的化身。事实如此，无论胜负成败，抑或人言毁铄，都不能将之化为无形。
E: No matter. Just remember one thing: You're already the embodiment of the beauty of battle, which is a fact. Regardless of winning and losing, or what others may say, it can't be taken away from you.

C: 青雀小姐又修复出其他记录了？
E: Miss Qingque has restored more parts of the record?

C: 哈哈，不要拷打卡美丽小姐了！还是看看我接下来的对手吧！
E: Haha, cut Miss Carmella some slack! Let's turn our attention to my next opponent!

C: …是波提欧挑战彦卿！
E: ...Between Boothill and Yanqing!

C: （喔～这样一来，我是不是也算半只脚踏入「强者」的领域了呢？）
E: (Oh~ does this mean I've got one foot in the realm of the "strong" now?)

C: 不过孩子，我要提醒你，仙舟人的比武可不只是普通的赛博拳击。
E: However, my child, I must remind you that the Xianzhou martial contests are much more than simple cyber boxing.

C: 时候不早了，奢摩小姐，擂台上见吧！祝你能赢过我！
E: It's getting late, Miss Samatha. I'll see you in the arena! I hope you can defeat me!

C: 提问：有机生命，为何没有将我销毁？歼灭已经失败，基于逻辑，你们会销毁我，这是最优解。
E: Question: Organic life, why did you not destroy me? The annihilation has failed. According to logic, you will destroy me. That is the most optimal solution.

C: 对驮那的死，我感受到无限近似于有机生命概念中的「愤怒」。反有机方程活跃起来，捕捉了我的负反馈，放大，输出结论——
E: Regarding Dhyana's death, I feel something that's infinitely close to a concept that organic life holds — rage. There was activity in the Anti-Organic Equation, and it captured my negative feedback, amplified it, and arrived at a conclusion...

C: 罪业？说得你好像见过这个叫罪业的玩意儿，它几斤几两，长什么样啊？拿出来给我开开眼呗！
E: Sin? As if you've seen actual sin. How much does it weigh? What does it look like? Take it out and enlighten us then!

C: 就像善逝先生说的，哪怕最后没有接受请愿，也不该剥夺他们表达的权力。
E: Just like Mr. Sugata said, even if the petition is ultimately rejected, they should not be denied the right to express themselves.

C: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
E: All right. That's it for your questions.

C: 在选手休息室，也算是共处一室，你们还有没有底线了？
E: Insinuating the lounge like it was a bedroom, have you no morals?

C: 看起来大局已定～那么我宣布，本场比赛的胜利者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: Looks like the outcome is clear! Then allow me to declare, the winner of this match is Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 不过请大家放心，我们一定会尽力重返赛场。
E: But everyone shouldn't worry. We will do our best to return to the ring.

C: （质疑卢卡的影响力）
E: (Question Luka's popularity)

C: 我反复观看了比赛回放，有一个惊人发现——卢卡选手在面对枪口时，并没有采用常规的快速躲闪方式应对，而是一动不动地站在原地。
E: I watched the match replay back to back multiple times, and made an astounding discovery — when Luka was facing the gun chamber, he didn't employ any common tactics to quickly dodge away, but stood rooted on the spot.

C: {NICKNAME}教练，我是仙舟精武新闻网特邀记者桂乃芬。
E: Coach {NICKNAME}, I'm Guinaifen, special correspondent from the Xianzhou Martial Elite Network.

C: 需要考察企业的实力…
E: We need to assess the companies' capacities...

C: 尽管史瓦罗选手给我们晋级之路造成了很大的麻烦，但不得不承认他实力强大，是值得尊敬的对手。
E: Even though Svarog gave us a hard time on our path to advancement, we have to admit that he is formidable in strength and is a respectable opponent.

C: 去找组委会评理啊！
E: Go complain to the committee then!

C: 休赛期结束啦，卢卡选手，做好继续比赛的准备了吗？
E: The break is over. Contestant Luka, are you ready to keep competing?

C: 永不言败的卢卡选手！继续战斗！
E: The indomitable Luka never gives up! The fight continues!

C: 能击倒卢卡的员工！我会在绩效总评中给你打高分！
E: Those who can knock down Luka! I'll be sure to give you an excellent score in your performance evaluation!

C: 抱歉，但看来属于你的比赛，就要到此结束了。
E: Apologies, but it looks like this match that should've been yours will end here.

C: 唉…我也想好好来一次教学，但是教学太浪费字数了，我们的预算不太付得起服务器运营费。
E: *sigh* ...I'd like to provide a proper tutorial too, but it expends too many words. Our budget can't afford the server costs.

C: 你们不要玩尬的了。我真的有点脚趾扣地。
E: You need to stop with the awkward lines. It's making me cringe.

C: {NICKNAME}大人，要不我现在就给您开通困难模式的权限？
E: {NICKNAME}, would you like me to activate Hard mode for you now?

C: 两个选手怎么了？你觉得一般玩家有资格做我的亚军吗？自信点。
E: So what if there are only two contenders? Do you think any average player is qualified to be my runner-up? Be more confident!

C: 好啊。到时再让你看看，谁才是真正的益智小游戏之神！
E: Sure. I'll show you who's the real god of puzzle games.

C: 既然在下接过了忍首职责，就必然会将诸位训练成无愧于「缭乱流」之名的杰出忍者！
E: Since I have undertaken the duty of Chief Ninja, I must train everyone into exemplar ninja worthy of the name of the Dazzling School!

C: 不瞒你们，我早就听说乱破大人将在乐队中担任C位，于是自告奋勇接下了中央舞台的布置工作。有什么想知道的，尽管问我就好！
E: To be honest, I'd already heard that Lady Rappa would be leading the band, so I volunteered to accept the setup for the central stage. Just ask me if you wanna know anything!

C: 哟，缭乱•忍侠！
E: Yo, Dazzling Ninja Hero!

C: 关于新的乐曲…
E: About the new tune...

C: 关于乐队的评价…
E: The band's reviews...

C: 对了，有几只跟我学习的折纸小鸟在前面的小屋子里排练呢，如果你有空就去帮帮他们吧。
E: Oh yes, some origami birds that I teach are practicing in the hut up ahead. Please help them out if you have time.

C: 汪汪汪…汪汪！
E: Woof woof... woof woof!

C: 不是，你来真的啊？
E: Wait, you were serious?

C: 早说嘛，等会就把你们拉进游戏群！大家现在每个晚上都在打铁，有什么经验或者有用的攻略也会在群里交流，对你们这样的新人最有用了！
E: You should've said so! I'll pull you guys into a game group later on! Everyone's been working on their timing every night now. They share their experiences and strategies in the chat as well. These guides are just what newbies like you need to get started!

C: 交给我吧！
E: Leave it to me!

C: 我就不该问你们。无论如何，距离首场演出没多少时间，先完成学院的任务再说吧。
E: I never should've asked you all. There's not much time left before the first show. We'll talk about this after finishing the school's task.

C: 说什么修行，明明你才是最需要练习的那个吧！
E: What do you mean by training? You're the one that needs the most practice!

C: 乱破同学的理念是正确的——旋律是大家对世界的记录，而合奏更是需要所有人齐心协力，绝不是单凭某个人就能凭空完成。
E: Rappa's philosophy is correct... A melody is a record of everyone's view of the world. A chord, moreover, requires people to be united as one. This is not something anyone achieves by their lonesome.

C: 完了！要被学校开除了！我还从来没见过代表这么严肃的样子，该怎么办啊！
E: Ahh! We're going to get expelled by the school! I've never seen the rep get so serious before. What do we do now!

C: 听学院代表的意思，折纸大学似乎对我们的演出很不满，打算更换乐队。可是，从现场的反响来看…大家明明很喜欢才对啊？
E: What the academy's rep is insinuating is that Paperfold University is seemingly dissatisfied with our performance, and intends to change a band. But from the crowd's reaction... I think it's quite obvious everyone loved it?

C: 这…反正都是死路一条，不如临走前闹个大的。我契波大人就和财富学院拼了！
E: Err... It's game over for us either way, so I wouldn't mind going out with a bang. I, Lord Czipo, will duke it out with Fortune Academy!

C: 哎呀呀，今儿可真不巧，咱们乐队有两位成员呢，诶，都有事来不了。
E: Ahaha, how unfortunate! Two of our band members couldn't make it due to personal reasons.

C: 世事如银河忍法般多变，许多意外在下始料未及，耽误了诸位时间。实在抱歉。
E: Life is as unpredictable as Cosmic Ninjutsu. Many unforeseen circumstances have caught me off guard, causing delays for everyone. I apologize.

C: 这不是我们的经理嘛！来，你也玩玩。几个苏乐达瓶不知道怎么回事，总在喷汽水。
E: If it isn't our manager! Come play a round too. No idea what's up with these SoulGlad bottles, apart from the fact that they're spraying soda all the time.

C: 想证明你很强，就在这场竞赛中堂堂正正击败我们吧！
E: If you want to prove you're stronger, defeat us fair and square in this competition!

C: 经理…您是能和这些小动物沟通吗？可以的话，请帮帮这个受排挤的孩子吧。
E: Manager... Can you communicate with these animals? If you can, please help that ostracized child.

C: 顺便为你们欢呼鼓掌！
E: And also to cheer you on!

C: 这可不是我编的，不知你听没听过一个故事：世界尽头有座酒馆，里面啥人都有，甭管什么来头，只要能提供乐子，就能坐下来喝杯酒。
E: I'm not making this up. I don't know if you've heard of this tale: There is a tavern at the end of the world that contains people from all walks of life. No matter who they are, all are welcome for a drink as long as they can provide entertainment.

C: 哼着一首奇怪的小曲，桑博的背影渐渐离你远去。
E: Humming a strange tune, Sampo's silhouette slowly fades away in the distance.

C: 在洗漱池上。
E: On the bathroom sink.

C: 瓦尔特先生，你的动画把孩子们教育成泯灭帮了。
E: Mr. Yang, your animations are turning the kids into the Annihilation Gang.

C: 话说回来，你们有没有觉得那个金色头发的角色，说话的声音和「闭嘴」一模一样……
E: That being said, do you guys feel like that blond character's voice sounds exactly like Shush's...?

C: 让我挑一首适合咖啡时光的音乐…就这首吧，《尘世乐园》。
E: I'll choose some music that fits the ambience of a coffee break... This will do, This Side of Paradise.

C: 可是我排查后，却并没有在系统中发现病毒植入的痕迹。莫非是索引系统本身的问题？不应该啊……
E: But after some troubleshooting, I didn't notice any traces of a virus being implanted in the system. Could the problem lie in the index system itself? It shouldn't...

C: 难道空间站的科员用的都是这套系统吗？
E: Could the space station researchers all be using this system as well?

C: 尊敬的星穹列车，你们竟然企图购买仿冒的星际和平公司货物！这是违法行为！
E: Esteemed Astral Express, how dare you attempt to purchase counterfeit IPC goods! This is a crime!

C: 睡前不该打游戏的！我现在心还在怦怦跳呢。
E: You shouldn't play games before bedtime! My heart's still beating fast right now.

C: 你们这是不打算睡觉了？也罢…走吧。
E: Do you two not intend to sleep? Fine... Let's go.

C: 举起来摇摇看。
E: Pick it up and shake it.

C: 你估摸了一下羽毛的高度…要堂堂无名客跳起来，也太不优雅了。
E: You gauge the height of the feathers... It would be unbecoming of a dignified Nameless to jump up.

C: 等等…难道你们是要拍我这位「盛会巨鹰」啾？记得把我拍得帅一些啾！
E: Hang on... Did you want to take a photo of this Festive Superhawk, tweet? Take a suaver shot of me!

C: 嗯…有一种展望未来，充满希望的感觉。
E: Hmm... It evokes a feeling full of hope for the future.

C: 脆脆的冰糖外壳包裹着香甜的琼实鸟果实，可不是让人甘之如饴嘛。
E: Sweet berrypheasant fruit wrapped in a crispy rock candy shell — isn't that something that can be savored?

C: 我们一定照办…各位还有什么要求吗？
E: We will do as we're told... Do you have any other requests?

C: 好浮夸的演技！
E: Overacting much!

C: 就在前边的沙发上！
E: On the sofa, up ahead!

C: 好记仇啊…
E: So petty...

C: 这也太逼真了吧！简直毫无修图痕迹。
E: Gosh, this is so real! No traces of any edits at all.

C: 我已经完全理解了，原来大家都喜欢奇怪的照片。明天我也要用这个镜头！
E: I totally get it now, though — everyone loves weird photos. I want to keep using this lens tomorrow!

C: 为什么只有我们家知更鸟没有板凳坐？节目组排挤得太明目张胆了！
E: Why is our Robin the only one without a bench to sit on? The show crew is so brazenly snubbing her!

C: 哇呀呀呀——我…我…我再也忍不了啦！
E: Waahhhh I... I... I can't take this anymore!

C: 小丫头竟然学会摆谱了，看来这一趟还真学到了点东西呢。
E: This little scamp has actually learned to put on airs. At least this wasn't a wasted trip.

C: 本大爷先行一步了，你们速速跟上！
E: I'll take the front. You guys keep up!

C: 哼哼，本姑娘为人处世本来就八面玲珑，滴水不漏！
E: Heh-heh, I've always had a knack for squashing beef without fail!

C: 你想起了托帕、砂金和翡翠，随即拨通了通讯…智械助手冰冷的声音礼貌地提醒你，对方「正在会议中」。
E: You recall Topaz, Aventurine, and Jade, and you give them a ring... An Intellitron assistant's emotionless robotic voice politely reminds you that they are "in a meeting."

C: 那就敬请指点——这群毫无用处的奇美拉，到底该怎么管教？
E: Then please enlighten me: How would I discipline this group of utterly useless chimeras?
