E: Bah... fine. I concede this round to you. But don't get all smug just yet.

C: ——提前完成！好棒！灰宝，还有小奇美拉们都很厉害！
E: ...Completed ahead of time! Well done! Grayie and the chimeras are wonderful!

C: 要不是这群东西的工作效率太低，我会输吗？是花园分配的奇美拉有问题好吧！
E: If not for the atrocious work efficiency of this lot, you think I would've lost? This is the Garden's problem with how they assign chimeras!

C: 说的也是。这次多亏了你帮忙啦。有了领队后，小奇美拉工作时的状态都完全不一样了。
E: You're right. Your help has been much appreciated this time. The chimeras' work mentality has been a complete about-turn with a leader guiding them.

C: 轻轻松松~距离最终期限还有好多时间，灰宝带着小奇美拉去尽情放松下吧！
E: Easy breezy! There's still plenty of time before the deadline. Grayie, you should take the chimeras out to relax for a bit!

C: …究竟会是谁呢？
E: ...Who could it be exactly?

C: 不就是鬼？
E: Isn't that just a ghost?

C: 但功夫不负有心人，我终归还是等到了可以托付的继承者。

C: 以这些方程式为基础，诸多看似紊乱不堪的事物，都能在差分宇宙中，以相对简洁的方式得到描述，展现出背后的联系。
E: With these equations as the foundation, many seemingly chaotic phenomena will be described relatively simplistically in the Divergent Universe, and their underlying connections revealed.

C: 我们跳过介绍环节，比赛立刻开始！

E: Before we begin, we owe everyone an apology—

C: 回到昏光庭院后，我本以为我的好心就到这里了…但是普赫斯抓住我的手，非要将那只绷带海豹托付给我，如果我不参赛，他就拒绝治疗——
E: Back at the Twilight Courtyard, I thought I was finished helping him... but he clutched my hand and demanded I take his Bandaged Seal. He wouldn't accept treatment unless I competed—

C: {NICKNAME}选手积极回应了泡泡的挑战！
E: {NICKNAME} boldly accepts Bubbles' challenge!

E: Wake up...

E: But now I can finally pay my way, maybe join those great creators and see my name in the credits... if I made it.

C: 你知道的，有笑声的地方自然会有{RUBY_B#「愚者」}我{RUBY_E#}的身影，更何况我原本就在匹诺康尼投了一个项目。
E: You know, wherever there is laughter, there {RUBY_B#Fools}I{RUBY_E#} will be. Besides, I invested in a project here in Penacony already.

C: 所以，经过制作团队紧张的开发，正式版终于得以与广大玩家见面——
E: So, after much hard work from the dev team, the official version has finally launched for the public —

C: 嗯？还有什么问题吗？
E: Mmm? Any more questions?

C: 我瞧瞧手表…啊，下班时间到了！不打了不打了，继续打也没加班费。撤退！
E: Lemme check the time... Ah, it's time to clock out! No more fighting! I won't get overtime pay anyway! Retreat!

C: 什么什么情况？您不是报名了吗？奇怪，我这里明明有您的报名表啊？
E: What what what? Didn't you sign up? Strange, I have your name on the roster right here?

C: 我确认了您那位认识的黑客，刚刚骇入赛事系统，调整了分组名单，您和他将在总决赛正面对上。
E: I've confirmed the hacker you know just hacked into the event system and adjusted the groupings. You and your friend will face off directly in the finals.

C: 那么比赛继续，祝您赛场上一路顺风。
E: Then the race will continue. Wishing you smooth sailing on the track.

C: 我不知道这个车怎么来的，你说，它是怎么来的……
E: I don't know where this car came from. How did you think it got here?

E: ...I'm afraid I have absolutely no idea what you're talking about.

C: 我听懂了，这句是「救救」！

E: (With his personality, he's probably still hanging out at Siobhan's bar.)

E: The blue-haired foreign hero leans against the bar with a smile, slowly becoming transparent, until he vanishes into the wind that didn't exist.

E: Something wrong at the office?

E: (A eye-rolling joke as a bonus.)

E: Maybe next time.

E: It's dangerous down there...

C: 咳咳，言归正传……
E: Ahem, back to the topic at hand...

C: 「书中暗表，这丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝保留了不少前世记忆，其中就有锻造这上古神兵的秘法。」
E: "The book implies that Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe retains memories from previous reincarnations, including the secrets of forging such an ancient ultimate weapon."

E: I understand...

C: 他们这些借口，你懂就好。结果上来说，就是某个管事人向艾丝妲站长提出申请，想要一名符合权限要求的「特派员」，完成这部分特殊的委托——因此，你来了。
E: You know, those are just their excuses. At the end of the day, it's basically a supervisor wanting a "special agent" with the right permits to complete those special assignments, and they put in an application with the Lead Researcher for such a person — and that's why you are here.

C: 机巧鸟配送那么方便，仙舟的年轻人都喜欢在家点外卖，以后的事，谁知道呢。

E: Another time.

C: 来进行「超链接对决」吧！
E: Let's have a "Hyperlink Match"!

C: 这个给你，希望这只<color=#dbc291ff>「以太灵」</color>能帮你战胜更多对手。
E: This is for you, I hope this <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Spirit</color> can help you defeat even more rivals!

C: 来来！瞧一瞧，看一看——共演现在正式开始咯！
E: Here we go! Ladies and gentlemen, prepare to be amazed!

C: 唷，是你们啊。刚才那场比赛打得漂亮。
E: Oh, hey, it's you guys. That was some performance just now.

C: 怎么，输得自闭了？
E: What's that? At a "loss" for words?

C: 两位的实力令人叹服！你们配得上这<color=#dbc291ff>「冠军首席」</color>的称号！
E: What an amazing display of skill! You've rightfully earned the title of <color=#dbc291ff>"champions!"</color>

C: 又见面了，虎克女士——怎样，这交易的结果还令你满意吗？
E: A pleasure to see you again, Miss Hook — I trust you are happy with the outcome of our arrangement?

C: 大姐头，是大姐头！
E: The esteemed Miss March!

C: 见证我们的选择？
E: Witness our decision?

C: 姐姐你吓死我了…这两个一模一样的白露没惊到我，你嚎一嗓子差点没给我送走……
E: Seriously...? That ghost twin was one thing, but your screaming nearly sent me to the grave...

C: 只是岁阳屏蔽了我们的感官而已…找找看吧，她们一定还在附近。
E: They're eluding our senses, but they won't have gone far... We just need to look around.

C: 你想找回尾巴吗？
E: Do you want Tail back?

C: 裳裳，你都睡了一整个白天了！
E: Sushang, you slept for an entire day!

C: 我也觉得，这样的日子，小桂子我做梦都想过。
E: Sure sounds like it. I could only dream of having a cozy job like that.

C: 符玄的眼神中透露着失望。
E: Fu Xuan seems disappointed.

C: 没有景元在身后看着，是否底气不足了？
E: Let's see how you perform without the general here to watch your back...

C: 一切都是命中注定。
E: Everything is predetermined.

C: 我意识到，其实我们别无选择。只有踏上唯一的道路，只有奔向最优解，哪怕其中满是灰烬和苦涩。
E: ...I realized that we have no real choices. There is only one path to follow, only one way to the optimal solution, even if it is paved with ashes and bitterness.

C: 用你们的「自由意志」把机巧带出沙盘吧。
E: Use your "free will" to guide the ingenium out of the sandbox.

C: 听说彦卿小哥的武器是工造司打造的名器，与主人彼此有感应。主人进退闪躲时，宝剑也会像有灵般随心运转，绝不离身。
E: I heard that Yanqing's sword is a famous weapon crafted by the Artisanship Commission. It resonates with its master — reacting to his movements in battle like it has a mind of its own.

C: 搭上渡船，前往祈龙坛。
E: Let's catch a ferry and head for Dragonprayer Terrace.

C: 快醒醒，彦卿骁卫！我们不想和你战斗啊？
E: Lieutenant Yanqing, snap out of it! We don't want to fight you!

C: 桂小姐，能否展示一下那个网站？
E: Little Gui, can you show us the website we'll be using for intel?

C: 我们现在立刻赶回绥园，趁事情还没到无可挽回的地步，陪浮烟来一局吧。
E: Let's hurry back to Fyxestroll Garden now, while there's still a chance to turn things around. It's time to teach Cirrus a lesson.

C: 你不是还有十王司的前辈吗？
E: What about those Ten Lords fogeys?

C: （这对夫妻究竟在哪儿呢……）
E: (Where are they going to be...)

C: 若昔…若昔…你把若昔还给我，求你了，你要什么都可以，命也可以…把若昔还给我，求你，还给我……
E: Ruoxi... Ruoxi... Give her back to me. I beg you, please. I'll give you anything, even my life... Give Ruoxi back to me, I beg you. Please give her back...

C: 不过嘛，人的念头千奇百怪，谁说得准呢。
E: But, people think in all kinds of wonderful ways, who can really say for sure?

C: 她一定是遭遇了什么岁阳异常，符玄大人——
E: She must have been affected by some heliobus's influence, Lady Fu Xuan—

C: 青雀小姐，你突然睡着了！
E: Miss Qingque, you suddenly lost consciousness!

C: 青、青总给的实在太多了！
E: P—President Qing has been extremely kind to me!

C: 各位提出创意请一定要找准帝垣琼玉类棋牌游戏的差异化赛道，创造全新行业生态，直达消费者的痛点，引爆用户需求，请记住我们的理念是「帝垣琼玉创造快乐」！
E: I ask that when you propose creative ideas, that you find paths for tile games like Celestial Jade to diversify. Create a new industry ecology and access the pressure points of consumers directly to ignite user demand. Remember, our slogan is: "Celestial Jade creates happiness!"

C: …真不知道你这迷之自信到底是从哪里而来。
E: ...I really don't know where this baffling self-confidence of yours comes from.

C: （使用道具）
E: (Try using an item)

C: 你错了，雷诺是短生种的名字，一百年前就去世了，房产证上写着呢，你不是雷诺！
E: Wrong. Renault was a short-life species that passed away a century ago. It says right here on the deed! You are not the real Renault!

C: 让我想个好标题。
E: Let me think of a good title.

C: 我们人多，分成两组肯定是够的。
E: There's more than enough of us to split into two groups.

C: 她最后好像是哭了？
E: She was crying at the end, right?

C: 唔，听起来有一丢丢可怜啊。
E: Hmm, you sound pitiful.

C: 我都行，听你的。
E: I'm down for anything. Up to you.

C: 那时候有固定的观众了，虽说数量不多，但有聊胜无。
E: Back then, we had a regular audience which might have been small, but it was better than nothing.

C: 别急，一会儿你就知道了。
E: Don't worry. You'll find out soon.

C: 那个灰头发的……
E: That gray-haired person...
Umm...

C: 那我们就相信你的直觉，出发。
E: Well, we trust your instincts. Let's go.

C: 这才多久啊你就忘了。
E: You've already forgotten so soon!?

C: 抱歉，这个笑话似乎并不好笑，我还没完全掌握人类深奥的语言规则。
E: I'm sorry, that joke wasn't particularly funny. I have yet to fully master the esoteric rules of human language.

C: 你观察着自己的「最新成果」，可你的「成果们」正不知道从哪个角落翻出来些垃圾，丝毫不嫌脏地把玩着。
E: Observing your "latest achievements," you find them digging around in the trash — as though your "achievements" do not care in the slightest about playing in filth.

C: 那我们该怎么做呢？
E: Then what should we do?

C: 很抱歉，我悬浮的高度是固定的，无法下降…所以……
E: I'm sorry, but my levitation height is fixed and cannot be lowered... so...

C: 咔咔！开饭咯，我狂吃！
E: Ka-caw! Time to eat. I'm pigging out!

C: 你好，我只是应邀而来，你不必在意。
E: Hello. I'm just here by invite. Don't mind me.

C: 嗯，就算没有「已读」也没关系，至少能传达大家的心意……
E: And well, even if she leaves the messages unread, at least we'll be passing on everyone's feelings...

C: 造物们对这里的一切很满意，它们给你留了点「小礼物」。
E: The creations are all very pleased with everything here. They have left you a "little gift".

C: 怎么感觉真的打了一架…
E: Why did that feel like a real fight?

C: 这是一个颇为激烈的故事……
E: This is rather intense...

C: 我有很多其他故事，但并非是为这个宇宙而准备。若你想听，我也可以讲，只是这并不能使你获得奖赏。
E: I've got lots of other stories, but they're just not ready for this universe. I can tell you the stories, if you'd like — you just won't be rewarded for it.

C: 「…让我们瞧瞧，是哪位英雄率领美梦剧团，赢得了对垃圾桶王国的胜利？」
E: "...Behold! Which great hero led the Sweet Dreams Troupe to triumph against the Trashcan Kingdom?"

C: 哈，大东西看到同伴被打，心里不舒服想插手是吧？我连你一起抽！
E: Hah, so now you think you're some kind of hero, you big nitwit? You're gonna get it, too!

C: …不好意思，让您久等了。我就是它们的管理者，有什么事尽管跟我谈吧。
E: ...I apologize for keeping you waiting. I'm the administrator here, so please let me know how I can help you today.

C: 是啊，我就是这家酒吧的店主。看你的模样，似乎完全没有受到噩梦的影响？
E: Yeah, I'm the owner of this lounge. Judging by your appearance, it seems like the nightmare hasn't affected you, right?

C: 汪！我们回来了！
E: Woof! We're back!

C: 就选大的！
E: Go big or go home!

C: （好像和这两只怪物熟悉了…只要能接受它们的性格，还是挺可爱的嘛。）
E: (It seems like I've gotten familiar with these two monsters... If you can get past their personality, they're actually kind of cute.)

C: 听着，新人就要有新人的样子。弯下你的腰，做好你的事，服务你的客人，用你最低的姿态。我是来买快活的，你要让我感觉到我很特别，明白？
E: Listen here. You're new, so you better act like it. Be sure to bow, do your job right, and serve your customers. Be the humblest you can be. I'm here to buy happiness, so you should be making me feel special, got it?

C: …除了舒翁外，它还有没有提到其他名字…我是说，怪物？
E: ...Did she mention anyone else...? I mean, any other monsters?

C: 我向你道歉，希望修复我们之间的关系。所以你看，下次那位红色客人来的时候，能不能帮我说点好话？不用夸奖，多提提我的名字就好！
E: I apologize for that, and I hope we can be on better terms. So you see, next time that guest comes around, could you put in a good word for me? No need for flattery. Just mention my name more often!

C: <size=28>…你！不知好歹！</size>
E: <size=28>...You! You have no idea what's good for you!</size>

C: 时间啊，在此停驻吧！这杯饮料实在太过美妙，我将用一生去回味。
E: O, time! Cease your march! This drink is so exquisite, and I yearn to savor its flavor for the remainder of my days.

C: （没有其他客人过来，好像有点累了…就到这吧。）
E: (No other customers now. I'm a bit tired... Let's call it a day.)

C: 都是很亲密的…家人？
E: They're all pretty close... family members?

C: …冰块？
E: ...Ice cubes?

C: …你自顾自地说了很多话。
E: ...You said a lot of things to yourself.

C: …味道非常棒。除了加拉赫外，你是我见过的人里面学习调饮最快的了，真不打算在这家酒吧长期干下去？
E: ...It tastes great. Besides Gallagher, you're the fastest learner I've ever met when it comes to mixing drinks. Are you really not planning on working at this lounge for a long time?

C: 尽管在家族看来，「美梦剧团」只是供宾客娱乐的道具，但对它们感兴趣的人不在少数。跟我打过招呼，来酒吧光顾的也有好几个。
E: Even though The Family treats the Sweet Dreams Troupe as mere props for the guests' entertainment, there are quite a few people who take a genuine interest in them. Some have even told me about it and become regulars at the lounge.

C: 我离开了舞台，因为想帮助它们。后来你也看到了，梦境开始坍塌，酒店遭到家族封锁，成为了发狂的怪物游荡的场所。
E: So, I left the stage because I wanted to help them. You know what happened next: The Dreamscape started collapsing, and the hotel got sealed by The Family and became a spot infested by frenzied monsters.

C: 嘿，你好啊！给我来杯…呃，<color=#dbc291ff>带点苦，带点柔和</color>的饮料！
E: Hey, how are you! Get me a glass of... Hmm, something <color=#dbc291ff>slightly bitter and mellow</color>!

C: 哇嘎嘎嘎！这就是我想要的，你果然是个好酒保！
E: Woah woah woah! This is exactly what I want. I knew you'd be an amazing drinksmith!

C: 好喝的饮料，喜欢的味道！你好懂怎么让我开心哇！
E: Delicious drink! A flavor I like! You really know how to make me happy!

C: （…这只狗狗真是惹人讨厌！）
E: (...This dog is really infuriating!)

C: 老人家，你有事找我？
E: Are you looking for me, old man?

C: 好在，在某次睡梦中，我有了灵感——或许，我能通过「记忆」这种介质，将童年的游戏复刻出来……
E: Luckily, I had this amazing idea in my dreams: What if I recreated the game using my "memories" as the basis...?

C: 无名客见识广，你身手又了得，还能给我这小玩意做测试……
E: The Nameless is well-traveled, you have moves, and yet you can even test this little thing for me...

C: 佩<rhythm>佩
E: Pep<rhythm>py

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 一切<rhythm>都<rhythm>正<rhythm>常
E: Everything <rhythm>is <rhythm>normal <rhythm>as usual

C: 汪汪    汪  汪
E: WoofWoof    woof  woof

C: 汪      汪
E: Woof      Woof
Hmph?!

C: 嗝。差不多饱了…走了走了。新人，你自己多保重！可别被舒翁吃了哦。
E: *hiccup* I think I've had enough... I'm off. Take care of yourself, newbie! Don't let that Siobhan eat you alive.

C: 可真是堵厚障壁，一眼望去，恐怕得凑齐整整十二位英雄的伟力才能将它洞开。
E: These walls are seriously strong. It would probably take a dozen heroes to break through them.

C: 不过这回总该没——等等，为什么这份经费报表跟个拼图似的，只有半截…
E: But this time, there isn't... Wait, why does this funding statement look like a jigsaw puzzle? It's only half of it...

C: 难怪委托难度这么高，感情是把上头发的钱，都给吃了回扣了！亏我还在替他们哭穷，我呸，再穷也穷不到他们头上。
E: Tsk! No wonder this task is so tough! They've taken all the money and left us with a measly payout! And here I thought they were strapped for cash and I was trying to help them save money!

C: 还记得我入梦前怎么说的吗？「说不定还会有亲人反目、家破人亡、阴阳两隔、血流成河之类的经典桥段」，没想到就真这么刺激。
E: Do you remember what I said before we entered the dream? "Maybe we'll even witness classic scenarios like family feuds, tragic losses, worlds torn apart, espionage situations, rivers running red with blood, stuff like that"? Honestly, who'd have thought that things would really turn out that exciting?

C: 明明是我先来的，汪！
E: I was here first, woof!

C: 什么玩意啊这都！*美梦小镇文明用语*…我啾啾的——*美梦小镇文明用语*啾！
E: Just what in the world! *Dreamville expletive* I tweet tweet *Dreamville expletive* tweet!

C: …真的假的，竟然开始上头了…喂，我说{NICKNAME}，你是有什么「对萤特攻宝具」吗？
E: ...I can't believe it. Are you getting hooked on the game!? Hey, {NICKNAME}, fess up. Do you have a special "Anti-Firefly Noble Phantasm" or something?

C: 就好像一首经典的歌曲一样，即便已然忘却准确的歌词曲调，可曲中传达的某种心绪、情感、企望，已然深植于人们的心间……
E: It's like listening to a classic song. Even if the lyrics and melody have become fuzzy, it doesn't change how the emotions, nuances, and feelings of longing expressed in the song have engraved themselves on the listener's heart...

C: 感谢你的坦诚，卢卡选手。如果你想通了，随时联系我～
E: Thanks for your frankness, Luka. If you change your mind, you can reach out anytime.

C: 可放眼整个罗浮…大部分人都不认识一个参加演武仪典的域外拳手吧？
E: But... Looking at all of the Luofu... Most of them would not know about an outworlder boxer participating in the Wardance.

C: 连广告牌都准备好了，这代言合同，我看来是非签不可了？
E: With the billboard already prepared and the endorsement contract in place, I suppose I have to sign it, don't I?

C: 公司终于还是开窍了
E: The IPC has finally seen the light.

C: 难以置信，一个只出现在「学派战争」时期的演算盲区，但到目前为止，二者却没表现出任何相关关系。
E: Unbelievable, an extrapolation blind spot that only appeared during the Scholars' Strife era — But these two factors have not shown any relationship with each other to this day.

C: 虽然，自始至终，我们都没能解开「不可知域」形成的原因。但至少我们搞清楚了帕提维娅博士在「学派战争」时期的经历。
E: Though we never managed to clarify the cause of what formed the Unknowable Domain, we are at least clear on Doctor Patavia's experiences during the Scholars' Strife.

C: 欢迎来到「派对车厢」，亲爱的无名客。您是要喝点饮料、吃点东西，还是要开始…「派对时刻」呢？
E: Welcome to the Party Car, Nameless. Would you like to have a drink, a snack, or... commence "Party Time?"

C: 我…我就是听到通风管道里有声音，觉得藏了什么奇怪的东西，就想爬上去看一看，结果…就卡住了……
E: I... I'd heard noises coming from the ventilation ducts, which made me wonder if something was hiding in there. Curiosity got the better of me, and I climbed up to take a look... And then I got stuck...

C: {M#他}{F#她}没有。
E: No, {F#she}{M#he} isn't.

C: 他们的困扰、渴望、一个又一个步履难停的日夜，远不如你报表上的一个数字更能令你共情。
E: Their hardships, their ambitions, their ceaseless daily grind... None of that even means half as much to you as the figures on your report.

C: 有帕姆给你送星穹列车的车票，还不知足嘛？别抱怨啦！整个列车就属你的房间最大！
E: Hmph, isn't the Astral Express boarding pass from Pom-Pom enough? You already have the biggest room on the Express, so just be happy with what you've got!

C: 用来成为最强的骇客！
E: To become the ultimate hacker!

C: （下一步，就装修收藏陈列间吧……）
E: (Next up, let's renovate the display room for the collection...)

C: 忙碌了一天的无名客啊，请问，您要先洗澡、先喝杯饮料、还是要先听我再讲个笑话呢？
E: It's been a long and busy day for you, Nameless. Would you like to take a bath, enjoy a beverage, or listen to another of my jokes first?

C: 你从哪儿听…咳咳，我是说，没错！
E: Where did you... Ahem... I mean, you're right!

C: 唉，想想也是，如果这里真有好东西，怎么可能留给我们来拿？
E: *sigh* Now that I think about it, if there really was something valuable here, surely it wouldn't still be lying here for us to pick up?

C: 它歪歪头表示不解。
E: It tilts its head sideways, looking confused.

C: 我再想想。
E: I'm having second thoughts.

C: 就叫这个啦！
E: Yep, that's the name!

C: 我是神悟树庭的教授，风堇女士的同僚，希望这能解答你的疑惑，小家伙。
E: I am a professor at the Grove of Epiphany and a colleague of Lady Hyacine. I hope this answers your question, little one.

C: 一向不敬泰坦的那刻夏老师居然会推荐用神迹疗法…这大概真是最好的选择了。
E: If even Professor Anaxa, who's never shown respect for the Titans, is recommending miracle therapy... Then it must really be the best option.

C: 英雄，我们要出发了——再不加快脚步的话，会吃到大地兽的尾气。
E: Hero, we need to head off now. If we don't pick up the pace, we'll be eating the dromases' exhaust fumes.

C: 你也有隐藏的力量？
E: You've got hidden powers too?

C: 你怎么还活着？
E: How are you still alive?

C: 出不起钱就别开古玩店，我找别人收去。
E: If you can't handle the costs, maybe running an antique shop isn't for you. I'll find a more serious buyer.

C: 今天这位大爷送来的东西不得了，他儿子知道他喜欢音乐，送了他一把黄金里拉琴。这样的宝贝可不是天天有，让你开开眼界！
E: Today brought an extraordinary surprise — a gentleman received a golden lyre from his son, who knows well his father's love for music. Such treasures are rare indeed. Feast your eyes on this marvel!

C: 今天没有适合你上手的宝物啦，请明天再来吧。
E: There are no suitable treasures for you to handle today. Please come back tomorrow.

C: 我收下了，谢谢你陌生的朋友。
E: I'll take it. Thanks, stranger.

C: 我已经完全明白了！
E: I totally get it now!

C: 嘶嘶。这是为您预留的糕点，请收下。请妥善保管。嘶嘶。
E: Zztzzt. These pastries are reserved for you. Please accept them, and make sure to take good care of them. Zztzzt.

C: 都有些什么好东西？
E: So, what goodies do you have?

C: 对弈是什么意思？
E: What do you mean by "countering"?

C: 我无权赐予你任何礼物。但只要对弈继续，定会有珍贵之物从中示现。
E: I have no right to bestow any gifts upon you. But as long as the countering continues, precious things will surely reveal themselves.

C: 「均衡…」一个低沉的声音从中传出，「多亏你的配合，世界离均衡又近了一步。」
E: "The Equilibrium..." a deep voice echoed, "Thanks to your cooperation, the world has taken another step closer to Equilibrium."

C: 有些问题想问你…
E: I've got a few questions I'd like to ask you...

C: 「均衡」的仲裁官，仲裁官中的「结绳人」——既是头衔，亦是权柄。
E: The Arbitrator of Equilibrium, the "Knot-Tier" among Arbitrators: both a title and authority.

C: 村长，错了！客人在那边，那边！
E: Chief, no! The guest is over there. That way!

C: 村长，还有徕啦迷，好久不见！按照约定，我们来啦。
E: Chief, Relimem, it's been forever! But, we're here, just as we said we would be.

C: 美食评审，这可是关系到餐馆评级的大事，当然得仔细思考后再做决定。你在脑海里想象着评审员品尝这道菜品的画面，心中总算有了答案。
E: This is a huge moment. The food review can make or break a restaurant's reputation. This calls for a thorough deliberation. You picture the judges savoring the dish... And finally, the answer comes to your mind.

C: 怎么样。哼哼，是不是很有大饭店的感觉啦？
E: Pretty impressive, huh? Feels like a fancy restaurant now, doesn't it?

C: 让我加入试试。
E: Let me join in and give it a try.

C: 想营造甜蜜蜜的氛围，顾客的用餐体验很重要。
E: To really create that sweetie vibe, the overall dining experience has to be spot on.

C: 哎，你可错怪我了。这地方与世隔绝，偏僻得很，运点东西进来老费劲了。
E: Ah, my friend, you wound me! This place is smack in the middle of nowhere. Hauling supplies here takes a lot of effort.

C: 砰砰砰砰砰——啪！
E: KABOOM CRASH BANG BOOM CRACK — POP!

C: 炼金成功了？
E: Did your alchemy actually work?

C: 啊，评审员和村长居然亲自到访！可惜餐馆打烊了，没法拿出美味的菜品招待……
E: Oh, the reviewer and the chief are here in person! Unfortunately, we've already closed. We can't offer you any of our delicious meals...

C: 呵呵，那便如此约好了。
E: Hehe, then it's agreed.

C: 真令人期待呀。
E: Everyone's looking forward to it!

C: 以及…好久不见！
E: Also... long time no see!

C: 依我看，赛飞儿阁下玩得很开心。
E: Seems to me like Lady Cipher had plenty of fun.

C: 真想知道？其实也没那么复杂。
E: Really wanna know? It's actually not that complicated.

C: 经营餐馆如同治理城邦，须思虑周全后再行事。店长做好开店的准备了么？
E: Running a restaurant is no different from governing a city-state. Every move must be cautiously considered. Manager, are you ready to open for business?

C: 「主厨角斗」引来了许多关注，那位白发的主厨也在认真磨砺厨艺。看来，这将会是场激烈的争锋。
E: The "Chef Showdown" has really stirred the pot of public interest, and that white-haired chef has been cooking up a storm in practice. Looks like we're in for quite the culinary battle.

C: 您好，要买点什么吗？
E: Hello, what would you like?

C: 当你提起王储
E: When You Speak of the Crown Prince

C: 「那只是杀戮，毫无荣耀可言。」\n一个男人挡在我面前。
E: "There's no glory to be found in an accolade only obtainable through slaughter."\nA man blocks my way.

C: 「猜猜*我们*是谁？」\n三子飞到街坊面前。
E: "Guess who we are?"\nThe three soared and landed in front of the townsfolk.

C: 三子耳目相连、心灵相交。\n若有一人心生悲戚，\n另两人都会泣出泪来。
E: Not only do the three children share each other's senses, their souls are also interconnected.\nWhen one is filled with grief,\nthe other two will burst into tears as well.

C:
泰坦钟爱这生来悲戚的子女，
却不能抹去行将到来的悲剧。

只能驱走神殿的夜风，
让孩童今晚有个好梦。
E:
The Titan loves this child born into sorrow,
But has no power to erase impeding tragedy in the morrow.

Only can they dispel the evening wind of the palace,
Giving the child solace in sweet dreams.

C: 最后一次相遇，\n她把自己的名字托付给你。
E: At the final meeting,\nshe entrusts you with her name.

C: 「彼岸将守望来生。」 少女期盼着拥抱走入寒溟。 「伤痕会带来和平。」 战士登上祭坛，低声自语。
E: "The shore on the other side will watch over the next life." With a hopeful heart, the maiden walks into the chill of the dark, awaiting an embrace. "Scars will give way to peace." The warrior ascends the altar, speaking softly under his breath.

C: 它识得那低吼中的含义——\n名为<color=#9e5738>「不朽」</color>。
E: They recognized the meaning in that low roar —\nIts name, "<color=#9e5738>Permanence</color>."

C: 「我们…虽素不相识……」\n「但请…交出火种…为了黎明。」
E: "Though we... are strangers..."\n"Please... surrender the Coreflame... for the Dawn."

C: 这是它们的新生，\n这是生命的出路。
E: This is their rebirth,\nThis is life's way forward.

C: 「以翁法罗斯之名，\n我将赐予盲信以自由。」
E: "In the name of Amphoreus,\nI will grant freedom to the blindly faithful."

C: 「我会用我的命运向你们证明——」
E: "I will use my own fate to prove to you —"

C: 金线颤动，风声传入耳中。\n她静默不言，\n旁人却煽风点火——
E: Golden threads quiver, and a gentle wind rustles by her ear.\nShe maintains her silence,\nbut others fan the flames.

C: 「真是爱与美的造物…」\n来客心想，这心潮牵动了房中的金丝
E: "The creation of love and beauty indeed..."\nAs the visitor thinks thus, his thoughts prickle the golden threads in the room.

C: 路径：诡计。原动力：渴望。\n注释：基于原始本能进行运算，以自我满足为唯一优先解。\n该电信号在行动时，其利他行为与其原动力产生了极为严重的矛盾，乃至选择自毁行为。「欢愉」的模拟命途，在践行到终点后走向了自我消解。
E: Track: Trickery. Primum Mobile: Desire.\nNote: Operates based on primal instinct, with self-gratification as the sole priority solution.\nThis electric signal, when in action, displayed severe dissonance between its altruistic behavior and its Primum Mobile, even culminating in self-destruction. As the simulated Path of Elation, it walked into self-erasure once reaching its end.

C: 队伍需要包含指定角色
E: Team must include the specified character(s)

C: 蒙塔娜同学，你在音乐派对中展现出的组织能力和热情令人印象深刻，在协调与人际关系方面做得尤为出色，相信你一定能在未来的学习与工作中大放异彩。
E: Montana, the organizational ability and passion you displayed during the music party were deeply impressive, and your ability to coordinate matters and handle relationships is awesome. I know you'll be able to achieve extraordinary results in your future studies and professional career.

C:
哈哈，你居然还记得。我也有一阵子没有尝到过它的味道了。
我记得，把橄榄油和小麦粉揉成面团，放进炉子里烘焙。至于糖…老妈放了多少勺来着？
当时只顾着吃，没有细看。总想着离开家前，总有机会学的。
你可以多试试！
E:
Haha, to think you'd still remember that. It's been a while since I last tasted it too.
I recall it was olive oil and wheat flour kneaded into dough, baked in the oven. As for the sugar... how many spoonfuls did Mom use again?
I was too busy eating to pay attention. I kept telling myself I'd have the opportunity to learn the recipe before I leave.
You can give it a few more tries!

E: I'll say my heart is still as pure and righteous as jade.

C: 「嗨，{NICKNAME}，你也来啦？古代人留下的遗物还真是神奇，我准备拿回机械屋好好研究一下——来和我找找有趣的东西，怎么样？」
E: "Hey, {NICKNAME}. You're here too? These relics are pretty incredible, so I'm planning to take them back to the workshop and have a good look at them. Come look for interesting things with me. What do you say?"

C: ——在遗迹中，你好像看到了熟悉的身影……

C: ——小心，埋伏的强敌将会发动突袭，削减你的耐力值。

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「暗箭难防」</color>具有「突袭」能力的敌人，会根据你的行动发起损耗耐力值的攻击。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Assured Ambush</color>: Enemies with the Surprise Attack ability will attack you according to your actions and drain your Stamina.

C: 你已经熟悉了寻宝的技巧，切忌盲目行动，利用经验进行探索吧。
E: You have already become familiar with the techniques involved in treasure hunting. Do not act rashly and explore according to your experience.

C: 寻宝者总计行动#1次后，扑满将会逃跑。\n在战斗中击败扑满后，将随机掉落<color=#f29e38ff>「补给物资」</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>「治疗物资」</color>。
E: After #1 Treasure Hunter action(s) in total, the Trotter will escape.\nTrotters defeated in battle will randomly drop <color=#f29e38ff>Provision Supplies</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>Healing Supplies</color>.

C: 敌人出现时，为周围显形的敌人施加强化效果。
E: When enemies appear, all visible enemies around the area will be strengthened.

C: 请提高<color=#f29e38ff>团队生存能力</color>，例如找到合适的<color=#f29e38ff>治疗角色</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>羁绊</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>生存装备</color>，以避免战斗提前结束。
E: Please improve your <color=#f29e38ff>team's survivability</color> by finding suitable <color=#f29e38ff>healer characters</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>Bonds</color>, or <color=#f29e38ff>sustain equipment</color> to avoid combat ending prematurely.

C: 上阵更多相同羁绊的角色，可提高羁绊等级。\n羁绊等级越高，效果越强。
E: Deploying more characters with the same Bond will increase the Bond Level.\nThe higher the Bond Level, the stronger the effect.

C: 队伍中的角色使用<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>时可为惊笑盒<color=#f29e38ff>充能</color>，增加花火<color=#f29e38ff>惊奇礼物的伤害段数</color>。花火的惊奇礼物会对随机敌方目标造成伤害。
E: When characters in the team use their <color=#f29e38ff>Skills</color>, they can <color=#f29e38ff>charge</color> the Surprise Box and increase the number of <color=#f29e38ff>damage instances from Sparkle's Surprise Gift</color>. Sparkle's Surprise Gift deals damage to random enemy targets.

C: 三月七的照片损坏，内容被黑影遮蔽。<color=#f29e38ff>寻找</color>照片中被<color=#f29e38ff>黑影</color>覆盖的东西，重新<color=#f29e38ff>拍摄目标</color>，帮助三月七还原照片吧。
E: March 7th's photographs have been ruined. The contents have been obscured by shadows. <color=#f29e38ff>Search for</color> objects covered by <color=#f29e38ff>shadows</color> in the photos and <color=#f29e38ff>re-take the photo subject</color> to help March 7th restore her photos.

C: 操作哈努兄弟左右移动并瞄准他的敌人，使用<color=#f29e38ff>攻击键</color>发射哈努飞弹击碎挡路的敌人！
E: Control Brother Hanu by moving him left or right, and aim at his foes. Use the <color=#f29e38ff>Attack Button</color> to fire the Hanu Rocket at enemies blocking your path!

C: 此处能够查看对手信息，<color=#f29e38ff>若不知道如何选择时</color>，点击查看吧。
E: Here you can view your opponent's information. <color=#f29e38ff>If you're unsure what to choose</color>, {LAYOUT_MOBILE#tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#click} to view.

C: 你可以回忆与丹恒在翁法罗斯生活的片段，将它们化作固定数量的「记忆残晶」。<color=#f29e38ff>每周开始时刷新</color>。
E: You can recall the life you led with Dan Heng in Amphoreus and convert them into a fixed amount of Memory Crystal Shards. <color=#f29e38ff>Refreshes at the beginning of each week</color>.

C: 按下鼠标左键移动鼠标，可旋转视角观察。按下鼠标右键移动鼠标，可平移画面观察。点击右下角重置按钮可重置视角。
E: Press the left mouse key and move the mouse to rotate the camera. Press the right mouse key and move the mouse to move the screen. Click the reset button in the bottom right corner to reset your camera.

C: 每次<color=#f29e38ff>打破凝晶</color>，光芒区域的<color=#f29e38ff>边界都会缩小</color>，借助这一性质来完成试炼吧。
E: Each time you <color=#f29e38ff>break a Crystal</color>, the <color=#f29e38ff>boundary of the lit area shrinks</color>. Use this property to complete the trial.

C: 选择参加赛事后，开拓者将会以随机抽选的方式确定对手阵容，将其击败后可获得不同增益。抽选开始后，角色阵容将锁定；每次战斗开始时将重置角色生命值和能量值。「均衡等级」将影响活动中敌方强度。
E: After choosing to participate in the tournament, the opponent lineup will be determined in a random drawing, and different buffs can be obtained by defeating different opponents. After random selection begins, your team lineup will be locked. All characters' HP and Energy will be reset at the start of every battle. Equilibrium Level will influence enemy strength in the event.

C: 战斗中会实时显示当前战斗波次，以及当前波次中击败敌人进度。
E: The current wave of enemies and the number of enemies defeated in the current wave will be displayed during battle.

C: 植物将<color=#f29e38ff>不断刷新</color>，消灭植物将会使敌方首领<color=#f29e38ff>损失生命值</color>。\n<color=#f29e38ff>消灭植物</color>，上演<color=#f29e38ff>「高光时刻」</color>，获得大量「气氛值」。
E: Plants will be <color=#f29e38ff>constantly refreshed</color>. Eliminating the plants will cause the enemy boss to <color=#f29e38ff>lose HP</color>.\n<color=#f29e38ff>Defeat plants</color> to trigger <color=#f29e38ff>Highlights</color> and gain a massive amount of Vibes.

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>恒冰长矛</color>\n「恒冰长矛」在我方击中一定数量敌人后，对生命最高的敌人发射「冰矛」。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>Spear of Eternal Ice</color>\nSpear of Eternal Ice fires icy spears at the enemy with the highest HP after allies hit a certain number of enemies.\nPrioritize the upgrade of the initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>歼灭机器人</color>\n「歼灭机器人」对一个敌方目标施加「歼灭标记」，在目标受到<color=#f29e38ff>击破伤害</color>时，对其造成随机属性伤害，并添加随机属性弱点。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>RuinBot</color>\nRuinBot applies Mark of Ruin to an enemy target. When this target receives <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG</color>, deals DMG of a random Type and adds a Weakness of a random Type to it.\nPrioritize the upgrade of initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

E: Treasure Opening 2

C: 即使看起来很「黑暗」的料理，也要拿出「开拓」的精神来面对！但，实话实说，砂鳗冻和姬子泡的咖啡真不太好……
E: No matter how disgusting the dish, you gotta summon your trailblazing spirit and face it! Not gonna lie though, jellied eels and Himeko's coffee are pretty tough to stomach...

C: 劳您担待啦！
E: Pardon my manners!

C: 不求所来，但思将往。
E: Leave the past behind. The future beckons my thoughts.

C: 姬子小姐，突发事况，交由我来处理。
E: Himeko, you can leave any contingencies to me.

C: 有什么需要尽管提，列车组可是一条心，{NICKNAME}。
E: If there's anything you need, don't hesitate to ask, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这份力量的沉重，你一无所知。
E: You know nothing of the weight behind this power.

C: 手感不错。
E: Well figured out.

C: 猎物落网啰。
E: Caught in the net.

C: 手机壳的发货地离空间站远，得满五千个起送…不不，请别告诉小姐。
E: Oh, man! The phone case shipping location is too far from the space station — you have to buy <unbreak>5000</unbreak> units for them to deliver... Wait, please don't tell Lady Asta that.

C: 猜猜我要干什么~
E: Guess what I'm about to do~

C: 我定会遵守骑士的誓言。
E: A knight's vow is absolute, I shall never break it.

C: 以星辰之光点亮大地。
E: Illuminate the land with the starlight...

C: 杰帕德戍卫官么…或许形容他为贝洛伯格的铁壁也不为过。在这座城市，「守」远比「攻」难。
E: Captain Gepard...? I think he could accurately be described as Belobog's iron wall. In this city, it's more difficult to defend than go on the offensive.

C: 优秀的战略资源。
E: First-rate supplies.

C: 胜负已分。
E: The die is cast.

C: 睡一觉吧。
E: Naptime.

C: 卢卡哥哥…是个很温柔的人。虽然看上去有些莽撞，但他其实很细心哦。
E: Luka...? He's nice to people. I know he seems kinda impatient, but he's actually very caring.

C: 那家伙看起来还挺结实的。
E: I dunno — this one looks kinda tough...

C: 哦呼呼呼~
E: Ehehehe~

C: 别走神了！
E: Snap out of it!

C: 曾送了些自觉稀奇的玩意儿给他，那孩子也会恭恭敬敬地道谢收下。直到小女子瞧见他在工造司挑选剑器，那眉飞色舞的样子…小孩子还是很好懂的。
E: I once gifted him some items I deemed rare, and that child respectfully thanked me and accepted them. Then I saw him excitedly selecting swords in the Artisanship Commission... Hehe, children are clever little creatures.

C: 飘摇世间，又何来落脚之处？
E: It's hard for a wanderer to find rest in this world.

C: 饮月君…我们的果报何时来临？我们欠下的债如何偿还！
E: Imbibitor Lunae... When will our retribution come? How can our debt be repaid?

C: 人皆有魔阴，或各有不同，我的情况殊为特别。即便常受魔阴作祟，我却对此记忆寥寥：无论是悔恨、仇怨，还是思念与惶然……
E: We are all mara-stricken in different ways, but my situation is unusual. Although the mara haunts me, memories of it seldom cross my mind, be they of remorse, hatred, fear, or reflection.

C: 还有其他事么？
E: Are there other matters?

C: 这名字有点耳熟…啊！有一次我去木叔叔家，看到有个人藏在房顶上…不会就是他吧！
E: That name sounds familiar... Oh! One time when I went to Uncle J's house, I saw someone hiding on the roof... Maybe it was him!

C: 我就说我能搞定的嘛！
E: See, I knew I could do it!

C: 哦？你能接我几招？
E: So, how many of my moves can you block?

C: 怪了……
E: How...?

C: 不知是否还能寻得稀有的剑器……
E: Wonder if I'll discover any rare swords...

C: 我家十几口兄弟姐妹呢！有个哥哥叫郎世乐，也在罗浮上讨生活，不过他好像还是更喜欢别人喊他「兰斯洛特」。
E: I've got more than a dozen siblings! One of them is my older brother — he's also living on the Xianzhou. His name is Langshile, but he seems to prefer being called "Lancelot."

C: 让我来治治你~
E: Let me tend to your wounds!

C: 霄龙现影，破！
E: Celestial dragon... Break!

C: 素裳，待会等等我，我先给你贴上灵符……
E: Sushang, just a minute, let me give you this talisman...

C: 还不够辣…再来再来！加麻，加辣！
E: Still not spicy enough! Keep turning up the heat!

C: 我允诺他在任何时刻向我发起「行刺」。近来，他动手的频率越来越低，准头倒是好了不少。做得不错，是得耐心一点，一击必中的时刻还没到。
E: I granted him permission to "assassinate" me anytime he wished. Lately, his attempts have become less frequent, but his accuracy has improved significantly. Good effort, but patience is key — the time for the perfect strike has yet to come.

C: 「天击将军」是写在书上的，「大捷将军」是大家叫的。前者太正经，后者太夸张，都不合适。我还是喜欢自己取的「三无将军」——无虑，无悔，无敌。
E: "The Merlin's Claw" is what's written in the books, and the "Vanquishing General" is what people call me. The former sounds too formal, the latter too exaggerated. Neither suits me. I prefer my own title, the "Lacking General" — lacking in worries, regrets, and rivals.

C: 各位…拜托了……
E: I... leave it to you...

C: 灵砂姐姐，前面的敌人就都交给我来对付吧。
E: Ms. Lingsha, please let me handle the enemies up ahead.

C: 剑是有脾气的，有时候觉得剑不好使，就要多摸摸它安抚它，体会手握住剑柄的触感，它会告诉你哪儿不舒服！
E: Swords have a temper. Sometimes, you have to touch them to calm them down — put the hilt of the sword in your hand, and it'll tell you what's wrong!

C: 有你在，妾身也能算安心些了～
E: With you here, I feel a bit more at ease.

C: 太卜大人定是算到了我们此番可以平安无事。
E: Master Diviner, you must have foreseen that we could get through this unscathed.

C: 还得让妾身来正本清源…
E: Please, allow me to purge the root of this problem.

C: 有破绽哦。
E: Oh, a weakness.

C: 金鳞燃犀，洞若观火。
E: The truth burns clear as a flame.

C: 我的使命还没完成……
E: My mission isn't over...

C: 信念无可摧毁。
E: My faith is unbreakable.

C: 听说在某个星球的风俗里，战士会用书页擦拭被改造的义肢，以此将知识直接输入神经。我对此感到震撼，但也颇为欣赏。
E: I've heard tales of warriors on a certain planet passing book pages over artificial limbs in order to infuse knowledge directly into their neural systems. It sounds so outlandish, and yet I find the idea quite inspired.

C: 我与螺丝咕姆对生命的理解截然不同，但我想他并未察觉。幸好，我们之间的交流仅限于「模拟宇宙」。
E: Screwllum and I have very different understandings of life, but I don't think he realizes it. Fortunately, our communication is limited to matters related to the Simulated Universe.

C: 博识学会的人大多急着和公司划清界限，而拉帝奥…我想他也不喜欢我，但可惜的是，比起其他愚笨的家伙，我多少算是个合格的交流对象。
E: The erudite folks of the Intelligentsia Guild are often eager to distance themselves from the IPC... and I suspect Ratio doesn't care for me much either. Unfortunately for him, I make for a more competent conversationalist than the other dimwits around here.

C: 别出千啊。
E: No dirty tricks, alright?

C: 博识学会常被视作知识的卖家，但定价的权利始终在买家手上。有人愿意聆听，知识得以传播与流通，价格便会产生。
E: The Intelligentsia Guild is often seen as a vendor of knowledge, but the right to set a price is always in the hands of the buyer. When someone is willing to listen to knowledge that is being disseminated and circulated, a price is created.

C: 不错不错，下次也教教我？
E: Not too shabby — wanna teach me next time?

C: 启程吧，远方还有那么多记忆在闪耀。
E: Set forth, for countless memories shimmer in the distance...

C: 这一次的经历，对你而言会意味着什么……
E: What meaning does this journey hold for you?

C: 无礼的客人。
E: Mind your manners.

C: 我也曾像你一样被人记在心上，那些微不足道的瞬间，再回首时总是胜过万语千言…往事造就如今的我们，有些事很难记得，有些事很难忘却。
E: I, too, was once kept in someone's heart like you. Those trivial moments, when looked back upon, are worth more than a thousand words... The past shapes who we are today. Some things are hard to remember, others hard to forget.

C: 它汇聚了生命的喜悦与甜美，也同样脆弱易逝…这种遗憾无可奈何，便由它去吧。
E: They embody life's delights and pleasures, but are equally fragile and short-lived... Such regret is inevitable, so let it be.

C: 演出…还没…
E: The show... must go on...

C: 没有巡演的日子里，我更喜欢离开都市去感受自然的声音…可惜，匹诺康尼的梦境中没有真正的森林，我也只能和梦里的「小鸟」聊聊天了。
E: When I'm not on tour, I love getting away from the urban hustle to listen to nature... Unfortunately, there aren't any real forests in Penacony's Dreamscape, so I just settle for talking to the "birds" in my dreams.

C: 银蛰虫群落在星球上的时候，就像下了一场闪耀的雪。每一场战役之后，我回头望去…纷飞的银色碎屑下，尽是骑士们冰冷的残骸。
E: When the Silver Sting Swarm lands on a planet, it looks like glittering snow has fallen. After every battle, I look back... and see the ice-cold remains of the cavalry in the swirl of silver fragments.

C: 天环一族常被视作「同谐」的子民，替祂在世间聆听人的祈祷。无论那些愿望能否实现，都将被编织到希佩的神音里。
E: Halovians are often seen as subjects of the Harmony, listening to people's prayers in the world on behalf of THEM. Whether those wishes come true or not, they will be woven into Xipe's divine music.

C: 「开拓」并非孤独的求索，而是由一代代人相连而成的轨迹…这是条令人敬佩的路。
E: The Trailblaze is not a solitary pursuit but a trajectory formed by generations connecting with each other... It's a path worthy of admiration.

C: 三月小姐，请尽情施展你的巧思。
E: Miss March, please put your brilliant ideas to good use.

C: 哈，幸亏你对我的赏金不感冒，不然我人可早没了啊。
E: Ha, fortunately, you're not interested in my bounty. Otherwise, I would be dead already.

C: 在下忍号「乱破」，意指「一心不乱、破邪显正」，恰如大岚神之箭矢，无所不及、无往不利。
E: My ninja name is Rappa, which means "to be of a steady heart, destroying evil and unveiling righteousness." It is just like the arrows of the Great Lan, far-reaching and all-prevailing.

C: 我将以人的怒火，剥夺神的权柄。
E: I will use humanity's wrath to strip gods of their authority.

C: 呐喊吧，胜利将如期而至。
E: Cry out, for victory will come.

C: 愿死亡铸就战士的荣耀。
E: May death forge glory for the warriors.

C: 成色不错，小金库加一。
E: Not bad. One more for my treasure trove.

C: 他永远能给人一种「无论发生什么，他都会与你站在一起」的信赖感，不愧是「无名客」。
E: He always gives out this trustworthy feeling of "he'll stand with you no matter what." That's what you expect out of a Nameless.

C: 一鼓作气，解决它。
E: Don't stop. Finish them off.

C: 免礼。天光甚好，对弈一局如何？
E: No need for formalities. It's a beautiful day. Care for a game of chess?

C: 下棋虽有助于推衍战局，但欢宴取乐的场合下不免过于严肃。嗯…若能将其改造成翩翩起飞的玩具，让骰子决定行进的步数，想必更有乐趣——不错，就称它为「飞行棋」吧。
E: Chess may sharpen one's mind for strategy, but in the midst of a feast, it's rather too serious. What if we transformed it into a cheerful game, where pieces take flight and the roll of dice guides their movement? Delightful! We'll call it Aero-Chess.

C: 等会就让你们安静下来~
E: You'll quiet down real soon~

C: 和你们以前见过的比，怎么样？
E: How does this compare to the ones you've seen before?

C: 我来分担一部分压力。
E: I'll help take some of the pressure off.

C: 愿「浪漫」永不离席。
E: May "Romance" never be absent.

C: 真让人期待呀，未来的旅途中，{NICKNAME}的「故事」会怎样发展呢？希望翁法罗斯的「记忆」，会成为其中浪漫的一笔…一定会的，对吧♪
E: I really look forward to seeing how {NICKNAME}'s "story" will unfold in future journeys. I hope Amphoreus's "memories" will become a romantic note in those journeys... It definitely will, right? ♪

C: 同为粉色的少女，我们不仅发色相似，连爱好都出奇地一致呢！真想和三月深入交流呀，我们一定能碰撞出许多光彩夺目的回忆♪
E: As fellow pink-haired girls, not only is our hair color the same, but we also like the same things! I really want to have a nice, long chat with March. We'd definitely create lots of brilliant memories together ♪

C: 人家可不喜欢道别。不如…留个悬念如何？如果想我了，就把这段回忆擦亮，我就会悄悄来到你的心里。约好了，不许忘记哦？
E: I don't like farewells, so why don't we... leave this as a cliffhanger? Should you ever miss me, you can just polish this memory, and I'll silently visit your heart. It's a promise, okay? Don't you forget~

C: 丹恒，我们速战速决。
E: Dan Heng, let's make this quick.

C: 警惕起来。
E: Stay alert.

C: 我们联手，就是无所不能的~
E: Together, we can do anything~

C: 想打倒我？没那么容易。
E: Wanna knock me down? It's not that easy.

C: 在匹诺康尼，米哈伊尔早就以自己的一生诠释了来自「钟表匠」最宝贵的遗产…只有当人们醒来后，才能将夜晚的梦带入白日。
E: In Penacony, Mikhail has long spent his life embodying the precious legacy of the Watchmaker... Only when one wakes up can one bring the dreams of the night into the daylight.

C: 成为英雄的道路并不孤单，搭档。
E: The road to becoming a hero is not a lonely one, partner.

C: 在「黄金嗷呜大师赛」中，与玩家对战获得#1场全胜
E: Win #1 matches in the Chrysos Awoo Championship against other players

C: 时间在刀尖上舞蹈，只有光能刺向未来
E: Time dances on a blade's edge, only light can pierce through to the future

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
开拓者每日登录游戏后，可在「旅情事记」中领取当日奖励。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
奖励将根据开拓者累计登录天数依次解锁，当日奖励将在<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）刷新。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
Trailblazers can receive daily rewards in the Travel Log after logging in to the game each day.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
The rewards will be unlocked in sequential order according to the Trailblazer's accrued login days. Daily rewards will be refreshed at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM (server time) every day.

C: 角色试用
E: Character Trial

C: 天赋的<u>追加攻击</u>的伤害次数增加<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>次，施放时使敌方全体目标受到的伤害提高<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>，持续<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>回合。
E: Increases the number of DMG instances dealt by Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>. Upon its use, the DMG taken by all enemy targets increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

C: 选择一名角色【离场】，【致幻人鱼】将代替该角色战斗
E: Select a character to be "Departed," "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" will replace that character in combat

C: 完成噩梦难度挑战，且至少消灭敌方后排【贼灵】<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次
E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge and defeat "Spirithief" on the enemy back row at least <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

C: 哥哥……
E: Brother...

C: 将杀王棋
E: King in Check

C: 鼓励师
E: Motivator

C: 请假王
E: Absentee Master

C: 轻轻松松~人家果然很擅长呢。
E: Piece of cake~ I guess I'm a natural at this.

C: 自身受到伤害时：使随机同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When this unit takes DMG: A random ally's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 自身首次被击倒时：恢复至<color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>，并使<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力</color>变为<color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>点
E: The first time this unit is knocked down: Restores <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color> and sets its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 购买道具与装备时：使随机1名同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When purchasing items and equipments: Causes 1 random companion's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 购买白色稀有度的奇美拉时：使所有同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When purchasing a white-rarity chimera: Causes all companions' <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>

C: 回合开始时：对所有<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>小于等于<color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点的对手造成<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn: Deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to all opponents with <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color> or below.

C: 回合开始时：队伍中最强的比格椰自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>，并对随机1名对手造成<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的伤害
E: At the start of a turn: The strongest Vigethos in the team causes its own <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> and deals DMG equal to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> to 1 random opponent.

C: 使1只奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: Increases 1 chimera's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>

C: 自身攻击后：若<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值小于<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>，发动追加攻击，对所有对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: After this unit attacks: If <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP is lower than <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, launches a Follow-Up ATK, dealing <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to all opponents.

C: 对手专属奇美拉首次攻击时：自身移动到队伍的最前排，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When the opponent's exclusive chimera launches its first attack: This unit moves to the front of the team, and its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 来几个正常队友。

E: I'm becoming more and more crucial.

E: Royal Guards, assemble~

E: Unlocked Successfully

C: 对敌方全体造成等同于本场战斗风堇、小伊卡累计治疗数值<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f9b0f0><gridfightmod type=cyrene index=1 format=i%></color>+我方小队其他目标累计治疗数值<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的风属性伤害并清空累计治疗数值的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Deals Wind DMG to all enemies by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f9b0f0><gridfightmod type=cyrene index=1 format=i%></color> of the total accumulated tally of healing done by Hyacine + <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of healing from other ally squad targets in the current battle, and clears <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of the accumulated tally of healing.

C: 不可显露注定的死亡
E: never reveal the inevitable death.

C: 倘若再造寰宇蝗灾
E: Should the Swarm Disaster recur,

C: 尝试接触「末王」的力量，补全最后的缺憾
E: Assay the might of Terminus,\nRender the final dole whole

C: 后排目标
E: Back Row Target

C: 梦的谢幕礼
E: Dream's Curtain Call

C: 树上的灾兆
E: Omen in the Trees

C: 凡俗众生
E: Mortal Beings

C: 沉积的忆质再度流淌……
E: The settled memoria flows once again...

C: 我喊了，你敢应吗
E: I've called you mom, how would you respond

C: 受海妖歌声影响的迷狂者，其理智崩溃于跃入洋面的一瞬，化身为塞壬的爪牙。
E: Those driven mad by the sea siren's song lose their sanity the moment they leap into the ocean, becoming the sirens' pawns.

C: 天谴斗士
E: Furiae Warrior

C: 当【示死祸源：深魇蝗灾】受到攻击后，降低生命值的一部分转化为【侵蚀】。当【示死祸源：深魇蝗灾】施放【荒潮到临，蝗灾示死】时，将回复侵蚀部分的生命值。
E: When "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare" is attacked, a portion of its reduced HP is converted into "Corrosion." When "Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare" uses "Primordial Tide, Swarm of Death," it will recover HP equal to the corrosion amount.

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害，并大概率降低目标的防御力和全属性抗性。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets and has a high chance to decrease the targets' DEF and All-Type RES.

C: 渐强
E: Accrescendo

C: 知更鸟的失声只是表象，根源在于匹诺康尼的「同谐」掺有杂音，家族中存在叛徒。知更鸟希望为星期日分担压力，查明真相。
E: Robin's lost voice was just a symptom. The root cause was a noise within Penacony's Harmony, indicating a traitor within The Family. Robin wished to uncover the truth and lighten Sunday's burden.

C: 舒翁偶遇知更鸟，邀请她前往惊梦酒吧。当下有更重要的事，知更鸟不得不婉拒邀约。分别之际，舒翁询问知更鸟为何而歌唱。
E: Siobhan happened to meet Robin and invited her to the Dreamjolt Hostelry. Having more pressing matters at hand, Robin had to politely decline the invitation. As they parted ways, Siobhan asked Robin why she sang.

C: 有#2%概率使神赐珍宝进化为3星。
E: Has a #2% chance to evolve Divine Treasures to 3 stars.

C: 以自身之血为代价。
E: At the cost of my own blood.

C: 宇宙美食学会的部分极端成员认为，吃和饥饿是贪饕命途的原动力，但享用由他人制作的食物乃是异端。他们执意要亲自完成从宰杀到烹饪的全过程、在生死搏杀中锤炼食物的肉质，便为自己打造了这种「热武器」——用于加热的武器，虽然结果往往是食材被火炮烤成一团焦炭。
E: Some radical members of the Universal Culinary Society believe that eating and hunger are the Primum Mobile of the Path of Voracity, but consuming food prepared by others is heresy. Insisting on personally completing the entire process from slaughter to cooking and tenderizing meat through life-or-death combat, they forged these "thermal weapons," which was meant for heating. The outcome, however, often ends up with ingredients being blasted into charcoal.

C: 【事件】【奖励】【遭遇】区域出现2个事件的概率大幅提高。进入上述区域时，有概率丢弃该奇物
E: Greatly increases the chances for 2 Occurrences to happen in Occurrence, Reward, and Encounter Domains. This Curio has a chance to be discarded after entering these domains.

C: 受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: DMG taken increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 易伤
E: Vulnerability

E: Lick... Enkindled Betrayal

E: Lament, Lost Soul

C: 额外火弱点
E: Additional Fire Weakness

C: 黄泉竟是「虚无」的令使…零点任务重于一切，绝不能让她在{NICKNAME}的身边拔刀。
E: So Acheron is an Emanator of the Nihility... The Zero-Point Mission is everything. I can't let her draw her blade anywhere near {NICKNAME}.

C: 人们都已奔赴最后的战场，与黄泉进行道别，然后，将尽头变作起点。
E: Everyone has rushed to the final battlefield. Bid farewell to Acheron, and then, turn the end into a new beginning.

C: 找到流萤
E: Find Firefly

C: 决定美梦的结局
E: Decide the fate of the sweet dream

C: 完成定级赛
E: Complete placement matches

C: 应该是要洗照片……
E: I think she wants to develop photos...

C: 欢迎，想让光线再暗些吗？
E: Welcome. Would you like me to dim the lights more?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>其中一部分，已然遭人窃取。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A part of it has already been stolen.</color>

C: 「将梦中的不可能之事尽收眼底，寻得匹诺康尼之父『钟表匠』的遗产，而后解答：生命因何而沉睡。」
E: "Witness the impossible in the realm of dreams, find the Legacy of the Watchmaker, Father of Penacony, and thus the answer to the question: Why does life slumber."

C: 在那里，你遇见了公司干部砂金，他看似只身赴宴，实际上是为收复失地而来。
E: There, you encountered Aventurine, an IPC executive who appeared to be answering the invitation alone, but was actually there to reclaim lost territory.

C: 这…就是梦？
E: Is this... what dreams are?

C: 她在和谁说话？「死亡」又是……
E: Who's she talking to? And what's this about "Death"...

C: 好久不见，大明星。
E: Long time no see, superstar.

C: （太引人注意，果然不是好事……）
E: (Drawing too much attention is never a good thing...)

C: 「开个玩笑，别紧张」——但哥哥他，从来不会对陌生人开玩笑。
E: "Just kidding, don't be so tense"... but my brother never jokes around with strangers.

C: 要看你态度怎么样…
E: It depends on your attitude...

C: 我给她留了言，如果她能收到，会帮忙引导{NICKNAME}回到这里。
E: I left her a message. If she gets it, she'll help guide {NICKNAME} back here.

C: 哦？你竟然不知道？不考虑立场的话，她可比梦主更加危险。
E: Oh? You don't know? Setting allegiances aside, she's much more dangerous than the Dreammaster.

C: 不过，和其他三位稍有不同。在那之前，我还有其他事需要留心。
E: However, it's a bit different from the other three. Before that, I have other matters that need my attention.

C: 这是「邀请函」最初被交付时残留的记忆…片刻就中断了。那么之后是……
E: This is the residual memory from when the 'invitation' was first delivered... they were abruptly interrupted. Then, what happened next is...

C: 怎可能光华长留？
E: Abide in glory forever?

C: 我一直认为，两个正用匕首死斗的人，互相将刀尖抵住对方脖子的那一刻，要比寻常的舞伴更加亲近。
E: I've always thought that when two people are locked in a knife fight, with their blades pressed to each other's throats, they become more intimate than any pair of dancers.

C: 此后不久，你终于知道了黑天鹅的意图，她与公司进行交易，将你带到了砂金的面前。为了收复匹诺康尼，公司一直在寻找暂时的盟友。
E: Soon after, you finally learned Black Swan's intentions: She made a deal with the IPC to bring you before Aventurine. In order to reclaim Penacony, the IPC had been seeking temporary allies.

C: 也很难说是礼物——愚者将我杀死时，为我戴上了一副假面。
E: Though it's hard to call it a gift. When the Fool killed me, they put a mask on my face.

C: 在「梦主」融汇的十二时刻，我出现了失声的症状，「同谐」的力量也开始衰微。而在流梦礁，我却完全没有受到影响。
E: In the Twelve Hours converged by the Dreammaster, I developed symptoms of losing my voice, and the strength of the Harmony began to wane. Yet in Dreamflux Reef, I wasn't affected at all.

C: 你对忆质相当熟悉，这段记忆是否出于捏造，你应该能够甄别。
E: You're quite familiar with memoria, so you should be able to tell whether this memory is fabricated or not.

C: 不必狡辩了。我带来了星期日先生的口信，足以证明我的身份。
E: Save your excuses. I bring a message from Mr. Sunday that will prove my identity.

C: 对于永火官邸，你不是很感兴趣么？
E: Weren't you really interested in the Ever-Flame Mansion?

C: 这是他向我下达的命令——「让匹诺康尼的午夜枯萎凋零，只留下记忆的坟茔。」
E: This was his command to me: "Make the nights of Penacony crumble and wither, leave nought but a tomb of Remembrance."

C: 哦，说到这里，你应该也感同身受？这位热衷于共舞的女士？
E: Oh, speaking of which, you must know exactly how that feels? My dear lady who loves to dance?

C: 荣光在上！诸位，「恶兆」当前，我们更当戮力同心！请允许我以枪刃证明意志，冲破这片阴霾！
E: Glory above all! My friends, in the face of the Omen of Evil, we must stand united more than ever! Allow me to prove our resolve with my spear and pierce through this darkness!

C: 学得倒快……
E: Someone's a quick learner...

C: …把话说完。
E: ...Please continue.

C: 又岂会容许众星，于白昼之中放光？
E: Moreover, how could I allow other stars to shine during the day?

C: 只因认定
E: For they deem

C: 好破败的景象……
E: What a desolate sight...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#翡翠}基石{RUBY_E#}的解放将会汲取入梦者的「欲望」，给出「存护」的许诺，引领他们如此呼唤——一切献给，琥珀王！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The release of {RUBY_B#Jade}the Cornerstone{RUBY_E#}'s powers will absorb the dreamers' desires and offer them the Preservation's promise instead, guiding them to cry out these words... All for the Amber Lord!</color>

C: 如果你就是梦主的答案，那么，就请你代替他，倾听我的回答——
E: If you are the Dreammaster's answer, then listen to my reply in his stead...

C: 而止步不前的美梦，无法囚禁我们的愿望——
E: A stagnant sweet dream can't imprison our desires...

C: 砂金
E: Aventurine

C: 知更鸟
E: Robin

C: 神力辟世，神力仁爱？诸神，今时此地，尔等只需静听——
E: Did the gods create this world? Do the gods love all beings? O gods, you only need to hold your tongue here and silently harken...

C: 那么，我必须坦诚自己的最后一个谎言。
E: Well then, I must come clean about my final lie.

C: 「他们坐在余烬中画下晨星，最为知晓：极度饥饿之时，群星才会旋转。」
E: "Sitting among the embers, they drew the morning star, knowing best: That only in times of extreme hunger do the stars begin to turn."

C: 你不懂，我有指引线。
E: You don't get it. I've got a quest marker.

C: 我能够告诉你的，只有我们重逢的原因。
E: All I can tell you is why our paths crossed again.

C: 嗯…我想想…该从哪里开始呢……
E: Hmm... let me think... where should we start...

C: （不，趁着她也许还能看见……）
E: (No. While she might still be able to see it...)

C: 英雄之旅可不能操之过急，先去寻找那只已有线索的若虫吧。
E: Let's not rush into the Hero's Journey. First, let's track down that nymph we've got a lead on.

C: 「哎哟，老巴特鲁斯的腰可经不起折腾！」紫色葡萄吐出成吨的利衡币，随后便像风一样消失了。
E: "Ouch, old Bartholos' back can't take this anymore!" The purple grape spits out tons of Balance Coins, then vanishes like the wind.

C: 你用祭刀割开手掌，金色的血液沿指尖滴入湖面。相传，某位古贤曾以自己的单眼为代价，从欧洛尼斯处换取了预言未来的能力。英雄本身就是最好的祭品。
E: You cut your palm with the ritual blade, and golden blood drips from your fingertips into the lake. Legend has it that an ancient sage once traded their own eye to Oronyx in exchange for the power to foresee the future. A hero themselves is the greatest sacrifice.

C: 去年的哀悼月，战争吞噬了你的挚友。士兵们用盾牌带回了他的身体，塞纳托斯已将他阖入手掌。人们推荐你参加今年的焚烧仪式——你应当开始新的生活。
E: In the previous Month of Mourning, war devoured your dearest friend. The soldiers brought back his body atop their shields, and Thanatos has taken him into their palm. People recommend you attend this year's Enkindle Ceremony. It's time for you to begin a new life.

C: 时间来到约定的那天。你拔剑在手，走向如山般高大的强敌，它的青铜面具在阳光照拂下闪耀。公民们纷纷驻足，静观这场史诗级的对决——
E: The promised day has arrived. With your sword in hand, you approach your formidable foe, towering like a mountain, its bronze mask gleaming in the sunlight. Citizens gather around, bearing witness to this epic confrontation...

C: 是啊，只要许愿，星核一定会赐予我无上的伟力！不过，原本屋顶上那么大一枚星核去哪儿了？
E: That's right, if I just make a wish, the Stellaron is sure to grant me unrivaled might! However, where did that huge Stellaron originally perched upon the roof disappear to?

C: 生命花园所有的小奇美拉都会参加这次锦标赛，灰宝能见到不少熟悉的面孔哦。
E: All the Little Chimeras from the Garden of Life will participate in this tournament. You'll get to see many familiar faces there, Grayie.

C: 说过很多遍，别乱用这个词。
E: I've told you many times, don't throw that word around carelessly.

C: 「这局我觉得你能赢！」「奇美拉骑脸怎么输」「这总翻不了吧？」
E: "I think you've got this one!" "Can't lose with a chimera in your face!" "No way they're coming back from this!"

C: 忆者的愿望
E: Memokeeper's Wish

C: 在挑战赛中，玩家可以与熟悉的奇美拉训练家或是其余好友进行对战。
E: In the Challenge Match, players can battle against familiar chimera trainers or other friends.

C: 队伍中出现了我的<color=#f29e38ff>专属奇美拉</color>。
E: My <color=#f29e38ff>exclusive chimera</color> has joined the team.

C: 重受击
E: Hit by Heavy Attack
